Matthew20:5 Wabuya waphuma sekungaba lihola lesithupha* langelesificamunwemunye, wenza njalo." 
Matthew20:6 Kwathi sekungaba lihola letshumi* lanye waphuma, wathola abanye bemi bengenzi lutho, wathi kubo: Limeleni lapha usuku lonke lingenzi lutho?" 
Matthew20:7 Bathi kuye: Ngoba akulamuntu osiqatshileyo. Wathi kubo: Yanini lani esivinini, njalo lizakwemukela lokho okufaneleyo." 
Matthew20:8 Kwathi sekuntambama umninisivini wathi enduneni yakhe: Biza izisebenzi, uzibhadale iholo, uqale ngezokucina kuze kube ngezokuqala." 
Matthew20:9 Kuthe befika aba qatshwa ngehola letshumi lanye ngulowo lalowo wemukela udenariyo. 
Matthew20:10 Njalo sebezile abokuqala bacabanga ukuthi bazakwemukela okungaphezulu; kodwa labo bemukela udenariyo ngamunye. 
Matthew20:11 Kwathi be ye mukela bamsola umninindlu," 
Matthew20:12 besithi: Labo abokucina basebenze ihola elilodwa, kodwa ubalinganise lathi esithwele ubunzima bosuku lokutshisa." 
Matthew20:13 Kodwa ephendula wathi komunye wabo: Mngane, angikoni; kanti kawuvumelananga lami ngodenariyo?" 
Matthew20:14 Thatha okwakho uhambe; ngiyathanda ukumnika lowokucina njengawe. 
Matthew20:15 Kumbe angivunyelwa yini ukwenza engikuthandayo ngezinto zami? Loba ilihlo lakho libi yini, ngoba mina ngilungile?" 
Matthew20:16 Kunjalo-ke abokucina bazakuba ngabokuqala, labokuqala ngabokucina; ngoba banengi ababiziweyo, kodwa balutshwana abakhethiweyo." 
Matthew20:17 Kwathi uJesu esesenyukela eJerusalema wathatha abalitshumi lambili bebodwa besendleleni, wathi kubo:" 
Matthew20:18 Khangelani, senyukela eJerusalema, njalo iNdodana yomuntu izanikelwa kubapristi abakhulu lakubabhali; besebeyilahlela ukufa," 
Matthew20:19 bayinikele kwabezizwe ukuthi ba yi yangise ba yi tshaye ngesiswepu ba yi bethele; njalo ngosuku lwesithathu izabuya ivuke. 
Matthew20:20 Kwasekusiza kuye unina wamadodana kaZebediya kanye lamadodana akhe, waguqa wacela ulutho kuye." 
Matthew20:21 Wasesithi kuye: Ufunani? Wathi kuye: Tshono ukuthi la amadodana ami amabili ahlale, enye ngakwesokunene sakho, lenye ngakwesokhohlo, embusweni wakho." 
Matthew20:22 Kodwa uJesu waphendula wathi: Kalikwazi elikucelayo. Linganatha yini inkezo engizayinatha mina, njalo libhabhathizwe ngobhabhathizo engibhabhathizwa ngalo mina? Bathi kuye: Singa kwenza." 
Matthew20:23 Wasesithi kubo: Ngeqiniso lizayinatha inkezo yami, libhabhathizwe ngobhabhathizo mina engizabhabhathizwa ngalo; kodwa ukuhlala ngakwesokunene sami langakwesokhohlo sami, kayisikho okwami ukuphana ngakho, kodwa kungo kwalabo abakulungiselweyo nguBaba." 
Matthew20:24 Kwathi sebezwile abalitshumi, bathukuthela ngezelamani ezimbili." 
Matthew20:25 Kodwa uJesu wababizela kuye wathi: Liyazi ukuthi ababusi bezizwe bayazibusa ngobulukhuni, lezikhulu zisebenzisa amandla phezu kwazo." 
Matthew20:26 Kodwa akuyikuba njalo phakathi kwenu; kodwa loba ngubani othanda ukuba ngomkhulu phakathi kwenu kabe yisisebenzi senu; 
Matthew20:27 njalo loba ngubani othanda ukuba ngowokuqala phakathi kwenu kabe yisisebenzi senu; 
Matthew20:28 njengalokhu iNdodana yomuntu kayizanga ukukhonzwa, kodwa ukukhonza, lokunika impilo yayo ibe lihlawulo labanengi." 
Matthew20:29 Kwathi bephuma eJeriko, ixuku elikhulu lamlandela." 
Matthew20:30 Njalo khangela, iziphofu ezimbili zihlezi endleleni, sezizwile ukuthi uJesu uyadlula, zamemeza, zathi: Sihawukele, Nkosi, Ndodana kaDavida!" 
Matthew20:31 Ixuku laselizikhuza ukuthi zithule, kodwa zamemeza kakhulu, zisithi: Sihawukele, Nkosi, Ndodana kaDavida!" 
Matthew20:32 UJesu wasesima wazibiza, wathi: Lifuna ukuthi ngilenzeleni?" 
Matthew20:33 Zathi kuye: Nkosi, ukuthi amehlo ethu avuleke." 
Matthew20:34 UJesu esesiba lesihelo wathinta amehlo azo; njalo amehlo azo ahle emukela ukubona, zasezimlandela." 
Matthew21:1 Kwathi-ke sebesondele eJerusalema, sebefikile eBetfage entabeni yeMihlwathi, khona uJesu wathuma abafundi ababili," 
Matthew21:2 wathi kubo: Hambani liye emzaneni okhangelene lani, lizahle libone ubabhemi ekhulekiwe, lethole lilaye; li ba khulule, li ba lethe kimi." 
Matthew21:3 Futhi uba umuntu ekhuluma ulutho kini, lizakuthi: INkosi iyabaswela; njalo uzahle abathumele." 
Matthew21:4 Njalo konke lokhu kwenzeka, ukuze kugcwaliseke okwakhulunywa ngumprofethi, ukuthi:" 
Matthew21:5 Tshelani indodakazi yeSiyoni ukuthi: Khangela, iNkosi yakho iyeza kuwe, imnene igade ubabhemi, lethole inkonyana yenyamazana yokuthwala." 
Matthew21:6 Abafundi bahamba-ke, benza njengalokhu uJesu wayebalayile," 
Matthew21:7 baletha ubabhemi lethole, babeka izembatho zabo phezu kwabo, ba m hlalisa phezu kwazo." 
Matthew21:8 Lenengi lexuku lendlala ezalo izembatho endleleni; labanye bagamula ingatsha zezihlahla, ba z endlala endleleni." 
Matthew21:9 Lamaxuku ayehamba phambili lababelandela bamemeza, besithi: Hosana* kuyo iNdodana kaDavida! Ubusisiwe ozayo ebizweni leNkosi. Hosana kweliphezulu!" 
Matthew21:10 Esengenile eJerusalema umuzi wonke wanyakazela usithi: Ngubani lo? 
Matthew21:11 Amaxuku asesithi: Lo nguJesu umprofethi, oweNazaretha yeGalili." 
Matthew21:12 UJesu wasengena ethempelini likaNkulunkulu, wabaxotsha bonke ababethengisa lababethenga ethempelini, wasegenqula amatafula ababentshintshelana imali, lezihlalo zalabo ababethengisa amajuba." 
Matthew21:13 Wasesithi kubo: Kulotshiwe ukuthi: Indlu yami izabizwa ngokuthi yindlu yomkhuleko; kodwa lina liyenze ubhalu lwabaphangi. 
Matthew21:14 Kwasekufika kuye iziphofu leziqhuli ethempelini; wasezisilisa. 
Matthew21:15 Kodwa abapristi abakhulu lababhali sebebonile izimangaliso azenzayo, labantwana bememeza ethempelini, besithi: Hosana eNdodaneni kaDavida! bathukuthela," 
Matthew21:16 basebesithi kuye: Uyakuzwa lokhu yini abakutshoyo laba? UJesu wasesithi kubo: Yebo; alikaze lifunde yini ukuthi: Emlonyeni wezingane lowabamunyayo uphelelise indumiso? 
Matthew21:17 Wasebatshiya waphuma phandle komuzi esiya eBethani, walala khona." 
Matthew21:18 Kwathi ebuyela emzini ekuseni, walamba;" 
Matthew21:19 kwathi ebona umkhiwa othile endleleni, wasondela kuwo, kodwa katholanga lutho kuwo ngaphandle kwamahlamvu wodwa; wathi kuwo: Kakungabe kusavela isithelo kuwe lanini. Njalo umkhiwa wahle wabuna." 
Matthew21:20 Kwathi bebona lokhu abafundi bakhe bamangala, besithi: Umkhiwa uhle wabuna njani?" 
Matthew21:21 UJesu wasephendula wathi kubo: Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Uba lilokholo, lingathandabuzi, kaliyikwenza lokhu okomkhiwa kuphela, kodwa loba lisithi lakulintaba: Qutshunwa uphoselwe olwandle, kuzakwenzeka." 
Matthew21:22 Njalo konke loba kuyini elikucelayo emkhulekweni, likholwa, lizakwemukela." 
Matthew21:23 Kwathi esengenile ethempelini, abapristi abakhulu labadala besizwe basondela kuye esafundisa, bathi: Izinto lezi uzenza ngaliphi igunya? Njalo ngubani okunike leligunya?" 
Matthew21:24 UJesu wasephendula wathi kubo: Lami ngizalibuza umbuzo ube munye; uba lingitshela lokhu, lami ngizalitshela ukuthi ngenza lezizinto ngaliphi igunya:" 
Matthew21:25 Ubhabhathizo lukaJohane lwavela ngaphi? Ezulwini kumbe ebantwini? Basebezindlisana, besithi: Uba sisithi: Ezulwini, uzakuthi kithi: Pho kalikholwanga kuye ngani?" 
Matthew21:26 Kodwa uba sisithi: Ebantwini, siyesaba ixuku; ngoba bonke bamphatha uJohane njengomprofethi." 
Matthew21:27 Basebemphendula uJesu bathi: Kasazi. Wasesithi kubo: Lami kangilitsheli ukuthi ngenza lezizinto ngaliphi igunya. 
Matthew21:28 Kanti licabangani? Umuntu wayelamadodana amabili; waya kweyokuqala wathi: Mntana mi, hamba, uyesebenza lamuhla esivinini sami." 
Matthew21:29 Kodwa yaphendula yathi: Angifuni. Kodwa emva kwalokho yaphenduka, yahamba." 
Matthew21:30 Wasesiya kweyesibili watsho ngokunjalo. Yona-ke yaphendula yathi: Ngiya hamba, nkosi. Kodwa kayiyanga." 
Matthew21:31 Yiyiphi kulawo amabili eyenza intando kayise? Bathi kuye: Eyokuqala. UJesu wathi kubo: Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Abathelisi lezifebe bayangena embusweni kaNkulunkulu phambi kwenu. 
Matthew21:32 Ngoba uJohane wafika kini ngendlela yokulunga, kalikholwanga kuye; kodwa abathelisi lezifebe bakholwa kuye; kodwa lina seli ku bonile kaliphendukanga emva kwalokho ukuthi likholwe kuye." 
Matthew21:33 Zwanini omunye umfanekiso. Kwakukhona umuntu othile ongumninimuzi, owahlanyela isivini, wasibiyela ngothango, wagebha isikhamelo kuso, wakha umphotshongo, wasiqatshisa kubalimi, waya kwelinye ilizwe." 
Matthew21:34 Kwathi sekusondele isikhathi sezithelo, wathuma inceku zakhe kubalimi, ukuze zemukele izithelo zakhe." 
Matthew21:35 Abalimi basebezibamba inceku zakhe, enye bayitshaya, lenye bayibulala, lenye bayikhanda ngamatshe." 
Matthew21:36 Wabuya wathuma ezinye inceku ezinengi kulezokuqala; basebesenza njalo kulezo. 
Matthew21:37 Ekucineni wasethuma indodana yakhe kubo, esithi: Bazayihlonipha indodana yami." 
Matthew21:38 Kodwa abalimi sebeyibonile indodana bakhulumisana besithi: Le yindlalifa; wozani, siyibulale, njalo sibambe ilifa layo." 
Matthew21:39 Basebeyibamba ba yi phosela ngaphandle kwesivini, ba yi bulala." 
Matthew21:40 Ngakho mhla kufika umninisivini, uzabenzani abalimi labo?" 
Matthew21:41 Bathi kuye: Uzababhubhisa kakubi labo ababi, njalo uzaqatshisa isivini kwabanye abalimi, abazamnika izithelo ngezikhathi zazo." 
Matthew21:42 UJesu wathi kubo: Alikaze lifunde yini emibhalweni ukuthi: Ilitshe abakhi abalalayo, yilo eseliyinhloko yengonsi; lokhu yikwenza kweNkosi; njalo kuyamangalisa emehlweni ethu?" 
Matthew21:43 Ngakho ngithi kini: Lizakwemukwa umbuso kaNkulunkulu, unikwe isizwe esithela izithelo zawo." 
Matthew21:44 Lalowo owela phezu kwalelilitshe uzaphahlazwa; kodwa loba ngubani eliwela phezu kwakhe lizamchoboza. 
Matthew21:45 Kwathi abapristi abakhulu labaFarisi sebezwile imifanekiso yakhe bazi ukuthi ubekhuluma ngabo. 
Matthew21:46 Kwathi sebedinga ukumbamba besaba amaxuku, ngoba ayemphatha njengomprofethi." 
Matthew22:1 UJesu wasephendula wabuya wakhuluma labo ngemifanekiso, wathi:" 
Matthew22:2 Umbuso wamazulu ufananiswa lomuntu oy inkosi, owenzela indodana yakhe idili lomtshado;" 
Matthew22:3 wasethuma inceku zakhe ukuthi zibize abanxusiweyo emtshadweni, kodwa kabavumanga ukubuya." 
Matthew22:4 Wabuya wathuma ezinye inceku, esithi: Batsheleni abanxusiweyo ukuthi: Khangelani, sengilungisile ukudla kwami kwemini, inkabi zami lokunonileyo sekuhlatshiwe, izinto zonke sezilungile; wozani emtshadweni." 
Matthew22:5 Kodwa kabananzanga, bazihambela, omunye ensimini yakhe, omunye ekuthengiselaneni kwakhe;" 
Matthew22:6 abaseleyo basebezibamba inceku zakhe ba zi phatha kubi ba zi bulala. 
Matthew22:7 Kodwa kwathi inkosi ikuzwa lokho yathukuthela, yathuma amabutho ayo yabhubhisa labobabulali, yatshisa umuzi wabo." 
Matthew22:8 Yasisithi encekwini zayo: Umtshado usulungile, kodwa abanxusiweyo bebengafanelanga." 
Matthew22:9 Ngakho yanini emahlanganweni ezindlela, njalo bonke elingabathola, libabizele emtshadweni." 
Matthew22:10 Lezonceku zaseziphuma zaya ezindleleni zabutha bonke ezabatholayo, ababi kanye labalungileyo; indlu yomtshado yasigcwala ngabahleziyo." 
Matthew22:11 Kwathi inkosi ingena ukukhangela ababehlezi ekudleni yabona khona umuntu owayengembathanga isembatho somtshado; 
Matthew22:12 yasisithi kuye: Mngane, ungene njani lapha ungelasembatho somtshado? Kodwa yena waqunywa umlomo." 
Matthew22:13 Inkosi yasisithi ezincekwini: Mbopheni inyawo lezandla, limsuse limphosele emnyameni ongaphandle; lapho kuzakuba khona ukukhala lokugedla amazinyo." 
Matthew22:14 Ngoba banengi ababiziweyo, kodwa balutshwana abakhethiweyo." 
Matthew22:15 Khona-ke abaFarisi basuka, bacebisana ngokuthi bangamthiya njani ekukhulumeni." 
Matthew22:16 Basebethuma kuye abafundi babo kanye labakaHerodi, besithi: Mfundisi, siyazi ukuthi wena uqotho, ufundisa indlela kaNkulunkulu ngeqiniso, kawukhathaleli muntu, ngoba kawunanzi isimo somuntu." 
Matthew22:17 Ngakho sitshele, wena ucabangani? Kuvunyelwe yini ukuthela kuKesari, kumbe hatshi?" 
Matthew22:18 Kodwa uJesu ebazi ububi babo wathi: Bazenzisi, lingilingelani?" 
Matthew22:19 Ngitshengisani imali yokuthela. Basebemlethela udenariyo*. 
Matthew22:20 Wasesithi kubo: Ngokabani lumfanekiso lalumbhalo? 
Matthew22:21 Bathi: NgokaKesari. Wasesithi kubo: Ngakho mnikeni uKesari izinto zikaKesari; loNkulunkulu izinto zikaNkulunkulu. 
Matthew22:22 Kwathi sebezwile bamangala; bamtshiya bahamba. 
Matthew22:23 Ngalolosuku kweza kuye abaSadusi, abathi kakukho ukuvuka kwabafileyo, basebembuza," 
Matthew22:24 besithi: Mfundisi, uMozisi wathi: Uba umuntu esifa engelabantwana, umfowabo uzamthatha umkakhe, amvusele umfowabo inzalo." 
Matthew22:25 Kwakukhona phakathi kwethu izelamani eziyisikhombisa; owokuqala wasethatha umfazi wafa; futhi engelanzalo, watshiya umkakhe kumfowabo." 
Matthew22:26 Kwaba njalo lowesibili, lowesithathu, kwaze kwaba kowesikhombisa." 
Matthew22:27 Kwathi emva kwabo bonke kwafa lomfazi. 
Matthew22:28 Ngakho ekuvukeni kwabafileyo, uzakuba ngumkabani kwabayisikhombisa? Ngoba bonke babelaye." 
Matthew22:29 Kodwa uJesu waphendula wathi kubo: Liduhile, lingayazi imibhalo, loba amandla kaNkulunkulu;" 
Matthew22:30 ngoba ekuvukeni kwabafileyo kabathathani, kabendiswa, kodwa banjengengilosi zikaNkulunkulu ezulwini." 
Matthew22:31 Kodwa mayelana lokuvuka kwabafileyo, kalifundanga yini okwakhulunywa kini nguNkulunkulu, esithi:" 
Matthew22:32 Mina nginguNkulunkulu kaAbrahama, loNkulunkulu kaIsaka, loNkulunkulu kaJakobe? UNkulunkulu kayisuye uNkulunkulu wabafileyo, kodwa owabaphilayo." 
Matthew22:33 Kwathi amaxuku ekuzwa amangala kakhulu ngokufundisa kwakhe. 
Matthew22:34 Kwathi abaFarisi, sebezwile ukuthi uJesu ubaqume umlomo abaSadusi, babuthana ndawonye." 
Matthew22:35 Lomunye wabo, isazumthetho, wa m buza, emlinga, esithi:" 
Matthew22:36 Mfundisi, yiwuphi umlayo omkhulu emthethweni?" 
Matthew22:37 UJesu wasesithi kuye: Wothanda iNkosi uNkulunkulu wakho, ngenhliziyo yakho yonke, langomphefumulo wakho wonke, langengqondo yakho yonke;" 
Matthew22:38 yiwo lowo umlayo owokuqala lomkhulu. 
Matthew22:39 Lowesibili ufanana lawo uthi: Wothanda umakhelwane wakho njengalokhu uzi thanda wena. 
Matthew22:40 Kuleyomilayo emibili kumisiwe umthetho wonke labaprofethi. 
Matthew22:41 Kwathi sebebuthene abaFarisi, uJesu wababuza," 
Matthew22:42 esithi: Licabangani ngoKristu? Uyindodana kabani? Bathi kuye: NgekaDavida. 
Matthew22:43 Wathi kubo: Pho uDavida wambiza njani ekuMoya ngokuthi yiNkosi, esithi:" 
Matthew22:44 INkosi yathi eNkosini yami: Hlala ngakwesokunene sami, ngize ngenze izitha zakho zibe yisenabelo senyawo zakho?" 
Matthew22:45 Ngakho uba uDavida embiza ngokuthi yiNkosi, uyiNdodana yakhe njani?" 
Matthew22:46 Njalo kwakungekho owayengamphendula ilizwi; kusukela ngalolosuku kakwabe kusaba khona umuntu olesibindi sokumbuza. 
Matthew23:1 Khona uJesu wakhuluma emaxukwini lakubafundi bakhe," 
Matthew23:2 esithi: Ababhali labaFarisi bahlezi esihlalweni sikaMozisi; 
Matthew23:3 ngakho konke lokhu abalitshela khona ukuthi likugcine, ku gcineni li kw enze; kodwa lingenzi njengokwemisebenzi yabo, ngoba bayakhuluma bangenzi." 
Matthew23:4 Ngoba bayabopha imithwalo enzima njalo elukhuni ukuthwalwa, ba yi beke emahlombe abantu, kodwa kabafuni ukuyisusa ngomunwe wabo." 
Matthew23:5 Njalo imisebenzi yabo yonke bayenza ukuze babonwe ngabantu; ngoba benza amafilakteriyu* abo abe banzi, njalo bakhulisa intshaka zezembatho zabo;" 
Matthew23:6 bathanda izihlalo zabahloniphekayo ekudleni kwantambama, lezihlalo eziqakathekileyo emasinagogeni," 
Matthew23:7 lokubingelelwa emidangeni, lokubizwa ngabantu ngokuthi: Rabi*, Rabi." 
Matthew23:8 Kodwa lina kalingabizwa ngokuthi Rabi; ngoba munye ongumfundisi wenu, uKristu; njalo lina lonke lingabazalwane." 
Matthew23:9 Futhi lingabizi muntu emhlabeni ngokuthi nguyihlo; ngoba munye onguYihlo, osemazulwini;" 
Matthew23:10 kalingabizwa ngokuthi ling abafundisi; ngoba munye ongumfundisi wenu, uKristu." 
Matthew23:11 Kodwa omkhulu kini uzakuba yinceku yenu. 
Matthew23:12 Lalowo oziphakamisayo, uzathotshiswa; lalowo ozithobayo, uzaphakanyiswa." 
Matthew23:13 Kodwa maye kini, babhali labaFarisi, bazenzisi, ngoba livalela abantu umbuso wamazulu; ngoba kalingeni lina, labangenayo kalibavumeli ukuthi bangene." 
Matthew23:14 Maye kini, babhali labaFarisi, bazenzisi, ngoba lidla izindlu zabafelokazi, langokuzenzisa lenza imikhuleko emide; ngakho lizakwemukela ukulahlwa okukhulu." 
Matthew23:15 Maye kini, babhali labaFarisi, bazenzisi, ngoba libhoda ulwandle lomhlaba ukuthi lenze abe munye ophendukela kumaJuda, kuthi nxa esenziwe njalo, limenze umntwana wesihogo ngokuphindiweyo kulani." 
Matthew23:16 Maye kini, bakhokheli abayiziphofu, abathi: Loba ngubani ofunga ngethempeli, akulutho; kodwa loba ngubani ofunga ngegolide lethempeli, ulomlandu." 
Matthew23:17 Zithutha leziphofu! Ngoba yikuphi okukhulu, igolide, kumbe ithempeli elenza igolide libe ngcwele?" 
Matthew23:18 Njalo: Loba ngubani ofunga ngelathi, akulutho; kodwa loba ngubani ofunga ngomnikelo ophezu kwalo, ulomlandu." 
Matthew23:19 Zithutha leziphofu! Ngoba yikuphi okukhulu, umnikelo, kumbe ilathi elenza umnikelo ube ngcwele?" 
Matthew23:20 Ngakho ofunga ngelathi ufunga ngalo langakho konke okuphezu kwalo; 
Matthew23:21 lofunga ngethempeli ufunga ngalo langaye ohlala kulo; 
Matthew23:22 lofunga ngezulu ufunga ngesihlalo sobukhosi sikaNkulunkulu langaye ohlala phezu kwaso. 
Matthew23:23 Maye kini, babhali labaFarisi, bazenzisi, ngoba lithela ingxenye yetshumi yetswayi leganga ledile* lokumini*; liyekele okunzima komlayo, ukwahlulela lesihawu lokholo; belifanele ukwenza lezizinto, lingaziyekeli lalezo." 
Matthew23:24 Bakhokheli abayiziphofu, likhetha umiyane, kodwa liginye ikamela." 
Matthew23:25 Maye kini, babhali labaFarisi, bazenzisi, ngoba lihlambulula ingaphandle yenkezo leyomganu, kodwa ngaphakathi kugcwele ukuphanga lobuhwaba." 
Matthew23:26 MFarisi oyisiphofu! Hlambulula kuqala ingaphakathi yenkezo leyomganu, ukuze kuhlambuluke lengaphandle yakho." 
Matthew23:27 Maye kini, babhali labaFarisi, bazenzisi, ngoba lifanana lamangcwaba aconjwe aba mhlophe, abonakala emahle ngaphandle, kanti ngaphakathi agcwele amathambo abafileyo lokungcola konke." 
Matthew23:28 Kunjalo lani ngaphandle libonakala ebantwini lilungile, kanti ngaphakathi ligcwele ukuzenzisa lobubi." 
Matthew23:29 Maye kini, babhali labaFarisi, bazenzisi, ngoba lakha amangcwaba abaprofethi, licecise amangcwaba abalungileyo," 
Matthew23:30 lithi: Uba besikhona ensukwini zabobaba bethu, besingayikuhlanganyela labo egazini labaprofethi." 
Matthew23:31 Kunjalo liyazifakazela lina ukuthi lingamadodana alabo ababulala abaprofethi; 
Matthew23:32 lina-ke gcwalisani isilinganiso saboyihlo! 
Matthew23:33 Zinyoka, nzalo yamabululu, lizaphepha njani ukulahlwa kwesihogo?" 
Matthew23:34 Ngakho, khangelani, mina ngithuma kini abaprofethi labahlakaniphileyo lababhali; l abanye babo lizababulala libabethele; l abanye lizabatshaya ngesiswepu emasinagogeni enu libazingele imizi ngemizi;" 
Matthew23:35 ukuze kwehlele phezu kwenu igazi lonke elilungileyo elachithwa emhlabeni, kusukela egazini likaAbela olungileyo, kuze kufike egazini likaZakariya indodana kaBarakiya, elambulala phakathi kwethempeli lelathi." 
Matthew23:36 Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Zonke lezizinto zizakwehlela phezu kwalesisizukulwana. 
Matthew23:37 Jerusalema, Jerusalema, wena obulala abaprofethi njalo obakhanda ngamatshe labo abathunywe kuwe! Bengithanda kangakanani ukubuthela ndawonye abantwana bakho, njengesikhukhukazi sibuthela amatsiyane aso ngaphansi kwempiko, kodwa kalivumanga." 
Matthew23:38 Khangelani, indlu yenu isele kini ilunxiwa." 
Matthew23:39 Ngoba ngithi kini: Kalisoze langibona kusukela khathesi, lize lithi: Ubusisiwe ozayo ebizweni leNkosi." 
Matthew24:1 UJesu wasephuma wasuka ethempelini; basebesondela abafundi bakhe ukumtshengisa izakhiwo zethempeli. 
Matthew24:2 UJesu wasesithi kubo: Kaliziboni yini zonke lezizinto? Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Akusoze kutshiywe lapha ilitshe elilodwa phezu kwelitshe, elingasoze lidilizelwe phansi." 
Matthew24:3 Kwathi esehlezi entabeni yeMihlwathi, abafundi beza kuye bebodwa, bathi: Sitshele, lezizinto zizakuba nini? Lesibonakaliso sokuza kwakho, lesokuphela kwesikhathi sizakuba yini?" 
Matthew24:4 UJesu wasephendula wathi kubo: Qaphelani, kungabi khona oliduhisayo;" 
Matthew24:5 ngoba abanengi bazakuza ngebizo lami, besithi: Mina nginguKristu; futhi baduhise abanengi." 
Matthew24:6 Njalo lizakuzwa ngezimpi lamahungahunga ezimpi; nanzelelani, lingethuki; ngoba konke lokhu kufanele kwenzeke; kodwa ukuphela kakukabi khona." 
Matthew24:7 Ngoba isizwe sizavukela isizwe, lombuso u vuk ele umbuso; njalo kuzakuba khona indlala labomatshayabhuqe bezifo lokuzamazama komhlaba indawo ngendawo;" 
Matthew24:8 kodwa zonke lezizinto ziyikuqala kwemihelo. 
Matthew24:9 Lapho-ke bazalinikela ekuhluphekeni, balibulale; futhi lizazondwa yizizwe zonke ngenxa yebizo lami." 
Matthew24:10 Njalo ngalesosikhathi abanengi bazakhubeka, banikelane, bazondane." 
Matthew24:11 Futhi kuzavuka abaprofethi bamanga abanengi, baduhise abanengi." 
Matthew24:12 Njalo ngenxa yokwanda kobubi, uthando lwabanengi luzaphola;" 
Matthew24:13 kodwa ophikelelayo kuze kube sekupheleni, nguye ozasindiswa." 
Matthew24:14 Njalo lelivangeli lombuso lizatshunyayelwa emhlabeni wonke kube yibufakazi ezizweni zonke; khona-ke kuzafika ukuphela. 
Matthew24:15 Ngakho nxa libona amanyala encithakalo, akhulunywa nguDaniyeli umprofethi, emi endaweni engcwele (obalayo kaqedisise)," 
Matthew24:16 khona labo abaseJudiya kababalekele ezintabeni; 
Matthew24:17 ophezu kophahla lwendlu angehli ukuthatha ulutho endlini yakhe; 
Matthew24:18 losemasimini angabuyeli emuva uku ya thatha izembatho zakhe. 
Matthew24:19 Kodwa maye kwabakhulelweyo labamunyisayo ngalezonsuku! 
Matthew24:20 Kodwa khulekani ukuthi ukubaleka kwenu kungabi sebusika, loba ngesabatha." 
Matthew24:21 Ngoba ngalesosikhathi kuzakuba khona ukuhlupheka okukhulu, okungazanga kube khona kusukela ekuqaleni komhlaba kuze kube khathesi, njalo okungasayikuba khona." 
Matthew24:22 Uba-ke lezonsuku bezingafinyezwanga, bekungesindiswe nyama; kodwa ngenxa yabakhethiweyo lezonsuku zizafinyezwa." 
Matthew24:23 Ngalesosikhathi nxa umuntu esithi kini: Khangelani, nangu uKristu, kumbe nanguya, lingakholwa." 
Matthew24:24 Ngoba kuzavuka okristu bamanga labaprofethi bamanga, benze izibonakaliso ezinkulu lezimangaliso, ukuze kuthi, nxa kungenzeka, baduhise labakhethiweyo." 
Matthew24:25 Khangelani, sengilitshelile ngaphambili." 
Matthew24:26 Ngakho uba bengathi kini: Khangelani, usenkangala, lingaphumi; khangelani, us endlini yensitha, lingakholwa." 
Matthew24:27 Ngoba njengalokhu umbane ubaneka empumalanga ukhanye lentshonalanga, kuzakuba njalo lokufika kweNdodana yomuntu." 
Matthew24:28 Ngoba loba ngaphi lapho okukhona isidumbu, lapho amanqe azakubuthana khona." 
Matthew24:29 Njalo masinyane emva kokuhlupheka kwalezonsuku, ilanga lizafiphazwa, lenyanga kayiyikupha ukukhanya kwayo, lenkanyezi zizakuwa ezulwini, lamandla amazulu azazanyazanyiswa." 
Matthew24:30 Khona-ke sizabonakala ezulwini isibonakaliso seNdodana yomuntu; njalo besezikhala zonke izizwe zomhlaba, sezibona iNdodana yomuntu isiza emayezini ezulu ilamandla lenkazimulo enkulu." 
Matthew24:31 Njalo izathuma izingilosi zayo lokukhala okukhulu kophondo, beseziqoqa abakhethiweyo bayo emimoyeni emine, kusukela emkhawulweni omunye wamazulu kuze kube komunye umkhawulo wawo." 
Matthew24:32 Kodwa fundani umfanekiso emkhiweni; nxa khathesi ugatsha lwawo selusiba buthakathaka, njalo luhlume amahlamvu, liyazi ukuthi ihlobo seliseduze;" 
Matthew24:33 ngokunjalo lani, nxa libona lezizinto zonke, yazini ukuthi kuseduze kuseminyango." 
Matthew24:34 Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Lesisizukulwana asisoze sidlule, kuze kwenzeke zonke lezizinto." 
Matthew24:35 Kuzadlula izulu lomhlaba, kodwa amazwi ami awasoze adlule." 
Matthew24:36 Kodwa lolosuku lehola kakho owaziyo ngalo, ngitsho lezingilosi zemazulwini, ngaphandle kukaBaba kuphela." 
Matthew24:37 Kodwa njengensuku zikaNowa, kuzakuba njalo ukufika kweNdodana yomuntu." 
Matthew24:38 Ngoba njengakulezonsuku ezaziphambili kukazamcolo babesidla benatha, bethatha besendiswa, kwaze kwafika usuku uNowa angena ngalo emkhunjini," 
Matthew24:39 njalo babengazi, kwaze kwafika uzamcolo wasebasusa bonke, kuzakuba njalo lokufika kweNdodana yomuntu." 
Matthew24:40 Ngalesosikhathi kuzakuba khona ababili ensimini; omunye athathwe, lomunye atshiywe;" 
Matthew24:41 kuzakuthi abesifazana ababili bechola elitsheni; omunye athathwe, lomunye atshiywe." 
Matthew24:42 Ngakho lindani, ngoba kalazi ukuthi iNkosi yenu izafika ngaliphi ihola." 
Matthew24:43 Kodwa yazini lokhu, ukuthi uba umninindlu ebewazi umlindo isela elizafika ngawo, ubezalinda, futhi ubengayikuvuma ukuthi indlu yakhe ifohlelwe." 
Matthew24:44 Ngakho lani-ke hlalani lilungile; ngoba ngehola elingalicabangiyo, iNdodana yomuntu izakuza." 
Matthew24:45 Pho ngubani inceku ethembekileyo lehlakaniphileyo, inkosi yayo eyibeke phezu kwabendlu yayo, ukuthi ibanike ukudla ngesikhathi esifaneleyo?" 
Matthew24:46 Ibusisiwe leyonceku, okuzakuthi inkosi yayo nxa ifika izayifica isenza njalo." 
Matthew24:47 Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Izayibeka phezu kwakho konke elakho. 
Matthew24:48 Kodwa nxa leyonceku embi isithi enhliziyweni yayo: Inkosi yami iphuzile ukubuya," 
Matthew24:49 njalo ibisiqala ukutshaya abayizinceku kanye layo, lokudla lokunatha lezidakwa," 
Matthew24:50 inkosi yaleyonceku izafika ngosuku enga yi lindele ngalo, langehola engalaziyo," 
Matthew24:51 izayiquma phakathi, izanika isabelo sayo labazenzisi; kuzakuba khona lapho ukukhala lokugedla amazinyo." 
Matthew25:1 Ngalesosikhathi umbuso wamazulu uzafananiswa lentombi ezilitshumi ezathatha izibane zazo zaphuma ukuhlangabeza umyeni. 
Matthew25:2 Njalo ezinhlanu zazo zazihlakaniphile, lezinhlanu zaziyizithutha." 
Matthew25:3 Eziyizithutha zathatha izibane zazo, kazithathanga amafutha kanye lazo;" 
Matthew25:4 kodwa ezihlakaniphileyo zathatha amafutha ezitsheni kanye lezibane zazo. 
Matthew25:5 Kwathi umyeni esephuzile, zawozela zonke zalala ubuthongo." 
Matthew25:6 Kodwa phakathi kobusuku kwamenyezwa: Khangelani, umyeni uyeza, phumani liyemhlangabeza!" 
Matthew25:7 Zasezivuka lezontombi zonke, zalungisa izibane zazo." 
Matthew25:8 Eziyizithutha zasezisithi kwezihlakaniphileyo: Sipheni okwamafutha enu, ngoba izibane zethu ziyacitsha." 
Matthew25:9 Kodwa ezihlakaniphileyo zaphendula, zathi: Hlezi angaseneli thina lani; kodwa kungcono ukuthi lihambe liye kwabathengisayo lizithengele." 
Matthew25:10 Kwathi zisiyathenga, weza umyeni. Ezasezilungile zasezingena laye emtshadweni, kwasekuvalwa umnyango." 
Matthew25:11 Kwathi emva kwalokho zafika lalezontombi ezinye, zathi: Nkosi, Nkosi, sivulele!" 
Matthew25:12 Kodwa yena waphendula wathi: Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Angilazi lina. 
Matthew25:13 Ngakho lindani, ngoba kalilwazi usuku lehola iNdodana yomuntu efika ngalo." 
Matthew25:14 Ngoba kunjengomuntu owaya kwelinye ilizwe wabiza inceku zakhe, wazinika impahla zakhe;" 
Matthew25:15 kwathi enye wayinika amathalenta* amahlanu, lenye amabili, lenye lalinye, kwaba yileyo laleyo njengamandla ayo; njalo wahle wasuka." 
Matthew25:16 Leyo eyayemukele amathalenta amahlanu yasihamba yathengiselana ngawo, yenza amanye amathalenta amahlanu." 
Matthew25:17 Ngokunjalo laleyo e la mabili, layo yazuza amanye amabili." 
Matthew25:18 Kodwa leyo eyayemukele elilodwa yasuka yagebha emhlabathini yayifihla imali yenkosi yayo. 
Matthew25:19 Kwathi emva kwesikhathi eside inkosi yalezozinceku yafika, yasilandiselana lazo." 
Matthew25:20 Kwasekusiza eyayemukele amathalenta amahlanu yaletha amanye amathalenta amahlanu, yathi: Nkosi, wanginika amathalenta amahlanu; khangela, ngizuzile amanye amathalenta amahlanu phezu kwawo." 
Matthew25:21 Inkosi yayo yasisithi kiyo: Kuhle, nceku elungileyo lethembekileyo, ubuthembekile ezintweni ezinlutshwana, ngizakubeka phezu kwezinengi; ngena entokozweni yenkosi yakho." 
Matthew25:22 Kwasekusiza laleyo eyayemukele amathalenta amabili yathi: Nkosi, wanginika amathalenta amabili; khangela, ngizuzile amanye amathalenta amabili phezu kwawo." 
Matthew25:23 Inkosi yayo yathi kiyo: Kuhle, nceku elungileyo lethembekileyo, ubuthembekile ezintweni ezinlutshwana, ngizakubeka phezu kwezinengi; ngena entokozweni yenkosi yakho." 
Matthew25:24 Kodwa kweza laleyo eyayemukele ithalenta elilodwa yathi: Nkosi, bengikwazi wena ukuthi ungumuntu olukhuni, uvuna lapho ongahlanyelanga khona, njalo ubutha lapho ongahlakazanga khona;" 
Matthew25:25 ngasengisesaba, ngasuka ngalifihla ithalenta lakho emhlabathini; khangela, ulokwakho." 
Matthew25:26 Kodwa inkosi yayo yaphendula yathi kiyo: Nceku embi lelivila, ubusazi ukuthi ngivuna lapho engingahlanyelanga khona, njalo ngibutha lapho engingahlakazanga khona;" 
Matthew25:27 ngakho ngabe ubekile imali yami ebhanga, njalo ekufikeni kwami ngabe ngemukele okwami lenzuzo." 
Matthew25:28 Ngakho mthatheleni ithalenta, li li nike yena olamathalenta alitshumi." 
Matthew25:29 Ngoba wonke olakho uzaphiwa, uzakwengezelelwa; kodwa ongelakho uzathathelwa lalokho alakho." 
Matthew25:30 Laleyonceku engasizi lutho iphoseleni emnyameni ongaphandle; kuzakuba khona lapho ukukhala lokugedla amazinyo. 
Matthew25:31 Njalo nxa isiza iNdodana yomuntu ngobukhosi bayo, lengilosi ezingcwele zonke laye, khona izahlala esihlalweni sobukhosi sodumo lwayo," 
Matthew25:32 kuzabuthelwa phambi kwayo izizwe zonke, njalo izabehlukanisa abanye kwabanye, njengomelusi esehlukanisa izimvu embuzini;" 
Matthew25:33 ibisibeka izimvu ngakwesokunene sayo, kodwa imbuzi ngakwesokhohlo." 
Matthew25:34 Khona-ke iNkosi izakuthi kubo abangakwesokunene sayo: Wozani, lina elibusisiweyo nguBaba, lidle ilifa lombuso eliwulungiselweyo kusukela ekusekelweni komhlaba." 
Matthew25:35 Ngoba ngangilambile, langinika ukudla; ngangomile, langinathisa; ngangingowemzini, langemukela;" 
Matthew25:36 ngangize, langigqokisa; ngangigula, leza ukungibona; ngangisentolongweni, leza kimi." 
Matthew25:37 Khona abalungileyo bezayiphendula, besithi: Nkosi, sakubona nini ulambile, njalo sa ku nika ukudla, kumbe womile, njalo sa ku nathisa?" 
Matthew25:38 Njalo sakubona nini ungowemzini, futhi sa kw emukela, kumbe uze, futhi sa ku gqokisa?" 
Matthew25:39 Njalo sakubona nini ugula, loba usentolongweni, njalo seza kuwe?" 
Matthew25:40 Futhi iNkosi izaphendula ithi kubo: Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Njengoba li kw enzile komunye walaba abazalwane bami abancinyane, li kw enzile kimi." 
Matthew25:41 Ngalesosikhathi izakuthi njalo kubo abangakwesokhohlo: Sukani kimi, lina eliqalekisiweyo, liye emlilweni olaphakade, olungiselwe uSathane lengilosi zakhe." 
Matthew25:42 Ngoba ngangilambile, kodwa kalinginikanga ukudla; ngangomile, kodwa kalinginathisanga;" 
Matthew25:43 ngangingowemzini, kodwa kalingemukelanga; ngangi ze, kodwa kalingigqokisanga; ngangi gula, ngangi sentolongweni, kodwa kalizanga ukungibona." 
Matthew25:44 Khona lalaba bezamphendula, besithi: Nkosi, sakubona nini ulambile, loba womile, loba ungowemzini, loba uze, loba ugula, loba usentolongweni, kodwa kasakusiza?" 
Matthew25:45 Isizabaphendula, ithi: Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Njengoba linga kw enzanga komunye walaba abancinyane, kali kw enzanga lakimi." 
Matthew25:46 Lalaba bazakuya ekujezisweni okulaphakade; kodwa abalungileyo empilweni elaphakade. 
Matthew26:1 Kwasekusithi uJesu eseqedile wonke lamazwi, wathi kubafundi bakhe:" 
Matthew26:2 Liyazi ukuthi emva kwensuku ezimbili kuzakuba liphasika, leNdodana yomuntu izanikelwa ukuze ibethelwe." 
Matthew26:3 Kwasekubuthana abapristi abakhulu lababhali labadala besizwe egumeni lompristi omkhulu othiwa nguKayafasi," 
Matthew26:4 basebecebisana ukuthi bambambe uJesu ngobuqili ba m bulale. 
Matthew26:5 Kodwa bathi: Kungabi ngomkhosi, hlezi kube khona isiphithiphithi ebantwini." 
Matthew26:6 Kwathi uJesu eseBethani endlini kaSimoni umlephero," 
Matthew26:7 kwafika kuye owesifazana ephethe umfuma we-alibasta* ulamagcobo aligugu elikhulu, wase wu thululela ekhanda lakhe ehlezi ekudleni." 
Matthew26:8 Kodwa abafundi bebona lokhu bathukuthela, bathi: Ngokwani ukumotsha lokhu?" 
Matthew26:9 Ngoba la amagcobo angathengiswa ngokunengi, besekunikwa abayanga." 
Matthew26:10 Kodwa uJesu ekwazi wathi kubo: Limhluphelani owesifazana? Ngoba wenzile umsebenzi omuhle kimi; 
Matthew26:11 ngoba abayanga lihlala lilabo, kodwa mina kalihlali lilami." 
Matthew26:12 Ngoba ngokuthululela amagcobo emzimbeni wami, u kw enzele umngcwabo wami." 
Matthew26:13 Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Loba ngaphi emhlabeni wonke lapho okuzatshunyayelwa khona lelivangeli, lalokho akwenzileyo kuzakhulunywa ngakho, kube yisikhumbuzo ngaye." 
Matthew26:14 Omunye wabalitshumi lambili, othiwa nguJudasi Iskariyothi, wasesiya kubapristi abakhulu," 
Matthew26:15 wathi: Lizanginikani, mina-ke ngizamnikela kini? Basebevumelana laye ngenhlamvu zesiliva ezingamatshumi amathathu." 
Matthew26:16 Njalo kusukela lapho wadinga ithuba elihle lokumnikela. 
Matthew26:17 Kwathi ngolokuqala lwesinkwa esingelamvubelo abafundi beza kuJesu, besithi kuye: Uthanda ukuthi sikulungisele ngaphi ukuthi udle iphasika?" 
Matthew26:18 Wasesithi: Hambani liye emzini kusibanibani, lithi kuye: UMfundisi uthi: Isikhathi sami sesiseduze; ngizakwenza iphasika kwakho kanye labafundi bami." 
Matthew26:19 Benza-ke abafundi njengoba uJesu ebalayile, basebelungisa iphasika." 
Matthew26:20 Kwathi ifika intambama wayehlezi labalitshumi lambili. 
Matthew26:21 Bathi besidla wathi: Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Omunye wenu uzanginikela. 
Matthew26:22 Basebedabuka kakhulu baqala ukuthi kuye ngamunye wabo: Nkosi, yimi yini?" 
Matthew26:23 Wasephendula wathi: Ofaka isandla sakhe kanye lami emganwini, nguye ozanginikela." 
Matthew26:24 Sibili iNdodana yomuntu ihamba, njengokulotshiweyo ngayo; kodwa maye kulowomuntu iNdodana yomuntu enikelwa nguye! Bekungakuhle kuye aluba lowomuntu wayengazalwanga." 
Matthew26:25 Wasephendula uJudasi owamnikelayo wathi: Rabi*, yimi yini? Wathi kuye: Utshilo wena." 
Matthew26:26 Kwathi besidla, uJesu wathatha isinkwa, wase si busisa, wa si hlephula wabanika abafundi, wathi: Thathani, lidle; lokhu kungumzimba wami." 
Matthew26:27 Wasethatha inkezo, wabonga, wabanika, esithi: Nathani lonke kuyo;" 
Matthew26:28 ngoba lokhu kuligazi lami, elesivumelwano esitsha, elichithelwa abanengi kukho ukuthethelelwa kwezono." 
Matthew26:29 Kodwa ngithi kini: Kusukela khathesi kangiyikunatha okwalesisithelo sevini, kuze kufike lolosuku lapho ngizasinatha lani sisitsha embusweni kaBaba." 
Matthew26:30 Kwathi sebehlabele ingoma yokudumisa baphuma baya entabeni yeMihlwathi. 
Matthew26:31 UJesu wasesithi kubo: Lina lonke lizakhubeka ngami ngalobubusuku; ngoba kulotshiwe ukuthi: Ngizatshaya umelusi, izimvu zomhlambi besezihlakazeka." 
Matthew26:32 Kodwa emva kokuvuswa kwami, ngizalandulela ukuya eGalili." 
Matthew26:33 Kodwa uPetro waphendula wathi kuye: Lanxa bonke bezakhubeka ngawe, mina angisoze ngikhubeke." 
Matthew26:34 UJesu wathi kuye: Ngiqinisile ngithi kuwe: Ngalobubusuku, lingakakhali iqhude, uzangiphika kathathu." 
Matthew26:35 UPetro wathi kuye: Loba kudingeka ngife lawe, angisoze ngikuphike. Basebesitsho njalo bonke abafundi." 
Matthew26:36 UJesu wasefika labo endaweni ethiwa yiGetsemane, wasesithi kubafundi: Hlalani phansi lapha, ngisayakhuleka laphaya." 
Matthew26:37 Wasethatha kanye laye uPetro lamadodana amabili kaZebediya, waqala ukudabuka lokukhathazeka kakhulu." 
Matthew26:38 Wasesithi kubo: Umphefumulo wami udabukile kakhulu kuze kube sekufeni; hlalani lapha lilinde lami. 
Matthew26:39 Waseqhubeka ibangana, wawa ngobuso bakhe wakhuleka wathi: Baba, uba kungenzeka, kakudlule kimi linkezo; kodwa kungabi njengoba ngithanda mina, kodwa njengoba uthanda wena." 
Matthew26:40 Wasesiza kubafundi, wabafica belele, wathi kuPetro: Kanti belingelinde lami ihola ibenye?" 
Matthew26:41 Lindani likhuleke, ukuze lingangeni ekulingweni; umoya uyavuma, kodwa inyama ibuthakathaka." 
Matthew26:42 Wabuya wasuka ngokwesibili wakhuleka, wathi: Baba, uba inkezo le ingedlule kimi, ngaphandle kokuthi ngiyinathe, kayenziwe intando yakho." 
Matthew26:43 Wasebuya wabafica futhi belele, ngoba amehlo abo ayenzima." 
Matthew26:44 Wasebatshiya wahamba futhi wakhuleka ngokwesithathu, esitsho wona lawomazwi." 
Matthew26:45 Wasesiza kubafundi bakhe, wathi kubo: Qhubekani lilele liphumule; khangelani, isikhathi sesisondele, futhi iNdodana yomuntu iyanikelwa ezandleni zezoni." 
Matthew26:46 Sukumani, sihambe; khangelani, onginikelayo useduze." 
Matthew26:47 Kwathi esakhuluma, khangela, kwafika uJudasi, omunye wabalitshumi lambili, lexuku elikhulu lilaye elilezinkemba lezinduku, livela kubapristi abakhulu labadala besizwe." 
Matthew26:48 Laye omnikelayo wayebanike isiboniso, esithi: Lowo engizamanga, nguye; limbambe." 
Matthew26:49 Njalo wahle wasondela kuJesu wathi: Mpilo enhle, Rabi! Wasemanga." 
Matthew26:50 UJesu wasesithi kuye: Mngane, ulandeni? Basebesondela bamdumela uJesu ngezandla, bambamba." 
Matthew26:51 Futhi khangela, omunye walabo ababeloJesu welula isandla, wakhokha inkemba yakhe, wagadla inceku yompristi omkhulu waquma indlebe yayo." 
Matthew26:52 UJesu wasesithi kuye: Buyisela inkemba yakho endaweni yayo; ngoba bonke ababamba inkemba bazabhubha ngenkemba. 
Matthew26:53 Kumbe ucabanga ukuthi ngingemcele uBaba yini khathesi, futhi anginike amabutho amakhulu ezingilosi edlula itshumi lambili?" 
Matthew26:54 Pho ingagcwaliseka njani imibhalo, ukuthi kumele ukuthi kube njalo?" 
Matthew26:55 Ngalelohola uJesu wathi emaxukwini: Liphume njengokuyamelana lomphangi yini lilezinkemba lezinduku ukuzangibamba? Bengihlezi insuku ngensuku ethempelini ngifundisa, kodwa kalingibambanga." 
Matthew26:56 Kodwa konke lokhu kwenzakele, ukuze kugcwaliseke imibhalo yabaprofethi. Basebemtshiya bonke abafundi babaleka." 
Matthew26:57 Lababembambile uJesu ba m qhuba bamusa kuKayafasi umpristi omkhulu, lapho ababebuthene khona ababhali labadala." 
Matthew26:58 Kodwa uPetro wamlandela ekhatshana, kwaze kwaba segumeni lompristi omkhulu, njalo wangena phakathi wahlala phansi lezinceku, ukuze abone isicino." 
Matthew26:59 Njalo abapristi abakhulu labadala lomphakathi wonke badinga ubufakazi bamanga obumelana loJesu, ukuze bambulale," 
Matthew26:60 kodwa kaba bu tholanga; lanxa kwavela abafakazi abanengi bamanga, aba bu tholanga. Kwathi emva kwalokho kwavela ababili abafakazi bamanga," 
Matthew26:61 bathi: Lo wathi: Ngilakho ukudiliza ithempeli likaNkulunkulu, njalo ngilakhe ngensuku ezintathu." 
Matthew26:62 Kwasekusukuma umpristi omkhulu wathi kuye: Kawuphenduli lutho yini? Bafakazani laba okumelana lawe? 
Matthew26:63 Kodwa uJesu wathula. Umpristi omkhulu wasephendula wathi kuye: Ngikufungisa ngoNkulunkulu ophilayo, ukuthi usitshele ukuthi unguKristu, iNdodana kaNkulunkulu." 
Matthew26:64 UJesu wathi kuye: Utshilo wena. Kodwa ngithi kini: Kusukela khathesi lizabona iNdodana yomuntu ihlezi ngakwesokunene samandla isiza phezu kwamayezi ezulu. 
Matthew26:65 Umpristi omkhulu wasedabula izembatho zakhe, wathi: Usehlambazile; sisadingelani abafakazi? Khangelani, khathesi seliyizwile inhlamba yakhe;" 
Matthew26:66 licabangani? Basebephendula besithi: Ulecala lokufa. 
Matthew26:67 Basebemkhafulela amathe ebusweni bamdutshuza; labanye bamwakala," 
Matthew26:68 bathi: Profetha kithi, Kristu, ngubani okutshayileyo?" 
Matthew26:69 UPetro wayesehlezi ngaphandle egumeni; kwasekusiza kuye incekukazi ethile, yathi: Lawe ubuloJesu weGalili." 
Matthew26:70 Kodwa waphika phambi kwabo bonke, wathi: Kangikwazi lokho okutshoyo." 
Matthew26:71 Kwathi esephuma esiya esangweni, enye incekukazi yambona, yathi kwababekhona: Laye lo ubeloJesu weNazaretha." 
Matthew26:72 Wasebuya ephika ngesifungo esithi: Kangimazi lumuntu. 
Matthew26:73 Kwathi emva kwesikhatshana labo ababemi khona basondela bathi kuPetro: Ngeqiniso lawe ungowabo; ngoba lokukhuluma kwakho kuyakuveza. 
Matthew26:74 Waseqala ukuqalekisa lokufunga esithi: Kangimazi lumuntu. Njalo lahle lakhala iqhude. 
Matthew26:75 UPetro wasekhumbula ilizwi likaJesu esithi kuye: Lingakakhali iqhude, uzangiphika kathathu. Wasephumela ngaphandle wakhala ngokubabayo." 
Matthew27:1 Kwathi sekusile, bonke abapristi abakhulu labadala babantu bacebisana ngoJesu ukuthi bambulale;" 
Matthew27:2 sebembophile ba m qhuba bamnikela kuPontiyusi Pilatu umbusi. 
Matthew27:3 Kwathi uJudasi owamnikelayo esebonile ukuthi ulahliwe, wazisola wabuyisela inhlamvu zesiliva ezingamatshumi amathathu kubapristi abakhulu labadala," 
Matthew27:4 wathi: Ngonile nginikele igazi elingelacala. Kodwa bona bathi: Kulani lathi? Zibonele wena. 
Matthew27:5 Wasephosela inhlamvu zesiliva ethempelini, wasuka; wayaziphanyeka." 
Matthew27:6 Abapristi abakhulu basebethatha inhlamvu zesiliva bathi: Kakuvunyelwa ukuzifaka emnikelweni, ngoba ziyintengo yegazi." 
Matthew27:7 Basebecebisana bathenga ngazo isiqinti sombumbi, sibe ngesokungcwaba abezizwe." 
Matthew27:8 Ngakho lesosiqinti sathiwa yisiqinti segazi, kuze kube lamuhla." 
Matthew27:9 Kwasekugcwaliseka okwakhulunywa ngumprofethi uJeremiya, esithi: Basebethatha inhlamvu zesiliva ezingamatshumi amathathu, intengo yalowo owalinganiswayo, abantwana bakoIsrayeli abamlinganisayo;" 
Matthew27:10 basebebapha zona ngensimu yombumbi, njengoba iNkosi ingilayile." 
Matthew27:11 UJesu wasesima phambi kombusi; umbusi wasembuza, wathi: Wena uyiNkosi yamaJuda yini? UJesu wasesithi: Utshilo wena." 
Matthew27:12 Kwathi nxa esemangalelwe ngabapristi abakhulu labadala, kaphendulanga lutho." 
Matthew27:13 UPilatu wasesithi kuye: Kawuzwa yini izinto ezingaka abazifakaza ngawe? 
Matthew27:14 Kodwa kamphendulanga lakwelilodwa ilizwi, waze wamangala kakhulu umbusi." 
Matthew27:15 Futhi ngomkhosi umbusi wayejwayele ukukhululela ixuku isibotshwa esisodwa, elisifunayo." 
Matthew27:16 Njalo ngalesosikhathi babelesibotshwa esidumileyo, esithiwa nguBarabasi." 
Matthew27:17 Ngakho sebebuthene, uPilatu wathi kubo: Lithanda ukuthi ngilikhululele bani, uBarabasi, kumbe uJesu othiwa nguKristu?" 
Matthew27:18 Ngoba wayekwazi ukuthi bamnikele ngomona. 
Matthew27:19 Kwathi esehlezi esihlalweni sokwahlulela, umkakhe wathumela kuye, wathi: Ungabi landaba lalowo olungileyo; ngoba lamuhla ngihluphekile kakhulu ngaye ephutsheni." 
Matthew27:20 Kodwa abapristi abakhulu labadala bancengana lamaxuku ukuthi acele uBarabasi, ambhubhise uJesu." 
Matthew27:21 Wasephendula umbusi wathi kubo: Lithanda ukuthi ngilikhululele bani kulaba ababili? Basebesithi: UBarabasi. 
Matthew27:22 UPilatu wathi kubo: Pho ngimenzeni uJesu othiwa nguKristu? Bonke bathi kuye: Kabethelwe. 
Matthew27:23 Umbusi wasesithi: Ngoba wenze bubi bani? Kodwa bamemeza kakhulu, bathi: Kabethelwe!" 
Matthew27:24 Kwathi uPilatu esebonile ukuthi kakusizi lutho, kodwa kwasekuqala kulalokhu ukuba lesiphithiphithi, wathatha amanzi, wageza izandla phambi kwexuku, wathi: Angilacala ngegazi lalumuntu olungileyo; ziboneleni lina." 
Matthew27:25 Bonke abantu basebephendula bathi: Igazi lakhe kalibe phezu kwethu laphezu kwabantwana bethu. 
Matthew27:26 Wasebakhululela uBarabasi; kodwa esemtshaye ngesiswepu uJesu wa m nikela ukuthi abethelwe. 
Matthew27:27 Abebutho bombusi basebemngenisa uJesu endlini yombusi, baqoqela kuye ibutho lonke;" 
Matthew27:28 bamhlubula, bamgqokisa isembatho esibomvu," 
Matthew27:29 sebelukile umqhele wameva, bamethesa wona ekhanda, bamphathisa lomhlanga esandleni sakhe sokunene; baguqa phambi kwakhe bamklolodela, bathi: Bayethe, Nkosi yamaJuda!" 
Matthew27:30 Bamkhafulela amathe, bathatha umhlanga, batshaya ikhanda lakhe." 
Matthew27:31 Sebemklolodele, bamhlubula isembatho, bamgqokisa izigqoko zakhe, bamqhuba ukuze ba m bethele." 
Matthew27:32 Kwathi sebephuma, bafica umuntu weKurene, uSimoni ngebizo; bambamba ngamandla lowo ukuthi athwale isiphambano sakhe." 
Matthew27:33 Sebefikile endaweni ethiwa yiGolgotha, okuyikuthi iNdawo yokhakhayi," 
Matthew27:34 bamnika iviniga elixutshaniswe lenyongo ukuze alinathe; kodwa eselizwile kavumanga ukunatha. 
Matthew27:35 Futhi sebembethele, babelana izembatho zakhe, benza inkatho yokuphosa; ukuze kugcwaliseke okwakhulunywa ngumprofethi ukuthi: Babelana izembatho zami, benza inkatho yokuphosa ngesigqoko sami." 
Matthew27:36 Njalo sebehlala phansi bamlinda khona. 
Matthew27:37 Babeka ngaphezu kwekhanda lakhe incwadi yecala lakhe ilotshiwe ukuthi: LO NGUJESU INKOSI YAMAJUDA. 
Matthew27:38 Kwasekubethelwa abaphangi ababili kanye laye, omunye ngakwesokunene lomunye ngakwesokhohlo." 
Matthew27:39 Labadlulayo bamhlambaza, benikina amakhanda abo," 
Matthew27:40 besithi: Wena odiliza ithempeli ulakhe ngensuku ezintathu, zisindise; uba uyiNdodana kaNkulunkulu, yehla esiphambanweni." 
Matthew27:41 Langokunjalo labapristi abakhulu labo bekloloda kanye lababhali labadala bathi: 
Matthew27:42 Wasindisa abanye, yena angezisindise. Uba eyiNkosi yakoIsrayeli, kehle khathesi esiphambanweni, futhi sizamkholwa." 
Matthew27:43 Wathemba kuNkulunkulu; kamkhulule khathesi, uba emthanda. Ngoba wathi: NgiyiNdodana kaNkulunkulu." 
Matthew27:44 Labaphangi ababebethelwe kanye laye bamyangisa ngokufananayo. 
Matthew27:45 Njalo kusukela ngehola lesithupha kwaba lobumnyama emhlabeni wonke kwaze kwaba lihola lesificamunwemunye*; 
Matthew27:46 sekungaba lihola lesificamunwemunye uJesu wamemeza ngelizwi elikhulu, wathi: \Eli, Eli, lama sabaktani?\ Okuyikuthi: Nkulunkulu wami, Nkulunkulu wami, ungitshiyeleni?" 
Matthew27:47 Njalo abanye kwababemi khona besizwa bathi: Lo ubiza uElija. 
Matthew27:48 Njalo omunye wabo wahle wagijima, wathatha uzipho, wa lu gcwalisa ngeviniga, wa lu hloma emhlangeni, wamnika ukuthi anathe." 
Matthew27:49 Kodwa abanye bathi: Yekelani sibone ukuthi uElija uzakuza amsindise. 
Matthew27:50 UJesu wasebuya ememeza ngelizwi elikhulu wanikela umoya. 
Matthew27:51 Futhi khangela, iveyili lethempeli ladatshulwa incezu ezimbili laqala phezulu lisiya phansi; lomhlaba wazamazama; lamadwala aqhekezeka;" 
Matthew27:52 lamangcwaba avuleka; lezidumbu ezinengi zabangcwele abasebelele zavuswa; 
Matthew27:53 sebephumile emangcwabeni emva kokuvuka kwakhe bangena emzini ongcwele, babonakala kwabanengi." 
Matthew27:54 Kwathi induna yekhulu lalabo ababelayo belinde uJesu, sebebonile ukuzamazama komhlaba lezinto ezenzekileyo, besaba kakhulu, bathi: Ngeqiniso lo ubeyiNdodana kaNkulunkulu." 
Matthew27:55 Kwakukhona lapho abesifazana abanengi bebukele bekhatshana, ababemlandele uJesu bevela eGalili, bemncedisa;" 
Matthew27:56 okwakukhona phakathi kwabo oMariya Magadalena, loMariya unina kaJakobe loJose, lonina wamadodana kaZebediya." 
Matthew27:57 Kwathi sekuhlwile, kwafika umuntu onothileyo evela eArimathiya, ibizo lakhe linguJosefa, owayengumfundi kaJesu laye;" 
Matthew27:58 yena waya kuPilatu, wacela isidumbu sikaJesu. UPilatu waselaya ukuthi isidumbu a sinikwe." 
Matthew27:59 UJosefa wasethatha isidumbu wasigoqela ngelembu elicolekileyo elihlambulukileyo," 
Matthew27:60 wasibeka engcwabeni lakhe elitsha, elaligujiwe edwaleni; wasegiqela ilitshe elikhulu emnyango wengcwaba, wahamba." 
Matthew27:61 Futhi kwakukhona lapho uMariya Magadalena, lomunye uMariya, behlezi maqondana lengcwaba." 
Matthew27:62 Langosuku olulandelayo, olulandela olwamalungiselelo, abapristi abakhulu labaFarisi babuthana kuPilatu," 
Matthew27:63 besithi: Nkosi, siyakhumbula ukuthi lowomkhohlisi esaphila wathi: Emva kwensuku ezintathu ngizavuka." 
Matthew27:64 Ngakho laya ukuthi ingcwaba liqiniswe kuze kube lusuku lwesithathu; hlezi abafundi bakhe bafike ebusuku bamebe, besebesithi ebantwini: Uvukile kwabafileyo; kuthi inkohliso yokucina ibembi kuleyokuqala." 
Matthew27:65 UPilatu wasesithi kubo: Lilabalindi; hambani, li li qinise njengokubona kwenu." 
Matthew27:66 Bahamba-ke baliqinisa ingcwaba, beliphawula ilitshe, belabalindi." 
Matthew28:1 Kwathi ekupheleni kwesabatha, emadabukakusa kusiya o sukw ini lokuqala lweviki, kwafika uMariya Magadalena, lomunye uMariya, ukuzabona ingcwaba." 
Matthew28:2 Futhi khangela, kwaba khona ukuzamazama komhlaba okukhulu; ngoba ingilosi yeNkosi yehla ivela ezulwini, yasondela yagiqa ilitshe yalisusa emnyango, yahlala phezu kwalo." 
Matthew28:3 Lokubonakala kwayo kwakunjengombane, lesembatho sayo sasimhlophe njengeliqhwa*." 
Matthew28:4 Abalindi basebethuthumela ngokuyesaba, baba njengabafileyo." 
Matthew28:5 Kodwa ingilosi yaphendula yathi kwabesifazana: Lingesabi lina; ngoba ngiyazi ukuthi lidinga uJesu obebethelwe; 
Matthew28:6 kakho lapha; ngoba uvukile, njengokutsho kwakhe; wozani libone indawo lapho iNkosi ebilele khona." 
Matthew28:7 Hambani masinyane litshele abafundi bakhe ukuthi uvukile kwabafileyo; njalo khangelani, uzalandulela ukuya eGalili; lizambona khona; khangelani, sengilitshelile." 
Matthew28:8 Basebephuma engcwabeni ngokuphangisa belokwesaba lentokozo enkulu, bagijima baya ukubikela abafundi bakhe." 
Matthew28:9 Kwathi besiyatshela abafundi bakhe, futhi khangela, uJesu wabahlangabeza, wathi: Mpilo enhle! Basebesondela babamba inyawo zakhe, bamkhonza." 
Matthew28:10 UJesu wasesithi kubo: Lingesabi; hambani, libikele abafowethu ukuthi baye eGalili, njalo bazangibona khona." 
Matthew28:11 Kwathi sebehamba, khangela, abanye kubalindi baya emzini babikela abapristi abakhulu konke okwenzakeleyo." 
Matthew28:12 Sebebuthene labadala, benza icebo, banika abebutho imali enengi," 
Matthew28:13 besithi: Kalibokuthi: Abafundi bakhe beze ebusuku bameba silele thina. 
Matthew28:14 Futhi uba lokhu kuzwakala kumbusi, thina sizamncenga, silenze lingabi senkathazweni." 
Matthew28:15 Basebethatha imali benza njengalokhu ababekufundisiwe. Lalelilizwi landa phakathi kwamaJuda kuze kube lamuhla. 
Matthew28:16 Kwathi abafundi abalitshumi lanye baya eGalili, entabeni uJesu ayebalayele yona;" 
Matthew28:17 sebembonile bamkhonza; kodwa abanye bathandabuza. 
Matthew28:18 UJesu wasesondela wakhuluma labo, esithi: Wonke amandla aphiwe mina ezulwini lemhlabeni;" 
Matthew28:19 ngakho hambani lenze izizwe zonke zibe ngabafundi, libabhabhathize ebizweni likaYise leleNdodana lelikaMoya oNgcwele;" 
Matthew28:20 libafundise ukugcina konke engililaye khona; futhi khangelani, mina ngilani insuku zonke kuze kube sekupheleni kwesikhathi. Ameni." 
Mark1:1 Ukuqala kwevangeli likaJesu Kristu, iNdodana kaNkulunkulu;" 
Mark1:2 njengokulotshiweyo kubaprofethi ukuthi: Khangela, mina ngiyathuma isithunywa sami phambi kobuso bakho, esizalungisa indlela yakho phambi kwakho." 
Mark1:3 Ilizwi lomemezayo enkangala, lithi: Lungisani indlela yeNkosi; qondisani indledlana zayo." 
Mark1:4 Kwathi uJohane ebhabhathiza enkangala, etshumayela ubhabhathizo lokuphenduka kukho ukuthethelelwa kwezono," 
Mark1:5 kwaphumela kuye ilizwe lonke leJudiya, labo abeJerusalema, basebebhabhathizwa bonke nguye emfuleni iJordani, bevuma izono zabo." 
Mark1:6 Futhi uJohane wayembethe uboya bekamela, elozwezwe lwesikhumba ekhalweni lwakhe, wayesidla intethe loluju lweganga." 
Mark1:7 Watshumayela, esithi: Olamandla kulami uyeza emva kwami, engingafanele ukukhothama ngithukulule umchilo wamanyathela akhe." 
Mark1:8 Mina ngilibhabhathize ngamanzi; kodwa yena uzalibhabhathiza ngoMoya oNgcwele. 
Mark1:9 Kwasekusithi ngalezonsuku kwafika uJesu evela eNazaretha yeGalili, wabhabhathizwa nguJohane eJordani." 
Mark1:10 Wenela ukukhuphuka emanzini, wabona amazulu eqhekezeka, loMoya kungathi lijuba esehlela phezu kwakhe;" 
Mark1:11 kwasekusiza ilizwi livela emazulwini, lathi: Wena uyiNdodana yami ethandekayo, engithokoza ngayo." 
Mark1:12 Njalo uMoya wahle wamqhubela enkangala. 
Mark1:13 Wayekhona-ke lapho enkangala insuku ezingamatshumi amane elingwa nguSathane, wayelezilo, ingilosi zasezimnceda." 
Mark1:14 Kwathi emva kokunikelwa kukaJohane, uJesu wafika eGalili, etshumayela ivangeli lombuso kaNkulunkulu," 
Mark1:15 wasesithi: Isikhathi sigcwalisekile, njalo umbuso kaNkulunkulu ususondele; phendukani, likholwe ivangeli." 
Mark1:16 Kwathi ehambahamba elwandle lweGalili wabona uSimoni loAndreya umfowabo, bephosela imbule olwandle; ngoba babengabagoli benhlanzi." 
Mark1:17 UJesu wasesithi kubo: Ngilandelani, ngizalenza libe ngabagoli babantu." 
Mark1:18 Njalo bahle batshiya amambule abo, bamlandela." 
Mark1:19 Eseqhubeke ibangana esuka lapho, wabona uJakobe okaZebediya, loJohane umfowabo, labo babesemkhunjini belungisa amambule abo." 
Mark1:20 Njalo wahle wababiza; basebetshiya uyise uZebediya emkhunjini leziqatshwa, basuka bamlandela." 
Mark1:21 Basebengena eKapenawume; kwathi ngesabatha wahle wangena esinagogeni, wafundisa." 
Mark1:22 Basebebabaza ngemfundiso yakhe; ngoba wabafundisa njengolamandla, kodwa kungenjengababhali." 
Mark1:23 Futhi kwakukhona esinagogeni labo umuntu owayelomoya ongcolileyo, wasememeza," 
Mark1:24 wathi: Yekela, silani lawe, Jesu weNazaretha? Uze ukusibhubhisa yini? Ngiyakwazi wena ukuthi ungubani: ONgcwele kaNkulunkulu." 
Mark1:25 UJesu wasemkhuza, wathi: Thula, uphume kuye." 
Mark1:26 Futhi umoya ongcolileyo emhlukuluza ekhala ngelizwi elikhulu, waphuma kuye." 
Mark1:27 Basebemangala bonke, baze babuzana, bathi: Kuyini lokhu? Yikufundisa bani okutsha lokhu, ukuthi ngamandla uyalaya labomoya abangcolileyo, futhi bamlalele." 
Mark1:28 Njalo yahle yaphuma indumela yakhe esigabeni sonke seGalili esizingelezeleyo. 
Mark1:29 Njalo bahle baphuma esinagogeni, bangena endlini kaSimoni loAndreya, kanye loJakobe loJohane." 
Mark1:30 Futhi uninazala kaSimoni wayelele eloqhuqho, njalo bahle bamtshela ngaye;" 
Mark1:31 wasesiya kuye, wabamba isandla sakhe wamvusa; futhi uqhuqho lwahle lwamyekela, wabasebenzela." 
Mark1:32 Kwathi sekuhlwile, ilanga selitshona, baletha kuye bonke abagulayo lababengenwe ngamadimoni;" 
Mark1:33 njalo umuzi wonke wawubuthene emnyango. 
Mark1:34 Wasesilisa abanengi ababegula izifo ezitshiyeneyo, wakhupha amadimoni amanengi, kavumelanga amadimoni ukuthi akhulume, ngoba ayemazi." 
Mark1:35 Njalo ekuseni kusesemnyama kakhulu wavuka waphuma, waya endaweni eyinkangala, wakhuleka khona." 
Mark1:36 USimoni lababelaye basebemdingisisa; 
Mark1:37 sebemtholile bathi kuye: Bonke bayakudinga. 
Mark1:38 Wasesithi kubo: Asiye emizini eseduze, ukuze ngitshumayele lakhona; ngoba ngiphumele lokhu." 
Mark1:39 Wasetshumayela emasinagogeni abo kulo lonke eleGalili, ekhupha amadimoni." 
Mark1:40 Kwasekufika kuye umlephero, emncenga eguqa ngamadolo phambi kwakhe, esithi kuye: Aluba uthanda, ungangihlambulula." 
Mark1:41 UJesu wasesiba lesihelo, welula isandla, wamthinta, wathi kuye: Ngiyathanda, hlambuluka;" 
Mark1:42 esekhulumile bahle basuka ubulephero kuye, wahlanjululwa." 
Mark1:43 Wasemlayisisa, wahle wamyekela wahamba," 
Mark1:44 esithi kuye: Khangela ungatsheli muntu ulutho; kodwa hamba, uziveze kumpristi, unikele ngokuhlanjululwa kwakho lokho uMozisi akulayayo, kube yibufakazi kubo." 
Mark1:45 Kodwa yena esephumile waqala ukutshumayela kakhulu walwandisa udaba, kwaze kwathi wayengaselakho ukungena emzini obala, kodwa wayengaphandle ezindaweni ezizinkangala; beza kuye bevela enhlangothini zonke." 
Mark2:1 Esebuye wangena eKapenawume emva kwezinsuku; kwasekuzwakala ukuthi usendlini. 
Mark2:2 Njalo kwahle kwabuthana abanengi, akwazabe kusaba lendawo ya bo, hatshi langasemnyango; wasekhuluma ilizwi kubo." 
Mark2:3 Basebesiza kuye, beletha oyisigoga, ethwelwe ngabane." 
Mark2:4 Babengelakusondela kuye ngenxa yexuku, bavula uphahla lapho ayekhona, bathi sebe lu bhobozile behlisa ithala alele kulo oyisigoga." 
Mark2:5 Njalo uJesu ebona ukholo lwabo wathi koyisigoga: Ndodana, izono zakho uzithethelelwe." 
Mark2:6 Kodwa abanye bababhali ababehlezi lapho, banakana enhliziyweni zabo, bathi:" 
Mark2:7 Ukhulumelani inhlamba enje lo? Ngubani ongathethelela izono ngaphandle koyedwa, uNkulunkulu?" 
Mark2:8 Njalo wahle wakwazi uJesu emoyeni wakhe ukuthi babenakana njalo phakathi kwabo, wathi kubo: Linakanelani izinto lezi enhliziyweni zenu?" 
Mark2:9 Yikuphi okulula, ukuthi koyisigoga: Izono zakho uzithethelelwe, kumbe ukuthi: Sukuma, uthathe icansi lakho, uhambe?" 
Mark2:10 Kodwa ukuze lazi ukuthi iNdodana yomuntu ilamandla okuthethelela izono emhlabeni (wathi koyisigoga): 
Mark2:11 Ngithi kuwe: Sukuma uthathe icansi lakho, uye endlini yakho." 
Mark2:12 Njalo wahle wasukuma, wathatha icansi, waphuma phambi kwabo bonke; baze bamangala bonke, bamdumisa uNkulunkulu, besithi: Kasizange sikubone okunje." 
Mark2:13 Wasebuya esiya elwandle, ixuku lonke laselisiza kuye, wasebafundisa." 
Mark2:14 Esedlula wabona uLevi okaAlfewu ehlezi endlini yokuthelisela, wasesithi kuye: Ngilandela. Wasesukuma wamlandela." 
Mark2:15 Kwasekusithi ehlezi endlini yakhe, labathelisi abanengi lezoni bahlala ekudleni loJesu labafundi bakhe; ngoba babebanengi, bemlandela." 
Mark2:16 Kwathi ababhali labaFarisi, bembona esidla labathelisi lezoni, bathi kubafundi bakhe: Kungani esidla enatha labathelisi lezoni?" 
Mark2:17 Kwathi uJesu esezwile wathi kubo: Abaphilileyo kabadingi melaphi, kodwa abagulayo. Kangizanga ukubiza abalungileyo, kodwa izoni zize ekuphendukeni." 
Mark2:18 Njalo abafundi bakaJohane lababaFarisi babezila ukudla; abantu basebesiza bathi kuye: Kungani abafundi bakaJohane lababaFarisi bezila ukudla, kodwa abafundi bakho bengazili ukudla?" 
Mark2:19 UJesu wasesithi kubo: Abantwana abasendlini yomthimba bangazila yini ukudla, umyeni eselabo? Bangezile, ingqe ngesikhathi umyeni eselabo;" 
Mark2:20 kodwa zizafika insuku lapho umyeni azasuswa kubo, njalo khona bezazila ukudla ngalezonsuku." 
Mark2:21 Futhi kakho othungela isichibi selembu elingakafinyeli esembathweni esidala; uba-ke kungenjalo okubekelweyo kudabuke kiso, okutsha kwesidala, kuqhele ukudabuka." 
Mark2:22 Futhi kakho othela iwayini elitsha emigodleni emidala; uba-ke kungenjalo iwayini elitsha lidabula imigodla, lichitheke iwayini lemigodla yonakale; kodwa iwayini elitsha limele lifakwe emigodleni emitsha." 
Mark2:23 Kwasekusithi edabula emasimini amabele ngesabatha, abafundi bakhe basebeqala ukukha izikhwebu behamba." 
Mark2:24 AbaFarisi basebesithi kuye: Khangela, kungani besenza okungavunyelwayo ngesabatha?" 
Mark2:25 Yena wasesithi kubo: Kalizange libale yini uDavida akwenzayo, mhla eswele, elambile, yena lababelaye?" 
Mark2:26 Ukuthi wayangena njani endlini kaNkulunkulu esikhathini uAbhiyatha engumpristi omkhulu, wadla izinkwa zokubukiswa ezingavunyelwa ukudliwa ngaphandle kwabapristi, wabanika lababelaye?" 
Mark2:27 Wasesithi kubo: Isabatha lenziwa ngenxa yomuntu, njalo umuntu ke nzi wanga ngenxa yesabatha;" 
Mark2:28 ngakho iNdodana yomuntu iyiNkosi leyesabatha. 
Mark3:1 Wasebuya engena esinagogeni, njalo kwakukhona lapho umuntu olesandla esitshwabheneyo." 
Mark3:2 Basebemqaphela ukuthi uzamsilisa ngesabatha, ukuze bambeke icala." 
Mark3:3 Wasesithi kumuntu olesandla esitshwabheneyo: Sukuma uye phakathi. 
Mark3:4 Wathi kubo: Kuvunyelwe yini ngamasabatha ukwenza okulungileyo, kumbe ukwenza okubi? Ukusindisa impilo, kumbe ukubulala? Kodwa bathula." 
Mark3:5 Wasebathalaza ngokuthukuthela, edabukile ngobulukhuni benhliziyo yabo, wathi kumuntu: Yelula isandla sakho. Waselula, isandla sakhe sasesisiliswa saphila njengesinye." 
Mark3:6 Basebephuma abaFarisi bahle bacebisana labakaHerodi bemelane laye, ukuthi bangambulala njani." 
Mark3:7 Kodwa uJesu wasuka wahamba labafundi bakhe ngaselwandle; ixuku elikhulu laselimlandela livela eGalili, leJudiya;" 
Mark3:8 leJerusalema, leIdumiya, langaphetsheya kweJordani, labemimangweni yeTire leSidoni, ixuku elikhulu, selizwile izinto ezinkulu abezenza, leza kuye." 
Mark3:9 Wasetshela abafundi bakhe ukuthi umkolo umlindele ngenxa yexuku, ukuze lingamcindezeli." 
Mark3:10 Ngoba wayesilisa abanengi, baze bawela phezu kwakhe bonke abalezifo, ukuze bamthinte." 
Mark3:11 Futhi omoya abangcolileyo, bembona, babesiwa phansi phambi kwakhe, bekhala besithi: Wena uyiNdodana kaNkulunkulu." 
Mark3:12 Wasebalayisisa kakhulu ukuthi bangamvezi. 
Mark3:13 Wasesenyukela entabeni, wabizela kuye labo ayebafuna yena; basebesiza kuye." 
Mark3:14 Wasemisa abalitshumi lambili, ukuze babe laye, lokuze abathume ukuyatshumayela," 
Mark3:15 futhi babe lamandla okwelapha imikhuhlane, lawokukhupha amadimoni:" 
Mark3:16 LoSimoni wamutha ibizo lokuthi nguPetro; 
Mark3:17 loJakobe okaZebediya, loJohane umfowabo kaJakobe; wabatha amabizo wathi ngoBowanegesi, okuyikuthi, amadodana omdumo;" 
Mark3:18 loAndreya, loFiliphu, loBartolomewu, loMathewu, loTomasi, loJakobe okaAlfewu, loTadewu, loSimoni umKhanani," 
Mark3:19 loJudasi uIskariyothi, laye owamnikelayo. Basebengena endlini." 
Mark3:20 Ixuku laselibuthana futhi, kwaze kwathi bona abasazange benelise lokudla isinkwa." 
Mark3:21 Kwathi abakibo sebezwile lokhu baphuma ukuyambamba; ngoba bathi: Uyahlanya. 
Mark3:22 Lababhali abavela eJerusalema bathi: UloBhelezebhule, lokuthi: Ukhupha amadimoni ngenkosi yamadimoni." 
Mark3:23 Wasebabizela kuye, wathi kubo ngemifanekiso: USathane angakhupha njani uSathane?" 
Mark3:24 Futhi uba umbuso wehlukene umelene lawo ngokwawo, lowombuso ungeme." 
Mark3:25 Lendlu uba yehlukene imelana layo ngokwayo, leyondlu ingeme." 
Mark3:26 LoSathane uba ezivukela yena, ahlukane, angeme, kodwa uyaphela." 
Mark3:27 Kakho ngitsho ongangena endlini yesiqhwaga, aphange impahla yaso, uba engasibophi isiqhwaga kuqala, abesephanga indlu yaso." 
Mark3:28 Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Zonke izono zizathethelelwa kubantwana babantu, lezinhlamba loba ziphi abahlambaza ngazo;" 
Mark3:29 kodwa loba ngubani ohlambaza emelene loMoya oyiNgcwele, kalakuthethelelwa lanini, kodwa ulecala lokulahlwa okulaphakade;" 
Mark3:30 ngoba bathi: Ulomoya ongcolileyo. 
Mark3:31 Kwasekufika abafowabo lonina, bema ngaphandle bathumela kuye, bembiza." 
Mark3:32 Njalo ixuku lalihlezi limphahlile; basebesithi kuye: Khangela, unyoko labafowenu baphandle bayakudinga." 
Mark3:33 Wasebaphendula wathi: Ngubani umama kumbe abafowethu? 
Mark3:34 Wasethalaza labo ababehlezi bemphahlile, wathi: Khangelani umama labafowethu." 
Mark3:35 Ngoba loba ngubani owenza intando kaNkulunkulu, nguye ongumfowethu lodadewethu lomama." 
Mark4:1 Wasebuya waqala ukufundisa ngaselwandle; kwasekubuthana kuye ixuku elikhulu, waze wangena emkhunjini wahlala olwandle; njalo ixuku lonke lalisemhlabathini ngaselwandle." 
Mark4:2 Wasebafundisa izinto ezinengi ngemifanekiso, lekufundiseni kwakhe wathi kubo:" 
Mark4:3 Lalelani; khangelani, kwaphuma umhlanyeli ukuyahlanyela." 
Mark4:4 Kwasekusithi ekuhlanyeleni, enye yawela eceleni kwendlela, kwasekufika inyoni zezulu zayidla zayiqeda." 
Mark4:5 Kodwa enye yawela edwaleni, lapho eyayingelamhlabathi omnengi khona; futhi yahle yamila, ngoba yayingelakutshona komhlabathi;" 
Mark4:6 kwathi ekuphumeni kwelanga yahangulwa yabuna ngoba yayingelampande. 
Mark4:7 Enye yasiwela emeveni, ameva asekhula, ayiminyanisa, futhi ayithelanga isithelo." 
Mark4:8 Njalo enye yawela emhlabathini omuhle; yathela isithelo esakhulayo sanda, yazala enye amatshumi amathathu, lenye amatshumi ayisithupha, lenye ikhulu." 
Mark4:9 Wasesithi kubo: Olendlebe zokuzwa, akezwe." 
Mark4:10 Kwathi eseyedwa, labo ababemphahlile kanye labalitshumi lambili bambuza ngemifanekiso." 
Mark4:11 Wasesithi kubo: Kuphiwe kini ukwazi imfihlo yombuso kaNkulunkulu; kodwa labo abangaphandle benzelwa izinto zonke ngemifanekiso; 
Mark4:12 ukuze bebona babone, bangabonisisi; njalo besizwa bezwe, bangaqedisisi; hlezi loba nini baphenduke, bathethelelwe izono zabo." 
Mark4:13 Wasesithi kubo: Kaliwazi lumfanekiso yini? Pho lizayazi njani imifanekiso yonke? 
Mark4:14 Umhlanyeli uhlanyela ilizwi. 
Mark4:15 Njalo abaseceleni kwendlela, yilabo lapho okuhlanyelwa khona ilizwi, futhi nxa belizwa, uSathane ahle afike alisuse ilizwi elihlanyelwe enhliziyweni zabo." 
Mark4:16 Lalabo ngokunjalo abahlanyelwe edwaleni, abathi, lapho besizwa ilizwi, bahle balemukele ngentokozo," 
Mark4:17 njalo kabalampande phakathi kwabo, kodwa bahlala okwesikhathi; kuthi sekufika inkathazo kumbe ukuzingelwa ngenxa yelizwi, bahle bakhubeke." 
Mark4:18 Lalaba yilabo abahlanyelwe emeveni, abalizwayo ilizwi," 
Mark4:19 kodwa impisekelo yalumhlaba, lenkohliso yenotho, lenkanuko yezinye izinto kungene kuminyanise ilizwi, futhi ibe ingasatheli." 
Mark4:20 Lalaba yilabo abahlanyelwe emhlabathini omuhle, abathi belizwile ilizwi, ba le mukele, bathele, enye amatshumi amathathu, lenye amatshumi ayisithupha, lenye ikhulu." 
Mark4:21 Wasesithi kubo: Kanti isibane silethwa ukuze sibekwe ngaphansi kwesitsha kumbe ngaphansi kombheda? Angithi ukuze sibekwe esiqobaneni sesibane? 
Mark4:22 Ngoba kakukho okufihliweyo okungayikubonakaliswa; akukho okwenzeka kube yimfihlo, kodwa ukuze kube sobala." 
Mark4:23 Nxa umuntu elendlebe zokuzwa akezwe. 
Mark4:24 Wasesithi kubo: Qaphelisani elikuzwayo. Ngesilinganiso elilinganisa ngaso lizalinganiselwa ngaso, njalo lina elizwayo lizaphiwa ngokwengezelelweyo." 
Mark4:25 Ngoba loba ngubani olakho, uzaphiwa; kodwa loba ngubani ongelakho, uzakwemukwa lalokho alakho." 
Mark4:26 Wasesithi: Unjalo umbuso kaNkulunkulu, njengokuba nxa umuntu ephosa inhlanyelo emhlabathini," 
Mark4:27 njalo alale abesevuka ebusuku lemini, lenhlanyelo imile njalo ikhule, yena kakwazi ukuthi njani." 
Mark4:28 Ngoba umhlabathi uyathela ngokwawo, kuqala usungulo, kulandele isikhwebu, kulandele amabele apheleleyo esikhwetshini." 
Mark4:29 Kodwa nxa sesivuthiwe isithelo, uhle athumeze isikela, ngoba ukuvuna sekufikile." 
Mark4:30 Wathi futhi: Sizawufananisa lani umbuso kaNkulunkulu? Kumbe sizawufananisa ngomfanekiso bani? 
Mark4:31 Unjengohlamvu lwemasitedi, oluthi nxa seluhlanyelwe emhlabathini, luncinyane kulazo zonke inhlamvu ezisemhlabeni;" 
Mark4:32 njalo nxa seluhlanyelwe, lukhule, lube lukhulu lwedlule izilimo zonke, lwenze ingatsha ezinkulu, kuze kuthi inyoni zezulu zingakhela ngaphansi komthunzi wazo." 
Mark4:33 Waselikhuluma kubo ilizwi ngemifanekiso eminengi enjalo, njengamandla abo okuzwa;" 
Mark4:34 kodwa ngaphandle komfanekiso kakhulumanga kubo; kodwa sebebodwa wabachasisela abafundi bakhe izinto zonke. 
Mark4:35 Ngalolosuku sekuhlwile, wasesithi kubo: Asichapheleni ngaphetsheya." 
Mark4:36 Sebeyekele ixuku lahamba, bamthatha bahamba laye njengoba enjalo emkhunjini. Futhi leminye imikolo yayilaye." 
Mark4:37 Kwasekuvuka isiphepho esikhulu somoya; lamagagasi aphoseka emkhunjini, waze wagcwala khathesi." 
Mark4:38 Njalo yena wayengemuva emkhunjini elele emqamelweni; basebemvusa, bathi kuye: Mfundisi, kawukhathali yini ukuthi siyabhubha?" 
Mark4:39 Wasevuka wakhuza umoya, wathi kulo ulwandle: Thula, uthi zwi! Umoya wasuqamuka, kwasekusiba khona ukuthula okukhulu." 
Mark4:40 Wasesithi kubo: Kungani lisesaba kangaka? Kalilakholo ngani? 
Mark4:41 Basebesesaba ngokwesaba okukhulu, bathi omunye komunye: Kanti ungubani lo, ukuthi lomoya lolwandle kumlalele?" 
Mark5:1 Basebefika ngaphetsheya kolwandle, elizweni lamaGadarene." 
Mark5:2 Esephumile emkhunjini, wahle wamhlangabeza umuntu ovela emangcwabeni elomoya ongcolileyo," 
Mark5:3 owayehlala emangcwabeni; njalo kwakungelamuntu owayengambopha ngitsho langamaketane," 
Mark5:4 ngoba wayebotshiwe kanengi ngezibopho langamaketane, kodwa amaketane ayeqanyulwa nguye, lezibopho zaqanyuqanyulwa; njalo kwakungekho owayengamthambisa;" 
Mark5:5 langezikhathi zonke, ebusuku lemini, wayesezintabeni lemangcwabeni eklabalala ezisika ngamatshe." 
Mark5:6 Kwathi ebona uJesu ekhatshana, wagijima wamkhonza," 
Mark5:7 wamemeza ngelizwi elikhulu esithi: Ngilani lawe, Jesu, Ndodana kaNkulunkulu oPhezukonke? Ngikufungisa ngoNkulunkulu, ungangihluphi." 
Mark5:8 Ngoba wathi kuye: Phuma emuntwini, moya ongcolileyo." 
Mark5:9 Wasembuza wathi: Ibizo lakho ungubani? Wasephendula, wathi: Ibizo lami nginguLegiyoni, ngoba sibanengi." 
Mark5:10 Wasemncenga kakhulu, ukuthi angabaxotsheli ngaphandle kwelizwe." 
Mark5:11 Kwakukhona lapho ngasezintabeni umhlambi omkhulu wengulube usidla; 
Mark5:12 lamadimoni wonke amncenga, athi: Sithume engulubeni, singene kuzo." 
Mark5:13 Njalo uJesu wahle wawavumela. Omoya abangcolileyo basebephuma bangena ezingulubeni; umhlambi wasuphaphatheka eliweni usiya olwandle; njalo zazingaba zinkulungwane ezimbili; zaminzwa olwandle. 
Mark5:14 Abazelusayo ingulube basebebaleka, bayabika emzini lemaphandleni. Basebephuma ukubona ukuthi kuyini okwenzakeleyo;" 
Mark5:15 bafika kuJesu, bambona obengenwe ngamadimoni ehlezi egqokile eqondile, yena owayelelegiyoni; basebesesaba." 
Mark5:16 Labo ababekubonile babatshela ukuthi kwenzeke njani kowayengenwe ngamadimoni, langengulube." 
Mark5:17 Basebeqala ukumncenga ukuthi asuke elizweni lakibo. 
Mark5:18 Wathi engena emkhunjini, owayengenwe ngamadimoni wamncenga, ukuthi abe laye." 
Mark5:19 Kodwa uJesu kamvumelanga, kodwa wathi kuye: Hamba uye ekhaya kwabakini, ubatshele ukuthi iNkosi ikwenzele okungakanani, ikuhawukele." 
Mark5:20 Wasesuka ehamba waqala ukutshumayela eDikapolisi ukuthi uJesu umenzele okungakanani; basebemangala bonke. 
Mark5:21 UJesu esebuye wachaphela ngaphetsheya ngomkhumbi, kwabuthana kuye ixuku elikhulu, futhi wayengasolwandle." 
Mark5:22 Njalo khangela, kwafika omunye wabaphathi besinagoge, uJayirosi ngebizo; embona, wawa phansi enyaweni zakhe," 
Mark5:23 wamncenga kakhulu, esithi: Indodakazi yami encane isiphela; ngiyakuncenga ukuthi ubuye ubeke izandla phezu kwayo, ukuze isindiswe, njalo izaphila." 
Mark5:24 Wasehamba laye; ixuku elikhulu laselimlandela, lamminyezela." 
Mark5:25 Njalo owesifazana othile owayelomopho wegazi okweminyaka elitshumi lambili," 
Mark5:26 ehluphekile kakhulu kubelaphi abanengi, echithile konke ayelakho, engasizakalanga, kodwa kulokhu kumqinela," 
Mark5:27 esezwile ngoJesu, weza exukwini ngemuva, wathinta isembatho sakhe;" 
Mark5:28 ngoba wathi: Aluba ngithinta izembatho zakhe nje, ngizasindiswa." 
Mark5:29 Futhi wahle woma umthombo wegazi lakhe, wasesizwa emzimbeni ukuthi usilile esifweni." 
Mark5:30 Njalo uJesu wahle wazi phakathi kwakhe ukuthi amandla aphumile kuye, watshibilika esexukwini, wathi: Ngubani othinte izembatho zami?" 
Mark5:31 Abafundi bakhe basebesithi kuye: Uyabona ixuku likuminyezela, kodwa uthi: Ngubani ongithintileyo?" 
Mark5:32 Wasethalaza ukuthi ambone owenze lokhu. 
Mark5:33 Kodwa owesifazana esesaba ethuthumela, ekwazi okwenzekileyo kuye, weza wawa phambi kwakhe, wamtshela iqiniso lonke." 
Mark5:34 Wasesithi kuye: Ndodakazi, ukholo lwakho lukusindisile; hamba ngokuthula, siliswa esifweni sakho." 
Mark5:35 Esakhuluma, kwafika aba nye bomphathi wesinagoge, bathi: Indodakazi yakho isifile; usamkhathazelani uMfundisi?" 
Mark5:36 Kwahle kwathi uJesu esizwa ilizwi elikhulunywayo wathi kumphathi wesinagoge: Ungesabi, kholwa kuphela." 
Mark5:37 Futhi kavumelanga muntu ukuthi amlandele, ngaphandle kukaPetro loJakobe loJohane umfowabo kaJakobe." 
Mark5:38 Bafika-ke endlini yomphathi wesinagoge, wabona isiphithiphithi, labakhalayo labalilayo kakhulu," 
Mark5:39 esengenile wathi kubo: Liphithizelelani, likhala? Umntwana omncane kafanga, kodwa ulele." 
Mark5:40 Basebemhleka usulu. Kodwa yena, esebakhuphile bonke, wathatha uyise womntwana omncane lonina lalabo ababelaye, wangena lapho okwakulele khona umntwana omncane." 
Mark5:41 Wabamba isandla somntwana omncane, wathi kuye: \Thalitha, kumi\; okuyikuthi ngokuphendulelwa: Wena ntombazana encane, ngithi kuwe, vuka." 
Mark5:42 Njalo yahle yavuka intombazana encane, yahamba, ngoba yayileminyaka elitshumi lambili; basebesanganiseka ngokusanganiseka okukhulu." 
Mark5:43 Wasebalayisisa kakhulu ukuthi lokhu kungaziwa muntu; wathi kayinikwe ukudla. 
Mark6:1 Wasesuka lapho, waya emzini wakibo; abafundi bakhe basebemlandela." 
Mark6:2 Sekufike isabatha, waqala ukufundisa esinagogeni; labanengi aba mu zwayo bamangala, bathi: Zivela ngaphi lezizinto kuye? Njalo yinhlakanipho bani ayinikiweyo, ukuthi lalimisebenzi yamandla enje yenziwe ngezandla zakhe?" 
Mark6:3 Lo kayisuye umbazi yini, indodana kaMariya, lomfowabo kaJakobe loJose loJudasi loSimoni? Labodadewabo kabakho yini lapha kithi? Basebekhubeka ngaye." 
Mark6:4 Kodwa uJesu wathi kubo: Umprofethi kasweli ukudunyiswa, ngaphandle kwelizweni lakibo, lezihlotsheni zakhe lendlini yakwabo." 
Mark6:5 Futhi wayengelakho ukwenza lowodwa umsebenzi wamandla lapho, ngaphandle kokubeka izandla phezu kwabagulayo abalutshwana, wa ba silisa." 
Mark6:6 Wasemangala ngokungakholwa kwabo. Wabhodabhoda imizana efundisa. 
Mark6:7 Wasebizela kuye abalitshumi lambili, waqala ukubathuma ngababili, wabanika amandla phezu kwabomoya abangcolileyo." 
Mark6:8 Wabalaya ukuthi bangaphathi lutho lwendlela, ngaphandle kodondolo kuphela; lasikhwama, lamphako, lamali ezwezweni;" 
Mark6:9 kodwa bafake amanyathela; futhi bangembathi izembatho ezimbili. 
Mark6:10 Wasesithi kubo: Lapho elingena khona endlini, hlalani kiyo lize liphume khona." 
Mark6:11 Njalo loba ngobani abangayikulemukela, kumbe balizwe, nxa liphuma lapho, thintithani uthuli olungaphansi kwenyawo zenu kube yibufakazi kubo. Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Kuzakuba lula eSodoma kumbe laseGomora ngosuku lwesigwebo, kulakulowomuzi." 
Mark6:12 Sebephumile batshumayela ukuthi baphenduke; 
Mark6:13 bakhupha amadimoni amanengi, bagcoba abanengi abagulayo ngamagcobo ba ba silisa." 
Mark6:14 Inkosi uHerodi wasesizwa ngakho, ngoba ibizo lakhe laba sobala, wasesithi: UJohane owabhabhathizayo uvukile kwabafileyo, futhi kungakho lamandla esebenza kuye." 
Mark6:15 Abanye bathi: UnguElija; labanye bathi: Ungumprofethi, kumbe u njengomunye wabaprofethi." 
Mark6:16 Kodwa uHerodi esizwa wathi: Lo nguJohane, mina engamquma ikhanda; yena uvukile kwabafileyo." 
Mark6:17 Ngoba yena uHerodi wayethumele wambamba uJohane, wambopha entolongweni, ngenxa kaHerodiyasi umkaFiliphu umfowabo, ngoba wayemthethe." 
Mark6:18 Ngoba uJohane wayethe kuHerodi: Kawuvunyelwa ukuba lomkamfowenu. 
Mark6:19 UHerodiyasi wasembambela inhliziyo, wafuna ukumbulala; kodwa kenelisanga;" 
Mark6:20 ngoba uHerodi wayemesaba uJohane, esazi ukuthi uyindoda elungileyo lengcwele, wamlondoloza; lalapho emuzwa, wenza izinto ezinengi, wamuzwa ngokuthokoza." 
Mark6:21 Kwathi selufikile usuku oluhle, uHerodi ngelanga lakhe lokuzalwa wenzela izikhulu zakhe lenduna zenkulungwane labalisa beGalili ukudla kwantambama," 
Mark6:22 kwathi indodakazi kaHerodiyasi lo isingenile yagida, yamkholisa uHerodi lalabo ababehlezi ekudleni laye, inkosi yathi entombini: Cela kimi loba kuyini okuthandayo, njalo ngizakupha;" 
Mark6:23 wafunga kuyo esithi: Loba kuyini ongakucela kimi, ngizakunika, kuze kube yingxenye yombuso wami." 
Mark6:24 Yasiphuma isithi kunina: Ngizacelani? Yena wasesithi: Ikhanda likaJohane uMbhabhathizi. 
Mark6:25 Njalo yahle yangena enkosini ngokuphangisa, yacela, yathi: Ngifuna ukuthi unginike khathesinje emganwini ikhanda likaJohane uMbhabhathizi." 
Mark6:26 Inkosi yasidabuka kakhulu, kodwa ngenxa yezifungo langalabo ababehlezi layo ekudleni kayithandanga ukuyilandulela." 
Mark6:27 Njalo inkosi yahle yathuma ibutho yalaya ukuthi kulethwe ikhanda lakhe. Wasehamba wamquma ikhanda entolongweni," 
Mark6:28 waletha ikhanda lakhe ngomganu, walinika intombi; intombi yasilinika unina." 
Mark6:29 Kwathi abafundi bakhe sebezwile beza, bathatha isidumbu sakhe, basibeka engcwabeni." 
Mark6:30 Abaphostoli basebebuthana kuJesu, bambikela konke, lababekwenzile kanye lababekufundisile." 
Mark6:31 Wasesithi kubo: Wozani lina lodwa endaweni eyinkangala, liphumule kancinyane. Ngoba babebanengi abafikayo labahambayo, futhi bengelathuba lokudla." 
Mark6:32 Bakhuphuka ngomkhumbi baya endaweni eyinkangala bebodwa. 
Mark6:33 Amaxuku asebabona besuka, labanengi bamazi, bagijimela khona ndawonye ngenyawo bevela emizini yonke, basebebadlula, bahlangana kuye." 
Mark6:34 Kwathi uJesu esephuma wabona ixuku elikhulu, waba lesihelo ngabo, ngoba babenjengezimvu ezingelamelusi; waseqala ukubafundisa izinto ezinengi." 
Mark6:35 Kwathi isikhathi sesihambile, abafundi bakhe beza kuye bathi: Lindawo iyinkangala, lesikhathi sesihambile;" 
Mark6:36 bayekele, ukuze baye ezigabeni ezizingelezeleyo lemizaneni bazithengele izinkwa. Ngoba bengelalutho abangaludla." 
Mark6:37 Wasephendula wathi kubo: Banikeni lina ukuthi badle. Basebesithi kuye: Sihambe yini siyethenga izinkwa ngabodenariyo* abangamakhulu amabili, sibaphe badle?" 
Mark6:38 Wasesithi kubo: Lilezinkwa ezingaki? Hambani liyebona. Sebesazi bathi: Zinhlanu, lenhlanzi ezimbili." 
Mark6:39 Wasebalaya ukuthi babahlalise bonke phansi ngezigaba ngezigaba etshanini obuluhlaza. 
Mark6:40 Basebehlala phansi ngamaviyo ngamaviyo, ngamakhulu langamatshumi amahlanu." 
Mark6:41 Wasethatha izinkwa ezinhlanu lenhlanzi ezimbili, ekhangela phezulu ezulwini, wabonga, wazihlephula izinkwa, wa zi nika abafundi bakhe ukuthi ba zi beke phambi kwabo; lenhlanzi ezimbili wazabela bonke." 
Mark6:42 Basebesidla bonke, basutha." 
Mark6:43 Basebedobha izitsha ezilitshumi lambili ezagcwala imvuthu ezazisele, l okuseleyo kwenhlanzi." 
Mark6:44 Lalabo abadlayo izinkwa, babengaba ngamadoda azinkulungwane ezinhlanu." 
Mark6:45 Njalo wahle wacindezela abafundi bakhe ukuthi bangene emkhunjini, njalo ba m qalele ukuya ngaphetsheya eBethisayida, yena esayekela ixuku lihamba." 
Mark6:46 Esebavalelisile, wasuka waya entabeni ukuyakhuleka." 
Mark6:47 Sekuhlwile, umkhumbi wawuphakathi kolwandle, futhi yena wayeyedwa emhlabathini." 
Mark6:48 Wababona behlupheka kakhulu ekugwedleni, ngoba umoya wawuphambene labo, wasesiza kubo sokungaba yisikhathi somlindo wesine wobusuku, ehamba phezu kolwandle; wasefuna ukubadlula." 
Mark6:49 Sebembonile ehamba phezu kolwandle, basebecabanga ukuthi lithonga, bakhala kakhulu;" 
Mark6:50 ngoba bambona bonke, bethuka. Kodwa wahle wakhuluma labo, wathi kubo: Manini isibindi; yimi, lingesabi." 
Mark6:51 Wasesenyukela kubo emkhunjini, umoya wasuthula; basebesanganiseka kakhulu okwedlula amalawulo ngaphakathi, bamangala." 
Mark6:52 Ngoba babengaqedisisanga ngezinkwa; ngoba inhliziyo yabo yayilukhuni. 
Mark6:53 Kwathi sebechaphile bafika elizweni leGenesaretha, babophela umkhumbi ekhunjini." 
Mark6:54 Bathi sebephumile emkhunjini, bahle bamazi," 
Mark6:55 bagijimela kuso sonke lesosigaba esizingelezeleyo, baqala ukubhoda bethwala abagulayo ngamathala bebasa lapho abebesizwa ukuthi ukhona." 
Mark6:56 Njalo loba ngaphi angena khona emizaneni loba emizini, loba emaphandleni, babeka abagulayo emidangeni, bamncenga ukuthi bathinte umphetho wesembatho sakhe nje; njalo bonke abamthintayo basindiswa." 
Mark7:1 Kwasekubuthana kuye abaFarisi, labanye bababhali, ababevela eJerusalema;" 
Mark7:2 sebebonile ukuthi abanye babafundi bakhe badla izinkwa ngezandla ezingcolileyo, okuyikuthi ezingagezwanga, basola." 
Mark7:3 Ngoba abaFarisi lamaJuda bonke kabadli, ngaphandle kokuthi bagezisise izandla zabo, belondoloza isiko labadala." 
Mark7:4 Nxa be vela emdangeni, kabadli, ngaphandle kokuthi bageze; futhi zikhona ezinye izinto ezinengi abazemukelayo ukuzilondoloza, ukugezisa inkezo lembiza lezitsha zethusi lemibheda." 
Mark7:5 Emva kwalokhu abaFarisi lababhali bambuza bathi: Kungani abafundi bakho bengahambi ngesiko labadala, kodwa badla isinkwa ngezandla ezingahlanjwanga?" 
Mark7:6 Kodwa waphendula wathi kubo: UIsaya waprofetha kuhle ngani lina bazenzisi, njengokulotshiweyo ukuthi: Lesisizwe singidumisa ngezindebe, kodwa inhliziyo yabo ikhatshana lami." 
Mark7:7 Kodwa zingikhonza ngeze, zifundisa izimfundiso eziy imilayo yabantu." 
Mark7:8 Ngoba liyekela umlayo kaNkulunkulu, ligcine isiko labantu, ukugezisa imbiza lenkezo; lezinye izinto ezinengi ezinjalo liyazenza." 
Mark7:9 Wasesithi kubo: Liyekela kuhle umlayo kaNkulunkulu, ukuze lilondoloze isiko lenu." 
Mark7:10 Ngoba uMozisi wathi: Hlonipha uyihlo lonyoko; lokuthi: Othuka uyise kumbe unina kumele afe ukufa; 
Mark7:11 kodwa lina lithi: Aluba umuntu esithi kuyise kumbe kunina: Lokho obungasizwa yimi ngakho, \liKhobane\, okuyikuthi umnikelo kuNkulunkulu;" 
Mark7:12 kalisamvumeli ukwenzela uyise kumbe unina ulutho," 
Mark7:13 lilenza ize ilizwi likaNkulunkulu ngesiko lenu eliliqhubayo; lezinto ezinengi ezinjalo liyazenza. 
Mark7:14 Esebizile kuye ixuku lonke, wathi kilo: Ngilalelani lonke, liqedisise." 
Mark7:15 Kalukho ulutho olungaphandle komuntu olungamngcolisa lungena kuye; kodwa izinto eziphuma kuye, yizo lezo ezingcolisa umuntu." 
Mark7:16 Uba ekhona olendlebe zokuzwa akezwe. 
Mark7:17 Esengenile endlini evela exukwini, abafundi bakhe bambuza ngomfanekiso." 
Mark7:18 Wasesithi kubo: Ngokunjalo lani lingabangelakuqedisisa yini? Kaliqedisisi yini ukuthi konke okungaphandle okungena emuntwini kungemngcolise? 
Mark7:19 Ngoba kakungeni enhliziyweni yakhe, kodwa esiswini; kuphumela ngaphandle, kuhlambulula ukudla konke." 
Mark7:20 Wasesithi: Okuphumayo emuntwini, yikho okungcolisa umuntu." 
Mark7:21 Ngoba kuphuma ngaphakathi enhliziyweni yabantu imicabango emibi, ukuphinga, ukufeba, ukubulala," 
Mark7:22 ukweba, ubuhwaba, ukuxhwala, inkohliso, amanyala, ilihlo elibi, inhlamba, ukuzigqaja, ubuthutha;" 
Mark7:23 zonke lezizinto ezimbi zivela ngaphakathi, zimngcolise umuntu."
