Mark7:24 Wasesukuma lapho waya emikhawulweni yeTire leSidoni. Wangena endlini, engathandi ukuthi umuntu akwazi, kodwa wayengelakufihlakala." 
Mark7:25 Ngoba owesifazana, olentombazana yakhe elomoya ongcolileyo, esezwile ngaye, weza wawa phansi enyaweni zakhe;" 
Mark7:26 njalo owesifazana wayengumGriki, engumSirofenike ngokuzalwa; wasemncenga ukuthi akhuphe idimoni endodakazini yakhe." 
Mark7:27 Kodwa uJesu wathi kuye: Ake kusuthe abantwana kuqala; ngoba kakukuhle ukuthatha isinkwa sabantwana sisiphosele izinjana. 
Mark7:28 Kodwa waphendula wathi kuye: Yebo, Nkosi; kodwa lezinjana ezingaphansi kwetafula ziyadla imvuthuluka yabantwana." 
Mark7:29 Wasesithi kuye: Ngenxa yalokhukutsho hamba-ke; idimoni liphumile endodakazini yakho. 
Mark7:30 Wasesuka waya endlini yakhe, wafica idimoni seliphumile, lendodakazi ilele embhedeni." 
Mark7:31 Wasebuya wasuka emikhawulweni yeTire leSidoni, weza elwandle lweGalili, phakathi kwemikhawulo yeDikapolisi." 
Mark7:32 Basebeletha kuye isacuthe esigagasayo, bamncenga ukuthi abeke isandla sakhe phezu kwaso." 
Mark7:33 Wasesikhupha exukwini saba sodwa, wafaka iminwe yakhe endlebeni zaso, wakhafula wathinta ulimi lwaso," 
Mark7:34 ekhangela phezulu ezulwini, wabubula, wathi kuso: \Efatha\; okuyikuthi: Vulwa!" 
Mark7:35 Njalo zahle zavulwa indlebe zaso; yasithukululwa intambo yolimi lwaso, sasesikhuluma saqonda." 
Mark7:36 Wasebalaya ukuthi bangatsheli muntu; kodwa lanxa wayebalayile kakhulu, kwang’khona bekumemezela ngamandla." 
Mark7:37 Basebemangala kakhulukazi sibili, bathi: Uzenzile kuhle izinto zonke; wenza kokubili izacuthe ukuthi zizwe, lezimungulu ukuthi zikhulume." 
Mark8:1 Ngalezonsuku kwakukhona ixuku elikhulu kakhulu, njalo lalingelakho okokudla, uJesu wabizela kuye abafundi bakhe wathi kubo:" 
Mark8:2 Ngilesihelo ngexuku; ngoba sebehlezi lami insuku ezintathu, bengelalutho lokudla;" 
Mark8:3 njalo uba ngibayekela baye emakhaya abo bengadlanga, bazayatha endleleni; ngoba abanye babo bavela khatshana." 
Mark8:4 Abafundi bakhe basebemphendula bathi: Zingavela ngaphi izinkwa umuntu angasuthisa ngazo laba lapha enkangala? 
Mark8:5 Wasebabuza wathi: Lilezinkwa ezingaki? Basebesithi: Eziyisikhombisa. 
Mark8:6 Waselaya ixuku ukuthi lihlale phansi emhlabathini; wasethatha izinkwa eziyisikhombisa, esebongile wa zi hlephula wa zi nika abafundi bakhe, ukuthi babeke phambi kwabo; basebebeka phambi kwexuku." 
Mark8:7 Njalo babelenhlanzana ezinlutshwana; esebusisile wathi bazibeke lazo phambi kwabo. 
Mark8:8 Basebesidla, basutha; basebedobha imvuthu ezazisele, izitsha eziyisikhombisa." 
Mark8:9 Labasebedlile babengaba zinkulungwane ezine; wasebayekela bahamba. 
Mark8:10 Njalo wahle wangena emkhunjini labafundi bakhe, weza kungxenye zeDalmanutha." 
Mark8:11 AbaFarisi basebephuma, baqala ukuphikisana laye, befunisisa kuye isibonakaliso esivela ezulwini, bemlinga." 
Mark8:12 Wasebubula kakhulu emoyeni wakhe wathi: Lesisizukulwana sidingelani isibonakaliso? Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Qiniso akulasibonakaliso esizanikwa kulesisizukulwana. 
Mark8:13 Wasebatshiya, wangena emkhunjini futhi, wasuka waya ngaphetsheya." 
Mark8:14 Njalo abafundi babekhohliwe ukuthatha izinkwa, bengelalutho emkhunjini ngaphandle kwesinkwa esisodwa." 
Mark8:15 Wasebalaya, wathi: Nanzelelani, liqaphele imvubelo yabaFarisi lemvubelo kaHerodi." 
Mark8:16 Basebezindlisana, besithi: Ngoba kasilazinkwa." 
Mark8:17 UJesu esekwazi wathi kubo: Kungani likhulumisana ngokuthi kalilazinkwa? Kalikaboni, njalo kaliqedisisi yini? Lokhe lilenhliziyo ezilukhuni yini?" 
Mark8:18 Lilamehlo kaliboni yini? Futhi lilendlebe kalizwa yini? Njalo kalikhumbuli yini? 
Mark8:19 Mhla ngahlephulela abazinkulungwane ezinhlanu izinkwa ezinhlanu, ladobha izitsha ezingaki ezigcwele imvuthu? Bathi kuye: Ezilitshumi lambili." 
Mark8:20 Njalo mhla ziyisikhombisa kwabazinkulungwane ezine, ladobha izitsha ezingaki ezigcwele imvuthu? Basebesithi: Eziyisikhombisa." 
Mark8:21 Wasesithi kubo: Yinindaba lingaqedisisi? 
Mark8:22 Wasefika eBethisayida. Basebeletha kuye isiphofu, bamncenga ukuthi asithinte." 
Mark8:23 Wasesibamba isiphofu ngesandla, wasikhuphela ngaphandle komzana; esekhafulele emehlweni aso, wabeka izandla zakhe phezu kwaso, wasibuza ukuthi ngabe sibona ulutho." 
Mark8:24 Sasesikhangela phezulu sathi: Ngibona abantu behambahamba kungathi yizihlahla. 
Mark8:25 Emva kwalokhu wabuya wabeka izandla zakhe phezu kwamehlo aso, wasenza sakhangela phezulu; sasesisiliswa, sabona bonke ngokucacileyo." 
Mark8:26 Wasesithuma endlini yaso, wathi: Ungangeni emzaneni, njalo ungatsheli muntu loyedwa emzaneni." 
Mark8:27 UJesu wasephuma labafundi bakhe baya emizaneni yeKesariya yeFiliphu; besendleleni wababuza abafundi bakhe, wathi kubo: Abantu bathi ngingubani?" 
Mark8:28 Basebephendula bathi: UJohane uMbhabhathizi; labanye: UElija; labanye: Omunye wabaprofethi. 
Mark8:29 Yena wasesithi kubo: Lina-ke lithi ngingubani? UPetro wasephendula wathi kuye: Wena unguKristu. 
Mark8:30 Wasebalayisisa ukuthi bangatsheli muntu ngaye. 
Mark8:31 Waseqala ukubafundisa, ukuthi iNdodana yomuntu imele ukuhlupheka izinto ezinengi, ilahlwe ngabadala labapristi abakhulu lababhali, ibulawe, ibuye ivuke emva kwensuku ezintathu." 
Mark8:32 Waselikhuluma lelilizwi obala. UPetro wasemthatha waqala ukumkhuza. 
Mark8:33 Kodwa etshibilika, wabona abafundi bakhe, wamkhuza uPetro, wathi: Suka ngemva kwami, Sathane; ngoba kawucabangi ngezinto zikaNkulunkulu, kodwa ngezabantu." 
Mark8:34 Kwathi esebizele kuye ixuku kanye labafundi bakhe, wathi kubo: Uba umuntu ethanda ukuza ngemva kwami, kazidele, athathe isiphambano sakhe, angilandele." 
Mark8:35 Ngoba loba ngubani othanda ukusindisa impilo yakhe, izamlahlekela; kodwa loba ngubani olahlekelwa yimpilo yakhe ngenxa yami levangeli, yena uzayisindisa." 
Mark8:36 Ngoba kuzamsizani umuntu, nxa ezuza umhlaba wonke, kodwa alahlekelwe ngumphefumulo wakhe?" 
Mark8:37 Kumbe umuntu uzanikani kube lihlawulo lomphefumulo wakhe? 
Mark8:38 Ngoba loba ngubani olenhloni ngami langamazwi ami kulesisizukulwana esifebayo lesonakeleyo, iNdodana yomuntu layo izakuba lenhloni ngaye, nxa isiza enkazimulweni kaYise kanye lengilosi ezingcwele." 
Mark9:1 Wasesithi kubo: Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Bakhona abanye kwabemiyo lapha, abangasoze bezwe ukufa, baze babone umbuso kaNkulunkulu usufikile ngamandla." 
Mark9:2 Emva kwensuku eziyisithupha uJesu wasethatha uPetro loJakobe loJohane, wasebakhuphulela entabeni ende ebehlukanisa bodwa; waseguqulwa isimo phambi kwabo;" 
Mark9:3 lezembatho zakhe zacwazimula, zaba mhlophe nke njengeliqhwa elikhithikayo, kakulamcoli welembu emhlabeni ongazenza zibe mhlophe kangako." 
Mark9:4 Kwasekubonakala kubo uElija eloMozisi, njalo bekhuluma loJesu." 
Mark9:5 UPetro wasephendula wathi kuJesu: Rabi*, kuhle ukuthi sibe lapha; futhi asakhe amadumba amathathu, elinye ngelakho, lelinye ngelikaMozisi, lelinye ngelikaElija." 
Mark9:6 Ngoba wayengakwazi angakutsho; ngoba babesesaba kakhulu. 
Mark9:7 Kwasekufika iyezi labasibekela; kwaba lelizwi elivela eyezini, lisithi: Lo uyiNdodana yami ethandekayo; zwanini yona." 
Mark9:8 Njalo bahle bathalaza, kababe besabona muntu, kodwa uJesu yedwa elabo." 
Mark9:9 Kwathi besehla entabeni, wabalaya ukuthi bangatsheli muntu izinto abazibonileyo, ize ivuke kwabafileyo iNdodana yomuntu." 
Mark9:10 Njalo bazigcinela lelilizwi, bebuzana ukuthi kutshoni ukuvuka kwabafileyo." 
Mark9:11 Basebembuza, besithi: Batsholoni ababhali ukuthi uElija ufanele ukufika kuqala?" 
Mark9:12 Wasephendula, wathi kubo: UElija ufika kuqala isibili, abuyisele zonke izinto; njalo kubhalwe njani ngeNdodana yomuntu, ukuthi imele ihlupheke izinto ezinengi njalo idelelwe." 
Mark9:13 Kodwa ngitsho kini ukuthi uElija laye sewafika, basebesenza kuye konke abakuthandayo, njengokulotshiweyo ngaye." 
Mark9:14 Kwathi efika kubafundi, wabona ixuku elikhulu libahanqile, lababhali bephikisana labo." 
Mark9:15 Lahle lathi ukumbona ixuku lonke laselimangala, lagijimela ku ye lambingelela." 
Mark9:16 Wasebabuza ababhali wathi: Liphikisana ngani labo? 
Mark9:17 Omunye wexuku wasephendula wathi: Mfundisi, ngilethe kuwe indodana yami, elomoya oyisimungulu;" 
Mark9:18 kuthi loba ngaphi oyibamba khona, uyidabule; ikhihlize amagwebu, igedle amazinyo ayo, yome qha; njalo ngikhulume labafundi bakho ukuthi bawukhuphe, kodwa behluleka." 
Mark9:19 Wasemphendula wathi: O sizukulwana esingelakholo, koze kube nini ngilani? Koze kube nini ngilibekezelela? Iletheni kimi." 
Mark9:20 Basebeyiletha kuye; kwathi umbona, umoya wahle wayihlukuza; yawela emhlabathini, yazigiqagiqa ikhihliza amagwebu." 
Mark9:21 Wasebuza uyise wathi: Kulesikhathi esingakanani, lokhu kwenzeka kiyo? Wasesithi: Kusukela ebuntwaneni." 
Mark9:22 Futhi uyiphosele kanengi emlilweni lemanzini, ukuze uyibhubhise; kodwa nxa kukhona ongakwenza, sihawukele, usisize." 
Mark9:23 UJesu wasesithi kuye: Nxa usenelisa ukukholwa, zonke izinto ziyenzeka kokholwayo." 
Mark9:24 Njalo uyise womntwana wahle wamemeza ngezinyembezi wathi: Ngiyakholwa, Nkosi, siza ukungakholwa kwami." 
Mark9:25 Kwathi uJesu esebona ukuthi ixuku ligijima kanyekanye ndawonye, wakhuza umoya ongcolileyo, esithi kuwo: Wena moya oyisimungulu loyisacuthe, mina ngiyakulaya: Phuma kuye, ungabe usangena kuye." 
Mark9:26 Usumemezile, wayihlukuza kakhulu, waphuma; yasisiba njengofileyo, kwaze kwathi abanengi bathi isifile." 
Mark9:27 Kodwa uJesu wayibamba ngesandla, wayiphakamisa; yasisukuma." 
Mark9:28 Wathi esengenile endlini, abafundi bakhe bambuza bebodwa bathi: Kungani thina sehlulekile ukuwukhupha?" 
Mark9:29 Wasesithi kubo: Loluhlobo lungeke luphume ngalutho, ngaphandle komkhuleko lokuzila ukudla." 
Mark9:30 Basebesuka lapho badabula eGalili; wayengathandi ukuthi loba ngubani akwazi," 
Mark9:31 ngoba wayefundisa abafundi bakhe, esithi kubo: INdodana yomuntu izanikelwa ezandleni zabantu, njalo bazayibulala; isibulewe izavuka ngosuku lwesithathu." 
Mark9:32 Kodwa kabaqedisisanga lumutsho, besaba ukumbuza." 
Mark9:33 Wasefika eKapenawume. Kwathi esendlini wababuza wathi: Beliphikisana ngani endleleni? 
Mark9:34 Kodwa bathula; ngoba endleleni babephikisene ngokuthi ngubani omkhulu. 
Mark9:35 Wasehlala phansi wabiza abalitshumi lambili, wathi kubo: Uba umuntu ethanda ukuba ngowokuqala, uzakuba ngowokucina kubo bonke, lesisebenzi sabo bonke." 
Mark9:36 Wasethatha umntwana omncane, wammisa phakathi kwabo; wamgona, wathi kubo:" 
Mark9:37 Loba ngubani owemukela omunye wabantwana abancane abanje ebizweni lami, wemukela mina; njalo loba ngubani owemukela mina, kemukeli mina, kodwa yena ongithumileyo." 
Mark9:38 UJohane wasemphendula, wathi: Mfundisi, sabona omunye ongasilandeliyo ekhupha amadimoni ngebizo lakho; sasesimenqabela, ngoba engasilandeli." 
Mark9:39 Kodwa uJesu wathi: Lingamenqabeli; ngoba kakho owenza umsebenzi wamandla ebizweni lami, njalo olamandla okukhuluma kubi ngami masinyane;" 
Mark9:40 ngoba ongamelani lathi, ungowethu." 
Mark9:41 Ngoba loba ngubani ozalinathisa inkezo yamanzi ngebizo lami, ngoba lingabakaKristu, ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Kasoze alahlekelwa ngumvuzo wakhe." 
Mark9:42 Futhi loba ngubani okhubekisa omunye walaba abancinyane abakholwa kimi, kungcono kuye ukuthi ilitshe lokuchola ligaxwe entanyeni yakhe, abesephoselwa olwandle." 
Mark9:43 Njalo uba isandla sakho sikukhubekisa, siqume; kungcono kuwe ukungena ekuphileni uyingini, kulokuthi ulezandla ezimbili usuke uye esihogweni, emlilweni ongacitshekiyo," 
Mark9:44 lapho impethu yabo engafi khona, lomlilo ongacitshi khona." 
Mark9:45 Njalo uba unyawo lwakho lukukhubekisa, luqume; kungcono kuwe ukungena ekuphileni uyisiqhwala, kulokuthi ulenyawo ezimbili uphoselwe esihogweni, emlilweni ongacitshekiyo," 
Mark9:46 lapho impethu yabo engafi khona, lomlilo ongacitshi khona." 
Mark9:47 Njalo uba ilihlo lakho likukhubekisa, likhuphe; kungcono kuwe ukungena embusweni kaNkulunkulu ulelihlo elilodwa, kulokuthi ulamehlo amabili uphoselwe esihogweni somlilo," 
Mark9:48 lapho impethu yabo engafi khona, lomlilo ongacitshi khona." 
Mark9:49 Ngoba wonke uzatswaywa ngomlilo; njalo wonke umhlatshelo uzatswaywa ngetswayi. 
Mark9:50 Itswayi lihle; kodwa uba itswayi lingelabutswayi, lizalivuselela ngani? Banini letswayi phakathi kwenu, njalo lihlalisane ngokuthula." 
Mark10:1 Wasesukuma lapho weza emingceleni yeJudiya edabula ngaphetsheya kweJordani; amaxuku asebuya abuthana kuye; wasephinda ukubafundisa, njengokwejwayela kwakhe." 
Mark10:2 Kwasekusiza kuye abaFarisi bambuza ukuthi: Kuvunyelwe yini ukuthi indoda yale umka yo? bemlinga. 
Mark10:3 Wasephendula wathi kubo: UMozisi walilayani? 
Mark10:4 Basebesithi: UMozisi wavuma ukubhala incwadi yesehlukaniso, loku m ala." 
Mark10:5 UJesu wasephendula wathi kubo: Ngenxa yobulukhuni benhliziyo yenu walibhalela lumlayo; 
Mark10:6 kodwa kusukela ekuqaleni kokudaliweyo, uNkulunkulu wabenza owesilisa lowesifazana." 
Mark10:7 Ngenxa yalokhu indoda izatshiya uyise lonina, inamathele kumkayo," 
Mark10:8 njalo labo ababili bazakuba nyamanye. Ngakho kabasebabili, kodwa ba nyamanye." 
Mark10:9 Ngakho lokho uNkulunkulu akuhlanganisileyo, kakungabi lamuntu okwehlukanisayo." 
Mark10:10 Endlini abafundi bakhe basebebuya bembuza ngalokhu. 
Mark10:11 Wasesithi kubo: Loba ngubani owala umkakhe athathe omunye, uyafeba kuye;" 
Mark10:12 lomfazi uba esala indoda yakhe endele kwenye, uyafeba." 
Mark10:13 Basebeletha abantwana abancane kuye ukuze ababambe; kodwa abafundi bakhe babakhuza aba ba lethayo. 
Mark10:14 Kodwa uJesu e ku bona wathukuthela, wathi kubo: Vumelani abantwana abancane beze kimi, lingabenqabeli. Ngoba umbuso kaNkulunkulu ungowabanje." 
Mark10:15 Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Loba ngubani ongemukeli umbuso kaNkulunkulu njengomntwana omncane, kasoze angene kuwo." 
Mark10:16 Njalo ebagona, ebeka izandla zakhe phezu kwabo, wababusisa." 
Mark10:17 Esephumele endleleni, omunye wa m gijimela, eguqa phambi kwakhe wambuza wathi: Mfundisi olungileyo, ngingenzani ukuze ngidle ilifa lempilo elaphakade?" 
Mark10:18 UJesu wasesithi kuye: Ungibizelani ngokuthi olungileyo? Kakho olungileyo, ngaphandle koyedwa, uNkulunkulu." 
Mark10:19 Uyayazi imilayo ethi: Ungafebi, ungabulali, ungebi, ungafakazi amanga, ungadlelezeli, hlonipha uyihlo lonyoko." 
Mark10:20 Wasephendula wathi kuye: Mfundisi, lezizinto zonke ngizigcinile kusukela ebutsheni bami." 
Mark10:21 Njalo uJesu emkhangela wamthanda, wathi kuye: Kunye okusweleyo; hamba, uthengise konke olakho, uphe abayanga, njalo uzakuba lokuligugu ezulwini; njalo uze, uthathe isiphambano, ungilandele." 
Mark10:22 Kodwa edanile ngalelilizwi wasuka wahamba edabukile; ngoba wayelempahla ezinengi. 
Mark10:23 UJesu wasethalaza wathi kubafundi bakhe: Kuzakuba lukhuni kangakanani kwabalenotho ukungena embusweni kaNkulunkulu. 
Mark10:24 Abafundi basebemangala ngamazwi akhe. Kodwa uJesu ephendula futhi wathi kubo: Bantwana, kulukhuni kangakanani kwabathembela enothweni ukungena embusweni kaNkulunkulu;" 
Mark10:25 kulula ukuthi ikamela lithutshe entunjeni yenalithi, kulokuthi umuntu onothileyo angene embusweni kaNkulunkulu." 
Mark10:26 Basebemangala kakhulukazi, bekhulumisana bathi: Pho kungasindiswa bani?" 
Mark10:27 UJesu wasebakhangela wathi: Kubantu kakulakwenzeka, kodwa kaku njalo kuNkulunkulu; ngoba zonke izinto ziyenzeka kuNkulunkulu." 
Mark10:28 UPetro waseqala ukuthi kuye: Khangela, thina sitshiye konke, sakulandela." 
Mark10:29 UJesu wasephendula wathi: Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Kakukho muntu otshiye indlu, kumbe abafowabo, kumbe odadewabo, kumbe uyise, kumbe unina, kumbe umka khe, kumbe abantwana, kumbe amasimu, ngenxa yami levangeli," 
Mark10:30 ongayikwemukela ngokwekhulu khathesi ngalesisikhathi, izindlu labafowabo labodadewabo labonina labantwana lamasimu, kanye lokuzingelwa, lempilo elaphakade esikhathini esizayo." 
Mark10:31 Kodwa abanengi abokuqala bazakuba ngabokucina, labokucina ngabokuqala." 
Mark10:32 Njalo besendleleni benyukela eJerusalema; uJesu wayesehamba phambi kwabo, njalo babemangele, belandela babesesaba. Wasethatha futhi abalitshumi lambili, waqala ukubatshela izinto ezazizamehlela" 
Mark10:33 ukuthi: Khangelani, senyukela eJerusalema, futhi iNdodana yomuntu izanikelwa kubapristi abakhulu lakubabhali, njalo bazayigwebela ukufa, bayinikele kwabezizwe," 
Mark10:34 bazayiyangisa, bayitshaye ngesiswepu, bayikhafulele amathe, bayibulale; njalo ngosuku lwesithathu izabuya ivuke ekufeni." 
Mark10:35 Kwasekusiza kuye uJakobe loJohane, amadodana kaZebediya, besithi: Mfundisi, sithanda ukuthi usenzele loba yini esizayicela." 
Mark10:36 Wasesithi kubo: Lithanda ukuthi ngilenzeleni? 
Mark10:37 Basebesithi kuye: Siphe ukuthi sihlale omunye ngakwesokunene sakho lomunye ngakwesokhohlo sakho ebukhosini bakho. 
Mark10:38 Kodwa uJesu wathi kubo: Kalikwazi elikucelayo. Linganatha yini inkezo engiyinathayo mina, njalo libhabhathizwe ngobhabhathizo engibhabhathizwa ngalo mina?" 
Mark10:39 Basebesithi kuye: Singa kwenza. Kodwa uJesu wathi kubo: Isibili inkezo engiyinathayo mina lizayinatha; lizabhabhathizwa ngobhabhathizo engibhabhathizwa ngalo mina; 
Mark10:40 kodwa ukuhlala ngakwesokunene sami langakwesokhohlo sami kayisikho okwami ukukupha, kodwa kungo kwalabo abakulungiselweyo." 
Mark10:41 Kwathi sebezwile abalitshumi baqala ukuthukuthela ngoJakobe loJohane. 
Mark10:42 Kodwa uJesu wababizela kuye wathi kubo: Liyazi ukuthi labo okuthiwa babusa izizwe bazibusa ngobulukhuni; lezikhulu zazo zisebenzisa amandla phezu kwazo. 
Mark10:43 Kodwa akuyikuba njalo phakathi kwenu; kodwa loba ngubani othanda ukuba ngomkhulu phakathi kwenu, kabe yisisebenzi senu;" 
Mark10:44 njalo loba ngubani othanda ukuba ngowokuqala phakathi kwenu, kabe yisisebenzi sabo bonke." 
Mark10:45 Ngoba leNdodana yomuntu kayizanga ukukhonzwa, kodwa ukukhonza, lokunika impilo yayo ibe lihlawulo labanengi." 
Mark10:46 Basebefika eJeriko; kwathi esephuma eJeriko, labafundi bakhe, lexuku elikhulu, indodana kaTimewu, uBartimewu oyisiphofu wayehlezi endleleni ephanza." 
Mark10:47 Kwathi esezwile ukuthi nguJesu weNazaretha, waqala ukumemeza lokuthi: Jesu Ndodana kaDavida, akungihawukele!" 
Mark10:48 Abanengi basebemkhuza ukuthi athule; kodwa wamemeza kakhulukazi, esithi: Ndodana kaDavida, akungihawukele!" 
Mark10:49 UJesu esima wasesithi kabizwe; basebesibiza isiphofu, besithi kuso: Mana isibindi; sukuma, uyakubiza." 
Mark10:50 Sasesilahla isembatho saso sasukuma seza kuJesu. 
Mark10:51 UJesu wasephendula wathi kuso: Ufuna ukuthi ngikwenzeleni? Isiphofu sasesisithi kuye: Raboni*, ukuthi ngemukele ukubona." 
Mark10:52 UJesu wasesithi kuso: Hamba; ukholo lwakho lukusindisile. Njalo sahle semukela ukubona, salandela uJesu endleleni." 
Mark11:1 Kwathi besondela eJerusalema, eBetfage leBethani, entabeni yeMihlwathi, wathuma ababili kubafundi bakhe," 
Mark11:2 wathi kubo: Hambani liye emzaneni okhangelene lani; lizahle lithi lingena kuwo lifice ithole likababhemi likhulekiwe, okungazange kuhlale kulo umuntu; lilikhulule li li lethe." 
Mark11:3 Njalo uba umuntu esithi kini: Likwenzelani lokhu? Lithi: INkosi iyaliswela; njalo uzahle alithumele lapha. 
Mark11:4 Bahamba-ke bafica ithole likhulekiwe lisesangweni ngaphandle, endleleni; basebelikhulula." 
Mark11:5 Labanye kwababemi khona bathi kubo: Lenzani likhulula ithole? 
Mark11:6 Basebesitsho kubo njengoba uJesu elayile; basebebayekela bahamba. 
Mark11:7 Basebeliletha ithole kuJesu, baphosela izembatho zabo phezu kwalo, wasehlala phezu kwalo." 
Mark11:8 Labanengi bendlala izembatho zabo endleleni; labanye bagamula izingatsha lamahlamvu ezihlahleni, bakwendlala endleleni." 
Mark11:9 Lalabo ababehamba phambili lababelandela bamemeza, besithi: Hosana*! Ubusisiwe ozayo ebizweni leNkosi;" 
Mark11:10 ubusisiwe umbuso kababa wethu uDavida, ozayo ebizweni leNkosi. Hosana kweliphezulu!" 
Mark11:11 UJesu wasengena eJerusalema, lethempelini; wathi esekhangele izinto zonke jikelele, sekuhlwile, waphuma waya eBethani labalitshumi lambili." 
Mark11:12 Lakusisa bephuma eBethani, walamba." 
Mark11:13 Ebona umkhiwa ukhatshana, ulamahlamvu, wasondela ukuthi mhlawumbe angathola ulutho kuwo; njalo efika kuwo, katholanga lutho ngaphandle kwamahlamvu; ngoba kwakungesiso isikhathi somkhiwa." 
Mark11:14 UJesu ekhuluma wathi kuwo: Kakungabi kusadla muntu isithelo kuwe kuze kube nininini. Labafundi bakhe ba ku zwa. 
Mark11:15 Basebefika eJerusalema; uJesu wasengena ethempelini waqala ukuxotsha labo ababethengisa lababethenga ethempelini; wasegenqula amatafula ababentshintshelana imali, lezihlalo zalabo ababethengisa amajuba;" 
Mark11:16 wayengavumeli ukuthi umuntu athwale impahla adabule ethempelini. 
Mark11:17 Wasefundisa, wathi kubo: Kakulotshiwe yini ukuthi: Indlu yami izabizwa ngokuthi yindlu yomkhuleko yezizwe zonke? Kodwa lina seliyenze ubhalu lwabaphangi." 
Mark11:18 Ababhali labapristi abakhulu basebe ku zwa, badinga ukuthi bangambulala njani; ngoba babemesaba, ngoba lonke ixuku lamangala kakhulu ngokufundisa kwakhe." 
Mark11:19 Sekusihlwa, waphuma phandle komuzi." 
Mark11:20 Ekuseni kakhulu besedlula, babona umkhiwa womile kusukela empandeni." 
Mark11:21 UPetro wasekhumbula wathi kuye: Rabi*, khangela, umkhiwa owuqalekisileyo womile." 
Mark11:22 UJesu wasephendula wathi kubo: Banini lokholo kuNkulunkulu. 
Mark11:23 Ngoba ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Loba ngubani ozakuthi kulintaba: Phakanyiswa, uphoselwe olwandle; njalo engathandabuzi enhliziyweni yakhe, kodwa ekholwa ukuthi akutshoyo kuyenzeka, kuzakwenzeka kuye loba yini akutshoyo." 
Mark11:24 Ngakho ngithi kini: Konke loba yini elikucelayo likhuleka, kholwani ukuthi liyakwemukela, njalo lizakuba layo." 
Mark11:25 Njalo nxa limi likhuleka, thethelelani uba lilolutho olumelana lomuntu; ukuze uYihlo osemazulwini laye alithethelele iziphambeko zenu." 
Mark11:26 Kodwa uba lina lingathetheleli, loYihlo osemazulwini kayikulithethelela iziphambeko zenu." 
Mark11:27 Basebebuya bafika eJerusalema; kwathi ehambahamba ethempelini, abapristi abakhulu lababhali labadala beza kuye," 
Mark11:28 bathi kuye: Izinto lezi uzenza ngaliphi igunya; njalo ngubani okunike leligunya lokuthi wenze lezizinto? 
Mark11:29 UJesu wasephendula wathi kubo: Lami ngizalibuza umbuzo ube munye, njalo lingiphendule, khona ngizalitshela ukuthi ngenza lezizinto ngaliphi igunya." 
Mark11:30 Ubhabhathizo lukaJohane lwavela ezulwini, kumbe ebantwini? Ngiphendulani." 
Mark11:31 Basebezindlisana, besithi: Uba sisithi: Ezulwini, uzakuthi: Pho kalikholwanga kuye ngani?" 
Mark11:32 Kodwa uba sisithi: Ebantwini; besaba abantu; ngoba bonke babemphatha uJohane, ngokuthi ungumprofethi ngeqiniso." 
Mark11:33 Basebephendula bathi kuJesu: Kasazi. UJesu wasephendula wathi kubo: Lami kangilitsheli ukuthi ngenza lezizinto ngaliphi igunya. 
Mark12:1 Waseqala ukukhuluma labo ngemifanekiso wathi: Umuntu wahlanyela isivini, wasibiyela ngothango, wagebha isikhamelo, wakha umphotshongo, wasiqatshisa kubalimi, waya kwelinye ilizwe." 
Mark12:2 Kwathi sekuyisikhathi esifaneleyo wathuma inceku kubalimi, ukuze yemukele kubalimi okwesithelo sesivini." 
Mark12:3 Kodwa ba yi bamba bayitshaya, ba yi mukisa ize." 
Mark12:4 Wasebuya ethuma kubo enye inceku; laleyo bayitshaya ngamatshe ba yi limaza ekhanda, ba yi xotsha isi thelwe inhloni." 
Mark12:5 Wasebuya ethuma enye; yona basebeyibulala; lezinye ezinengi, ezinye bazitshaya, lezinye bazibulala." 
Mark12:6 Ngakho eseselendodana eyodwa ethandekayo kuye, ekucineni wayithuma kubo layo, esithi: Bazayihlonipha indodana yami." 
Mark12:7 Kodwa labobalimi bakhulumisana besithi: Le yindlalifa; wozani, siyibulale, lelifa lizakuba ngelethu." 
Mark12:8 Basebe yi bamba bayibulala, ba yi phosela ngaphandle kwesivini." 
Mark12:9 Ngakho uzakwenzani umninisivini? Uzakuza ababhubhise abalimi, anikele isivini kwabanye." 
Mark12:10 Kalibalanga yini lumbhalo othi: Ilitshe abakhi abalalayo, yilo eseliyinhloko yengonsi;" 
Mark12:11 lokhu kwenziwe yiNkosi, njalo kuyisimanga emehlweni ethu?" 
Mark12:12 Basebedinga ukumbamba, kodwa besaba ixuku; ngoba babesazi ukuthi wayekhuluma lumfanekiso emelane labo. Basebemtshiya bahamba." 
Mark12:13 Basebethuma kuye abanye babaFarisi labakaHerodi, ukuze bamthiye ekukhulumeni." 
Mark12:14 Basebesiza bathi kuye: Mfundisi, siyazi ukuthi wena uqotho, njalo kawukhathali ngomuntu; ngoba kawunanzi isimo somuntu, kodwa ufundisa indlela kaNkulunkulu ngeqiniso: Kuvunyelwe yini ukuthela kuKesari kumbe hatshi?" 
Mark12:15 Sithele, kumbe singatheli? Kodwa ekwazi ukuzenzisa kwabo wathi kubo: Lingilingelani? Lethani kimi udenariyo*, ukuze ngibone." 
Mark12:16 Basebeletha. Wasesithi kubo: Ngokabani lumfanekiso lalumbhalo? Basebesithi kuye: NgokaKesari. 
Mark12:17 UJesu wasephendula wathi kubo: Mnikeni uKesari okukaKesari, loNkulunkulu okukaNkulunkulu. Basebemangala ngaye." 
Mark12:18 Basebesiza kuye abaSadusi, abathi kakukho ukuvuka kwabafileyo; bambuza, bathi:" 
Mark12:19 Mfundisi, uMozisi wasibhalela, ukuthi: Uba umfowabo womuntu esifa, atshiye umka khe, engatshiyi bantwana, umfowabo kamthathe umkakhe, amvusele umfowabo inzalo;" 
Mark12:20 kwakulezelamani eziyisikhombisa; owokuqala wasethatha umfazi, wafa engatshiyanga inzalo;" 
Mark12:21 lowesibili wamthatha, wafa, laye engatshiyanga inzalo; lowesithathu kwaba njalo;" 
Mark12:22 lalaba boyisikhombisa bamthatha, kabatshiyanga inzalo. Ekucineni kwabo bonke kwafa lomfazi." 
Mark12:23 Ngakho ekuvukeni kwabafileyo, mhla bevukayo, uzakuba ngumkabani kubo; lokhu abayisikhombisa babelaye engumkabo?" 
Mark12:24 UJesu wasephendula wathi kubo: Kaliduhanga yini ngalokhu, ngoba lingayazi imibhalo, loba amandla kaNkulunkulu?" 
Mark12:25 Ngoba mhla bevukayo ekufeni, kabathathani, njalo kabendiswa, kodwa banjengengilosi ezisemazulwini." 
Mark12:26 Kodwa mayelana labafileyo, ukuthi bayavuswa, kalifundanga yini egwalweni lukaMozisi, ukuthi uNkulunkulu esihlahleni wakhuluma njani kuye, esithi: NginguNkulunkulu kaAbrahama, loNkulunkulu kaIsaka, loNkulunkulu kaJakobe?" 
Mark12:27 Kayisuye uNkulunkulu wabafileyo, kodwa uNkulunkulu wabaphilayo; ngakho lina liduhile kakhulu." 
Mark12:28 Wasefika omunye wababhali, esezwile bebuzana, esebonile ukuthi ubaphendule kuhle, wambuza wathi: Yiwuphi umlayo wokuqala kuyo yonke?" 
Mark12:29 UJesu wasemphendula wathi: Owokuqala kuyo yonke imilayo ngowokuthi: Zwana, Israyeli: INkosi uNkulunkulu wethu, iNkosi yinye;" 
Mark12:30 njalo wothanda iNkosi uNkulunkulu wakho ngenhliziyo yakho yonke, langomphefumulo wakho wonke, langengqondo yakho yonke, langamandla akho wonke. Yilo umlayo owokuqala." 
Mark12:31 Lowesibili uyafanana, yilo: Wothanda umakhelwane wakho njengalokhu uzi thanda wena. Kawukho omunye umlayo omkhulu kulale." 
Mark12:32 Umbhali wasesithi kuye: Kuhle, Mfundisi, utsho okuqotho ukuthi kuloNkulunkulu oyedwa, langaphandle kwakhe kakho omunye;" 
Mark12:33 lokumthanda ngenhliziyo yonke, langokuqedisisa konke, langomphefumulo wonke, langamandla wonke, lokuthanda umakhelwane njengawe, kuyedlula yonke iminikelo yokutshiswa lemihlatshelo." 
Mark12:34 UJesu esembona ukuthi uphendule ngenhlakanipho, wathi kuye: Kawukhatshana lombuso kaNkulunkulu. Njalo kakwabe kusaba khona umuntu olesibindi sokumbuza." 
Mark12:35 UJesu, efundisa ethempelini, wasephendula wathi: Batsho njani ababhali ukuthi uKristu uyindodana kaDavida?" 
Mark12:36 Ngoba uDavida uqobo lwakhe ngoMoya oyiNgcwele wathi: INkosi yathi eNkosini yami: Hlala ngakwesokunene sami, ngize ngibeke izitha zakho zibe yisenabelo senyawo zakho." 
Mark12:37 Ngakho uDavida uqobo lwakhe umbiza ngokuthi yiNkosi; pho uyindodana yakhe njani? Lexuku elikhulu lamuzwa ngokuthokoza. 
Mark12:38 Wasesithi kubo ekufundiseni kwakhe: Qaphelani ababhali, abathanda ukuhamba bembethe izembatho ezinde, lokubingelelwa emidangeni," 
Mark12:39 lezihlalo eziqakathekileyo emasinagogeni, lezihlalo zabahloniphekayo ekudleni kwantambama;" 
Mark12:40 abadla izindlu zabafelokazi, bekhuleka isikhathi eside ngokuzenzisa; laba bazakwemukela ukulahlwa okukhulu." 
Mark12:41 UJesu wasehlala phansi maqondana lesitsha somnikelo wabona ukuthi ixuku liphosela njani imali esitsheni somnikelo; labanothileyo abanengi baphosela okunengi. 
Mark12:42 Kwasekufika umfelokazi othile ongumyanga waphosela inhlamvana ezimbili ezincane zemali, ezenza indibilitshi." 
Mark12:43 Wasebizela kuye abafundi bakhe, wathi kubo: Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Lumfelokazi ongumyanga uphosele okwedlula bonke laba abaphoseleyo esitsheni somnikelo;" 
Mark12:44 ngoba bonke baphosele kokunengi kwabo; kodwa yena ebuyangeni bakhe uphosele konke alakho, konke okwempilo yakhe." 
Mark13:1 Kwathi ephuma ethempelini, omunye wabafundi bakhe wathi kuye: Mfundisi, khangela, amatshe anjani lezakhiwo ezinjani!" 
Mark13:2 UJesu wasephendula wathi kuye: Uyabona lezizakhiwo ezinkulu yini? Akusoze kutshiywe ilitshe phezu kwelitshe, elingasoze lidilizelwe phansi." 
Mark13:3 Esehlezi entabeni yeMihlwathi maqondana lethempeli, uPetro loJakobe loJohane loAndreya bambuza bebodwa," 
Mark13:4 bathi: Sitshele, lezizinto zizakuba nini? Lesibonakaliso siyini lapho sezizapheleliswa lezizinto zonke?" 
Mark13:5 UJesu ebaphendula waseqala ukuthi: Qaphelani kungabi khona oliduhisayo. 
Mark13:6 Ngoba abanengi bazakuza ngebizo lami, besithi: Mina ngingu ye; futhi baduhise abanengi." 
Mark13:7 Kodwa nxa lisizwa ngezimpi lamahungahunga ezimpi, lingethuki; ngoba kufanele kwenzeke; kodwa ukuphela kakukabi khona." 
Mark13:8 Ngoba isizwe sizavukela isizwe, lombuso u vuk ele umbuso; njalo kuzakuba khona ukuzamazama komhlaba indawo ngendawo, njalo kuzakuba khona indlala lezinhlupheko; lezizinto ziyikuqala kwemihelo." 
Mark13:9 Kodwa ziqapheleni lina; ngoba bazalinikela emiphakathini, lemasinagogeni lizatshaywa, lizalethwa laphambi kwababusi lamakhosi ngenxa yami, kube yibufakazi obumelene labo." 
Mark13:10 Kodwa ivangeli limele ukutshunyayelwa kuqala kuzo zonke izizwe. 
Mark13:11 Kodwa nxa be li donsa belinikela, lingakhathaleli ngaphambili elizakukhuluma, linganakani; kodwa loba yini elizayinikwa ngalelohola, ikhulumeni; ngoba kakusini elikhulumayo, kodwa uMoya oyiNgcwele." 
Mark13:12 Futhi umfowabo uzanikela umfowabo ekufeni, loyise umntwana; labantwana bazavukela abazali, besebebabulala;" 
Mark13:13 njalo lizazondwa yibo bonke ngenxa yebizo lami; kodwa ophikelelayo kuze kube sekupheleni, nguye ozasindiswa." 
Mark13:14 Kodwa nxa libona amanyala encithakalo, akhulunywa nguDaniyeli umprofethi, emi lapho angafanele khona (ofundayo kaqedisise), khona labo abaseJudiya kababalekele ezintabeni;" 
Mark13:15 lophezu kophahla lwendlu angehleli endlini, angangeni ukuthatha ulutho endlini yakhe;" 
Mark13:16 losemasimini angabuyeli emuva, ukuyathatha isembatho sakhe." 
Mark13:17 Kodwa maye kwabakhulelweyo labamunyisayo ngalezonsuku! 
Mark13:18 Kodwa khulekani ukuthi ukubaleka kwenu kungabi sebusika. 
Mark13:19 Ngoba nga lezonsuku kuzakuba khona ukuhlupheka, okungazanga kube khona kusukela ekuqaleni kokudaliweyo uNkulunkulu akudalayo kuze kube khathesi, lokungasoze kwaba khona." 
Mark13:20 Njalo uba iNkosi ibingazifinyezanga lezonsuku, bekungesindiswe nyama; kodwa ngenxa yabakhethiweyo, ebakhethileyo, izifinyezile insuku." 
Mark13:21 Langalesosikhathi nxa umuntu esithi kini: Khangelani, nangu uKristu; kumbe: Khangelani, ulaphayana; lingakholwa;" 
Mark13:22 ngoba kuzavuka okristu bamanga labaprofethi bamanga, besebesenza izibonakaliso lezimangaliso, ukuduhisa, nxa kungenzeka, labakhethiweyo." 
Mark13:23 Kodwa qaphelani lina; khangelani, se ngilitshelile konke ngaphambili." 
Mark13:24 Kodwa ngalezonsuku, emva kwalokhokuhlupheka, ilanga lizafiphazwa, lenyanga kayiyikupha ukukhanya kwayo," 
Mark13:25 lenkanyezi zezulu zizabe zisiwa, lamandla asemazulwini azazanyazanyiswa." 
Mark13:26 Khona-ke bezabona iNdodana yomuntu isiza emayezini ilamandla amakhulu lenkazimulo," 
Mark13:27 khona-ke izathuma ingilosi zayo, ibisiqoqa abakhethiweyo bayo emimoyeni yomine, kusukela emkhawulweni womhlaba kuze kube semkhawulweni wezulu." 
Mark13:28 Fundani-ke umfanekiso emkhiweni; nxa ugatsha lwawo selusiba buthakathaka luhlume amahlamvu, liyazi ukuthi ihlobo seliseduze;" 
Mark13:29 ngokunjalo lani, nxa libona lezizinto zisenzeka, yazini ukuthi kuseduze kuseminyango." 
Mark13:30 Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Lesisizukulwana asisoze sidlule, zize zenzeke izinto zonke lezi." 
Mark13:31 Kuzadlula izulu lomhlaba; kodwa amazwi ami awasoze adlule. 
Mark13:32 Kodwa lolosuku lalelohola kakho owaziyo ngakho, ngitsho lengilosi ezisezulwini, ngitsho leNdodana, ngaphandle kukaBaba." 
Mark13:33 Qaphelani, lilinde likhuleke; ngoba kalazi ukuthi isikhathi sinini." 
Mark13:34 Njengomuntu owasuka elizweni lakibo watshiya indlu yakhe, wanika inceku zakhe amandla, kuleyo laleyo umsebenzi wayo, walaya umlindisango ukuthi alinde." 
Mark13:35 Ngakho lindani; ngoba kalazi ukuthi inkosi yendlu izafika nini, kusihlwa, loba phakathi kobusuku, loba ekukhaleni kweqhude, loba emadabukakusa;" 
Mark13:36 hlezi ifike ilijume, ilifice lilele." 
Mark13:37 Lalokhu engikutsho kini ngikutsho kubo bonke: Lindani. 
Mark14:1 Kwathi emva kwensuku ezimbili kwaba khona iphasika l omkhosi wesinkwa esingelamvubelo; abapristi abakhulu lababhali basebedinga ukuthi bangambamba njani ngobuqili ba m bulale; 
Mark14:2 kodwa bathi: Kungabi ngomkhosi, hlezi kube lesiphithiphithi sabantu." 
Mark14:3 Kwathi eseBethani, endlini kaSimoni umlephero, ehlezi ekudleni, kwafika owesifazana ephethe umfuma we-alibasta* wamagcobo awenadi* uqobo aligugu elikhulu; wasephahlaza umfuma we-alibasta, wa wa thela ekhanda lakhe." 
Mark14:4 Kwakukhona abanye abathukuthelayo ngaphakathi kwabo, besithi: Kwenzelwani ukumotshwa kwalamagcobo?" 
Mark14:5 Ngoba la abengathengiswa ngemali edlula odenariyo* abangamakhulu amathathu, besekunikwa abayanga. Basebemsola." 
Mark14:6 Kodwa uJesu wathi: Myekeleni; limhluphelani? Wenze umsebenzi omuhle kimi. 
Mark14:7 Ngoba abayanga lihlala lilabo, futhi uba lithanda lingabenzela okuhle; kodwa mina kalihlali lilami." 
Mark14:8 Yena wenzile abengakwenza; uqalile ngaphambili ukuwugcobela ukungcwatshwa umzimba wami. 
Mark14:9 Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Loba ngaphi emhlabeni wonke lapho okuzatshunyayelwa khona lelivangeli, lalokhu akwenzileyo kuzakhulunywa ngakho kube yisikhumbuzo ngaye." 
Mark14:10 UJudasi Iskariyothi, omunye wabalitshumi lambili, wasesiya kubapristi abakhulu, ukuze amnikele kubo." 
Mark14:11 Futhi sebezwile bathokoza, bathembisa ukumnika imali; wasedinga ukuthi angamnikela njani kuhle." 
Mark14:12 Kwathi ngosuku lokuqala lwesinkwa esingelamvubelo, ababehlaba ngalo iphasika, abafundi bakhe bathi kuye: Uthanda ukuthi siyelungisa ngaphi ukuze udle iphasika?" 
Mark14:13 Wasethuma ababili kubafundi bakhe, wathi kubo: Hambani liye emzini, njalo umuntu uzahlangana lani ethwele imbiza yamanzi; limlandele," 
Mark14:14 njalo loba kungaphi azangena khona, kalibokuthi kumninindlu: UMfundisi uthi: Ingaphi indlu yezihambi, lapho engingadlela khona iphasika labafundi bami?" 
Mark14:15 Futhi yena uzalitshengisa indlu enkulu ephezulu eyendlelweyo elungisiweyo; silungiseleni khona. 
Mark14:16 Abafundi bakhe basebephuma, bangena emzini, bathola kunjengokutsho kwakhe kubo; basebelungisa iphasika." 
Mark14:17 Kwathi sekukusihlwa wafika labalitshumi lambili. 
Mark14:18 Sebehlezi besidla, uJesu wathi: Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Omunye wenu, odla lami, uzanginikela." 
Mark14:19 Basebeqala ukudabuka, bathi kuye ngamunye ngamunye: Yimi yini? Lomunye: Yimi yini?" 
Mark14:20 Kodwa waphendula wathi kubo: Ng omunye wabalitshumi lambili, otsheba kanye lami emganwini." 
Mark14:21 Sibili iNdodana yomuntu ihamba, njengokulotshiweyo ngayo; kodwa maye kulowomuntu enikelwa nguye iNdodana yomuntu! Bekungakuhle kuye aluba lowomuntu wayengazalwanga." 
Mark14:22 Kwathi besidla, uJesu wathatha isinkwa, wa si busisa wa si hlephula, wabanika, wathi: Thathani, lidle; lokhu kungumzimba wami." 
Mark14:23 Wasethatha inkezo, esebongile wabanika; basebenatha kuyo bonke." 
Mark14:24 Wasesithi kubo: Leli ligazi lami, elesivumelwano esitsha, elichithelwa abanengi." 
Mark14:25 Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Angisayikunatha okwesithelo sevini, kuze kufike lolosuku engizasinatha ngalo sisitsha embusweni kaNkulunkulu." 
Mark14:26 Kwathi sebehlabele ingoma yokudumisa baphuma baya entabeni yeMihlwathi. 
Mark14:27 UJesu wasesithi kubo: Lonke lizakhubeka ngami ngalobubusuku; ngoba kulotshiwe ukuthi: Ngizatshaya umelusi, izimvu besezihlakazeka." 
Mark14:28 Kodwa emva kokuvuswa kwami, ngizalandulela ukuya eGalili." 
Mark14:29 Kodwa uPetro wathi kuye: Lanxa bonke bezakhubeka, kodwa hatshi mina." 
Mark14:30 UJesu wasesithi kuye: Ngiqinisile ngithi kuwe: Lamuhla ngalobubusuku, lingakakhali kabili iqhude, uzangiphika kathathu." 
Mark14:31 Kodwa waqinisa ngamandla esithi: Loba kudingeka ngife lawe, angisoze ngikuphike. Basebesitsho njalo labo bonke." 
Mark14:32 Basebefika endaweni ebizo layo yiGetsemane; wasesithi kubafundi bakhe: Hlalani phansi lapha, ngisa ya khuleka." 
Mark14:33 Wasethatha kanye laye uPetro loJakobe loJohane, waseqala ukudatshulwa sibili lokukhathazeka kakhulu." 
Mark14:34 Wasesithi kubo: Umphefumulo wami udabukile kakhulu kuze kube sekufeni; hlalani lapha lilinde. 
Mark14:35 Waseqhubeka ibangana, wawela emhlabathini, wakhuleka ukuthi, uba kungenzeka, kudlule kuye lelihola." 
Mark14:36 Wasesithi: Aba*, Baba, zonke izinto ziyenzeka kuwe. Susa linkezo kimi; kodwa kungabi yikuthi ngithandani mina, kodwa kube yikuthi uthanda ni wena." 
Mark14:37 Wasesiza, wabafica belele, wathi kuPetro: Simoni, ulele yini? Ubungelinde yini ihola libe linye?" 
Mark14:38 Lindani likhuleke, ukuze lingangeni ekulingweni. Umoya uyavuma-ke, kodwa inyama ibuthakathaka." 
Mark14:39 Wasebuya wahamba wa ya khuleka, esitsho wona lawomazwi." 
Mark14:40 Wasebuya wabafica futhi belele; ngoba amehlo abo ayenzima, kodwa babengazi ukuthi bazamphendula bathi ni." 
Mark14:41 Wasesiza ngokwesithathu, wathi kubo: Qhubekani lilele-ke liphumule. Kwanele; ihola selifikile; khangelani, iNdodana yomuntu iyanikelwa ezandleni zezoni." 
Mark14:42 Sukumani, sihambe; khangelani, onginikelayo useduze." 
Mark14:43 Kwathi esakhuluma, wahle wafika uJudasi, omunye wabalitshumi lambili, njalo elexuku elikhulu elilezinkemba lezinduku, livela kubapristi abakhulu lababhali labadala." 
Mark14:44 Lomnikelayo wayebanike isiboniso, esithi: Lowo engizamanga, nguye; limbambe, li m qhube li m qinise." 
Mark14:45 Esefikile, wahle wasondela kuye wathi: Rabi*, Rabi! Wasemanga." 
Mark14:46 Basebemdumela, bambamba." 
Mark14:47 Lomunye kwababemi khona wakhokha inkemba wagadla inceku yompristi omkhulu, waquma indlebe yayo." 
Mark14:48 UJesu wasephendula wathi kubo: Liphume njengokuyamelana lomphangi yini lilezinkemba lezinduku ukuzangibamba? 
Mark14:49 Bengilani insuku ngensuku ethempelini ngifundisa, kodwa kalingibambanga; kodwa lokhu kwenzeke ukuze kugcwaliseke imibhalo." 
Mark14:50 Bonke basebemtshiya babaleka. 
Mark14:51 Lejaha elithile lamlandela, lembethe ilembu elicolekileyo emzimbeni onqunu. Aselibamba amajaha;" 
Mark14:52 laselitshiya ilembu elicolekileyo lababalekela linqunu. 
Mark14:53 Basebemqhuba uJesu bamusa kumpristi omkhulu; basebebuthana kuye abapristi abakhulu bonke labadala lababhali. 
Mark14:54 UPetro wasemlandela ekhatshana waze waba phakathi kweguma lompristi omkhulu; wayehlezi kanye lezinceku, esotha umlilo." 
Mark14:55 Labapristi abakhulu lomphakathi wonke badinga ubufakazi ngoJesu, ukuze bambulale; kodwa kababutholanga." 
Mark14:56 Ngoba abanengi bafakaza amanga ngaye, kodwa ubufakazi babo kabuvumelananga." 
Mark14:57 Kwasekusukuma abanye bafakaza amanga amelana laye besithi: 
Mark14:58 Thina samuzwa esithi: Mina ngizadiliza lelithempeli elenziwe ngezandla, njalo ngakhe elinye elingenziwanga ngezandla ngensuku ezintathu." 
Mark14:59 Loba kunjalo ubufakazi babo kabuvumelananga. 
Mark14:60 Kwasekusukuma umpristi omkhulu phakathi kwabo wambuza uJesu, esithi: Kawuphenduli lutho yini? Bafakazani laba okumelana lawe?" 
Mark14:61 Kodwa wathula, kaphendulanga lutho. Umpristi omkhulu wabuya wambuza, wathi kuye: Wena unguKristu, iNdodana yoBusisiweyo yini?" 
Mark14:62 UJesu wasesithi: Mina nginguye. Njalo lizabona iNdodana yomuntu ihlezi ngakwesokunene samandla, isiza ngamayezi ezulu." 
Mark14:63 Umpristi omkhulu wasedabula izembatho zakhe wathi: Sisaswelelani abafakazi? 
Mark14:64 Liyizwile inhlamba; licabangani? Bonke basebemlahla ukuthi ulecala lokufa. 
Mark14:65 Abanye basebeqala ukumkhafulela amathe, lokumgubuzela ubuso, lokumdutshuza, lokuthi kuye: Profetha! Izinceku zasezimwakala." 
Mark14:66 UPetro esegumeni ngaphansi, kwafika enye yezincekukazi zompristi omkhulu;" 
Mark14:67 isibona uPetro esotha, yamkhangela yathi: Lawe ubulomNazaretha, uJesu." 
Mark14:68 Kodwa waphika, wathi: Kangikwazi, futhi kangikuqedisisi okutshoyo. Wasephuma phandle, waya entubeni; laselikhala iqhude." 
Mark14:69 Njalo incekukazi encane imbona yabuya yaqala ukutsho kwababemi khona ukuthi: Lo ungo munye wabo. 
Mark14:70 Kodwa wabuya waphika. Kwathi emva kwesikhatshana futhi labo ababemi khona bathi kuPetro: Ngeqiniso ungo munye wabo; ngoba lawe ungumGalili, lolimi lwakho luyavumelana." 
Mark14:71 Waseqala ukuqalekisa lokufunga esithi: Kangimazi lumuntu elimtshoyo. 
Mark14:72 Iqhude laselikhala ngokwesibili. UPetro wasekhumbula ilizwi uJesu ayelitshilo kuye lokuthi: Lingakakhali kabili iqhude, uzangiphika kathathu. Esenakane ngalokhu wakhala." 
Mark15:1 Kwathi khonokho ekuseni kakhulu abapristi abakhulu benza umhlangano kanye labadala lababhali, lomphakathi wonke, bambopha uJesu ba m qhuba ba m nikela kuPilatu." 
Mark15:2 UPilatu wasembuza wathi: Wena uyiNkosi yamaJuda yini? Wasemphendula wathi kuye: Uyatsho wena. 
Mark15:3 Abapristi abakhulu basebemmangalela ngezinto ezinengi; kodwa yena kaphendulanga lutho. 
Mark15:4 UPilatu wasebuya embuza, wathi: Kawuphenduli lutho yini? Khangela, zingaki izinto abazifakazayo ezimelana lawe." 
Mark15:5 Kodwa uJesu kabesaphendula lutho, waze wamangala uPilatu." 
Mark15:6 Langomkhosi wayebakhululela isibotshwa esisodwa, loba yisiphi abasicelayo." 
Mark15:7 Kwakukhona umuntu othiwa nguBarabasi, owayebotshiwe lalabo ababevukele umbuso laye, ababebulele ekuvukeleni umbuso." 
Mark15:8 Ixuku laselimemeza laqala ukucela ukuthi alenzele njengezikhathi zonke. 
Mark15:9 UPilatu wasebaphendula, wathi: Lithanda ukuthi ngilikhululele iNkosi yamaJuda yini?" 
Mark15:10 Ngoba wayekwazi ukuthi ngomona abapristi abakhulu bamnikele. 
Mark15:11 Kodwa abapristi abakhulu bavusa ixuku, ukuthi kungcono alikhululele uBarabasi." 
Mark15:12 UPilatu wasephendula wathi futhi kubo: Pho lifuna ngimenzeni lo elithi uyiNkosi yamaJuda? 
Mark15:13 Basebememeza futhi bathi: Mbethele! 
Mark15:14 Kodwa uPilatu wathi kubo: Ngoba wenze ububi bani? Kodwa bamemeza kakhulu bathi: Mbethele! 
Mark15:15 Khona uPilatu ethanda ukukholisa ixuku, wabakhululela uBarabasi; kodwa wamnikela uJesu, ese m tshaye ngesiswepu, ukuthi abethelwe." 
Mark15:16 Abebutho basebemngenisa phakathi, egumeni, eliyindlu yombusi, basebebizela ibutho lonke ndawonye," 
Mark15:17 bamgqokisa okuyibubende, sebeluke umqhele wameva bamethesa," 
Mark15:18 baqala ukumbingelela besithi: Bayethe, Nkosi yamaJuda!" 
Mark15:19 Batshaya ikhanda lakhe ngomhlanga, bamkhafulela amathe, baguqa ngamadolo bamkhonza." 
Mark15:20 Sebemklolodele, bamhlubula okuyibubende, bamgqokisa ezakhe izembatho. Basebemusa phandle ukuze bambethele." 
Mark15:21 Babamba ngamandla omunye owayesedlula othiwa nguSimoni umKurene, evela emaphandleni, uyise kaAleksandro loRufusi, ukuthi athwale isiphambano sakhe." 
Mark15:22 Basebemusa endaweni ethiwa yiGolgotha, okuyikuthi ngokuphendulelwa, iNdawo yokhakhayi." 
Mark15:23 Basebemnika iwayini lixutshaniswe lenhlaka ukuthi alinathe; kodwa kalemukelanga. 
Mark15:24 Sebembethele, babelana izembatho zakhe, benza inkatho yokuphosa ngazo, ukuthi ngamunye uzathathani." 
Mark15:25 Kwakulihola lesithathu*, njalo bambethela." 
Mark15:26 Futhi kwakulombhalo wecala lakhe elalibhalwe phezulu usithi: INKOSI YAMAJUDA. 
Mark15:27 Njalo babethelwa kanye laye abaphangi ababili, omunye ngakwesokunene lomunye ngakwesokhohlo sakhe." 
Mark15:28 Wasugcwaliseka umbhalo othi: Futhi wabalwa kanye lezoni. 
Mark15:29 Labedlulayo bamhlambaza, benikina amakhanda abo, besithi: Hiya, wena odiliza ithempeli, ulakhe ngensuku ezintathu," 
Mark15:30 zisindise, wehle esiphambanweni." 
Mark15:31 Langokunjalo abapristi abakhulu labo bakloloda kanye lababhali bathi omunye komunye: Wasindisa abanye, angezisindise yena." 
Mark15:32 UKristu iNkosi yakoIsrayeli kehle khathesi esiphambanweni, ukuze sibone sikholwe. Lababebethelwe kanye laye bamklolodela." 
Mark15:33 Kwathi sekufike ihola lesithupha*, kwaba khona ubumnyama phezu komhlaba wonke kwaze kwaba lihola lesificamunwemunye*." 
Mark15:34 Ngehola lesificamunwemunye uJesu wamemeza ngelizwi elikhulu, wathi, \Eloyi, Eloyi, lama sabaktani?\ Okuyikuthi ngokuphendulelwa: Nkulunkulu wami, Nkulunkulu wami, ungitshiyeleni?" 
Mark15:35 Labanye kwababemi khona besizwa bathi: Khangelani, ubiza uElija." 
Mark15:36 Wasegijima omunye, wagcwalisa uzipho ngeviniga, waluhloma emhlangeni, wamnika ukuthi anathe, esithi: Yekelani, sibone uba uElija uzakuza amethule." 
Mark15:37 UJesu wasememeza ngelizwi elikhulu waphefumula okokucina. 
Mark15:38 Leveyili lethempeli ladatshulwa laba zincezu ezimbili laqala phezulu lisiya phansi. 
Mark15:39 Kwathi induna yekhulu eyayimi maqondana laye ibona ukuthi ukhale njalo, waphefumula okokucina, yathi: Ngeqiniso lumuntu ubeyiNdodana kaNkulunkulu." 
Mark15:40 Kwakukhona labesifazana bebukele bekhatshana, okwakukhona phakathi kwabo loMariya Magadalena, loMariya unina kaJakobe omncinyane lokaJose, loSalome," 
Mark15:41 (labo ababemlandela, eseseGalili, bemncedisa), labanye abesifazana abanengi abenyukela eJerusalema laye." 
Mark15:42 Kwathi sekuhlwile, ngoba kwakungamalungiselelo, okuyikuthi usuku phambi kwesabatha," 
Mark15:43 wafika uJosefa owayevela eArimathiya, ilunga elihloniphekayo lomphakathi, owayelindele laye umbuso kaNkulunkulu; wangena ngesibindi kuPilatu, wacela isidumbu sikaJesu." 
Mark15:44 UPilatu wasemangala ngokuthi usefile; wabizela kuye induna yekhulu, wayibuza ukuthi kambe sekuyisikhathi efile." 
Mark15:45 Esazisiwe yinduna yekhulu, wamnika uJosefa isidumbu." 
Mark15:46 Wasethenga ilembu elicolekileyo, wamethula, wamgoqela ngelembu elicolekileyo, wambeka engcwabeni elaligujwe edwaleni; wagiqela ilitshe emnyango wengcwaba." 
Mark15:47 Futhi uMariya Magadalena loMariya unina kaJose babona lapho ayebekwa khona. 
Mark16:1 Isabatha selidlulile, uMariya Magadalena loMariya unina kaJakobe loSalome bathenga amakha, ukuze bahambe bayemgcoba." 
Mark16:2 Kwathi ekuseni kakhulu ngo suku lokuqala lweviki beza engcwabeni, ekuphumeni kwelanga." 
Mark16:3 Basebekhulumisana besithi: Ngubani ozasigiqela ilitshe lisuke emnyango wengcwaba? 
Mark16:4 Futhi bathi ukukhangela babona ilitshe seligiqwe lasuswa; ngoba lalilikhulu kakhulu. 
Mark16:5 Kuthe bengena engcwabeni, babona ijaha lihlezi ngakwesokunene, lembethe isembatho eside esimhlophe; besaba." 
Mark16:6 Kodwa lathi kubo: Lingesabi; lidinga uJesu weNazaretha obebethelwe; uvukile, kakho lapha; khangelani, indawo lapho abebembeke khona." 
Mark16:7 Kodwa hambani, litshele abafundi bakhe loPetro ukuthi uzalandulela ukuya eGalili; lizambona khona, njengalokho ayekutshilo kini." 
Mark16:8 Basebephuma ngokuphangisa babaleka engcwabeni; futhi ukuqhuqha lokwethuka kwababamba; futhi kabakhulumanga lutho emuntwini, ngoba babesesaba." 
Mark16:9 Kwathi uJesu esevukile ekuseni kakhulu ngolokuqala lweviki, wabonakala kuqala kuMariya Magadalena, ayekhuphe kuye amadimoni ayisikhombisa." 
Mark16:10 Yena wasuka wababikela labo ababelaye, belila bekhala." 
Mark16:11 Labo sebezwile ukuthi uyaphila lokuthi ubonwe nguye, kabakholwanga." 
Mark16:12 Njalo emva kwalezizinto wabonakala ngesinye isimo kwababili babo behamba, besiya emaphandleni." 
Mark16:13 Labo bahamba babikela abanye; lalabo kababakholwanga. 
Mark16:14 Emva kwalokhu wabonakala kwabalitshumi lanye behlezi ekudleni, wasola ukungakholwa kwabo lobulukhuni benhliziyo, ngoba bengakholwanga labo abambonayo esevukile." 
Mark16:15 Wasesithi kubo: Hambani liye emhlabeni wonke, litshumayele ivangeli kuso sonke isidalwa." 
Mark16:16 Lowo okholwayo abhabhathizwe uzasindiswa; kodwa ongakholwayo uzalahlwa. 
Mark16:17 Lalezizibonakaliso zizabalandela abakholwayo; ebizweni lami bazakhupha amadimoni; bakhulume ngendimi ezintsha; 
Mark16:18 bazadobha izinyoka; uba benatha loba yikuphi okubulalayo, kakusoze kubalimaze; bazabeka izandla phezu kwabagulayo, futhi bazaphila." 
Mark16:19 Ngakho iNkosi, emva kokuthi isikhulumile labo, yakhutshulelwa ezulwini, yahlala ngakwesokunene sikaNkulunkulu." 
Mark16:20 Bona basebephuma batshumayela endaweni zonke, iNkosi isebenza la bo, iqinisa ilizwi ngezibonakaliso ezazilandela. Ameni." 
Luke1:1 Njengoba abanengi sebebeke izandla ukubeka ngendlela efaneleyo ukulandiswa kwalezizinto eziqiniseke ngokupheleleyo phakathi kwethu," 
Luke1:2 njengalokhu basinika labo ababonayo ngamehlo ekuqaleni njalo bezinceku zelizwi," 
Luke1:3 kukhanye kukuhle lakimi, sengizihlolisisile zonke izinto kusukela ekuqaleni, ukuthi ngikubhalele ngokulandelana, mhlekazi Teyofilu," 
Luke1:4 ukuze wazi iqiniso ngalezozinto owazifundiswayo. 
Luke1:5 Ensukwini zikaHerodi inkosi yeJudiya kwakukhona umpristi othile othiwa nguZakariya, oweqembu likaAbhiya; lomkakhe wayevela kumadodakazi kaAroni, lebizo lakhe linguElizabethi." 
Luke1:6 Njalo babelungile bobabili phambi kukaNkulunkulu, behamba ngayo yonke imilayo lezimiso zeNkosi, bengasoleki." 
Luke1:7 Njalo babengelamntwana, ngoba uElizabethi wayeyinyumba, basebeleminyaka eminengi bobabili." 
Luke1:8 Kwasekusithi esenza inkonzo yobupristi phambi kukaNkulunkulu esesimisweni seqembu lakibo," 
Luke1:9 ngomkhuba wenkonzo yobupristi, wadliwa yinkatho ukutshisa impepha esengene ethempelini leNkosi." 
Luke1:10 Njalo ixuku lonke labantu lalikhuleka ngaphandle ngesikhathi sokutshisa impepha. 
Luke1:11 Ingilosi yeNkosi yasibonakala kuye, imi ngakwesokunene selathi lempepha." 
Luke1:12 Kwathi uZakariya e yi bona waqhuqha, lokwesaba kwawela phezu kwakhe." 
Luke1:13 Kodwa ingilosi yathi kuye: Ungesabi Zakariya; ngoba umkhuleko wakho uzwakele, lomkakho uElizabethi uzakuzalela indodana, njalo uzakuthi ibizo layo nguJohane." 
Luke1:14 Futhi uzakuba lenjabulo lentokozo, labanengi bazakujabulela ukuzalwa kwakhe." 
Luke1:15 Ngoba uzakuba mkhulu phambi kweNkosi, iwayini kanye lokunathwayo okulamandla kasoze akunathe, futhi uzagcwaliswa ngoMoya oNgcwele kusukela eses esiswini sikanina." 
Luke1:16 Labanengi kubantwana bakoIsrayeli uzabaphendulela eNkosini uNkulunkulu wabo; 
Luke1:17 njalo yena uzahamba phambi kwayo emoyeni lemandleni kaElija, ukuphendulela inhliziyo zaboyise kubantwana, labangalaleliyo ekuhlakanipheni kwabalungileyo, ukulungiselela iNkosi isizwe esilungisiweyo." 
Luke1:18 UZakariya wasesithi kuyo ingilosi: Ngizakwazi ngani lokhu? Ngoba mina ngilixhegu, lomkami useleminyaka eminengi." 
Luke1:19 Ingilosi yasiphendula yathi kuye: NginguGabriyeli mina, omayo phambi kukaNkulunkulu; njalo ngithunyiwe ukukhuluma lawe, lokukubikela lezizindaba ezinhle." 
Luke1:20 Njalo khangela, uzakuba yisimungulu njalo wehluleke ukukhuluma, kuze kube lusuku okuzakwenzeka ngalo lezizinto, ngenxa yokuthi ungakholwanga amazwi ami, azagcwaliseka ngesikhathi sawo." 
Luke1:21 Labantu babemlindele uZakariya; bamangala ngokuphuza kwakhe ethempelini. 
Luke1:22 Kuthe esephuma wehluleka ukukhuluma labo; njalo bazi ukuthi ubone umbono ethempelini; njalo yena wayesebaqhweba, wahlala eyisimungulu." 
Luke1:23 Kwasekusithi seziphelile insuku zokukhonza kwakhe, waya endlini yakhe." 
Luke1:24 Kwathi emva kwalezonsuku uElizabethi umkakhe wathatha isisu, wazifihla okwezinyanga ezinhlanu, esithi:" 
Luke1:25 Yenze kanje kimi iNkosi ensukwini eya ngi khangela ngazo ukususa ihlazo lami phakathi kwabantu. 
Luke1:26 Kwathi ngenyanga yesithupha ingilosi uGabriyeli yathunywa nguNkulunkulu emzini weGalili othiwa yiNazaretha," 
Luke1:27 entombini eyayigane indoda, ebizo layo lalinguJosefa, eyendlu kaDavida; lebizo lentombi linguMariya." 
Luke1:28 Ingilosi yasingena kuye yathi: Ekuhle, wena othandiweyo! INkosi ilawe, ubusisiwe wena phakathi kwabesifazana." 
Luke1:29 Kwathi ese yi bonile wethuswa kakhulu yilizwi layo, wanakana ukuthi yikubingelela okunjani lokhu." 
Luke1:30 Ingilosi yasisithi kuye: Ungesabi, Mariya; ngoba uthole uthando kuNkulunkulu." 
Luke1:31 Njalo khangela, uzathatha isisu, uzale indodana, uzakuthi ibizo layo nguJesu." 
Luke1:32 Yena uzakuba mkhulu, uzabizwa ngokuthi yiNdodana yoPhezukonke; futhi iNkosi uNkulunkulu izamnika isihlalo sobukhosi sikayise uDavida," 
Luke1:33 njalo uzabusa phezu kwendlu kaJakobe kuze kube nininini, langombuso wakhe kawuzukuba lokuphela." 
Luke1:34 UMariya wasesithi kuyo ingilosi: Lokhu kungenzeka njani, njengoba ngingazi indoda?" 
Luke1:35 Ingilosi yasiphendula yathi kuye: UMoya oNgcwele uzakuza phezu kwakho, lamandla oPhezukonke azakwembesa; ngakho lalokhu okungcwele okuzazalwa nguwe kuzakuthiwa yiNdodana kaNkulunkulu." 
Luke1:36 Njalo khangela, isinini sakho uElizabethi, laye ukhulelwe yindodana ebudaleni bakhe; lale yinyanga yesithupha kuye obekuthiwa uyinyumba." 
Luke1:37 Ngoba kuNkulunkulu kakulalutho oluzakwehlula. 
Luke1:38 UMariya wasesithi: Khangela, incekukazi yeNkosi; kakube kimi njengelizwi lakho. Ingilosi yasisuka kuye." 
Luke1:39 Ngalezonsuku uMariya wasesukuma waya ezintabeni ngokuphangisa, emzini weJuda," 
Luke1:40 wangena endlini kaZakariya, wabingelela uElizabethi." 
Luke1:41 Kwasekusithi uElizabethi ezwe ukubingelela kukaMariya, inkonyane yeqa esiswini sakhe; loElizabethi wagcwaliswa ngoMoya oNgcwele," 
Luke1:42 wamemeza ngelizwi elikhulu, wathi: Ubusisiwe wena phakathi kwabesifazana, njalo sibusisiwe isithelo sesizalo sakho!" 
Luke1:43 Kanti kuvela ngaphi lokhu kimi, ukuthi unina weNkosi yami eze kimi?" 
Luke1:44 Ngoba khangela, kuthe ilizwi lokubingelela kwakho lifika endlebeni zami, umntwana weqa esiswini sami ngokuthokoza." 
Luke1:45 Futhi ubusisiwe okholiweyo, ngoba kuzagcwaliseka lezozinto ezakhulunywa kuye yiNkosi." 
Luke1:46 UMariya wasesithi: Umphefumulo wami uyayikhulisa iNkosi," 
Luke1:47 lomoya wami uyathokoza kuNkulunkulu uMsindisi wami," 
Luke1:48 ngoba ukhangele ubuphansi bencekukazi yakhe. Ngoba khangela, kusukela khathesi zonke izizukulwana zizakuthi ngibusisiwe." 
Luke1:49 Ngoba yena olamandla ungenzele izinto ezinkulu, lingcwele lebizo lakhe," 
Luke1:50 lesihawu sakhe sikusizukulwana ngesizukulwana kulabo abamesabayo. 
Luke1:51 Wenzile amandla ngengalo yakhe; uhlakazile abazigqajayo ekunakaneni kwenhliziyo zabo. 
Luke1:52 Wehlisile iziphathamandla ezihlalweni zobukhosi, kodwa uphakamisile abantukazana." 
Luke1:53 Abalambileyo ubasuthise ngezinto ezinhle, kodwa abanothileyo wabamukisa beze." 
Luke1:54 Umsizile uIsrayeli inceku yakhe, ngokukhumbula isihawu," 
Luke1:55 njengoba watsho kubobaba bethu, kuAbrahama, lenzalweni yakhe kuze kube nininini." 
Luke1:56 UMariya wasehlala laye okungaba zinyanga ezintathu, wasebuyela endlini yakhe." 
Luke1:57 Isikhathi sikaElizabethi sokuthi abelethe sesiphelele, wasebeletha indodana." 
Luke1:58 Abakhelene laye lezinini zakhe basebesizwa ukuthi iNkosi yenze isihawu sayo saba sikhulu kuye, basebethokoza laye." 
Luke1:59 Kwasekusithi ngosuku lwesificaminwembili, beza uku za soka usane; balubiza ngebizo likayise ngokuthi nguZakariya." 
Luke1:60 Kodwa unina waphendula wathi: Hatshi bo, kodwa luzathiwa nguJohane." 
Luke1:61 Basebesithi kuye: Kakho ezihlotsheni zakho obizwa ngalelibizo. 
Luke1:62 Basebeqhweba uyise, ukuthi angathanda ukuthi lubizwe ngokuthini." 
Luke1:63 Wasecela into yokubhalela, wabhala, esithi: NguJohane ibizo lalo; basebemangala bonke." 
Luke1:64 Njalo wahle wavulwa umlomo wakhe lolimi lwakhe lwatshwaphululwa, wasekhuluma edumisa uNkulunkulu." 
Luke1:65 Lokwesaba kwehlela phezu kwabo bonke abakhelene labo; njalo kwakhulunywa ngazo zonke lezizinto kulo lonke elezintabeni zeJudiya," 
Luke1:66 labo bonke aba zi zwayo ba zi londoloza ezinhliziyweni zabo, besithi: Kambe lolusane luzakuba njani? Njalo isandla seNkosi sasilalo." 
Luke1:67 LoZakariya uyise wagcwaliswa ngoMoya oNgcwele, waprofetha, esithi:" 
Luke1:68 Ibusisiwe iNkosi uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ngoba ihambele yasenzela inkululeko isizwe sayo," 
Luke1:69 yasivusela uphondo losindiso endlini kaDavida inceku yayo," 
Luke1:70 njengalokho yakhuluma ngomlomo wabaprofethi bayo abangcwele kusukela ekuqaleni komhlaba," 
Luke1:71 isikhulula ezitheni zethu, lesandleni sabo bonke abasizondayo;" 
Luke1:72 ukwenzela obaba bethu isihawu, lokukhumbula isivumelwano sayo esingcwele," 
Luke1:73 isifungo eyasifunga kubaba wethu uAbrahama," 
Luke1:74 ukusinika, ukuthi sesikhululiwe esandleni sezitha zethu, siyikhonze si ngelakwesaba" 
Luke1:75 ngobungcwele langokulunga phambi kwayo zonke izinsuku zempilo yethu. 
Luke1:76 Lawe-ke, sane, uzabizwa ngokuthi u ngumprofethi woPhezukonke; ngoba uzahamba phambi kobuso beNkosi ukulungisa izindlela zayo;" 
Luke1:77 lokunika isizwe sayo ulwazi losindiso ngothethelelo lwezono zabo," 
Luke1:78 ngesihelo sikaNkulunkulu wethu, okuthi ngaso ukusa kwaphezulu kusethekelele," 
Luke1:79 ukubakhanyisela abahlezi emnyameni lethunzini lokufa, ukuqondisa inyawo zethu endleleni yokuthula." 
Luke1:80 Wakhula-ke umntwana omncane, waqina emoyeni, waba sezinkangala kwaze kwaba lusuku lokubonakala kwakhe kuIsrayeli." 
Luke2:1 Kwasekusithi ngalezonsuku, isimiso saphuma kuKesari uAgastasi, sokuthi kubhalwe umhlaba wonke." 
Luke2:2 Lokhukubhalwa kwakungokokuqala ukwenziwa lapho uKwiriniya engumbusi weSiriya. 
Luke2:3 Bonke basebesiya ukuze ba ye bhalwa, ngulowo lalowo emzini wakibo." 
Luke2:4 LoJosefa laye wenyuka esuka eGalili, emzini weNazaretha, waya eJudiya, emzini kaDavida, othiwa yiBhethelehema, ngoba wayengowendlu lowosendo lukaDavida," 
Luke2:5 uku ya bhalwa kanye loMariya umkakhe ayemganile, owayezithwele." 
Luke2:6 Kwasekusithi belapho, zaseziphelela insuku zokubeletha kwakhe." 
Luke2:7 Wasebeletha indodana yakhe eyingqabutho, wayigoqela ngamalembu, wayilalisa emkolweni, ngoba kwakungelandawo yabo endlini yezihambi." 
Luke2:8 Njalo kwakukhona kulelolizwe abelusi ababehlala egangeni futhi belinde umhlambi wabo ebusuku. 
Luke2:9 Njalo khangela, ingilosi yeNkosi yema eduze kwabo, lenkazimulo yeNkosi yakhanya ibazingelezele; njalo besaba ngokwesaba okukhulu." 
Luke2:10 Ingilosi yasisithi kubo: Lingesabi; ngoba khangelani, ngitshumayela indaba ezinhle kini ezentokozo enkulu, ezakuba kubantu bonke;" 
Luke2:11 ngoba lizalelwe lamuhla uMsindisi, onguKristu iNkosi, emzini kaDavida." 
Luke2:12 Njalo lokhu kuzakuba yisibonakaliso kini: Lizathola usane lugoqelwe ngamalembu, lulele emkolweni." 
Luke2:13 Njalo kwahle kwaba khona kanye lengilosi ixuku lebutho lasezulwini, lidumisa uNkulunkulu, lisithi:" 
Luke2:14 Udumo kalube kuNkulunkulu kweliphezulu, lokuthula emhlabeni; isifiso esihle ebantwini." 
Luke2:15 Kwasekusithi, ingilosi sezisukile kubo zisiya ezulwini, abantu, abangabelusi, bakhulumisana besithi: Ake siye eBhethelehema, sibone leyonto eyenzakeleyo, iNkosi esazise yona." 
Luke2:16 Basebesiza ngokuphangisa, bathola oMariya loJosefa, losane lulele emkolweni." 
Luke2:17 Sebebonile basebesazisa indawo ezizingelezeleyo ngelizwi ababelitshelwe mayelana lalo umntwana omncane. 
Luke2:18 Labo bonke aba ku zwayo bamangala ngezinto ezazikhulunywe ngabelusi kubo. 
Luke2:19 Kodwa uMariya walondoloza wonke la amazwi, enakana ngawo enhliziyweni yakhe." 
Luke2:20 Basebebuyela abelusi, bemdumisa bembonga uNkulunkulu ngazo zonke izinto ababezizwile lababezibonile, njengalokho okwakukhulunywe kubo." 
Luke2:21 Kwathi seziphelile insuku eziyisificaminwembili zokuthi umntwana omncane asokwe, ibizo lakhe laselithiwa nguJesu, elalibizwe yingilosi engakomulwa esiswini." 
Luke2:22 Kwathi seziphelele insuku zokuhlanjululwa kwakhe ngokomlayo kaMozisi, bamletha eJerusalema, ukuze ba m mise phambi kweNkosi" 
Luke2:23 (njengokulotshiweyo emlayweni weNkosi ukuthi konke okwesilisa okuvula isibeletho kuzathiwa kungcwele eNkosini) 
Luke2:24 lokuthi banikele umhlatshelo njengokutshiwo emlayweni weNkosi, amajuba amabili kumbe amaphuphu amabili enkwilimba." 
Luke2:25 Njalo khangela, kwakukhona eJerusalema umuntu, obizo lakhe linguSimeyoni, njalo lumuntu wayelungile ekhuthele ekukhonzeni, elindele induduzo kaIsrayeli, loMoya oNgcwele wayephezu kwakhe." 
Luke2:26 Futhi kwakubonakalisiwe kuye nguMoya oyiNgcwele, ukuthi kayikubona ukufa engakamboni uKristu weNkosi." 
Luke2:27 Wasengena ethempelini ngoMoya; kwathi abazali bemletha umntwana omncane uJesu, ukuze benze ngaye ngokomkhuba womlayo," 
Luke2:28 yena wasemthatha wamphatha engalweni zakhe, wabonga uNkulunkulu, wathi:" 
Luke2:29 Nkosi, khathesi iyekele inceku yakho ihambe ngokuthula, njengokwelizwi lakho;" 
Luke2:30 ngoba amehlo ami alubonile usindiso lwakho 
Luke2:31 olulungisileyo phambi kobuso babantu bonke; 
Luke2:32 ukukhanya kokwembulela abezizwe, lenkazimulo yesizwe sakho uIsrayeli." 
Luke2:33 UJosefa lonina basebemangala ngezinto ezatshiwo ngaye. 
Luke2:34 USimeyoni wasebabusisa, wathi kuMariya unina: Khangela, lo umiselwe ukuwa lokuvuka kwabanengi kuIsrayeli, lokuba yisibonakaliso esizaphikiswa;" 
Luke2:35 futhi lawe, inkemba izadabula owakho umphefumulo; ukuze imicabango yenhliziyo ezinengi yembulwe." 
Luke2:36 Njalo kwakukhona uAna umprofethikazi, indodakazi kaFanuweli, owesizwe sikaAsheri; wayesekhulile kakhulu, ebehlale lendoda iminyaka eyisikhombisa kusukela ebuntombini bakhe," 
Luke2:37 njalo wayengumfelokazi owayengaba leminyaka engamatshumi ayisificaminwembili lane, engasuki ethempelini, ekhonza ngokuzila ukudla langemikhuleko ebusuku lemini." 
Luke2:38 Laye-ke efika ngalelohola wadumisa uNkulunkulu, wakhuluma ngaye kubo bonke ababelindele inkululeko eJerusalema." 
Luke2:39 Kwathi sebeqedile konke okungokomlayo weNkosi, babuyela eGalili, emzini wakibo iNazaretha." 
Luke2:40 Lomntwana omncane wakhula, waqina emoyeni, wagcwala inhlakanipho; lomusa kaNkulunkulu wawuphezu kwakhe." 
Luke2:41 Njalo abazali bakhe babesiya eJerusalema wonke umnyaka ngomkhosi wephasika. 
Luke2:42 Kwathi eseleminyaka elitshumi lambili, sebenyukele eJerusalema njengomkhuba womkhosi," 
Luke2:43 njalo seziphelile insuku, ekubuyeleni kwabo, umntwana uJesu wasala eJerusalema; njalo uJosefa lonina bengazi;" 
Luke2:44 kodwa becabanga ukuthi wayesexukwini endleleni, bahamba uhambo losuku, bamdinga phakathi kwezinini labazana labo;" 
Luke2:45 kodwa bengamtholi, babuyela eJerusalema, bemdinga." 
Luke2:46 Kwasekusithi emva kwensuku ezintathu, bamthola ethempelini, ehlezi phakathi kwabafundisi, njalo ebalalela, futhi ebabuza." 
Luke2:47 Njalo bonke ababemuzwa bamangala kakhulu ngolwazi lempendulo zakhe. 
Luke2:48 Kwathi bembona bamangala; lonina wathi kuye: Mntana mi, wenzeleni okunje kithi? Khangela, uyihlo lami besikudinga sidubekile." 
Luke2:49 Wasesithi kubo: Ku ngani lingidinga? Belingakwazi yini ukuthi kumele ukuthi ngibe sezintweni zikaBaba? 
Luke2:50 Kodwa bona kabaliqedisisanga ilizwi alikhuluma kibo. 
Luke2:51 Wasesehla labo, weza eNazaretha; wazehlisela ngaphansi kwabo. Unina wasegcina zonke lezizinto enhliziyweni yakhe." 
Luke2:52 UJesu waseqhubeka enhlakaniphweni lekukhuleni, lekuthandekeni kuNkulunkulu lebantwini." 
Luke3:1 Kwathi ngomnyaka wetshumi lanhlanu wokubusa kukaTiberiyosi uKesari, uPontiyusi Pilatu engumbusi weJudiya, loHerodi engumtetrarki* weGalili, loFiliphu umfowabo engumtetrarki weIturiya lelizweni iTrakoniti, loLisaniya engumtetrarki weAbilene," 
Luke3:2 uAnasi loKayafasi bengabapristi abakhulu, ilizwi likaNkulunkulu lafika kuJohane indodana kaZakariya enkangala." 
Luke3:3 Wasesiza esigabeni sonke seJordani esizingelezeleyo, etshumayela ubhabhathizo lokuphenduka kube yikuthethelelwa kwezono;" 
Luke3:4 njengokulotshiweyo egwalweni lwamazwi kaIsaya umprofethi, esithi: Ilizwi lomemezayo enkangala lithi: Lungisani indlela yeNkosi; qondisani indledlana zayo." 
Luke3:5 Sonke isigodi sizagqitshwa, layo yonke intaba loqaqa kuzakwehliswa; njalo kuzaqondiswa amazombazombe, lamaxhakaxhaka ezindlela azalungiswa;" 
Luke3:6 layo yonke inyama izabona usindiso lukaNkulunkulu. 
Luke3:7 Ngakho wathi emaxukwini aphumela ukubhabhathizwa nguye: Nzalo yezinyoka, ngubani olixwayise ukubalekela ulaka oluzayo?" 
Luke3:8 Ngakho thelani izithelo ezifanele ukuphenduka; njalo lingaqali ukuthi phakathi kwenu: SiloAbrahama ongubaba wethu; ngoba ngithi kini: UNkulunkulu ulamandla okumvusela uAbrahama abantwana kulamatshe. 
Luke3:9 Lakhathesi lehloka selibekiwe empandeni zezihlahla; ngakho sonke isihlahla esingatheli isithelo esihle siyaganyulwa siphoselwe emlilweni. 
Luke3:10 Amaxuku asembuza, athi: Pho thina sizakwenzani?" 
Luke3:11 Wasephendula wathi kubo: Olezembatho ezimbili, kamuphe ongelaso; lolokudla kenze njalo." 
Luke3:12 Kwasekufika labathelisi ukuze babhabhathizwe, basebesithi kuye: Mfundisi, sizakwenzani?" 
Luke3:13 Wasesithi kubo: Lingabizi okwedlula elikumiselweyo. 
Luke3:14 Lamabutho lawo ambuza, athi: Thina-ke sizakwenzani? Wasesithi kuwo: Lingenzi udlakela emuntwini, njalo lingacali ngamanga; njalo yeneliswani yimivuzo yenu." 
Luke3:15 Kwathi abantu belindile, futhi bonke bezibuza enhliziyweni zabo ngoJohane, ukuthi kambe yena angaba enguKristu," 
Luke3:16 uJohane waphendula, esithi kubo bonke: Mina-ke ngilibhabhathiza ngamanzi; kodwa uyeza olamandla kulami, engingafanele ukuthukulula umchilo wamanyathela akhe; yena uzalibhabhathiza ngoMoya oNgcwele langomlilo;" 
Luke3:17 okhomane lwakhe lokwela lusesandleni sakhe, njalo uzahlambululisisa isibuya sakhe, abesebuthela amabele esiphaleni sakhe, kodwa amakhoba uzawatshisa ngomlilo ongacitshekiyo." 
Luke3:18 Langokulaya ngezinye izinto ezinengi, watshumayela ivangeli ebantwini." 
Luke3:19 Kodwa uHerodi umtetrarki, owayesolwe nguye ngoHerodiyasi umkaFiliphu umfowabo, langakho konke okubi ayekwenzile uHerodi," 
Luke3:20 wengezelela lalokhu phezu kwakho konke, ukuthi wamvalela uJohane entolongweni." 
Luke3:21 Kwasekusithi sebebhabhathiziwe bonke abantu, laye uJesu esebhabhathiziwe, ekhuleka, izulu lavulwa," 
Luke3:22 uMoya oyiNgcwele wasesehlela phezu kwakhe elesimo somzimba onjengowejuba, lelizwi lavela ezulwini, lisithi: Wena uyiNdodana yami ethandekayo, ngithokoza ngawe." 
Luke3:23 Yena uJesu waseqala ukuba leminyaka engaba ngamatshumi amathathu, yena (njengokunakana kwabo) eyindodana kaJosefa, kaEli," 
Luke3:24 kaMathati, kaLevi, kaMeliki, kaJanayi, kaJosefa," 
Luke3:25 kaMatathiya, kaAmosi, kaNahume, kaEseli, kaNagayi," 
Luke3:26 kaMahati, kaMatathiya, kaSemeyini, kaJosefa, kaJuda," 
Luke3:27 kaJohanani, kaResa, kaZerubhabheli, kaSalatiyeli, kaNeri," 
Luke3:28 kaMeliki, kaAdi, kaKosamu, kaElimodamu, kaEri," 
Luke3:29 kaJose, kaEliyezeri, kaJorima, kaMathati, kaLevi," 
Luke3:30 kaSimeyoni, kaJuda, kaJosefa, kaJonanu, kaEliyakhimi," 
Luke3:31 kaMeleya, kaMena, kaMathata, kaNathani, kaDavida," 
Luke3:32 kaJese, kaObedi, kaBowosi, kaSalimoni, kaNashoni," 
Luke3:33 kaAminadaba, kaAramu, kaEsiromu, kaFaresi, kaJuda," 
Luke3:34 kaJakobe, kaIsaka, kaAbrahama, kaThara, kaNahori," 
Luke3:35 kaSarugi, kaRagawu, kaFaleki, kaEberi, kaSala," 
Luke3:36 kaKayinani, kaArpakishadi, kaShemu, kaNowe, kaLameki," 
Luke3:37 kaMethusala, kaEnoki, kaJaredi, kaMaleleyeli, kaKayinani," 
Luke3:38 kaEnosi, kaSeti, kaAdamu, kaNkulunkulu." 
Luke4:1 Kwathi uJesu egcwele uMoya oNgcwele wabuya evela eJordani, wakhokhelelwa nguMoya enkangala," 
Luke4:2 walingwa nguSathane insuku ezingamatshumi amane. Njalo kadlanga lutho ngalezonsuku; kwathi seziphelile, ekucineni walamba." 
Luke4:3 USathane wasesithi kuye: Uba uyiNdodana kaNkulunkulu, tshono kulelilitshe ukuthi libe yisinkwa." 
Luke4:4 UJesu wasemphendula, wathi: Kulotshiwe ukuthi: Umuntu kayikuphila ngesinkwa sodwa, kodwa ngalo lonke ilizwi likaNkulunkulu." 
Luke4:5 USathane wasemkhokhelela entabeni ende wamtshengisa yonke imibuso yomhlaba ngesikhatshana. 
Luke4:6 USathane wasesithi kuye: Amandla wonke la lobukhosi bayo ngizakunika; ngoba anikwe mina, njalo ngiwanika loba ngubani engithandayo." 
Luke4:7 Ngakho wena uba ukhonza phambi kwami, konke kuzakuba ngokwakho." 
Luke4:8 UJesu wasemphendula wathi: Suka ngemva kwami, Sathane; ngoba kulotshiwe ukuthi: Uzakhothamela eNkosini uNkulunkulu wakho, njalo umkhonze yena yedwa." 
Luke4:9 Wasemkhokhelela eJerusalema, wammisa engqongeni yethempeli, wasesithi kuye: Uba uyiNdodana kaNkulunkulu, ziwisele phansi usuka lapha;" 
Luke4:10 ngoba kulotshiwe ukuthi: Uzalaya ingilosi zakhe ngawe, ukukulondoloza;" 
Luke4:11 lokuthi: Zizakuphatha ngezandla, hlezi loba nini ukhube unyawo lwakho elitsheni." 
Luke4:12 UJesu wasephendula wathi kuye: Kuthiwa: Ungayilingi iNkosi uNkulunkulu wakho. 
Luke4:13 USathane eseqedile ukulinga konke, wasuka kuye kwaze kwaba ngesinye isikhathi." 
Luke4:14 UJesu wasebuyela eGalili ngamandla kaMoya; lendumela yakhe yaphuma kuso sonke isigaba esizingelezeleyo. 
Luke4:15 Yena wasefundisa emasinagogeni abo, edunyiswa yibo bonke." 
Luke4:16 Wasefika eNazaretha, lapho ayondliwe khona; njengokwejwayela kwakhe wasengena esinagogeni ngosuku lwesabatha, wasukuma ukuze afunde." 
Luke4:17 Wasenikwa ugwalo lomprofethi uIsaya. Waseluvula ugwalo, wayithola indawo okubhalwe kuyo ukuthi:" 
Luke4:18 UMoya weNkosi uphezu kwami, ngakho ingigcobile ukuthi ngitshumayele ivangeli kubayanga; ingithumile ukusilisa abadabukileyo enhliziyweni; ukumemezela ukukhululwa kwabathunjiweyo, lokubona kwabayiziphofu, ukukhulula ababandezelweyo," 
Luke4:19 ukumemezela umnyaka womusa weNkosi. 
Luke4:20 Waselugoqa ugwalo, wa lu buyisela encekwini, wahlala phansi; lamehlo abo bonke ababesesinagogeni amjolozela." 
Luke4:21 Waseqala ukuthi kubo: Lamuhla lumbhalo ugcwalisekile endlebeni zenu. 
Luke4:22 Labo bonke bafakaza ngaye, bamangala ngamazwi omusa aphuma emlonyeni wakhe, basebesithi: Lo kayisiyo indodana kaJosefa yini?" 
Luke4:23 Wasesithi kubo: Isibili lizakutsho kimi lesisaga: Melaphi, zelaphe wena; konke lokho esikuzwileyo okwenzeke eKapenawume, kwenze lalapha emzini wakini." 
Luke4:24 Wathi-ke: Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Kakho umprofethi owemukelekayo elizweni lakibo. 
Luke4:25 Kodwa ngeqiniso ngithi kini: Abafelokazi abanengi babekhona koIsrayeli ensukwini zikaElija, lapho izulu lalivalekile iminyaka emithathu lenyanga eziyisithupha, kwaze kwaba khona indlala enkulu emhlabeni wonke;" 
Luke4:26 kodwa uElija kathunyelwanga lakomunye wabo, ngaphandle kweSarepita yeSidoni kowesifazana ong umfelokazi." 
Luke4:27 Futhi amalephero amanengi ayekhona koIsrayeli ngesikhathi sikaElisha umprofethi; kodwa kakuhlanjululwanga lamunye wawo, ngaphandle kukaNamani umSiriya." 
Luke4:28 Kwathi bonke ababesesinagogeni bagcwala ulaka, bezizwa lezizinto," 
Luke4:29 basebesukuma, bamkhuphela ngaphandle komuzi, bamqhubela eliweni lentaba umuzi wabo owawakhiwe phezu kwayo, ukuze bamphosele phansi eliweni." 
Luke4:30 Kodwa yena edabula phakathi kwabo wahamba. 
Luke4:31 Wasesehlela eKapenawume umuzi weGalili; njalo wayebafundisa ngamasabatha. 
Luke4:32 Basebebabaza ngemfundiso yakhe, ngoba ilizwi lakhe lalilamandla." 
Luke4:33 Futhi kwakukhona esinagogeni umuntu owayelomoya wedimoni ongcolileyo, wasememeza ngelizwi elikhulu" 
Luke4:34 wathi: Yekela! Silani lawe, Jesu weNazaretha? Uze ukusibhubhisa yini? Ngiyakwazi wena ukuthi ungubani: ONgcwele kaNkulunkulu." 
Luke4:35 UJesu wasemkhuza, esithi: Thula, uphume kuye! Ledimoni selimwisele phakathi laphuma kuye, lingamlimazanga." 
Luke4:36 Kwasekubafikela bonke ukumangala, bakhulumisana, besithi: Yilizwi bani leli, ukuthi ngegunya langamandla uyalaya omoya abangcolileyo, baphume?" 
Luke4:37 Yasiphuma indumela yakhe kuyo yonke indawo yesigaba esizingelezeleyo. 
Luke4:38 Wasesukuma waphuma esinagogeni, wayangena endlini kaSimoni; njalo uninazala kaSimoni wayebanjwe luqhuqho olukhulu; basebemcelela kuye." 
Luke4:39 Wasemengama, wakhuza uqhuqho, khona lwamyekela; njalo wahle wasukuma wabasebenzela." 
Luke4:40 Kwathi ekutshoneni kwelanga, bonke ababelababegula izifo ezitshiyeneyo babaletha kuye; wasebeka izandla kulowo lalowo wabo wabasilisa." 
Luke4:41 Kwasekuphuma lamadimoni kwabanengi, ememeza esithi: Wena unguKristu iNdodana kaNkulunkulu. Wase wa khuza engawavumeli ukuthi akhulume, ngoba ayemazi ukuthi unguKristu." 
Luke4:42 Kwathi sekusile, waphuma waya endaweni eyinkangala, lamaxuku amdinga, eza kuye, amvimbela ukuthi angasuki kiwo." 
Luke4:43 Kodwa wathi kuwo: Ngimele ukutshumayela ivangeli lombuso kaNkulunkulu lakweminye imizi; ngoba ngithunyelwe lokho. 
Luke4:44 Wayesetshumayela emasinagogeni eGalili. 
Luke5:1 Kwasekusithi ixuku selimminyezele ukuzwa ilizwi likaNkulunkulu, yena wasesima eceleni kwechibi leGenesaretha;" 
Luke5:2 wabona imikhumbi emibili imi eceleni kwechibi; kodwa abagoli benhlanzi babephumile kiyo behlambulula amambule. 
Luke5:3 Wasengena komunye wemikhumbi, ongokaSimoni, wamcela ukuthi asuke kancinyane emhlabathini. Wasehlala phansi wafundisa amaxuku esemkhunjini." 
Luke5:4 Kwathi eseqedile ukukhuluma, wathi kuSimoni: Ngena enzikini, wehlise amambule akho ukuze ubambe." 
Luke5:5 USimoni wasephendula wathi kuye: Nkosi, sitshikatshike ubusuku bonke, kasibambanga lutho; kodwa ngokutsho kwakho ngizakwehlisa imbule." 
Luke5:6 Kwathi sebekwenzile lokho, babamba inkithinkithi enkulu yenhlanzi. Laselidabuka imbule labo." 
Luke5:7 Basebeqhweba ababehlanganyele labo ababekomunye umkhumbi, ukuthi beze babasize; beza-ke bayigcwalisa imikhumbi yomibili, yaze yaqalisa ukutshona." 
Luke5:8 Kuthe uSimoni Petro ebona, wawela emadolweni kaJesu, esithi: Suka kimi, Nkosi, ngoba ngingumuntu oyisoni." 
Luke5:9 Ngoba ukumangala kwakumbambile, labo bonke ababelaye, ngokubanjwa kwenhlanzi ababezibambile;" 
Luke5:10 ngokufananayo-ke loJakobe loJohane, amadodana kaZebediya, ababehlanganyele loSimoni. UJesu wasesithi kuSimoni: Ungesabi; kusukela khathesi uzagola abantu." 
Luke5:11 Kwathi sebeyifikisile imikhumbi emhlabathini, batshiya konke, bamlandela." 
Luke5:12 Kwasekusithi, esekomunye wemizi, khangela-ke, indoda egcwele ubulephero; yathi ibona uJesu, yawa ngobuso, yamncenga, isithi: Nkosi, aluba uthanda, ungangihlambulula." 
Luke5:13 Waseselula isandla, wayithinta, esithi: Ngiyathanda, hlambuluka. Njalo bahle basuka ubulephero kuyo." 
Luke5:14 Yena waseyilaya ukuthi ingatsheli muntu; wathi: Kodwa hamba uziveze kumpristi, unikelele ukuhlanjululwa kwakho, njengoba uMozisi walaya, kube yibufakazi kubo." 
Luke5:15 Kodwa kwayilapho ukukhuluma ngaye kwanda kakhulu; lamaxuku amanengi abuthana ukulalela, lokusiliswa nguye ezifweni zawo." 
Luke5:16 Kodwa yena waphumela enkangala wakhuleka. 
Luke5:17 Kwasekusithi ngolunye lwezinsuku, yena wayefundisa; njalo kwakuhlezi abaFarisi labafundisi bomlayo, abavela kuyo yonke imizana yeGalili leJudiya leJerusalema; lamandla eNkosi aye khona ukubasilisa." 
Luke5:18 Njalo khangela, amadoda ethwele ngohlaka umuntu owayeyisigoga; njalo adinga ukumngenisa a m beke phambi kwakhe;" 
Luke5:19 kodwa engatholi indlela yokumngenisa ngenxa yexuku, akhwela ephahleni lwendlu, amehlisa ezitineni zokufulela ngethala phambi kukaJesu phakathi laphakathi." 
Luke5:20 Kwathi ebona ukholo lwawo, wathi kuye: Ndoda, izono zakho uzithethelelwe." 
Luke5:21 Ababhali labaFarisi basebeqala ukunakana, besithi: Ungubani lo okhuluma inhlamba? Ngubani ongathethelela izono, ngaphandle kukaNkulunkulu yedwa?" 
Luke5:22 Kwathi uJesu esazi ukunakana kwabo waphendula wathi kubo: Linakanani enhliziyweni zenu? 
Luke5:23 Yikuphi okulula, ukuthi: Izono zakho uzithethelelwe; kumbe ukuthi: Sukuma uhambe?" 
Luke5:24 Kodwa ukuze lazi ukuthi iNdodana yomuntu ilamandla okuthethelela izono emhlabeni (wathi koyisigoga): Ngithi kuwe: Sukuma, uthathe ithala lakho, uye endlini yakho." 
Luke5:25 Njalo wahle wasukuma phambi kwabo, wathatha lokhu ayelele kukho, wasuka waya endlini yakhe, edumisa uNkulunkulu." 
Luke5:26 Lokusanganiseka kwababamba bonke, basebedumisa uNkulunkulu, bagcwala ukwesaba, besithi: Sibone izimanga lamuhla." 
Luke5:27 Njalo emva kwalezizinto waphuma, wabona umthelisi, uLevi ngebizo, ehlezi endlini yokuthelisela, wathi kuye: Ngilandela." 
Luke5:28 Wasetshiya konke, wasukuma wamlandela." 
Luke5:29 ULevi wasemenzela idili elikhulu endlini yakhe; njalo kwakukhona ixuku elikhulu labathelisi lelabanye abahlala kanye labo ekudleni. 
Luke5:30 Ababhali babo labaFarisi basebesola kubafundi bakhe, besithi: Kungani lisidla linatha labathelisi lezoni?" 
Luke5:31 UJesu wasephendula wathi kubo: Abaphilayo kabasweli melaphi, kodwa abagulayo." 
Luke5:32 Kangizanga ukubiza abalungileyo, kodwa izoni zize ekuphendukeni." 
Luke5:33 Basebesithi kuye: Kungani abafundi bakaJohane bezila ukudla kanengi, benze imikhuleko, kunjalo lababaFarisi; kodwa abakho bayadla banathe?" 
Luke5:34 Kodwa wathi kubo: Kambe, lingabazilisa ukudla yini abantwana abasendlini yomthimba, umyeni eselabo?" 
Luke5:35 Kodwa zizafika insuku, lapho umyeni ezasuswa kubo, njalo khona bezazila ukudla ngalezonsuku." 
Luke5:36 Wasebatshela futhi umfanekiso wokuthi: Kakho obekela isichibi sesembatho esitsha esembathweni esidala; uba kungenjalo, esitsha laso siyadabula, lesichibi sesitsha asihambelani lesidala." 
Luke5:37 Futhi kakho ofaka iwayini elitsha emigodleni emidala; uba-ke kungenjalo, iwayini elitsha lizadabula imigodla, lichitheke lona, lemigodla yonakale." 
Luke5:38 Kodwa iwayini elitsha limele lifakwe emigodleni emitsha, njalo kokubili kulondolozeke." 
Luke5:39 Njalo kakho othi esenathe iwayini elidala ahle afise elitsha; ngoba uthi: Elidala lingcono. 
Luke6:1 Kwasekusithi ngesabatha lesibili lakuqala edabula emasimini amabele, abafundi bakhe bakha izikhwebu, badla, be zi hlikihla ngezandla." 
Luke6:2 Kodwa abathile babaFarisi bathi kubo: Lenzelani okungavunyelwa ukwenziwa ngensuku zesabatha? 
Luke6:3 UJesu wasebaphendula, wathi: Alifundanga lalokho yini, uDavida akwenzayo, mhla elambile yena lababelaye," 
Luke6:4 ukuthi wayangena njani endlini kaNkulunkulu, wathatha izinkwa zokubukiswa, wasesidla, wanika lalabo ababelaye; ezingavunyelwa ukudliwa ngaphandle kwabapristi bodwa?" 
Luke6:5 Wasesithi kubo: INdodana yomuntu iyiNkosi leyesabatha. 
Luke6:6 Kwasekusithi langelinye isabatha wangena esinagogeni, wafundisa; njalo kwakukhona umuntu lapho, osandla sakhe sokunene sasitshwabhene." 
Luke6:7 Ababhali labaFarisi basebemqaphela, ukuthi uzasilisa ngesabatha yini; ukuze bathole oko kumbeka icala." 
Luke6:8 Kodwa wayazi imicabango yabo, wathi kumuntu olesandla esitshwabheneyo: Sukuma, ume phakathi. Wasukuma-ke wema." 
Luke6:9 UJesu wasesithi kubo: Ngizalibuza ulutho: Kuvunyelwe yini ngamasabatha ukwenza okulungileyo kumbe ukwenza okubi? Ukusindisa impilo kumbe ukuchitha? 
Luke6:10 Wasebathalaza bonke, wathi kumuntu: Yelula isandla sakho. Wasesenza njalo. Isandla sakhe sasesisiliswa saphila njengesinye." 
Luke6:11 Basebegcwala ubuhlanya; bakhulumisana omunye komunye, ukuthi bangamenzani uJesu." 
Luke6:12 Kwasekusithi ngalezonsuku waphuma waya entabeni ukuyakhuleka; wahlala ubusuku bonke ekukhulekeni kuNkulunkulu. 
Luke6:13 Kwathi sekusile, wabizela kuye abafundi bakhe; wakhetha kubo abalitshumi lambili, ababiza futhi ngokuthi ngabaphostoli;" 
Luke6:14 uSimoni laye ambiza ngokuthi nguPetro, loAndreya umfowabo, uJakobe loJohane, uFiliphu loBartolomewu," 
Luke6:15 uMathewu loTomasi, uJakobe okaAlfewu, loSimoni owayethiwa ngumZelothi," 
Luke6:16 uJudasi kaJakobe, loJudasi Iskariyothi, laye owaba ngumnikeli." 
Luke6:17 Wasesehla labo, wema esigcawini, lexuku labafundi bakhe, lexuku elikhulu labantu abavela kuyo yonke iJudiya leJerusalema, langaselwandle lweTire leSidoni, ababezile ukumuzwa, lokusiliswa ezifweni zabo;" 
Luke6:18 lalabo ababekhathazwa ngomoya abangcolileyo, basebesiliswa." 
Luke6:19 Lexuku lonke ladinga ukumthinta; ngoba kwaphuma amandla kuye, asebasilisa bonke." 
Luke6:20 Yena wasephakamisela amehlo akhe kubafundi bakhe wathi: Libusisiwe, bayanga, ngoba umbuso kaNkulunkulu ungowenu." 
Luke6:21 Libusisiwe, lina elilambileyo khathesi, ngoba lizasuthiswa. Libusisiwe, lina elikhalayo khathesi, ngoba lizahleka." 
Luke6:22 Libusisiwe, nxa abantu belizonda, njalo nxa belehlukanisa, belithuka, belahla ibizo lenu ngokungathi libi, ngenxa yeNdodana yomuntu." 
Luke6:23 Thokozani ngalolosuku leqe ngokuthokoza; ngoba khangelani, umvuzo wenu mkhulu ezulwini; ngoba oyise benza njalo kubaprofethi." 
Luke6:24 Kodwa maye kini lina elinothileyo! Ngoba seliyemukele induduzo yenu. 
Luke6:25 Maye kini, lina elisuthiyo! Ngoba lizalamba. Maye kini, lina elihlekayo khathesi! Ngoba lizalila, likhale." 
Luke6:26 Maye kini, nxa abantu bonke bekhuluma kuhle ngani! Ngoba oyise babesenza njalo kubaprofethi bamanga." 
Luke6:27 Kodwa ngithi kini elizwayo: Thandani izitha zenu, lenze okuhle kwabalizondayo," 
Luke6:28 libusise abaliqalekisayo, libakhulekele abaliphatha kubi."
