Luke20:42 Ngoba uDavida uqobo lwakhe uthi encwadini yeziHlabelelo: INkosi yathi eNkosini yami: Hlala ngakwesokunene sami," 
Luke20:43 ngize ngenze izitha zakho zibe yisenabelo senyawo zakho. 
Luke20:44 Ngakho uDavida umbiza ngokuthi yiNkosi, pho uyindodana yakhe njani?" 
Luke20:45 Kwathi besalalele abantu bonke, wathi kubafundi bakhe:" 
Luke20:46 Xwayani ababhali abathanda ukuhamba bembethe izembatho ezinde, njalo bethanda ukubingelelwa emidangeni, lezihlalo eziqakathekileyo emasinagogeni, lezihlalo zabahloniphekayo ezilayelweni;" 
Luke20:47 abadla izindlu zabafelokazi, bekhuleka isikhathi eside ngokuzenzisa. Laba bazakwemukela ukulahlwa okukhulu." 
Luke21:1 Wathi ephakamisa amehlo wabona abanothileyo bephosela iminikelo yabo esitsheni somnikelo. 
Luke21:2 Wabona lomfelokazi othile ongumyanga ephosela khona inhlamvana ezincane ezimbili zemali. 
Luke21:3 Wathi: Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Lumfelokazi ongumyanga uphosele okwedlula okwabo bonke; 
Luke21:4 ngoba bonke laba baphosele kokunengi kwabo eminikelweni kaNkulunkulu, kodwa yena ebuyangeni bakhe uphosele konke alakho abephila ngakho." 
Luke21:5 Abanye besakhuluma ngethempeli, ukuthi liceciswe ngamatshe amahle langezipho, wathi:" 
Luke21:6 Lezizinto elizibonayo, kuzafika insuku okungayikutshiywa ngazo ilitshe phezu kwelitshe, elingayikudilizelwa phansi." 
Luke21:7 Basebembuza, besithi: Mfundisi, pho lezizinto zizakuba nini? Lesibonakaliso siyini, lapho sekuzakwenzeka lezizinto?" 
Luke21:8 Wasesithi: Qaphelani ukuthi lingaduhiswa; ngoba abanengi bazakuza ebizweni lami, besithi: Ngi nguye; futhi: Isikhathi sesisondele. Ngakho lingabalandeli." 
Luke21:9 Njalo nxa lisizwa ngezimpi langeziphithiphithi, lingethuki; ngoba lezizinto zimele ukuthi zenzeke kuqala, kodwa ukuphela kakuhle ku fik e." 
Luke21:10 Wasesithi kubo: Isizwe sizavukela isizwe, lombuso u vuk ele umbuso;" 
Luke21:11 njalo kuzakuba khona ukuzamazama komhlaba okukhulu indawo ngendawo lezindlala labomatshayabhuqe bezifo; kube khona lezinto ezesabekayo lezibonakaliso ezinkulu ezivela ezulwini. 
Luke21:12 Kodwa ngaphambi kwakho konke lokhu bazalibamba ngezandla zabo, ba li zingele, ba li nikele emasinagogeni lezintolongweni, ba li se phambi kwamakhosi lababusi, ngenxa yebizo lami." 
Luke21:13 Njalo lokhu kuzaphenduka kini kube yibufakazi. 
Luke21:14 Ngakho kubekeni enhliziyweni zenu ukuthi linganakani ngaphambili nge lizakuphendula; 
Luke21:15 ngoba mina ngizalinika umlomo lenhlakanipho, abangekuphike, bamelane lakho, bonke abayizitha zenu." 
Luke21:16 Njalo lizanikelwa langabazali labafowenu lezihlobo labangane, njalo bazabulala abanye benu." 
Luke21:17 Njalo lizazondwa yibo bonke ngenxa yebizo lami. 
Luke21:18 Kodwa kakuyikulahleka ngitsho unwele lwekhanda lenu. 
Luke21:19 Ekubekezeleni kwenu zuzani imiphefumulo yenu. 
Luke21:20 Kodwa nxa libona iJerusalema ihanqwe ngamabutho, yazini-ke ukuthi sekusondele ukuchitheka kwayo." 
Luke21:21 Ngalesosikhathi abaseJudiya kababalekele ezintabeni; labaphakathi kwayo baphume; labasemaphandleni bangangeni kuyo. 
Luke21:22 Ngoba lezi zinsuku zempindiselo, ukuze kugcwaliseke zonke izinto ezilotshiweyo." 
Luke21:23 Kodwa maye kwabakhulelweyo labamunyisayo ngalezonsuku! Ngoba kuzakuba khona ukuhlupheka okukhulu emhlabeni, lolaka kulesisizwe." 
Luke21:24 Njalo bazakuwa ngobukhali benkemba, bathunjelwe ezizweni zonke; leJerusalema inyathelelwe phansi ngabezizwe, kuze kugcwaliseke izikhathi zabezizwe." 
Luke21:25 Kuzakuba khona izibonakaliso elangeni lenyangeni lezinkanyezini; lemhlabeni usizi lwezizwe ngokudideka; kudume ulwandle lamagagasi," 
Luke21:26 abantu baphele amandla ngenxa yokwesaba langokubona lokho okuzayo emhlabeni; ngoba amandla amazulu azazanyazanyiswa. 
Luke21:27 Khona-ke bezayibona iNdodana yomuntu isiza eyezini ilamandla lenkazimulo enkulu. 
Luke21:28 Njalo nxa kuqala ukwenzeka lezizinto, manini liqonde njalo liphakamise amakhanda enu; ngoba kusondele ukukhululwa kwenu." 
Luke21:29 Wasebatshela umfanekiso: Khangelani umkhiwa lazo zonke izihlahla; 
Luke21:30 nxa sezihluma, liyazibonela lani likwazi ukuthi ihlobo selisondele." 
Luke21:31 Ngokunjalo lani, nxa libona lezizinto zisenzeka, yazini ukuthi umbuso kaNkulunkulu useduze." 
Luke21:32 Ngiqinisile ngithi kini: Lesisizukulwana asisoze sidlule, kuze kwenzeke zonke izinto." 
Luke21:33 Kuzadlula izulu lomhlaba, kodwa amazwi ami kawasoze adlule." 
Luke21:34 Njalo ziqapheleni, ukuthi inhliziyo zenu zingasindwa ngenxa yokuminza lokudakwa lokuphisekela izinto zalokhukusila, lalolosuku lulifikele lingananzelele;" 
Luke21:35 ngoba luzafika njengomjibila phezu kwabo bonke abahlezi ebusweni bomhlaba wonke. 
Luke21:36 Ngakho lindani ngezikhathi zonke likhulekele ukuthi lifanele ukuphepha zonke lezizinto ezizakwenzeka, lokuma phambi kweNdodana yomuntu." 
Luke21:37 Njalo wayefundisa ethempelini emini; kodwa ebusuku wayephuma ayehlala entabeni ethiwa ngeyeMihlwathi. 
Luke21:38 Lekuseni kakhulu abantu bonke babesiza kuye ethempelini ukumuzwa. 
Luke22:1 Kwasekusondela umkhosi we sinkwa esingelamvubelo, othiwa liphasika." 
Luke22:2 Abapristi abakhulu lababhali basebedinga ukuthi bangambulala njani; ngoba babesesaba abantu. 
Luke22:3 USathane wasengena kuJudasi othiwa nguIskariyothi, owayengowenani labalitshumi lambili." 
Luke22:4 Wasesuka wayakhuluma labapristi abakhulu lezinduna ngokuthi angamnikela njani kubo. 
Luke22:5 Basebethokoza, basebevumelana ukumnika imali." 
Luke22:6 Yena wasevuma, njalo wadinga ithuba elihle lokumnikela kubo lingekho ixuku." 
Luke22:7 Lwaselufika usuku lwe sinkwa esingelamvubelo, okwakumele kuhlatshwe ngalo iphasika." 
Luke22:8 Wasethuma uPetro loJohane, esithi: Hambani li ye silungisela iphasika, ukuze sidle." 
Luke22:9 Basebesithi kuye: Uthanda ukuthi silungise ngaphi? 
Luke22:10 Wasesithi kubo: Khangelani, kuzakuthi selingenile emzini, umuntu uzahlangana lani ethwele imbiza yamanzi; limlandele endlini azangena kuyo." 
Luke22:11 Beselisithi kumninindlu: Uthi uMfundisi kuwe: Ingaphi indlu yezihambi, lapho engingadlela khona iphasika labafundi bami?" 
Luke22:12 Yena-ke uzalitshengisa indlu enkulu ephezulu eyendlelweyo; lilungise khona. 
Luke22:13 Bahamba-ke bafica njengokutsho kwakhe kubo; basebelungisa iphasika. 
Luke22:14 Kwathi selifikile ihola, wahlala phansi, labaphostoli abalitshumi lambili belaye." 
Luke22:15 Wasesithi kubo: Ngokunxwanela nginxwanele ukudla lani leliphasika ngingakahlupheki; 
Luke22:16 ngoba ngithi kini: Kangisoze ngidle futhi kulo, lize ligcwaliseke embusweni kaNkulunkulu." 
Luke22:17 Wasethatha inkezo, esebongile wathi: Thathani lokhu, beselisabelana;" 
Luke22:18 ngoba ngithi kini: Kangisoze nginathe okwesithelo sevini, kuze kufike umbuso kaNkulunkulu." 
Luke22:19 Wasethatha isinkwa, esebongile wa si hlephuna, wabanika, esithi: Lokhu kungumzimba wami, owanikelelwa lina; lokhu kwenzeni ukungikhumbula." 
Luke22:20 Ngokunjalo lenkezo emva kokudla, esithi: Inkezo le iyisivumelwano esitsha egazini lami, elichithelwa lina." 
Luke22:21 Kodwa khangelani, isandla songinikelayo silami etafuleni." 
Luke22:22 Ngoba isibili iNdodana yomuntu ihamba njengokumisiweyo; kodwa maye kulowomuntu enikelwa nguye! 
Luke22:23 Bona basebeqala ukubuzana ukuthi kambe ngubani kubo ozakwenza lokho. 
Luke22:24 Kwavela lokuphikisana phakathi kwabo okokuthi nguwuphi kubo ongathiwa ngomkhulu. 
Luke22:25 Wasesithi kubo: Amakhosi abezizwe azibusa ngobulukhuni, leziphathamandla zazo zithiwa ngabasizi." 
Luke22:26 Kodwa lina kakungabi njalo; kodwa omkhulu phakathi kwenu kabe njengomncinyane, longumkhokheli njengosebenzayo." 
Luke22:27 Ngoba nguwuphi omkhulu, lowo ohleziyo ekudleni kumbe lowo osebenzayo? Kayisilowo yini ohlezi ekudleni? Kodwa mina ngiphakathi kwenu njengaye osebenzayo." 
Luke22:28 Lina-ke liyibo ababehlezi lami ezilingweni zami; 
Luke22:29 njalo mina ngilimisele umbuso, njengoba uBaba engimisele," 
Luke22:30 ukuthi lidle linathe etafuleni lami embusweni wami, lihlale ezihlalweni zobukhosi, lisehlulela izizwe ezilitshumi lambili zakoIsrayeli." 
Luke22:31 INkosi yasisithi: Simoni, Simoni, khangela, uSathane ulifunisisile, ukuze a li hlungule njengamabele;" 
Luke22:32 kodwa mina ngikukhulekele, ukuze ukholo lwakho lungapheli; wena-ke nxa usuphendukile uqinise abazalwane bakho." 
Luke22:33 Kodwa wathi kuye: Nkosi, lentolongweni lekufeni ngilungele ukuya khona lawe." 
Luke22:34 Kodwa yena wathi: Ngiyakutshela, Petro, iqhude kaliyikukhala lamuhla, ungakaphiki kathathu ukuthi uyangazi." 
Luke22:35 Wasesithi kubo: Mhla ngilithuma lingelamxhaka lesikhwama lamanyathela, laswela yini ulutho? Basebesithi: Lutho." 
Luke22:36 Wasesithi kubo: Kodwa khathesi lowo olomxhaka ka wu thathe, ngokunjalo lesikhwama; lalowo ongelakho, athengise isembatho sakhe, athenge inkemba." 
Luke22:37 Ngoba ngithi kini, kusamele kugcwaliseke kimi lokhu okulotshiweyo, ukuthi: Wabalwa kanye lezoni; ngoba lalezizinto eziqondane lami zilesiphetho." 
Luke22:38 Basebesithi: Nkosi, khangela, nanzi inkemba ezimbili. Wasesithi kubo: Kwanele." 
Luke22:39 Wasephuma waya entabeni yeMihlwathi njengokwejwayela; labafundi bakhe bamlandela. 
Luke22:40 Esefikile kuleyondawo, wathi kubo: Khulekani ukuthi lingangeni ekulingweni." 
Luke22:41 Yena wasemonyuka kubo okungaba libanga lokuphosa ilitshe, waguqa phansi ngamadolo wakhuleka," 
Luke22:42 esithi: Baba, uba uthanda, susa linkezo kimi; kodwa-ke kungenziwa intando yami, kodwa eyakho." 
Luke22:43 Kwabonakala kuye ingilosi evela ezulwini imqinisa. 
Luke22:44 Esesesizini olunzima, wakhuleka kakhulu. Njalo izithukuthuku zakhe zaba njengamathonsi egazi zawela emhlabathini." 
Luke22:45 Esesukumile emkhulekweni, weza kubafundi bakhe, wabafica belele ngenxa yokudabuka," 
Luke22:46 wasesithi kubo: Lilaleleni? Vukani likhuleke, ukuze lingangeni ekulingweni." 
Luke22:47 Kwathi esakhuluma, khangela, ixuku, lalowo okuthiwa nguJudasi, omunye wabalitshumi lambili, ehamba phambi kwabo, wasesondela kuJesu ukumanga." 
Luke22:48 Kodwa uJesu wathi kuye: Judasi, uyayinikela yini iNdodana yomuntu ngokuyanga?" 
Luke22:49 Kwathi labo ababengakuye sebebona okuzakwenzeka bathi kuye: Nkosi, sigadle yini ngenkemba?" 
Luke22:50 Omunye wabo wasegadla inceku yompristi omkhulu, waquma indlebe yayo yokunene." 
Luke22:51 Kodwa uJesu waphendula wathi: Yekelani kuze kube yilokhu. Wasethinta indlebe yayo, wayisilisa." 
Luke22:52 UJesu wasesithi kubapristi abakhulu lezinduna zethempeli labadala ababeze kuye: Liphume njengokuyamelana lomphangi yini lilezinkemba lezinduku? 
Luke22:53 Nxa bengilani insuku ngensuku ethempelini, kalelulanga izandla ukumelana lami; kodwa leli lihola lenu, lamandla obumnyama." 
Luke22:54 Sebembambile ba m qhuba, bamusa endlini yompristi omkhulu. UPetro waselandela ekhatshana." 
Luke22:55 Sebebasile umlilo phakathi kweguma, sebehlezi phansi ndawonye, uPetro wahlala phakathi kwabo." 
Luke22:56 Kodwa incekukazi ethile imbona ehlezi emlilweni, yamjolozela, yathi: Lumuntu laye ube laye." 
Luke22:57 Kodwa wamphika, wathi: Mama, kangimazi." 
Luke22:58 Emva kwesikhatshana omunye wasembona wathi: Lawe ungomunye wabo. Kodwa uPetro wathi: Ndoda, kangisu ye." 
Luke22:59 Sekungaba kwedlule ihola elilodwa, omunye waqinisa, esithi: Isibili laye ube laye; ngoba futhi ungumGalili." 
Luke22:60 Kodwa uPetro wathi: Ndoda, kangazi ukuthi uthini. Njalo khonokho esakhuluma lakhala iqhude." 
Luke22:61 INkosi yasiphenduka yamkhangela uPetro. UPetro waselikhumbula ilizwi leNkosi, ukuthi yakhuluma njani kuye isithi: Iqhude lingakakhali, uzangiphika kathathu." 
Luke22:62 UPetro wasephuma phandle wakhala ngokubabayo. 
Luke22:63 Lamadoda ayembambile uJesu amklolodela, a m tshaya." 
Luke22:64 Amembesa, amtshaya ubuso, asembuza, esithi: Profetha! Ngubani okutshayileyo?" 
Luke22:65 Akhuluma lezinye izinto ezinengi kuye ehlambaza. 
Luke22:66 Kwathi sekusile, abadala babantu babuthana, labapristi abakhulu lababhali, basebemusa emphakathini wabo, bathi:" 
Luke22:67 Uba unguKristu, sitshele. Wasesithi kubo: Uba ngilitshela, kalisoze likholwe;" 
Luke22:68 njalo uba lami ngilibuza, kalisoze lingiphendule, loba li ngi khulule." 
Luke22:69 Kusukela khathesi iNdodana yomuntu izahlala ngakwesokunene samandla kaNkulunkulu. 
Luke22:70 Basebesithi bonke: Kanti uyiNdodana kaNkulunkulu? Wasesithi kubo: Kutsho lina ukuthi ngiyiyo. 
Luke22:71 Basebesithi: Pho sisafunelani ubufakazi? Ngoba sesizizwele uqobo lwethu emlonyeni wakhe. 
Luke23:1 Kwasekusukuma ixuku labo lonke, lamusa kuPilatu." 
Luke23:2 Baqala ukummangalela, besithi: Simficile lo eduhisa isizwe, esalela ukuthela kuKesari, esithi nguye onguKristu iNkosi." 
Luke23:3 UPilatu wasembuza, wathi: Wena uyiNkosi yamaJuda yini? Wasemphendula wathi: Uyatsho wena." 
Luke23:4 Wasesithi uPilatu kubapristi abakhulu lemaxukwini: Kangitholi cala kulumuntu. 
Luke23:5 Kodwa baqinisa, besithi: Udunga abantu, efundisa kuyo yonke iJudiya, eqala eGalili kuze kufike lapha." 
Luke23:6 Lapho uPilatu esizwa kuthiwa iGalili wabuza ukuthi lumuntu ungumGalili yini. 
Luke23:7 Kwathi esezwile ukuthi ungowombuso kaHerodi, wamthumela kuHerodi, owayekhona laye eJerusalema ngalezonsuku." 
Luke23:8 Kwathi uHerodi embona uJesu wathokoza kakhulu; ngoba wayekade ethanda ukumbona, ngoba wayezwile okunengi ngaye; wayethemba ukuthi uzabona isibonakaliso esithile sisenziwa nguye." 
Luke23:9 Wambuza ngamazwi amanengi; kodwa yena kamphendulanga lutho. 
Luke23:10 Abapristi abakhulu lababhali babemi, bemmangalela ngamandla." 
Luke23:11 UHerodi lamabutho akhe bamyangisa, ba m klolodela, basebemgqokisa isembatho esikhazimulayo, bambuyisela kuPilatu." 
Luke23:12 Ngalolosuku uHerodi kanye loPilatu baba ngabangane omunye komunye; ngoba ngaphambi kwalokhu babelobutha phakathi kwabo. 
Luke23:13 UPilatu wasebizela ndawonye abapristi abakhulu lababusi labantu," 
Luke23:14 wathi kubo: Limlethile kimi lumuntu, ngokungathi ungoduhisa abantu; njalo khangelani, mina ngimhlolile phambi kwenu, kodwa kangitholanga cala kulumuntu ngalezozinto elimmangalela ngazo;" 
Luke23:15 hatshi ngitsho loHerodi; ngoba ngilithumeze kuye, njalo khangelani, kakulalutho olufanele ukufa olwenziwe nguye." 
Luke23:16 Ngakho ngizamtshaya ngi m khulule. 
Luke23:17 Kwakufanele ukuthi abakhululele abe munye ngomkhosi. 
Luke23:18 Bamemeza bonke kanyekanye besithi: Msuse lo, usikhululele uBarabasi" 
Luke23:19 (owayephoselwe entolongweni ngenxa yomvukela othile owenzeka phakathi komuzi langenxa yokubulala). 
Luke23:20 Ngakho uPilatu wabuya wakhuluma labo, efuna ukumkhulula uJesu." 
Luke23:21 Kodwa bamemeza, besithi: Bethela, mbethele!" 
Luke23:22 Wasesithi kubo ngokwesithathu: Ngoba lo enze bubi bani? Kangitholanga kuye icala afanele ukufa ngalo; ngakho ngiza m tshaya ngimkhulule. 
Luke23:23 Kodwa baqinisa ngamazwi amakhulu, befuna ukuthi abethelwe; lamazwi abo lawabapristi abakhulu aphumelela." 
Luke23:24 UPilatu wasequma ukuthi kwenziwe isicelo sabo. 
Luke23:25 Wasebakhululela lowo ababemcelile owayephoselwe entolongweni ngenxa yomvukela lokubulala; kodwa uJesu wamnikela entandweni yabo. 
Luke23:26 Kwathi sebemqhuba, babamba uSimoni othile umKurene owayevela emaphandleni, bamethesa isiphambano, ukuthi asi thwale ngemva kukaJesu." 
Luke23:27 Laselimlandela ixuku elikhulu labantu, labesifazana labo ababekhala bemlilela." 
Luke23:28 Kodwa uJesu ephendukela kubo wathi: Madodakazi eJerusalema, lingangikhaleli mina, kodwa zikhaleleni lina labantwana benu," 
Luke23:29 ngoba khangelani, ziyeza insuku abazakutsho ngazo ukuthi: Zibusisiwe inyumba, lezizalo ezingazalanga, lamabele angamunyisanga." 
Luke23:30 Khona bezaqalisa ukuthi ezintabeni: Welani phezu kwethu; lemaqaqeni: Sisibekeleni. 
Luke23:31 Ngoba uba besenza lezizinto esihlahleni esimanzi, kuzakwenzakalani kwesomileyo?" 
Luke23:32 Kwaqhutshwa labanye abenzi bobubi ababili, ukuthi babulawe kanye laye." 
Luke23:33 Sebefikile endaweni ethiwa luKhakhayi, bambethela khona, labenzi bobubi, omunye ngakwesokunene, lomunye ngakwesokhohlo." 
Luke23:34 UJesu wasesithi: Baba, bathethelele; ngoba kabakwazi abakwenzayo. Njalo babelana izembatho zakhe, benza inkatho yokuphosa." 
Luke23:35 Labantu bema babukela. Lababusi kanye labo ba m klolodela, besithi: Wasindisa abanye, kazisindise yena, uba yena enguKristu, okhethiweyo kaNkulunkulu." 
Luke23:36 Labebutho bamklolodela, beza kuye bamnika iviniga," 
Luke23:37 besithi: Uba wena uyiNkosi yamaJuda, zisindise wena." 
Luke23:38 Kwakukhona lombhalo ngaphezu kwakhe kulotshiwe ngamabala esiGriki langesiRoma langesiHebheru othi: LO UYINKOSI YAMAJUDA. 
Luke23:39 Lomunye wabenzi bobubi ababelengisiwe wamthuka, esithi: Uba wena unguKristu, zisindise wena lathi." 
Luke23:40 Kodwa omunye waphendula emkhuza, esithi: Wena kawumesabi yini uNkulunkulu, lokhu lawe ukulokhukulahlwa?" 
Luke23:41 Thina kambe kusilungele, ngoba semukela okulingene ukwenza kwethu; kodwa lo kenzanga lutho olungafanelanga." 
Luke23:42 Wasesithi kuJesu: Ungikhumbule, Nkosi, lapha ufika embusweni wakho." 
Luke23:43 UJesu wasesithi kuye: Ngiqinisile ngithi kuwe: Lamuhla uzakuba lami eParadise. 
Luke23:44 Kwakungaba lihola lesithupha*, kwaba khona ubumnyama phezu komhlaba wonke kwaze kwaba lihola lesificamunwemunye*," 
Luke23:45 futhi ilanga lalifiphaziwe, leveyili lethempeli ladatshulwa phakathi." 
Luke23:46 UJesu wasememeza ngelizwi elikhulu esithi: Baba, ezandleni zakho ngibeka umoya wami; esetshilo lokhu waphefumula okokucina." 
Luke23:47 Kwathi induna yekhulu isibonile okwenzekileyo, yamdumisa uNkulunkulu, isithi: Isibili lumuntu ubelungile." 
Luke23:48 Lamaxuku wonke ayebuthene ukubukela lokho, sebebonile izinto ezenzekileyo, babuyela bezitshaya izifuba." 
Luke23:49 Bonke abazana laye, labesifazana ababemlandela bevela eGalili, bema khatshana, bebona lezizinto." 
Luke23:50 Njalo khangela, indoda ethiwa nguJosefa, ilunga lomphakathi, indoda elungileyo eqotho;" 
Luke23:51 yena wayengavumelananga lecebo lesenzo sabo; waye vela eArimathiya umuzi wamaJuda, laye ngokwakhe wayelindele umbuso kaNkulunkulu;" 
Luke23:52 lowo wasuka waya kuPilatu wacela isidumbu sikaJesu. 
Luke23:53 Wasesethula wasigoqela ngelembu elicolekileyo, wasibeka engcwabeni elaligujwe edwaleni, lapho okwakungazanga kubekwe khona umuntu." 
Luke23:54 Kwakulusuku lwamalungiselelo, lesabatha laselisondela." 
Luke23:55 Labesifazana, ababeze laye bevela eGalili, balandela, balibona ingcwaba, lokuthi isidumbu sibekwe njani." 
Luke23:56 Basebebuyela emuva balungisa amakha lamagcobo. Ngesabatha basebephumula njengokomlayo. 
Luke24:1 Kodwa ngo suku lokuqala lweviki, emadabukakusa, baya engcwabeni, bephethe amakha ababewalungisile, labanye ababelabo." 
Luke24:2 Bafica ilitshe ligiqiwe lasuswa engcwabeni. 
Luke24:3 Kuthe bengena kabasitholanga isidumbu seNkosi uJesu. 
Luke24:4 Kwasekusithi bedidekile kakhulu ngalokhu, futhi khangela, amadoda amabili ema labo embethe izembatho ezicwazimulayo;" 
Luke24:5 njalo besesaba, bakhothamisa ubuso emhlabathini, athi kubo: Lidingelani ophilayo kwabafileyo?" 
Luke24:6 Kakho lapha, kodwa uvukile; khumbulani ukuthi wakhuluma njani kini, eseseGalili," 
Luke24:7 esithi: INdodana yomuntu imele ukunikelwa ezandleni zabantu abayizoni, ibethelwe, ibuye ivuke ngosuku lwesithathu." 
Luke24:8 Basebewakhumbula amazwi akhe. 
Luke24:9 Sebebuyile bevela engcwabeni, babika konke lokhu kwabalitshumi lanye lakubo bonke abanye." 
Luke24:10 KwakunguMariya Magadalena loJowana loMariya unina kaJakobe, labanye ababekanye labo, abatshela abaphostoli lezizinto." 
Luke24:11 Kodwa amazwi abo akhanya kibo njengokukhuluma okuyize, futhi kabaze bawakholwa." 
Luke24:12 Kodwa uPetro wasukuma wagijimela engcwabeni, wakhothama walunguza wabona amalembu acolekileyo ebekiwe ewodwa; wasuka, emangele ngaphakathi kwakhe ngokwenzekileyo." 
Luke24:13 Futhi khangela, ngalona lolosuku ababili babo babehamba besiya emzaneni, obizo lawo yiEmawusi, ongamastadiyu* angamatshumi ayisithupha kusukela eJerusalema." 
Luke24:14 Njalo bona babekhulumisana ngazo zonke lezizinto ezenzekileyo. 
Luke24:15 Kwasekusithi bekhulumisana bebuzana, uJesu uqobo wasondela wahamba kanye labo," 
Luke24:16 kodwa amehlo abo ayebanjiwe ukuze bangamazi. 
Luke24:17 Wasesithi kubo: Ngamazwi bani la elikhulumisana ngawo lihamba, lidanile?" 
Luke24:18 Omunye, obizo lakhe linguKleyopha, wasephendula wathi kuye: Wena nguwe wedwa isihambi eJerusalema, njalo esingaziyo yini izinto ezenzekileyo phakathi kwayo kulezinsuku?" 
Luke24:19 Wasesithi kubo: Yizinto bani? Basebesithi kuye: Ezimayelana loJesu weNazaretha, obeyindoda umprofethi olamandla ngesenzo langelizwi phambi kukaNkulunkulu labantu bonke;" 
Luke24:20 lokuthi abapristi abakhulu lababusi bethu bamnikela njani ekulahlweni kokufa, bambethela." 
Luke24:21 Kodwa thina besithemba ukuthi nguye obezakhulula uIsrayeli. Kodwa-ke phezu kwakho konke lokhu lamuhla lusuku lwesithathu selokhu lezizinto zenzakele. 
Luke24:22 Kodwa njalo abesifazana abathile abangakithi basimangalisile, ababesengcwabeni ekuseni kakhulu;" 
Luke24:23 kuthe bengasitholi isidumbu sakhe, babuya besithi babone lombono wezingilosi, ezithe uyaphila." 
Luke24:24 Labathile abebelathi baya engcwabeni, bafica kunjalo njengokutsho kwabesifazana labo; kodwa yena kabambonanga." 
Luke24:25 Yena wasesithi kubo: O lina elingelakuqedisisa elilenhliziyo ezivilaphela ukukholwa konke lokho abaprofethi abalitshela khona! 
Luke24:26 UKristu ubengamele yini ukuthi ahlupheke ngalezizinto, abesengena ebukhosini bakhe?" 
Luke24:27 Esesusela kuMozisi lakubo bonke abaprofethi, wabachasisela emibhalweni yonke izinto eziqondene laye." 
Luke24:28 Basebesondela emzaneni ababesiya kuwo; yena wasesenza angathi uyedlula. 
Luke24:29 Kodwa bamcindezela, besithi: Hlala lathi, ngoba sekuzakuhlwa, lelanga selitshonile. Wangena-ke ukuze ahlale labo." 
Luke24:30 Kwasekusithi ehlezi ekudleni labo, wathatha isinkwa wa si busisa, wa si hlephuna wabanika." 
Luke24:31 Amehlo abo asevuleka, basebemazi; wasenyamalala esuka emehlweni abo." 
Luke24:32 Basebekhulumisana besithi: Kambe inhliziyo zethu bezingavuthi yini phakathi kwethu, lapho ekhuluma lathi endleleni, lalapho esivulela imibhalo?" 
Luke24:33 Basebesukuma ngalelohola, babuyela eJerusalema, bafica abalitshumi lanye bebuthene ndawonye lalabo ababelabo," 
Luke24:34 besithi: Isibili iNkosi ivukile, ibonwe nguSimoni." 
Luke24:35 Basebelandisa okw enzekileyo endleleni, lokuthi yaziwa njani yibo ekuhlephuneni isinkwa." 
Luke24:36 Besakhuluma lezizinto, uJesu uqobo wema phakathi kwabo, wathi kubo: Ukuthula kakube kini." 
Luke24:37 Kodwa batshaywa luvalo besaba becabanga ukuthi babona umoya. 
Luke24:38 Wasesithi kubo: Likhathazekelani, njalo kuvukelani imicabango enhliziyweni zenu?" 
Luke24:39 Khangelani izandla zami lenyawo zami, ukuthi yimi uqobo; ngibambani libone, ngoba umoya kawulanyama lamathambo, njengoba lingibona ngilakho." 
Luke24:40 Esekutshilo lokho wabatshengisa izandla lenyawo zakhe. 
Luke24:41 Kodwa belokhu bengakholwa ngenxa yentokozo bemangala, wathi kubo: Lilalo ulutho lokudla lapha yini?" 
Luke24:42 Bamnika iqatha lenhlanzi eyosiweyo, lohlanga lwenyosi." 
Luke24:43 Wase ku thatha wa ku dla phambi kwabo. 
Luke24:44 Wasesithi kubo: Yila amazwi, engawakhuluma kini ngiseselani okuthi, kumele ukuthi kugcwaliseke konke okwabhalwa ngami emlayweni kaMozisi labaprofethi leziHlabelelo." 
Luke24:45 Wasevula ingqondo yabo, ukuze baqedisise imibhalo;" 
Luke24:46 wasesithi kubo: Kulotshiwe kanje, njalo uKristu kumele ahlupheke kanje, njalo avuke kwabafileyo ngosuku lwesithathu," 
Luke24:47 njalo kutshunyayelwe ebizweni lakhe ukuphenduka lothethelelo lwezono ezizweni zonke, kuqalwa eJerusalema." 
Luke24:48 Lina-ke lingabafakazi balezizinto. 
Luke24:49 Futhi khangelani, mina ngiyathumela kini isithembiso sikaBaba; kodwa lina hlalani emzini weJerusalema, lize lembathiswe amandla avela phezulu." 
Luke24:50 Wasebakhokhela ephuma phandle baze bafika eBethani; ephakamisa izandla zakhe wababusisa. 
Luke24:51 Kwasekusithi esababusisa, wehlukana labo, wenyukiselwa ezulwini." 
Luke24:52 Basebemkhonza, babuyela eJerusalema belentokozo enkulu;" 
Luke24:53 baqhubeka besethempelini, bebonga bedumisa uNkulunkulu. Ameni." 
John1:1 Ekuqaleni wayekhona uLizwi, njalo uLizwi wayeloNkulunkulu, njalo uLizwi wayenguNkulunkulu." 
John1:2 Yena lo wayeloNkulunkulu ekuqaleni. 
John1:3 Zonke izinto zenziwa ngaye, njalo ngaphandle kwakhe kakulalutho lolulodwa olwenziwayo lolo olwenziweyo." 
John1:4 Impilo yayikuye, njalo impilo yayiyikukhanya kwabantu," 
John1:5 lokukhanya kukhanya emnyameni, kodwa ubumnyama kabukwemukelanga." 
John1:6 Kwavela umuntu ethunywe nguNkulunkulu, obizo lakhe linguJohane;" 
John1:7 yena lo wezela ubufakazi, ukuze afakaze ngokukhanya, ukuze bonke bakholwe ngaye." 
John1:8 Yena wayengayisikho ukukhanya, kodwa ukuze afakaze ngokukhanya." 
John1:9 Kwakuyikukhanya okuqotho, okukhanyisa wonke umuntu oza emhlabeni." 
John1:10 Wayekhona emhlabeni, njalo umhlaba wenziwa ngaye, kodwa umhlaba kawumazanga." 
John1:11 Weza kokwakhe, kodwa abakhe kabamemukelanga." 
John1:12 Kodwa bonke abamemukelayo, wabapha amandla okuthi babe ngabantwana bakaNkulunkulu, labo abakholwa ebizweni lakhe;" 
John1:13 abazalwa kungeyisikho ngegazi, langentando yenyama, langentando yendoda, kodwa nguNkulunkulu." 
John1:14 ULizwi wasesiba yinyama, wahlala phakathi kwethu, njalo sabona inkazimulo yakhe, inkazimulo injengeyozelwe yedwa kaYise, egcwele umusa leqiniso." 
John1:15 UJohane wafakaza ngaye, wamemeza wathi: Nguye lo ebengisitsho ngaye ukuthi: Lowo ozayo emva kwami uphambi kwami; ngoba wayekhona kuqala kulami." 
John1:16 Lekugcwaleni kwakhe thina semukele sonke, futhi umusa ngomusa;" 
John1:17 ngoba umlayo wanikwa ngoMozisi, umusa leqiniso kweza ngoJesu Kristu." 
John1:18 Kakho owake wabona uNkulunkulu; iNdodana ezelwe yodwa, esesifubeni sikaYise, yiyo e m vezileyo." 
John1:19 Njalo lobu yibufakazi bukaJohane, mhla amaJuda ethuma abapristi lamaLevi bevela eJerusalema ukuze bambuze ukuthi: Wena ungubani?" 
John1:20 Wasevuma, kaphikanga; futhi wavuma wathi: Kangisuye uKristu mina." 
John1:21 Bambuza futhi bathi: Kuyini pho? Wena unguElija yini? Wasesithi: Kangisuye. Wena ungulowomProfethi yini? Wasephendula wathi: Hatshi. 
John1:22 Basebesithi kuye: Ungubani? Ukuze sibaphe impendulo abasithumileyo; uthini ngawe? 
John1:23 Wathi: Mina ngiyilizwi lomemezayo enkangala: Lungisani indlela yeNkosi, njengoba uIsaya umprofethi watsho." 
John1:24 Lalabo ababethunyiwe babevela kubaFarisi. 
John1:25 Basebembuza, bathi kuye: Ubhabhathizelani pho, uba wena ungeyisuye uKristu, loElija, lalowomProfethi?" 
John1:26 UJohane wabaphendula, wathi: Mina ngibhabhathiza ngamanzi; kodwa phakathi kwenu kumi lina elingamaziyo;" 
John1:27 nguye ozayo emva kwami, ophambi kwami, engingafanele mina ukuthukulula umchilo wamanyathela akhe." 
John1:28 Lezizinto zenzeka eBethabara ngaphetsheya kweJordani, lapho uJohane ayebhabhathiza khona." 
John1:29 Kusisa uJohane wabona uJesu esiza kuye, wathi: Khangelani iWundlu likaNkulunkulu, elisusa isono somhlaba." 
John1:30 Nguye lo mina ebengi li tshela ngaye ukuthi: Emva kwami kuza indoda, eyayikhona phambi kwami, ngoba yayikhona kuqala kulami." 
John1:31 Lami bengingamazi; kodwa ukuze abonakaliswe kuIsrayeli, ngalokho mina ngizile ngibhabhathiza ngamanzi." 
John1:32 UJohane wasefakaza, esithi: Ngibonile uMoya esehla ezulwini njengejuba, wahlala phezu kwakhe." 
John1:33 Lami bengingamazi; kodwa owangithumayo ukubhabhathiza ngamanzi, yena wathi kimi: Lowo ozabona uMoya esehlela phezu kwakhe ahlale kuye, nguye obhabhathiza ngoMoya oNgcwele." 
John1:34 Mina ngibonile, ngafakaza ukuthi lo uyiNdodana kaNkulunkulu." 
John1:35 Kusisa futhi uJohane wayemi, lababili kubafundi bakhe;" 
John1:36 wasekhangela uJesu ehambahamba, wathi: Khangelani iWundlu likaNkulunkulu." 
John1:37 Abafundi ababili bamuzwa ekhuluma, basebemlandela uJesu." 
John1:38 Kwathi uJesu enyemukula ebabona belandela, wathi kibo: Lidingani? Basebesithi kuye: Rabi*, (okuyikuthi ngokuphendulelwa, Mfundisi) uhlala ngaphi?" 
John1:39 Wathi kibo: Wozani libone. Beza babona lapho ayehlala khona; bahlala laye ngalolosuku; kwakungaba lihola letshumi*. 
John1:40 UAndreya umfowabo kaSimoni Petro wayengomunye wababili ababe ku zwe ngoJohane bamlandela. 
John1:41 Yena wathola kuqala umfowabo uqobo uSimoni, wathi kuye: Simtholile uMesiya, okuphendulelwa ngokuthi, uKristu." 
John1:42 Wasemletha kuJesu. UJesu esemkhangele wathi: Wena unguSimoni indodana kaJona; uzathiwa nguKefasi, okuphendulelwa ngokuthi uPetro." 
John1:43 Kusisa uJesu wayefuna ukusuka aye eGalili, wathola uFiliphu, wathi kuye: Ngilandela." 
John1:44 UFiliphu-ke wayengoweBethisayida, emzini wakibo kaAndreya loPetro." 
John1:45 UFiliphu wathola uNathaniyeli, wathi kuye: Simtholile lowo abhala ngaye uMozisi emlayweni labaprofethi, uJesu weNazaretha, indodana kaJosefa." 
John1:46 UNathaniyeli wasesithi kuye: Kambe kungavela okuhle eNazaretha? UFiliphu wathi kuye: Woza ubone. 
John1:47 UJesu wabona uNathaniyeli esiza kuye, wathi ngaye: Khangelani umIsrayeli uqobo, okungekho nkohliso kuye." 
John1:48 UNathaniyeli wathi kuye: Ungazela ngaphi? UJesu waphendula wathi kuye: UFiliphu engakakubizi, ungaphansi komkhiwa, ngakubona." 
John1:49 UNathaniyeli waphendula wathi kuye: Rabi, wena uyiNdodana kaNkulunkulu, wena uyiNkosi kaIsrayeli." 
John1:50 UJesu waphendula wathi kuye: Uyakholwa ngoba ngithe kuwe, bengikubona ungaphansi komkhiwa. Uzabona izinto ezinkulu kulalezi." 
John1:51 Wasesithi kuye: Ngiqinisile, ngiqinisile, ngithi kini: Kusukela khathesi lizabona izulu livulekile, lengilosi zikaNkulunkulu zisenyuka zisehla phezu kweNdodana yomuntu." 
John2:1 Kwathi ngosuku lwesithathu kwaba khona umtshado eKana yeGalili; lonina kaJesu wayekhona lapho; 
John2:2 njalo uJesu laye wayenxusiwe labafundi bakhe emtshadweni. 
John2:3 Kwathi iwayini selisweleka, unina kaJesu wathi kuye: Kabalawayini." 
John2:4 UJesu wathi kuye: Mama, ngilani lawe? Ihola lami kalikafiki." 
John2:5 Unina wathi kuzinceku: Yenzani loba yikuphi azalitshela khona. 
John2:6 Kwakukhona lapho imbiza zamanzi ezamatshe zimiswe njengokokuhlambulula kwamaJuda, inye ingena amaphoco amabili kumbe amathathu." 
John2:7 UJesu wathi kuzo: Gcwalisani imbiza zamanzi ngamanzi. Zasezizigcwalisa zathi kliki. 
John2:8 Wasesithi kuzo: Khanini khathesi, lise kumphathi wokudla. Zasezikusa." 
John2:9 Umphathi wokudla esizwa amanzi asebe liwayini, engazi ukuthi livela ngaphi (kodwa inceku ezaziwakhile amanzi zazisazi), umphathi wokudla wabiza umyeni," 
John2:10 wasesithi kuye: Wonke umuntu uletha iwayini elimnandi kuqala, kuthi lapho sebenathile kakhulu, abese letha elibi; wena ugcinile iwayini elimnandi kwaze kwaba khathesi." 
John2:11 Lokho kuyikuqala kwezibonakaliso uJesu akwenza eKana yeGalili wabonakalisa ubukhosi bakhe; labafundi bakhe bakholwa kuye. 
John2:12 Emva kwalokho wehlela eKapenawume, yena, lonina, labafowabo, labafundi bakhe; njalo bahlala khona kungeyisikho okwensuku ezinengi." 
John2:13 Iphasika lamaJuda laselisondele, uJesu wasesenyukela eJerusalema." 
John2:14 Wafica ethempelini labo abathengisa inkabi lezimvu lamajuba, labantshintshi bemali behlezi." 
John2:15 Esenze isiswepu sezintambo wabaxotsha bonke ethempelini, izimvu kanye lenkabi; wachitha imali yabantshintshisayo, wagenqula amatafula;" 
John2:16 wasesithi kwabathengisa amajuba: Susani lezizinto lapha; lingayenzi indlu kaBaba indlu yokuthengisela. 
John2:17 Abafundi bakhe basebekhumbula ukuthi kulotshiwe ukuthi: Ukutshisekela indlu yakho kungidlile. 
John2:18 Ngakho amaJuda aphendula athi kuye: Usitshengisa isibonakaliso bani, sokuthi wenze lezizinto?" 
John2:19 UJesu waphendula wathi kuwo: Dilizani lelithempeli, njalo ngensuku ezintathu ngizalivusa." 
John2:20 AmaJuda asesithi: Okweminyaka engamatshumi amane lesithupha lelithempeli lakhiwa, wena-ke uzalivusa ngensuku ezintathu yini?" 
John2:21 Kodwa yena wayekhuluma ngethempeli lomzimba wakhe. 
John2:22 Ngakho, kwathi esevukile kwabafileyo, abafundi bakhe bakhumbula ukuthi wayekutshilo lokhu kubo; bakholwa umbhalo, lelizwi ayelitshilo uJesu." 
John2:23 Njalo kwathi eseJerusalema ngephasika, emkhosini, abanengi bakholwa ebizweni lakhe, bebona izibonakaliso zakhe azenzayo;" 
John2:24 kodwa uJesu ngokwakhe kazinikelanga yena kubo, ngoba yena wayebazi bonke," 
John2:25 langenxa yokuthi wayengasweli ukuthi loba ngubani afakaze ngomuntu; ngoba yena wayekwazi okusemuntwini. 
John3:1 Kwakukhona-ke umuntu wakubaFarisi, nguNikodima ibizo lakhe, isikhulu samaJuda;" 
John3:2 lo weza kuJesu ebusuku, wathi kuye: Rabi*, siyazi ukuthi ungumfundisi ovela kuNkulunkulu; ngoba kakho ongenza lezizibonakaliso ozenzayo wena, uba uNkulunkulu engelaye." 
John3:3 UJesu waphendula wathi kuye: Ngiqinisile, ngiqinisile, ngithi kuwe: Ngaphandle kokuthi umuntu azalwe ngokutsha, angewubone umbuso kaNkulunkulu." 
John3:4 UNikodima wathi kuye: Umuntu angazalwa njani esemdala? Angangena yini ngokwesibili esiswini sikanina azalwe? 
John3:5 UJesu waphendula wathi: Ngiqinisile, ngiqinisile, ngithi kuwe: Uba umuntu engazalwanga ngamanzi langoMoya, angengene embusweni kaNkulunkulu." 
John3:6 Lokho okuzelwe yinyama kuyinyama; lalokho okuzelwe nguMoya kungumoya. 
John3:7 Ungamangali ukuthi ngithe kuwe: Kufanele ukuthi lizalwe ngokutsha. 
John3:8 Umoya uphephethela lapho othanda khona, uyawuzwa umdumo wawo, kodwa kawazi lapho ovela khona lalapho oya khona; unjalo wonke ozelwe nguMoya." 
John3:9 UNikodima waphendula wathi kuye: Lezizinto zingenzeka njani? 
John3:10 UJesu waphendula wathi kuye: Wena ungumfundisi wakoIsrayeli, kodwa kawuzazi lezizinto yini?" 
John3:11 Ngiqinisile, ngiqinisile, ngithi kuwe: Sikhuluma esikwaziyo, sifakaze esikubonileyo; kodwa kalibemukeli ubufakazi bethu." 
John3:12 Nxa ngilitshelile izinto zomhlaba njalo lingakholwa, lizakholwa njani, uba ngilitshela izinto zezulwini?" 
John3:13 Njalo kakho owake wenyukela ezulwini, ngaphandle kowehla ezulwini, iNdodana yomuntu esezulwini." 
John3:14 Futhi njengoba uMozisi waphakamisa inyoka enkangala, ngokunjalo iNdodana yomuntu imele ukuphakanyiswa;" 
John3:15 ukuze wonke okholwa kuyo angabhubhi, kodwa abe lempilo elaphakade." 
John3:16 Ngoba uNkulunkulu wawuthanda umhlaba ngokunjalo, ngakho wanika iNdodana yakhe ezelwe yodwa, ukuze wonke okholwa kuyo angabhubhi, kodwa abe lempilo elaphakade." 
John3:17 Ngoba uNkulunkulu kayithumanga iNdodana yakhe emhlabeni ukuthi iwulahle umhlaba, kodwa ukuze umhlaba usindiswe ngayo." 
John3:18 Okholwa kiyo kalahlwa; kodwa ongakholwayo uselahliwe, ngoba engakholwanga ebizweni leNdodana kaNkulunkulu ezelwe yodwa." 
John3:19 Ukulahlwa kuyilokhu, ukuthi ukukhanya kufikile emhlabeni, kodwa abantu bathanda ubumnyama kulokukhanya; ngoba imisebenzi yabo yayimibi." 
John3:20 Ngoba wonke owenza okubi uzonda ukukhanya, njalo kezi ekukhanyeni, ukuze imisebenzi yakhe ingasolwa." 
John3:21 Kodwa owenza iqiniso uyeza ekukhanyeni, ukuze imisebenzi yakhe ibonakale, ukuthi yenziwe kuNkulunkulu." 
John3:22 Emva kwalezizinto uJesu weza elizweni leJudiya labafundi bakhe; njalo wahlala khona kanye labo njalo wabhabhathiza. 
John3:23 UJohane laye wayebhabhathiza eEnoni eduze leSalima, ngoba kwakulamanzi amanengi khona; njalo babesiza bebhabhathizwa." 
John3:24 Ngoba uJohane wayengakaphoselwa entolongweni. 
John3:25 Kwasekusiba khona ukuphikisana phakathi kwabafundi bakaJohane lamaJuda ngokuhlambulula. 
John3:26 Basebesiza kuJohane bathi kuye: Rabi, lowo owawulaye ngaphetsheya kweJordani, owamfakazelayo, khangela yena uyabhabhathiza, njalo bayeza kuye bonke." 
John3:27 UJohane waphendula wathi: Umuntu angemukele ulutho, ngaphandle kokuthi alunikwe luvela ezulwini." 
John3:28 Lina ngokwenu liyangifakazela ukuthi ngathi: Kangisuye uKristu mina, kodwa ukuthi ngithunyiwe ngaphambi kwakhe." 
John3:29 Olomakoti ungumyeni; kodwa umngane womyeni, esimiyo simuzwa, sithokoza ngentokozo ngelizwi lomyeni; ngakho lintokozo yami isiphelele." 
John3:30 Umele ukukhula yena, kodwa mina nginciphe." 
John3:31 Ovela phezulu uphezu kwakho konke. Ovela emhlabeni, ungowomhlaba, njalo ukhuluma okomhlaba; ovela ezulwini uphezu kwakho konke." 
John3:32 Lalokho akubonileyo lakuzwileyo, ufakaza khona; kodwa kakho owemukela ubufakazi bakhe." 
John3:33 Owemukele ubufakazi bakhe uphawulile ukuthi uNkulunkulu uqinisile. 
John3:34 Ngoba lowo uNkulunkulu amthumileyo, ukhuluma amazwi kaNkulunkulu; ngoba uNkulunkulu u m nika uMoya kungeyisikho ngesilinganiso." 
John3:35 UYise uyayithanda iNdodana, njalo unikele izinto zonke esandleni sayo." 
John3:36 Yena okholwa eNdodaneni ulempilo elaphakade; kodwa yena ongakholwayo eNdodaneni, kayikubona impilo, kodwa ulaka lukaNkulunkulu luhlezi phezu kwakhe." 
John4:1 Kwathi-ke iNkosi isisazi ukuthi abaFarisi sebezwile ukuthi uJesu wenza wabhabhathiza abafundi abanengi kuloJohane," 
John4:2 lanxa uJesu ngokwakhe wayengabhabhathizi, kodwa abafundi bakhe," 
John4:3 wasuka eJudiya, wasuka waya futhi eGalili." 
John4:4 Kodwa kwakumele ukuthi adabule eSamariya. 
John4:5 Wafika-ke emzini weSamariya okuthiwa yiSikari, eduze lesiqinti uJakobe asinika indodana yakhe uJosefa;" 
John4:6 lomthombo kaJakobe wawulapho. Ngakho uJesu ekhathele ngohambo wahlala ngokunjalo emthonjeni. Kwakungaba lihola lesithupha*. 
John4:7 Kwafika owesifazana evela eSamariya ukuzakukha amanzi; uJesu wathi kuye: Nginathisa 
John4:8 (ngoba abafundi bakhe babehambile baya emzini, ukuze bathenge ukudla)." 
John4:9 Ngakho owesifazana umSamariya wathi kuye: Kungani wena ungumJuda ucela ukunatha kimi, owesifazana ongumSamariya? Ngoba amaJuda awalabudlelwano lamaSamariya." 
John4:10 UJesu waphendula wathi kuye: Aluba ubusazi isipho sikaNkulunkulu, lokuthi ungubani othi kuwe: Nginathisa; ubuzacela kuye, njalo ubezakunika amanzi aphilayo." 
John4:11 Owesifazana wathi kuye: Nkosi, kawulalutho lokukha, lomgodi uyatshona; uwathethe ngaphi pho amanzi aphilayo?" 
John4:12 Wena umkhulu yini kulobaba wethu uJakobe, owasinika umgodi, wanatha kuwo yena, labantwana bakhe, lemihlambi yakhe?" 
John4:13 UJesu waphendula wathi kuye: Wonke onatha lamanzi, uzakoma futhi;" 
John4:14 kodwa loba ngubani onatha amanzi mina engizamnika wona, kasoze ome kuze kube laphakade; kodwa amanzi engizamnika wona azakuba ngumthombo wamanzi phakathi kwakhe ogobhozela empilweni elaphakade." 
John4:15 Owesifazana wathi kuye: Nkosi, ngipha lawomanzi, ukuze ngingomi, ngingabe ngiseza lapha ukukha." 
John4:16 UJesu wathi kuye: Hamba, ubize umkakho, uze lapha." 
John4:17 Owesifazana waphendula wathi: Kangilandoda. UJesu wathi kuye: Utsho kuhle ukuthi: Kangilandoda; 
John4:18 ngoba usuke waba lamadoda amahlanu, le olayo khathesi kayisiyo indoda yakho; lokhu ukutsho uqinisile." 
John4:19 Owesifazana wathi kuye: Nkosi, ngiyabona ukuthi wena ungumprofethi." 
John4:20 Obaba bethu babekhonza kulintaba; kodwa lina lithi iseJerusalema indawo lapho okufanele umuntu akhonze khona. 
John4:21 UJesu wathi kuye: Mama, kholwa kimi, ukuthi ihola liyeza, lapho elizakhonza uBaba kungeyisikho kulintaba, kumbe eJerusalema." 
John4:22 Lina likhonza elingakwaziyo; thina sikhonza esikwaziyo; ngoba usindiso luvela kumaJuda. 
John4:23 Kodwa ihola liyeza njalo seliyilo, lapho abakhonzi abaqotho bazakhonza uBaba ngomoya langeqiniso; ngoba-ke uBaba udinga abanjalo abamkhonzayo." 
John4:24 UNkulunkulu unguMoya; lalabo abamkhonzayo, bafanele ukukhonza ngomoya langeqiniso." 
John4:25 Owesifazana wathi kuye: Ngiyazi ukuthi uMesiya uyeza okuthiwa nguKristu; nxa lo esefikile, uzasitshela konke." 
John4:26 UJesu wathi kuye: Mina nginguye, okhuluma lawe." 
John4:27 Kwathi ngalesosikhathi bafika abafundi bakhe, bamangala ukuthi wayekhuluma lowesifazana; kodwa kakho owathi: Udingani? Kumbe: Ukhulumani laye?" 
John4:28 Ngakho owesifazana wasetshiya inkonxa yakhe, wasesuka waya emzini, wathi ebantwini:" 
John4:29 Wozani, libone umuntu, ongitshele konke engakwenzayo; kambe kayisuye yini uKristu lo?" 
John4:30 Ngakho baphuma emzini, beza kuye." 
John4:31 Kusenjalo abafundi bamncenga besithi: Rabi*, dlana." 
John4:32 Kodwa wathi kubo: Mina ngilokudla engikudlayo lina elingakwaziyo. 
John4:33 Basebekhulumisana abafundi besithi: Kambe ukhona omlethele ukudla? 
John4:34 UJesu wathi kubo: Ukudla kwami kuyikuthi ngenze intando yongithumileyo, lokuthi ngiqede umsebenzi wakhe." 
John4:35 Kalitsho yini ukuthi: Kuseselenyanga ezine ukuthi kufike ukuvuna? Khangelani, ngithi kini: Phakamisani amehlo enu, libone amasimu, ngoba asehle emhlophe elungele isivuno." 
John4:36 Njalo ovunayo wemukela umvuzo, njalo abuthe isithelo empilweni elaphakade; ukuze bobabili ohlanyelayo lovunayo bathokoze bendawonye." 
John4:37 Ngoba kulokhu ilizwi liqinisile elokuthi: Omunye ngohlanyelayo, lomunye ngovunayo." 
John4:38 Mina ngalithuma ukuvuna lokho elingakusebenzelanga; abanye basebenzile, lina-ke selingenile emsebenzini wabo." 
John4:39 Njalo amaSamariya amanengi akulowomuzi akholwa kuye ngenxa yelizwi lowesifazana, elafakaza lisithi: Ungitshele konke engikwenzileyo." 
John4:40 Kwathi esefikile kuye amaSamariya, amncenga ukuthi ahlale lawo; wasehlala khona insuku ezimbili." 
John4:41 Abanengi bengezelelwa bakholwa ngenxa yelizwi lakhe. 
John4:42 Basebesithi kowesifazana: Kasisakholwa ngenxa yokutsho kwakho; ngoba sesizizwele thina, siyazi ukuthi oqotho lo unguMsindisi womhlaba, uKristu." 
John4:43 Kwathi emva kwensuku ezimbili wasuka lapho, waya eGalili;" 
John4:44 ngoba uJesu ngokwakhe wafakaza ukuthi umprofethi kaladumo elizweni lakibo. 
John4:45 Wathi esefikile eGalili, amaGalili amemukela, ebonile konke akwenzayo eJerusalema emkhosini; ngoba lawo ayeyile emkhosini." 
John4:46 UJesu wafika-ke futhi eKana yeGalili, lapho enza khona amanzi aba liwayini. Kwakukhona othile owesikhosini, ondodana yakhe yayigula eKapenawume." 
John4:47 Esezwile ukuthi uJesu u se fikile eGalili evela eJudiya, waya kuye, wamncenga ukuthi ehle, asilise indodana yakhe, ngoba yayisizaphela." 
John4:48 Ngakho uJesu wathi kuye: Ngaphandle kokuthi libone izibonakaliso lezimangaliso, kalisoze likholwe." 
John4:49 Owesikhosini wathi kuye: Nkosi, yehla engakafi umntanami." 
John4:50 UJesu wathi kuye: Hamba; indodana yakho iyaphila. Umuntu wasekholwa ilizwi uJesu alikhuluma laye, wasuka wahamba." 
John4:51 Kwathi esesehla, inceku zakhe zamhlangabeza, zabika zathi: Umntanakho uyaphila." 
John4:52 Wasezibuza ihola aqale ngalo ukuba ngcono. Zasezisithi kuye: Izolo ngehola lesikhombisa uqhuqho lumyekele. 
John4:53 Ngakho uyise wazi ukuthi kwaku ngalelohola uJesu athi ngalo kuye: Indodana yakho iyaphila; wasekholwa yena lendlu yakhe yonke. 
John4:54 UJesu waphinda wakwenza lokhu kwaba yisibonakaliso sesibili, efikile eGalili evela eJudiya." 
John5:1 Emva kwalezizinto kwaba khona umkhosi wamaJuda; uJesu wasesenyukela eJerusalema. 
John5:2 Kwakukhona-ke lapho eJerusalema eduze lesango lezimvu ichibi, elithiwa ngesiHebheru iBethesda, lilamakhulusi amahlanu." 
John5:3 Kwakulele kuwo ixuku elikhulu labagulayo, eleziphofu, eleziqhuli, elabatshwabheneyo, belindele ukuzanyanzanyiswa kwamanzi." 
John5:4 Ngoba ingilosi yayisehlela echibini ngezikhathi ezithile, izamazamise amanzi; kuthi lowo ongene kuqala emva kokuzanyazanyiswa kwamanzi, asiliswe, loba yisiphi isifo ebesimbambile." 
John5:5 Njalo kwakukhona lapho umuntu othile owayelesifo okweminyaka engamatshumi amathathu leyisificaminwembili. 
John5:6 Kwathi uJesu embona elele, esazi ukuthi ulesikhathi eside enjalo, wathi kuye: Uyafuna ukuba uphile yini?" 
John5:7 Ogulayo wamphendula wathi: Nkosi, kangilamuntu wokungifaka echibini, nxa amanzi ezanyazanyiswa; kuthi nxa ngizayo mina, kwehle omunye phambi kwami." 
John5:8 UJesu wathi kuye: Sukuma, uthathe icansi lakho, uhambe." 
John5:9 Lowomuntu wahle waphila, wathatha icansi lakhe wahamba. Njalo kwakulisabatha mhlalokho." 
John5:10 Ngakho amaJuda athi kosilisiweyo: Kulisabatha; ngakho kawuvunyelwa ukuthwala icansi. 
John5:11 Wawaphendula wathi: Ongiphilisileyo, yena uthe kimi: Thatha icansi lakho uhambe." 
John5:12 Ngakho ambuza: Ngubani umuntu othe kuwe: Thatha icansi lakho uhambe? 
John5:13 Kodwa osilisiweyo wayengamazi ukuthi ungubani; ngoba uJesu wayesesithele, ngoba kukhona ixuku kuleyondawo." 
John5:14 Emva kwalezizinto uJesu wamfica ethempelini, wasesithi kuye: Khangela usuphilile; ungabe usona futhi, hlezi kwehle kuwe okunye okukhulu kulalokhu." 
John5:15 Umuntu wasuka, watshela amaJuda ukuthi nguJesu owayemenze waphila." 
John5:16 Njalo ngenxa yalokhu amaJuda amzingela uJesu, asedinga ukumbulala, ngoba wenza lezizinto ngesabatha." 
John5:17 Kodwa uJesu wawaphendula wathi: UBaba uyasebenza kuze kube lamuhla, lami ngiyasebenza." 
John5:18 Ngenxa yalokhu-ke amaJuda adinga kakhulu ukumbulala, ngoba wayengephulanga isabatha kuphela, kodwa wabuya wathi uNkulunkulu unguYise wakhe, ezenza olingana loNkulunkulu." 
John5:19 UJesu wasephendula wathi kubo: Ngiqinisile, ngiqinisile, ngithi kini: INdodana ingenze lutho ngokwayo, ngaphandle kwalokho ebona uYise ekwenza; ngoba loba yini yena ayenzayo, leNdodana iyenza lezizinto ngokunjalo." 
John5:20 Ngoba uYise uyayithanda iNdodana, uyayitshengisa konke akwenzayo yena; njalo uzayitshengisa imisebenzi emikhulu kulale, ukuze lina limangale." 
John5:21 Ngoba njengalokhu uYise evusa abafileyo abaphilise, kunjalo-ke leNdodana iyabaphilisa labo ethanda ukubaphilisa." 
John5:22 Ngoba loYise kahluleli muntu, kodwa unike iNdodana konke ukwahlulela;" 
John5:23 ukuze bonke badumise iNdodana, njengalokhu bedumisa uYise. Ongayidumisiyo iNdodana, kamdumisi uYise oyithumileyo." 
John5:24 Ngiqinisile, ngiqinisile, ngithi kini: Olizwayo ilizwi lami, akholwe kuye ongithumileyo, ulempilo elaphakade; njalo kangeni ekulahlweni, kodwa usedlule ekufeni waya empilweni." 
John5:25 Ngiqinisile, ngiqinisile, ngithi kini: Ihola liyeza njalo selikhona, lapho abafileyo bezalizwa ilizwi leNdodana kaNkulunkulu, lalabo abalizwileyo bazaphila." 
John5:26 Njengoba uYise elempilo ngokwakhe, kunjalo uyinikile layo iNdodana ukuthi ibe lempilo ngokwayo;" 
John5:27 njalo uyiphile amandla lawokwahlulela, ngoba iyiNdodana yomuntu." 
John5:28 Lingamangali ngalokhu; ngoba ihola liyeza, lapho bonke abasemangcwabeni bazalizwa ilizwi layo," 
John5:29 babesebephuma, labo abenze okulungileyo, ekuvukeni kwempilo; lalabo abenze okubi, ekuvukeni kokulahlwa." 
John5:30 Mina ngingenze lutho ngokwami; njengokuzwa kwami, ngiyahlulela; njalo ukwahlulela kwami kulungile; ngoba kangidingi intando yami, kodwa intando kaBaba ongithumileyo." 
John5:31 Aluba ngizifakazela mina, ubufakazi bami abusiloqiniso." 
John5:32 Ukhona omunye ongifakazelayo mina, njalo ngiyazi ukuthi ubufakazi abufakaza ngami buliqiniso." 
John5:33 Lina lathumela kuJohane, walifakazela iqiniso." 
John5:34 Kodwa mina kangibemukeli ubufakazi obuvela emuntwini, kodwa ngitsho lezizinto ukuze lina lisindiswe." 
John5:35 Yena wayeyisibane esivuthayo lesikhanyayo, lani lavuma ukuthokoza okwesikhatshana ekukhanyeni kwakhe." 
John5:36 Kodwa mina ngilobufakazi obukhulu kulo buka Johane; ngoba imisebenzi uBaba anginike yona ukuze ngiyiqede, yonale imisebenzi mina engiyenzayo, iyangifakazela ukuthi uBaba ungithumile." 
John5:37 Laye uBaba ongithumileyo, yena ungifakazele. Kalikaze lilizwe ilizwi lakhe lanini, lesimo sakhe kalikaze lisibone," 
John5:38 njalo kalilalizwi lakhe elihlala phakathi kwenu, ngoba amthumileyo yena, lowo lina kalimkholwa." 
John5:39 Hlolani imibhalo, ngoba lina licabanga ukuthi lilempilo elaphakade kiyo, njalo yiyo engifakazelayo;" 
John5:40 kodwa kalivumi ukuza kimi, ukuze libe lempilo." 
John5:41 Angemukeli udumo ebantwini; 
John5:42 kodwa ngiyalazi lina, ukuthi kalilalo uthando lukaNkulunkulu phakathi kwenu." 
John5:43 Mina ngizile ebizweni likaBaba, kodwa kalingemukeli; uba omunye esiza ngelakhe ibizo, lizamemukela yena." 
John5:44 Lingakholwa njani lina, nxa lisemukela udumo omunye komunye, kodwa lingaludingi udumo oluvela kuNkulunkulu oyedwa?" 
John5:45 Lingacabangi ukuthi mina ngizalimangalela kuBaba; ukhona olimangalelayo, uMozisi, elithemba kuye lina." 
John5:46 Ngoba uba belikholwa uMozisi, belizakholwa mina; ngoba yena wabhala ngami." 
John5:47 Kodwa uba lingakholwa imibhalo yakhe, lizakholwa njani amazwi ami?" 
John6:1 Emva kwalezizinto uJesu wasuka waya ngaphetsheya kolwandle lweGalili, lweTiberiyasi." 
John6:2 Laselimlandela ixuku elikhulu, ngoba babebone izibonakaliso zakhe azenza kulabo abagulayo." 
John6:3 UJesu wasesenyukela entabeni, wahlala phansi khona labafundi bakhe." 
John6:4 Iphasika, umkhosi wamaJuda, laselisondele." 
John6:5 Kwathi uJesu ephakamisa amehlo, wasebona ixuku elikhulu lisiza kuye, wathi kuFiliphu: Sizathenga ngaphi izinkwa, ukuze laba badle?" 
John6:6 Njalo watsho lokhu emhlola, ngoba yena wayekwazi azakwenza." 
John6:7 UFiliphu wamphendula wathi: Izinkwa zabodenariyo* abangamakhulu amabili zingebanele, ukuthi wonke ngamunye wabo azuze ingcosana." 
John6:8 Omunye wabafundi bakhe, uAndreya umfowabo kaSimoni Petro, wathi kuye:" 
John6:9 Kukhona umfanyana lapha, olezinkwa ezinhlanu zebhali* lenhlanzana ezimbili; kodwa ziyini kwabanengi kangaka?" 
John6:10 Kodwa uJesu wathi: Hlalisani abantu phansi. Kwakukhona utshani obunengi ku leyo ndawo. Ngakho amadoda ahlala phansi inani lawo lalingaba zinkulungwane ezinhlanu. 
John6:11 UJesu wasezithatha izinkwa, esebongile wazinika abafundi, labafundi kulabo ababehlezi phansi; ngokunjalo lenhlanzana ngangokufuna kwabo." 
John6:12 Bathi sebesuthi, wathi kubafundi bakhe: Buthani imvuthu eziseleyo, ukuze kungachitheki lutho." 
John6:13 Basebebutha, bagcwalisa izitsha ezilitshumi lambili ngemvuthu zezinkwa ezinhlanu zebhali, ezasalayo kulabo abadlayo." 
John6:14 Kwathi lababantu bebona isimangaliso asenzileyo uJesu, bathi: Ngeqiniso lo nguye umProfethi omele ukuza emhlabeni." 
John6:15 Kwathi uJesu esazi ukuthi bazakuza bambambe ngamandla, ukumbeka abe yinkosi, wamonyukela futhi entabeni yena eyedwa." 
John6:16 Sekuhlwile, abafundi bakhe behlela elwandle," 
John6:17 sebengenile emkhunjini, beza ngaphetsheya kolwandle ukuya eKapenawume. Kwasekumnyama, uJesu wayengafikanga kubo." 
John6:18 Lwaseluvuka ulwandle ngoba umoya olamandla wawuvunguza. 
John6:19 Sebegwedlile amastadiyu* angaba ngamatshumi amabili lanhlanu kumbe amatshumi amathathu, babona uJesu ehamba phezu kolwandle, esondela emkhunjini; basebesethuka." 
John6:20 Kodwa wathi kubo: Yimi, lingesabi." 
John6:21 Basebevuma ukumemukela emkhunjini; njalo wahle wafika umkhumbi elizweni ababesiya kilo. 
John6:22 Kusisa ixuku elalimi ngaphetsheya kolwandle, libona ukuthi kwakungela lamunye umkolo lapho ngaphandle kwalowo ababengene kuwo abafundi bakhe, lokuthi uJesu wayengangenanga emkolweni labafundi bakhe, kodwa abafundi bakhe babehambe bodwa," 
John6:23 kodwa imikolo evela eTiberiyasi yafika eduze lendawo lapho ababedle khona isinkwa, emva kokuthi iNkosi isibongile;" 
John6:24 ngakho ixuku selibonile ukuthi uJesu wayengekho lapho loba abafundi bakhe, bangena labo emikhunjini, bafika eKapenawume, bedinga uJesu." 
John6:25 Bathi sebemtholile ngaphetsheya kolwandle, bathi kuye: Rabi*, ufike nini lapha?" 
John6:26 UJesu wabaphendula wathi: Ngiqinisile, ngiqinisile, ngithi kini: Liyangidinga, kungeyisikho ukuthi labona izibonakaliso, kodwa ngoba ladla izinkwa lasutha." 
John6:27 Lingasebenz el i ukudla okuphelayo, kodwa ukudla okuhlala kuze kube yimpilo elaphakade, ezalinika khona iNdodana yomuntu; ngoba yena uNkulunkulu uYise umphawulile." 
John6:28 Basebesithi kuye: Sizakwenzani, ukuze senze imisebenzi kaNkulunkulu?" 
John6:29 UJesu waphendula wathi kubo: Lo ngumsebenzi kaNkulunkulu, ukuze likholwe kulowo yena amthumileyo." 
John6:30 Ngakho bathi kuye: Pho wena wenza isibonakaliso bani, ukuze sibone sikholwe kuwe? Usebenzani?" 
John6:31 Obaba bethu badla imana enkangala, njengokulotshiweyo ukuthi: Wabanika isinkwa esivela ezulwini ukuthi badle." 
John6:32 UJesu wasesithi kubo: Ngiqinisile, ngiqinisile, ngithi kini: UMozisi kalinikanga isinkwa esivela ezulwini; kodwa uBaba ulinika isinkwa soqobo esivela ezulwini." 
John6:33 Ngoba isinkwa sikaNkulunkulu singuye owehla evela ezulwini esinika impilo emhlabeni. 
John6:34 Basebesithi kuye: Nkosi, sinike lesosinkwa njalonjalo." 
John6:35 UJesu wasesithi kubo: Mina ngiyisinkwa sempilo; lowo oza kimi, kasoze alambe; lalowo okholwa kimi, kasoze ome lakanye." 
John6:36 Kodwa ngithe kini: Lani lingibonile, kodwa kalikholwa." 
John6:37 Bonke uBaba anginika bona bazakuza kimi; lozayo kimi angisoze ngimxotshele phandle. 
John6:38 Ngoba ngehlile ezulwini, hatshi ukuthi ngenze intando yami, kodwa intando yalowo ongithumileyo." 
John6:39 Lalokhu kuyintando kaBaba ongithumileyo, ukuze konke anginike khona, ngingalahlekelwa lutho kikho, kodwa ngikuvuse ngosuku lokucina." 
John6:40 Lalokhu kuyintando yongithumileyo, ukuthi wonke obona iNdodana njalo akholwe kuyo, abe lempilo elaphakade, njalo mina ngizamvusa ngosuku lokucina." 
John6:41 Ngalokho amaJuda akhonona ngaye, ngoba wathi: Mina ngiyisinkwa esehla sivela ezulwini." 
John6:42 Athi-ke: Lo kayisuye yini uJesu indodana kaJosefa, uyise lonina thina esibaziyo? Pho yena utsho njani, ukuthi: Ngehle ngivela ezulwini?" 
John6:43 UJesu wasephendula wathi kuwo: Lingakhononi phakathi kwenu. 
John6:44 Kakho ongeza kimi, ngaphandle kokuthi uBaba ongithumileyo amdonse, njalo mina ngizamvusa ngosuku lokucina." 
John6:45 Kulotshiwe kubaprofethi ukuthi: Njalo bonke bazafundiswa nguNkulunkulu. Ngakho wonke ozwileyo ngoBaba wafunda, uyeza kimi." 
John6:46 Kayisikho ukuthi ukhona obone uBaba, ngaphandle kwakhe ovela kuNkulunkulu, yena umbonile uBaba." 
John6:47 Ngiqinisile, ngiqinisile, ngithi kini: Okholwayo kimi, ulempilo elaphakade." 
John6:48 Mina ngiyisinkwa sempilo. 
John6:49 Oyihlo badla imana enkangala, futhi bafa;" 
John6:50 lesi yisinkwa esehla sivela ezulwini, ukuze umuntu adle okwaso angafi." 
John6:51 Mina ngiyisinkwa esiphilayo, esehla sivela ezulwini; uba umuntu esidla lesisinkwa, uzaphila ephakadeni. Njalo lesinkwa mina engizasinika, siyinyama yami, mina engizayinikela impilo yomhlaba." 
John6:52 AmaJuda asephikisana esithi: Lo angasinika njani inyama yakhe siyidle? 
John6:53 Ngakho uJesu wathi kuwo: Ngiqinisile, ngiqinisile, ngithi kini: Ngaphandle kokuthi lidle inyama yeNdodana yomuntu linathe igazi layo, kalilampilo phakathi kwenu." 
John6:54 Odla inyama yami anathe igazi lami, ulempilo elaphakade, njalo mina ngizamvusa ngosuku lokucina." 
John6:55 Ngoba inyama yami iyikudla oqotho, legazi lami lingokunathwayo oqotho." 
John6:56 Odla inyama yami anathe igazi lami, uhlala kimi, lami kuye." 
John6:57 Njengalokhu uBaba ophilayo engithumile, lami ngiphila ngoBaba; ngakho ongidlayo, laye uzaphila ngami." 
John6:58 Lesi yisinkwa esehla sivela ezulwini; akunjengaboyihlo abadla imana, sebafa; odla lesisinkwa, uzaphila okulaphakade." 
John6:59 Watsho lezizinto esinagogeni efundisa eKapenawume. 
John6:60 Kwathi abanengi kubafundi bakhe besizwa bathi: Lilukhuni lelilizwi; ngubani ongalizwa? 
John6:61 Kodwa uJesu esazi phakathi kwakhe ukuthi abafundi bakhe bayasola ngalokhu, wathi kubo: Lokhu kuyalikhuba yini?" 
John6:62 Pho, lizathini uba libona iNdodana yomuntu isenyukela lapho eyayikhona kuqala?" 
John6:63 KunguMoya ophilisayo, inyama kayisizi lutho; amazwi mina engiwakhuluma kini, angumoya njalo ayimpilo." 
John6:64 Kodwa bakhona abanye kini abangakholwayo. Ngoba uJesu wayekwazi kusukela ekuqaleni, ukuthi ngobani abangakholwayo, lokuthi ngubani ozamnikela." 
John6:65 Wasesithi: Kungenxa yalokhu ngithe kini: Kakho ongeza kimi, ngaphandle kokuthi ekunikwe nguBaba." 
John6:66 Kusukela lapho abanengi babafundi bakhe babuyela emuva, kababe besahamba laye." 
John6:67 UJesu wasesithi kwabalitshumi lambili: Lani lithanda ukuzihambela yini? 
John6:68 USimoni Petro wasemphendula wathi: Nkosi, sizakuya kubani? Amazwi empilo elaphakade akuwe," 
John6:69 njalo thina siyakholwa, sesisazi ukuthi wena unguKristu iNdodana kaNkulunkulu ophilayo." 
John6:70 UJesu wabaphendula wathi: Mina kangilikhethanga yini lina abalitshumi lambili, kodwa omunye wenu unguSathane?" 
John6:71 Wayekhuluma ngoJudasi Iskariyothi kaSimoni; ngoba nguye owayezamnikela, engomunye wabalitshumi lambili." 
John7:1 Njalo emva kwalezizinto uJesu wabhoda eGalili; ngoba wayengathandi ukubhoda eJudiya, ngenxa yokuthi amaJuda ayedinga ukumbulala." 
John7:2 Wawusondele umkhosi wamaJuda wokwakha amadumba. 
John7:3 Ngakho abafowabo bathi kuye: Suka lapha, uye eJudiya, ukuze labafundi bakho babone imisebenzi oyenzayo." 
John7:4 Ngoba kakho owenza ulutho ensitha, kodwa yena ngokwakhe edinga ukuba sobala. Uba uzenza lezizinto, ziveze wena emhlabeni." 
John7:5 Ngoba labafowabo babengakholwa kuye. 
John7:6 Ngakho uJesu wathi kubo: Isikhathi sami kasikafiki, kodwa esenu isikhathi sihlala silungile." 
John7:7 Ungelizonde umhlaba lina; kodwa uyangizonda, ngoba mina ngifakaza ngawo, ukuthi imisebenzi yawo mibi." 
John7:8 Yenyukelani lina emkhosini lo; mina angikenyukeli kulumkhosi, ngoba isikhathi sami kasikagcwaliseki." 
John7:9 Esetshilo lezizinto kubo, wahlala eGalili." 
John7:10 Kodwa sebenyukile abafowabo, laye wasesenyukela emkhosini, kungeyisikho obala, kodwa kungathi ku sensitha." 
John7:11 AmaJuda asemdinga emkhosini, athi: Ungaphi yena?" 
John7:12 Kwakukhona ukukhonona okukhulu ngaye phakathi kwamaxuku; abanye bathi: Ulungile. Kodwa abanye bathi: Hatshi, kodwa uyaliduhisa ixuku." 
John7:13 Loba kunjalo kwakungekho muntu owakhuluma obala ngaye ngokwesaba amaJuda. 
John7:14 Kuthe sekuphakathi komkhosi, uJesu wenyukela ethempelini, wafundisa." 
John7:15 AmaJuda asemangala athi: Lo uyazi njani imibhalo, engafundanga?" 
John7:16 UJesu wawaphendula wathi: Imfundiso yami kayisiyo eyami kodwa ngeyalowo ongithumileyo. 
John7:17 Uba umuntu ethanda ukwenza intando yakhe, uzakwazi ngemfundiso, ukuthi ivela kuNkulunkulu, kumbe ngizikhulumela mina ngokwami." 
John7:18 Ozikhulumela ngokwakhe, uzidingela udumo lwakhe; kodwa odinga udumo lwalowo omthumileyo, lowo uqinisile, njalo kakukho ukungalungi kuye." 
John7:19 Kalinikanga yini uMozisi umlayo, kanti kakho kini ogcina umlayo? Lidingelani ukungibulala?" 
John7:20 Ixuku laphendula lathi: Uledimoni; ngubani odinga ukukubulala? 
John7:21 UJesu waphendula wathi kubo: Ngenze umsebenzi owodwa, njalo lonke liyamangala." 
John7:22 Ngakho uMozisi walinika ukusoka (kungeyisikho ukuthi kwavela kuMozisi, kodwa kubobaba), njalo liyamsoka umuntu langesabatha." 
John7:23 Uba ngesabatha umuntu esemukela ukusoka, ukuze kungephulwa umlayo kaMozisi, lingithukuthelela ngoba ngaphilisa umuntu ngokupheleleyo ngesabatha yini?" 
John7:24 Lingahluleli ngokubona, kodwa yahlulelani ukwahlulela okuqondileyo." 
John7:25 Abanye kwabeJerusalema basebesithi: Lo kayisuye yini abadinga ukumbulala? 
John7:26 Kodwa khangela ukhuluma obala, kodwa kabatsho lutho kuye. Kungaba yikuthi ababusi sebesazi oqotho ukuthi lo unguKristu uqobo yini?" 
John7:27 Kodwa lo siyazi lapho avela khona; kodwa uKristu nxa efika, kakho ozakwazi lapho avela khona." 
John7:28 Ngakho uJesu efundisa ethempelini wamemeza wathi: Lami liyangazi, liyakwazi lalapho engivela khona; njalo kangizizelanga ngokwami, kodwa ongithumileyo uqinisile, elingamaziyo lina." 
John7:29 Kodwa ngiyamazi mina, ngoba ngivela kuye, njalo yena ungithumile." 
John7:30 Ngakho badinga ukumbamba, kodwa kakubanga khona owabeka isandla phezu kwakhe, ngoba ihola lakhe lalingakafiki." 
John7:31 Kodwa abanengi bexuku bakholwa kuye, bathi: Nxa uKristu esefikile, uzakwenza yini izibonakaliso ezinengi kulalezi azenzileyo lo?" 
John7:32 AbaFarisi bezwa ixuku likhonona lezizinto ngaye; abapristi abakhulu labaFarisi basebethuma abancedisi ukuze bambambe. 
John7:33 UJesu wasesithi kubo: Ngiselani okwesikhatshana, besengihamba ngiye kongithumileyo." 
John7:34 Lizangidinga, linga ngit holi, lalapho mina engikhona, lina lingeze leza." 
John7:35 Ngakho amaJuda akhulumisana athi: Uzakuya ngaphi lo ukuthi thina singayikumthola? Kayikuya yini kwabahlakazekileyo bamaGriki, afundise amaGriki?" 
John7:36 Yilizwi bani leli alitshoyo elokuthi: Lizangidinga, aliyiku ngi thola; lelo kuthi: Lapho engikhona mina, lina lingeze leza?" 
John7:37 Kwathi ngosuku lokucina olukhulu lomkhosi uJesu wema wamemeza, esithi: Uba ekhona owomileyo, keze kimi anathe." 
John7:38 Okholwa kimi, njengokutsho kombhalo, kuzageleza kuphuma esiswini sakhe imifula yamanzi aphilayo." 
John7:39 Lalokhu wakutsho ngoMoya ababezamemukela abakholwa kuye; ngoba uMoya oNgcwele wayengaka fik i, lokhu uJesu wayengakadunyiswa." 
John7:40 Ngakho abanengi bexuku besizwa lelilizwi bathi: Oqotho lo ungulowomProfethi. 
John7:41 Abanye bathi: Lo unguKristu. Kodwa abanye bathi: Kambe uKristu uzavela eGalili? 
John7:42 Kawutsho yini umbhalo ukuthi uKristu uzavela enzalweni kaDavida, leBhethelehema, emzaneni lapho uDavida ayekhona?" 
John7:43 Ngakho kwaba khona ukwehlukana ngaye phakathi kwexuku. 
John7:44 Abanye babo bafuna ukumbamba, kodwa kakubanga khona owambeka izandla." 
John7:45 Khona abancedisi baya kubapristi abakhulu lakubaFarisi; bona basebesithi kubo: Kungani lingamlethanga? 
John7:46 Abancedisi baphendula bathi: Kakuzange kukhulume umuntu kanje, njengalumuntu." 
John7:47 AbaFarisi basebebaphendula bathi: Lani seliduhisiwe yini? 
John7:48 Ukhona yini kubabusi kumbe kubaFarisi okholwe kuye? 
John7:49 Kodwa lelixuku elingawaziyo umlayo lithukiwe. 
John7:50 UNikodima, lowo oweza kuye ebusuku, owayengomunye wabo, wathi kubo:" 
John7:51 Kanti umlayo wakithi uyamgweba umuntu, ngaphandle kokuthi umuzwe kuqala ukwazi akwenzayo?" 
John7:52 Baphendula bathi kuye: Kanti lawe ungoweGalili? Hlolisisa ubone ukuthi kakuvukanga umprofethi eGalili. 
John7:53 Ngulowo lalowo wasesuka waya ekhaya. 
John8:1 Kodwa uJesu waya entabeni yeMihlwathi. 
John8:2 Kwathi ekuseni kakhulu wabuya weza ethempelini, isizwe sonke sasesisiza kuye; wasehlala phansi wabafundisa." 
John8:3 Ababhali labaFarisi basebeletha kuye owesifazana owayebanjwe efeba, bammisa phakathi," 
John8:4 bathi kuye: Mfundisi, lo owesifazana ubanjwe eseqotsheni lo kuphinga;" 
John8:5 lemlayweni uMozisi wasilaya ukuthi abanje bakhandwe ngamatshe; ngakho wena uthini? 
John8:6 Kodwa batsho lokhu bemlinga, ukuze bazuze oko kummangalela ngakho. Kodwa uJesu ekhothamela phansi, wabhala emhlabathini ngomunwe, wenza angathi ka bezwa." 
John8:7 Kwathi bephikelela ukumbuza, walulama wathi kubo: Ongelasono phakathi kwenu, kaqale ukumjikijela ngelitshe." 
John8:8 Wasebuya ekhothamela phansi wabhala emhlabathini. 
John8:9 Kodwa bona, bekuzwa, balahlwa yisazela sabo, baphuma ngamunye ngamunye kuqala komdala kwaze kwaba kowokucina; uJesu wasesala yedwa, lowesifazana emi phakathi." 
John8:10 UJesu waseselulama, engaboni muntu ngaphandle kowesifazana, wathi kuye: Mama, bangaphi labo abakumangalelayo? Kakho okulahlayo yini?" 
John8:11 Wasesithi: Kakho, Nkosi. UJesu wasesithi kuye: Lami kangikulahli; hamba ungabe usona futhi." 
John8:12 Ngakho uJesu wakhuluma labo futhi wathi: Mina ngiyikukhanya komhlaba; ongilandelayo, kasoze ahambe emnyameni, kodwa uzakuba lokukhanya kwempilo." 
John8:13 Ngakho abaFarisi bathi kuye: Wena uyazifakazela; ubufakazi bakho kabulaqiniso. 
John8:14 UJesu waphendula wathi kubo: Lanxa ngizifakazela mina, buqinisile ubufakazi bami; ngoba ngiyazi ukuthi ngivela ngaphi, lokuthi ngiya ngaphi; kodwa lina kalazi ukuthi ngivela ngaphi, lokuthi ngiya ngaphi." 
John8:15 Lina lahlulela ngokwenyama; kodwa mina kangahluleli muntu. 
John8:16 Kodwa uba lami ngisahlulela, ukwahlulela kwami kuqinisile; ngoba kangingedwa, kodwa yimi loBaba ongithumileyo." 
John8:17 Njalo emlayweni wenu kulotshiwe ukuthi ubufakazi babantu ababili bungobuqinisileyo. 
John8:18 Mina ngingozifakazelayo, loBaba ongithumileyo ufakaza ngami." 
John8:19 Ngakho bathi kuye: Ungaphi uYihlo? UJesu waphendula wathi: Kalingazi mina, loba uBaba. Uba belingazi mina, laye uBaba belizamazi." 
John8:20 UJesu wakhuluma la amazwi endlini yomnikelo, efundisa ethempelini; futhi kakho owambambayo, ngoba ihola lakhe lalingakafiki." 
John8:21 Ngakho uJesu wathi kubo futhi: Ngiyahamba mina, njalo lizangidinga, njalo lizafela esonweni senu; lapho engiya khona mina, lingeze leza lina." 
John8:22 Ngakho amaJuda athi: Uzazibulala yini? Ngoba uthi: Lapho engiya khona mina, lingeze leza khona lina." 
John8:23 Wasesithi kuwo: Lina livela phansi, mina ngivela phezulu; lina lingabomhlaba lo, mina kangisuye owalumhlaba." 
John8:24 Ngakho ngithe kini, lizafela ezonweni zenu; ngoba uba lingakholwa ukuthi ngingu ye, lizafela ezonweni zenu." 
John8:25 Ngakho athi kuye: Wena ungubani? UJesu wasesithi kuwo: Lokho engalitshela khona futhi ekuqaleni. 
John8:26 Ngilezinto ezinengi engilokuzikhuluma ngani lokwahlulela ngazo; kodwa ongithumileyo uqinisile, lezinto engizizwe kuye lezi ngizikhuluma emhlabeni." 
John8:27 Kawaqedisisanga ukuthi ukhuluma lawo ngoYise. 
John8:28 Ngakho uJesu wathi kuwo: Nxa seliyiphakamisile iNdodana yomuntu, khona lizakwazi ukuthi ngingu ye, njalo kangizenzeli lutho ngokwami, kodwa ngikhuluma lezizinto njengalokhu uBaba engifundisile;" 
John8:29 njalo yena ongithumileyo ulami; uBaba kangitshiyanga ngedwa, ngoba mina ngihlala ngisenza lezizinto ezimthokozisayo yena." 
John8:30 Esakhuluma lezizinto abanengi bakholwa kuye. 
John8:31 Ngakho uJesu wathi kumaJuda akholwe kuye: Uba lina lihlala elizwini lami, lingabafundi bami oqotho;" 
John8:32 lizalazi iqiniso, leqiniso lizalikhulula." 
John8:33 Amphendula athi: Siyinzalo kaAbrahama, kasizanga sibe yizigqili zamuntu; wena utsho njani ukuthi: Lizakuba ngabakhululekileyo?" 
John8:34 UJesu wawaphendula wathi: Ngiqinisile, ngiqinisile, ngithi kini: Wonke owenza isono uyisigqili sesono." 
John8:35 Njalo isigqili kasihlali phakade ekhaya; indodana ihlala phakade. 
John8:36 Ngakho uba iNdodana ilikhulula, lizakuba ngabakhululekileyo oqotho." 
John8:37 Ngiyazi ukuthi liyinzalo kaAbrahama; kodwa lidinga ukungibulala, ngoba ilizwi lami kalilandawo kini." 
John8:38 Mina ngikhuluma lokho engikubonileyo kuBaba; lani-ke lenza lokho elikubonileyo kuyihlo. 
John8:39 Aphendula athi kuye: Ubaba wethu nguAbrahama. UJesu wathi kuwo: Uba belingabantwana bakaAbrahama, belizakwenza imisebenzi kaAbrahama." 
John8:40 Kodwa khathesi lidinga ukungibulala, umuntu olitshele iqiniso, engilizwe kuNkulunkulu; lokho uAbrahama kakwenzanga." 
John8:41 Lina lenza imisebenzi kayihlo. Ngakho athi kuye: Kasizalwanga ngobufebe thina; silobaba munye, uNkulunkulu." 
John8:42 UJesu wathi kuwo: Uba uNkulunkulu ubenguyihlo, belizangithanda; ngoba mina ngiphume ngivela kuNkulunkulu; ngoba kangizizelanga ngokwami, kodwa yena ungithumile." 
John8:43 Kungani lingaqedisisi inkulumo yami? Ngoba lingeke lilizwe ilizwi lami. 
John8:44 Lina lingabakayihlo uSathane, lithanda ukwenza inkanuko zikayihlo. Yena wayengumbulali kusukela ekuqaleni, njalo kemi eqinisweni, ngoba iqiniso kalikho kuye. Nxa eqamba amanga, ukhuluma ngokwakhe; ngoba engumqambimanga loyise wawo." 
John8:45 Mina-ke ngoba ngikhuluma iqiniso, kalingikholwa." 
John8:46 Nguwuphi kini ongilahla ngesono? Njalo uba ngilitshela iqiniso, lina kalingikholwa ngani?" 
John8:47 Yena ongokaNkulunkulu uyawezwa amazwi kaNkulunkulu; kungakho lina lingezwa, ngoba kalisibo abakaNkulunkulu." 
John8:48 Ngakho amaJuda aphendula athi kuye: Kasitsho kuhle yini thina ukuthi wena ungumSamariya, lokuthi uledimoni?" 
John8:49 UJesu waphendula wathi: Mina kangiladimoni, kodwa ngiyadumisa uBaba; kodwa lina liyangigcona." 
John8:50 Mina-ke kangizidingeli udumo lwami; ukhona odingayo lowahlulelayo. 
John8:51 Ngiqinisile, ngiqinisile, ngithi kini: Uba umuntu elondoloza ilizwi lami, kasoze abone ukufa laphakade." 
John8:52 Ngakho amaJuda athi kuye: Khathesi sesisazi ukuthi uledimoni; uAbrahama wafa, labaprofethi, kodwa wena uthi: Uba umuntu elondoloza ilizwi lami, kasoze ezwe ukufa laphakade." 
John8:53 Wena umkhulu yini kulobaba wethu uAbrahama, owafayo? Labaprofethi bafa; uzenza bani wena?" 
John8:54 UJesu waphendula wathi: Uba ngizidumisa mina, udumo lwami luyize; nguBaba ongidumisayo, elitsho ngaye lina ukuthi unguNkulunkulu wenu," 
John8:55 njalo kalimazanga; kodwa mina ngiyamazi, njalo uba ngisithi kangimazi, ngizakuba ngumqambi wamanga njengani; kodwa ngiyamazi, ngiyalilondoloza ilizwi lakhe." 
John8:56 Uyihlo uAbrahama wajabula kakhulu ukubona usuku lwami, njalo wa lu bona wathokoza." 
John8:57 Ngakho amaJuda athi kuye: Kawukabi leminyaka engamatshumi amahlanu, njalo wena wambona uAbrahama yini?" 
John8:58 UJesu wathi kuwo: Ngiqinisile, ngiqinisile, ngithi kini: UAbrahama engakabi khona, mina ngikhona." 
John8:59 Asedobha amatshe ukuze amjikijele; kodwa uJesu wacatsha, waphuma ethempelini, edabula phakathi kwawo; wadlula ngokunjalo." 
John9:1 Wathi esedlula wabona umuntu oyisiphofu kusukela ekuzalweni. 
John9:2 Abafundi bakhe basebembuza bathi: Rabi*, ngubani owonayo, lo kumbe abazali bakhe, aze azalwe eyisiphofu?" 
John9:3 UJesu waphendula wathi: Konanga lo loba abazali bakhe; kodwa ukuze kubonakaliswe imisebenzi kaNkulunkulu kuye. 
John9:4 Kufanele ngisebenze imisebenzi yongithumileyo kusesemini; ubusuku buyeza, lapho okungekho olakho ukusebenza khona." 
John9:5 Ngisekhona emhlabeni, ngiyikukhanya komhlaba." 
John9:6 Esetshilo lezizinto, wakhafulela emhlabathini, wenza udaka ngamathe, waninda loludaka emehlweni esiphofu," 
John9:7 wasesithi kuso: Hamba uyegeza echibini leSilowama (okuphendulelwa ngokuthi, oThunyiweyo). Ngakho sahamba sageza, sabuya sesibona." 
John9:8 Ngakho abakhelene laso lalabo ababesibonile ngaphambili ukuthi sasiyisiphofu, bathi: Kayisuye yini lo owayehlezi ephanza?" 
John9:9 Abanye bathi: Lo nguye; kodwa abanye bathi: Unjengaye. Yena wathi: Ngingu ye. 
John9:10 Ngakho bathi kuye: Avulwe njani amehlo akho? 
John9:11 Yena waphendula wathi: Umuntu othiwa nguJesu wenze udaka, waninda amehlo ami, wathi kimi: Hamba uye echibini leSilowama, ugeze. Njalo ngahamba ngageza, ngemukela ukubona." 
John9:12 Ngakho bathi kuye: Ungaphi yena? Wathi: Kangazi. 
John9:13 Basebemletha kubaFarisi, lowo owayekade eyisiphofu." 
John9:14 Njalo kwakulisabatha mhla uJesu esenza udaka, evula amehlo akhe." 
John9:15 AbaFarisi labo basebembuza futhi, ukuthi wemukele njani ukubona. Wasesithi kubo: Ufake udaka emehlweni ami, ngasengigeza, sengibona." 
John9:16 Ngakho abanye babaFarisi bathi: Lumuntu kaveli kuNkulunkulu, ngoba kagcini isabatha. Abanye bathi: Umuntu oyisoni angazenza njani izibonakaliso ezinje? Kwasekusiba khona ukwehlukana phakathi kwabo." 
John9:17 Baphinda bathi kuso isiphofu: Wena uthini ngaye, lokhu evule amehlo akho? Wasesithi: Ungumprofethi." 
John9:18 AmaJuda-ke kawakholwanga ngaye, ukuthi wayeyisiphofu usemukele ukubona, aze abiza abazali bakhe osemukele ukubona," 
John9:19 asebabuza athi: Lo uyindodana yenu, lina elithi yazalwa iyisiphofu yini? Pho isibona njani khathesi?" 
John9:20 Abazali bakhe bawaphendula bathi: Siyazi ukuthi lo uyindodana yethu, lokuthi wazalwa eyisiphofu;" 
John9:21 kodwa ukuthi ubona njani khathesi, kasikwazi; kumbe ngubani ovule amehlo akhe, thina kasikwazi; yena usekhulile; mbuzeni, uzazikhulumela yena." 
John9:22 Abazali bakhe batsho lezizinto, ngoba besesaba amaJuda; ngoba amaJuda ayesevumelene ngokuthi, uba loba engubani ovuma ukuthi unguKristu, kakhutshwe esinagogeni." 
John9:23 Kungakho abazali bakhe bathi: Usekhulile, mbuzeni." 
John9:24 Ambiza-ke ngokwesibili lowomuntu owayeyisiphofu, athi kuye: Phana uNkulunkulu udumo; thina siyazi ukuthi lowomuntu uyisoni." 
John9:25 Yena wasephendula esithi: Loba eyisoni kangazi, kunye engikwaziyo, ukuthi bengiyisiphofu, khathesi sengibona." 
John9:26 Asesithi kuye futhi: Wenzeni kuwe? Uwavule njani amehlo akho? 
John9:27 Wawaphendula wathi: Sengilitshelile, kodwa kalizwanga, lifunelani ukuzwa futhi? Liyafisa lani ukuba ngabafundi bakhe yini?" 
John9:28 Ngakho amthuka, esithi: Nguwe ongumfundi wakhe; kodwa thina singabafundi bakaMozisi." 
John9:29 Thina siyazi ukuthi uNkulunkulu wakhuluma loMozisi; kodwa lo kasimazi lapho avela khona. 
John9:30 Umuntu waphendula wathi kuwo: Ngoba kulokhu kuyisimanga ukuthi lina kalimazi lapho avela khona, kanti uvule amehlo ami." 
John9:31 Njalo siyazi ukuthi uNkulunkulu kazizwa izoni; kodwa uba umuntu engokhonza uNkulunkulu, esenza intando yakhe, uyamuzwa lowo." 
John9:32 Loba nini kakukaze kuzwakale ukuthi kukhona umuntu owavula amehlo owazalwa eyisiphofu. 
John9:33 Uba lo ubengaveli kuNkulunkulu, ubengebe lamandla okwenza ulutho." 
John9:34 Aphendula athi kuye: Wena wazalelwa esonweni ngokupheleleyo, njalo wena uyasifundisa yini? Asemxotshela phandle." 
John9:35 UJesu wezwa ukuthi amxotshele phandle; kwathi esemficile, wathi kuye: Wena uyakholwa yini eNdodaneni kaNkulunkulu?" 
John9:36 Yena waphendula wathi: Ingubani, Nkosi, ukuze ngikholwe kuyo?" 
John9:37 UJesu wasesithi kuye: Lawe usuyibonile, njalo okhuluma lawe uyiyo." 
John9:38 Wasesithi: Nkosi, ngiyakholwa; wasemkhonza." 
John9:39 UJesu wasesithi: Mina ngizele ukwahlulela kulumhlaba, ukuze abangaboniyo babone, lalabo ababonayo babe yiziphofu." 
John9:40 Lalabo kubaFarisi ababelaye bezwa lezizinto, bathi kuye: Lathi siyiziphofu yini?" 
John9:41 UJesu wathi kubo: Uba beliyiziphofu, ngabe kalilasono. Kodwa khathesi lithi: Siyabona; ngakho isono senu simi." 
John10:1 Ngiqinisile, ngiqinisile, ngithi kini: Ongangeni ngesango esibayeni sezimvu, kodwa akhwele kwenye indawo, lowo ulisela lomphangi;" 
John10:2 kodwa ongena ngesango ungumelusi wezimvu. 
John10:3 Umlindi wesango uyamvulela, lezimvu ziyalizwa ilizwi lakhe, njalo uyazibiza ezakhe izimvu ngamabizo, azikhokhelele phandle." 
John10:4 Nxa esezikhuphile ezakhe izimvu, uhamba phambi kwazo; lezimvu zimlandele, ngoba ziyalazi ilizwi lakhe." 
John10:5 Kodwa owemzini kazisoze zimlandele, kodwa zizambalekela; ngoba kazilazi ilizwi labemzini." 
John10:6 UJesu wakhuluma lumfanekiso kubo; kodwa bona kabaqedisisanga ukuthi ziyini izinto azitshoyo kubo. 
John10:7 Ngakho uJesu waphinda wathi kubo: Ngiqinisile, ngiqinisile, ngithi kini: Mina ngilisango lezimvu;" 
John10:8 bonke abake bafika phambi kwami bangamasela labaphangi; kodwa izimvu kazibezwanga. 
John10:9 Mina ngilisango; uba umuntu engena ngami, uzasindiswa, angene aphume, athole idlelo." 
John10:10 Isela kalizi ngaphandle kokuzakweba lokubulala lokubhubhisa; mina ngizile ukuze babe lempilo, babe layo iphuphume." 
John10:11 Mina ngingumelusi olungileyo. Umelusi olungileyo uzibekela phansi izimvu impilo yakhe. 
John10:12 Kodwa oqatshiweyo, engesuye umelusi, izimvu zingesizo ezakhe, ubona impisi isiza, atshiye izimvu, abaleke; kuthi impisi izibambe, izichithachithe izimvu." 
John10:13 Oqatshiweyo uyabaleka-ke, ngoba engoqatshiweyo, njalo engazikhathaleli izimvu." 
John10:14 Mina ngingumelusi olungileyo, ngiyazazi ezami, ngiyaziwa ngezami," 
John10:15 njengalokhu uBaba engazi, lami ngiyamazi uBaba; ngizibekela phansi izimvu impilo yami." 
John10:16 Njalo ngilezinye izimvu, ezingesizo zalesisibaya; lazo ngifanele ukuziletha, njalo zizakuzwa ilizwi lami; njalo kube mhlambi munye, melusi munye." 
John10:17 Ngenxa yalokhu uBaba uyangithanda, ngoba mina ngibeka phansi impilo yami, ukuze ngibuye ngiyithathe." 
John10:18 Kakho ongemuka yona, kodwa mina ngiyibeka phansi ngokwami. Ngilamandla okuyibeka phansi, njalo ngilamandla okubuya ngiyithathe. Lumlayo ngiwemukele kuBaba." 
John10:19 Ngakho kwaba khona futhi ukwehlukana phakathi kwamaJuda ngenxa yalamazwi. 
John10:20 Labanengi bawo bathi: Uledimoni futhi uyahlanya; limlalelelani? 
John10:21 Amanye athi: Lamazwi kawasiwo wongenwe lidimoni; kambe idimoni lingavula amehlo eziphofu yini? 
John10:22 Kwakukhona umkhosi wokuvuselela eJerusalema, kwakusebusika;" 
John10:23 uJesu wasehambahamba ethempelini ekhulusini likaSolomoni. 
John10:24 AmaJuda asemhanqa, athi kuye: Koze kube nini usilibazisa? Uba wena unguKristu, sitshele ngokucacileyo." 
John10:25 UJesu wawaphendula wathi: Ngalitshela, kodwa kalikholwanga; imisebenzi mina engiyenza ebizweni likaBaba, yiyo engifakazelayo;" 
John10:26 kodwa lina kalikholwa; ngoba kalisibo abezimvu zami, njengokutsho kwami kini." 
John10:27 Izimvu zami ziyalizwa ilizwi lami, lami ngiyazazi, futhi ziyangilandela;" 
John10:28 njalo mina ngizinika impilo elaphakade; futhi kazisoze zabhubha laphakade, njalo kungekho ozazihluthuna esandleni sami." 
John10:29 UBaba o zi nike mina, mkhulu kulabo bonke; kungekho njalo ongazihluthuna esandleni sikaBaba." 
John10:30 Mina loBaba simunye. 
John10:31 Ngakho amaJuda aphinda athatha amatshe ukuze amkhande ngawo. 
John10:32 UJesu wawaphendula wathi: Ngilitshengise imisebenzi eminengi emihle evela kuBaba; yiwuphi umsebenzi kuyo elingikhandela wona ngamatshe? 
John10:33 AmaJuda amphendula athi: Kasikukhandi ngamatshe ngenxa yomsebenzi omuhle, kodwa ngenxa yenhlamba, langokuthi wena ungumuntu uzenza uNkulunkulu." 
John10:34 UJesu wawaphendula wathi: Kakulotshiwe yini emlayweni wenu ukuthi: Mina ngathi: Lingonkulunkulu? 
John10:35 Uba wababiza bona ngokuthi ngonkulunkulu, eleza kubo ilizwi likaNkulunkulu, njalo umbhalo ungephulwe," 
John10:36 lowo uBaba amehlukanisileyo wamthuma emhlabeni, kanti lina lithi: Uyahlambaza, ngoba ngithe: NgiyiNdodana kaNkulunkulu?" 
John10:37 Uba ngingenzi imisebenzi kaBaba, kalingakholwa kimi." 
John10:38 Kodwa uba ngi y enza, lanxa lingakholwa kimi, kholwani imisebenzi; ukuze lazi likholwe ukuthi uBaba ukimi, lami ngikuye." 
John10:39 Ngakho adinga futhi ukumbamba; kodwa waphunyuka esandleni sabo. 
John10:40 Wasebuya wasuka waya ngaphetsheya kweJordani kundawo lapho uJohane ayebhabhathiza khona kuqala; wasehlala khona. 
John10:41 Labanengi beza kuye, bathi: UJohane kenzanga sibonakaliso; kodwa konke uJohane akutsho ngalo, kwakuliqiniso." 
John10:42 Abanengi basebekholwa kuye lapho. 
John11:1 Kwakukhona-ke othile owayegula othiwa nguLazaro weBethani, emzaneni kaMariya loMarta udadewabo." 
John11:2 Kwakunguye uMariya owagcoba iNkosi ngamagcobo, wesula inyawo zayo ngenwele zakhe, omnewabo uLazaro wayegula." 
John11:3 Ngakho odadewabo bathumela kuye besithi: Nkosi, khangela lowo omthandayo uyagula." 
John11:4 UJesu esezwile wathi: Lokhu ukugula kakusikho okokufa, kodwa kungokodumo lukaNkulunkulu ukuze iNdodana kaNkulunkulu idunyiswe ngakho." 
John11:5 UJesu wayebathanda-ke oMarta lodadewabo loLazaro. 
John11:6 Ngakho esezwile ukuthi uyagula, wasehlala insuku ezimbili endaweni lapho ayekhona." 
John11:7 Emva kwalokhu wasesithi kubafundi bakhe: Asiphinde siye eJudiya. 
John11:8 Abafundi bathi kuye: Rabi*, amaJuda asanda ukudinga ukukukhanda ngamatshe, njalo uya khona futhi yini?" 
John11:9 UJesu waphendula wathi: Kawakho amahola alitshumi lambili emini yini? Nxa umuntu ehamba emini, kakhubeki, ngoba uyabona ukukhanya kwalumhlaba." 
John11:10 Kodwa uba umuntu ehamba ebusuku, uyakhubeka, ngoba ukukhanya kakukho kuye." 
John11:11 Wakhuluma lezizinto, emva kwalokhu wasesithi kubo: Umngane wethu uLazaro uselele; kodwa ngiyahamba ukuze ngimvuse ebuthongweni." 
John11:12 Ngakho abafundi bakhe bathi kuye: Nkosi, uba elele, uzaphila." 
John11:13 Kodwa uJesu wakhuluma ngokufa kwakhe; kodwa bona bacabanga ukuthi wakhuluma ngokuphumula kobuthongo. 
John11:14 Ngakho uJesu wasebatshela ngokucacileyo: ULazaro ufile. 
John11:15 Njalo ngiyathokoza ngenxa yenu ukuthi bengingekho lapho, ukuze likholwe; kodwa asiye kuye." 
John11:16 Ngakho uTomasi, othiwa nguDidimusi, wathi kubafundi kanye laye: Asihambeni lathi, ukuze sife kanye laye." 
John11:17 Kwathi esefika uJesu, wamfica eselensuku ezine engcwabeni." 
John11:18 LeBethani yayiseduze leJerusalema, okungaba ngamastadiyu* alitshumi lanhlanu ukusuka lapho;" 
John11:19 labanengi kumaJuda babefikile kuMarta loMariya, ukuze babaduduze ngomnewabo." 
John11:20 Ngakho uMarta, esezwile ukuthi uJesu uyeza, wayakumhlangabeza; kodwa uMariya wahlala endlini." 
John11:21 UMarta wasesithi kuJesu: Nkosi, aluba ubukhona lapha, umnewethu ngabe kafanga;" 
John11:22 kodwa lakhathesi ngiyazi ukuthi loba yini ongayicela kuNkulunkulu, uNkulunkulu uzakunika yona." 
John11:23 UJesu wathi kuye: Umnewenu uzabuya avuke. 
John11:24 UMarta wathi kuye: Ngiyazi ukuthi uzabuya avuke ekuvukeni ngosuku lokucina. 
John11:25 UJesu wathi kuye: Mina ngiyikuvuka lempilo; okholwa kimi, loba esefile, uzaphila;" 
John11:26 njalo wonke ophilayo ekholwa kimi, kasoze afe laphakade. Uyakukholwa lokhu yini?" 
John11:27 Wathi kuye: Yebo, Nkosi; mina ngiyakholwa ukuthi wena unguKristu, iNdodana kaNkulunkulu, obezakuza emhlabeni." 
John11:28 Esetshilo lokhu uMarta wasuka, wayabiza udadewabo uMariya ensitha, wathi: UMfundisi ulapha uyakubiza." 
John11:29 Yena-ke esezwile lokhu, wahle wasuka waya kuye." 
John11:30 Kodwa uJesu wayengakafiki emzaneni, kodwa wayesendaweni lapho uMarta amhlangabeza khona." 
John11:31 Ngakho amaJuda ayesendlini laye emduduza, ebona uMariya ukuthi wasukuma ngokuphangisa ephuma, amlandela, esithi: Uya engcwabeni, ukuze akhale khona." 
John11:32 Kwathi uMariya, esefike lapho uJesu akhona, embona, wawela enyaweni zakhe, esithi kuye: Nkosi, ngabe ubukhona lapha, umnewethu ngabe kafanga."
