1Corinthians4:4 Ngoba kanginanzeleli lutho kimi, kanti kangilungisiswanga ngalokho; kodwa ongahlulelayo yiNkosi." 
1Corinthians4:5 Ngakho lingahluleli lutho isikhathi singakafiki, ize ifike iNkosi, ezaveza futhi ekukhanyeni izinto ezifihlakeleyo emnyameni, njalo iveze obala amacebo ezinhliziyo; njalo khona ngulowo lalowo ezakuba lokubongwa okuvela kuNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians4:6 Njalo lezizinto, bazalwane, ngiziqondanise lami loApolosi ngenxa yenu, ukuze lifunde kithi ukuthi lingakhumbuli phezu kokulotshiweyo, ukuze lingakhukhunyezwa omunye ngomunye limelene lomunye." 
1Corinthians4:7 Ngoba ngubani okwenza ukuthi wehluke? Njalo kuyini olakho ongakwemukelanga? Njalo uba lawe wemukele, uzincomelani ngokungathi kawemukelanga yini?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Selisuthi, selinothile, libusile ngaphandle kwethu; yebo-ke kungathi ngabe liyabusa, ukuze lathi sibuse kanye lani." 
1Corinthians4:9 Ngoba ngithi uNkulunkulu usimisile thina abaphostoli bokucina, sibe njengabamiselwe ukufa; ngoba senziwe umbukiso emhlabeni, lakuzo ingilosi, lebantwini." 
1Corinthians4:10 Thina siyizithutha ngenxa kaKristu, kodwa lina lihlakaniphile kuKristu; thina sibuthakathaka, kodwa lina lilamandla; lina liyahlonitshwa, kodwa thina siyadelelwa." 
1Corinthians4:11 Kuze kube lihola lakhathesi silambile, somile, sinqunu, siyatshaywa ngenqindi, siyimihambuma," 
1Corinthians4:12 siyatshikatshika sisebenza ngezethu izandla; sithi sithukwa sibusise; sithi sizingelwa sibekezele; 
1Corinthians4:13 sithi sinyeywa sincenge; senziwa njengamanyala omhlaba, imfucuza yezinto zonke, kuze kube khathesi." 
1Corinthians4:14 Kangilibhaleli lezizinto ukuthi ngilithele inhloni, kodwa ngi l eluleka njengabantwana bami abathandekayo." 
1Corinthians4:15 Ngoba lanxa lilabeluleki abayizinkulungwane ezilitshumi kuKristu, kodwa kungeyisibo obaba abanengi; ngoba mina ngalizala kuKristu Jesu ngevangeli." 
1Corinthians4:16 Ngakho ngiyalincenga: Banini ngabalingisi bami. 
1Corinthians4:17 Ngalokho ngithume kini uTimothi, ongumntanami othandekayo lothembekileyo eNkosini, ozalikhumbuza ngenhambo zami ezikuKristu, njengoba ngifundisa endaweni zonke kulo lonke ibandla." 
1Corinthians4:18 Kodwa abanye bazikhukhumezile ngokungathi kangiyikuza kini. 
1Corinthians4:19 Kanti ngizakuza kini masinyane, uba iNkosi ivuma, njalo ngizakwazi, kangitsho ilizwi lalabo abazikhukhumezayo, kodwa amandla." 
1Corinthians4:20 Ngoba umbuso kaNkulunkulu kawungelizwi kodwa ngamandla. 
1Corinthians4:21 Lifunani? Ngize kini ngenduku yini, kumbe ngothando lomoya ochumileyo?" 
1Corinthians5:1 Isibili kuzwakele ukuthi kukhona ukuphinga phakathi kwenu, futhi ukuphinga kohlobo olungaqanjwayo laphakathi kwabezizwe, kuze kuthi omunye abe lomkayise." 
1Corinthians5:2 Kodwa lina liyazikhukhumeza, njalo endaweni yalokho alizange lilile, ukuze owenze lesisenzo asuswe phakathi kwenu." 
1Corinthians5:3 Ngoba mina-ke, njengongekho ngomzimba kodwa okhona ngomoya, sengiqumile owenze kanje lokhu, ngokungathi ngi khona," 
1Corinthians5:4 ebizweni leNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu, selihlangene lomoya wami kanye lamandla eNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu," 
1Corinthians5:5 ukunikela onjalo kuSathane ekubhubheni kwenyama, ukuze umoya usindiswe esukwini lweNkosi uJesu." 
1Corinthians5:6 Kakukuhle ukuzincoma kwenu. Kalazi yini ukuthi imvubelo encinyane ibilisa inhlama yonke? 
1Corinthians5:7 Ngakho khuphani imvubelo endala, ukuze libe yinhlama entsha, njengabangelamvubelo. Ngoba lephasika lethu lihlatshelwe thina, ngitsho uKristu;" 
1Corinthians5:8 ngakho asigcine umkhosi, kungabi ngemvubelo endala, njalo kungabi ngemvubelo yobubi lokona, kodwa nge sinkwa esingelamvubelo sobuqotho leseqiniso." 
1Corinthians5:9 Ngalibhalela encwadini ukuthi lingahlanganyeli leziphingi; 
1Corinthians5:10 kodwa kungeyisikho ngokupheleleyo leziphingi zalumhlaba kumbe lezihwaba, kumbe labaphangi, kumbe labakhonza izithombe; ngoba phela ngokunjalo kungafanela ukuthi liphume emhlabeni." 
1Corinthians5:11 Kodwa khathesi-ke ngalibhalela ukuthi lingahlanganyeli, nxa umuntu ebizwa ngokuthi ungumzalwane eyisiphingi, kumbe isihwaba, kumbe okhonza izithombe, kumbe isithuki, kumbe isidakwa, kumbe umphangi; lingaze ladla lonje lakanye." 
1Corinthians5:12 Ngoba ngilani lokwahlulela abangaphandle? Lina kalahluleli yini abangaphakathi? 
1Corinthians5:13 Kodwa uNkulunkulu wahlulela abangaphandle. Njalo lina mxotsheni omubi phakathi kwenu. 
1Corinthians6:1 Kukhona yini umuntu wakini, othi elecala lomunye, abe lesibindi sokuyakwahlulelwa phambi kwabangalunganga, kungabi phambi kwabangcwele?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Kalazi yini ukuthi abangcwele bazakwahlulela umhlaba? Uba-ke umhlaba uzakwahlulelwa yini, kalifanele yini amacala amancinyane?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Kalazi yini ukuthi sizazahlulela ingilosi? Kangakanani indaba zalokhukuphila? 
1Corinthians6:4 Ngakho uba lilamacala alokhukuphila, babekeni phezu kwawo labo abadelelekayo ebandleni." 
1Corinthians6:5 Ngikhuluma kini ukuthi libe lenhloni. Ngokunjalo kakho ohlakaniphileyo phakathi kwenu yini, ngitsho loyedwa, ongahlulela phakathi kwabazalwane bakhe?" 
1Corinthians6:6 Kodwa umzalwane umangalela umzalwane, lalokho phambi kwabangakholwayo." 
1Corinthians6:7 Ngakho kusekhona isibili ukwehluleka phakathi kwenu, ukuthi lilokumangalelana. Kungani kulalokhu lingavumi ukoniwa? Kungani kulalokhu lingavumi ukuqilibezelwa?" 
1Corinthians6:8 Kodwa lina liyona liqilibezele, lalokhu kubazalwane." 
1Corinthians6:9 Kumbe alazi yini ukuthi abangalunganga kabayikulidla ilifa lombuso kaNkulunkulu? Lingakhohliswa; kakulaziphingi, loba abakhonza izithombe, loba izifebe, loba ababuthakathaka ekulalaneni kwabesilisa, loba abesilisa abalalanayo," 
1Corinthians6:10 loba amasela, loba izihwaba, loba izidakwa, loba izithuki, loba abaphangi, abayikulidla ilifa lombuso kaNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians6:11 Abanye benu babeyilezizinto; kodwa ligezisiwe, kodwa langcweliswa, kodwa lalungisiswa ebizweni leNkosi uJesu Kristu, langoMoya kaNkulunkulu wethu." 
1Corinthians6:12 Zonke izinto zivumelekile kimi, kodwa kayisizo zonke izinto ezisizayo; zonke izinto zivumelekile kimi, kodwa mina kangiyikubuswa lutho." 
1Corinthians6:13 Ukudla ngokwesisu, lesisu ngesokudla; kanti uNkulunkulu uzakuchitha laso lakho. Kodwa umzimba kayisiwo wokuphinga, kodwa ungoweNkosi, njalo iNkosi ingeyomzimba;" 
1Corinthians6:14 njalo uNkulunkulu owavusa iNkosi uzasivusa lathi ngamandla akhe. 
1Corinthians6:15 Kalazi yini ukuthi imizimba yenu iyizitho zikaKristu? Pho ngizathatha izitho zikaKristu ngizenze izitho zesifebe yini? Phinde! 
1Corinthians6:16 Kumbe kalazi yini ukuthi onamathelana lesifebe ungumzimba munye laso? Ngoba labo ababili, uthi, bazakuba nyamanye." 
1Corinthians6:17 Kodwa onamathelene leNkosi ungumoya munye layo. 
1Corinthians6:18 Balekelani ukuphinga. Sonke isono umuntu asenzayo singaphandle komzimba; kodwa ophingayo wona umzimba wakhe uqobo. 
1Corinthians6:19 Kumbe kalazi yini ukuthi umzimba wenu ulithempeli likaMoya oNgcwele okini, elilawo uvela kuNkulunkulu? Njalo kalisibo abenu," 
1Corinthians6:20 ngoba lathengwa ngentengo; ngakho dumisani uNkulunkulu emzimbeni wenu, langomoya wenu, okungokukaNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians7:1 Mayelana-ke lezinto elangibhalela ngazo, kuhle emuntwini ukuthi angamthinti owesifazana." 
1Corinthians7:2 Kodwa ngenxa yokuphinga ngulowo lalowo kumele abe lowakhe umfazi, njalo ngulowo lalowo mfazi abe leyakhe indoda." 
1Corinthians7:3 Indoda kayenanise kumfazi isifiso esihle esimfaneleyo; langokunjalo lomfazi endodeni. 
1Corinthians7:4 Umfazi kalamandla phezu kowakhe umzimba, kodwa indoda; langokunjalo lendoda kayilamandla phezu kowayo umzimba, kodwa umfazi." 
1Corinthians7:5 Lingagodlelani, ngaphandle kokuvumela na okwesikhathi, ukuthi lizinikele ekuzileni ukudla lekukhulekeni, libuye lihlangane futhi, ukuze uSathane angalilingi ngokungazithibi kwenu." 
1Corinthians7:6 Kodwa lokhu ngikutsho ngemvumo, kungeyisikho ngomlayo." 
1Corinthians7:7 Ngoba ngithanda ukuthi abantu bonke babe njengami labo; kodwa ngulowo lalowo ulesakhe isiphiwo esivela kuNkulunkulu, omunye ngokunjalo, lomunye ngokunjalo." 
1Corinthians7:8 Kodwa kwabangendanga labafelokazi ngithi: Kuhle kibo uba behlala njengami labo. 
1Corinthians7:9 Kodwa uba bengelakuzithiba kabende; ngoba kungcono ukwenda kulokutsha. 
1Corinthians7:10 Kodwa kwabendileyo ngiyabalaya, kungeyisimi kodwa yiNkosi, ukuthi umfazi kangehlukani lendoda;" 
1Corinthians7:11 kodwa uba laye esehlukana, kahlale engendanga, kumbe abuyisane lendoda; lendoda kayingamlahli umfazi." 
1Corinthians7:12 Kodwa kwabanye kutsho mina, kungesiyo iNkosi, ukuthi: Uba loba nguwuphi umzalwane elomfazi ongakholwayo, njalo yena evuma ukuhlala laye, angamlahli." 
1Corinthians7:13 Lomfazi olendoda engakholwayo, njalo ivuma ukuhlala laye, angayitshiyi." 
1Corinthians7:14 Ngoba indoda engakholwayo yenziwa ibe ngcwele ngomfazi, lomfazi ongakholwayo wenziwa abe ngcwele ngendoda. Uba kungenjalo abantwana benu ngabangcolileyo, kodwa khathesi bangcwele." 
1Corinthians7:15 Uba-ke ongakholwayo ezehlukanisa, kazehlukanise; kwezinjalo umzalwane kumbe umzalwanekazi kabotshwanga; kodwa uNkulunkulu usibizele ekuthuleni." 
1Corinthians7:16 Ngoba wazi ngani, mfazi, ukuthi uzayisindisa indoda? Kumbe wazi ngani, ndoda, ukuthi uzamsindisa umfazi?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Kuphela nje njengokuthi uNkulunkulu ababele ngulowo lalowo, njengoba iNkosi ibizile ngulowo lalowo, akahambe ngokunjalo. Langokunjalo ngiyalaya emabandleni wonke." 
1Corinthians7:18 Ukhona yini owabizwa esokile? Kangabi ngongasokwanga. Ukhona yini owabizwa engasokanga? Kangasokwa. 
1Corinthians7:19 Ukusoka kakusilutho, lokungasoki kakusilutho, kodwa ukulondolozwa kwemilayo kaNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians7:20 Ngulowo lalowo kahlale kubizo abizwe kulo. 
1Corinthians7:21 Wabizwa uyisigqili yini? Ungakhathazeki ngakho. Kodwa uba lawe ungakhululeka, kungcono ukusebenzise." 
1Corinthians7:22 Ngoba lo obizwa eNkosini eyisigqili ungokhululekileyo weNkosi; ngokunjalo lalowo owabizwa ekhululekile, uyisigqili sikaKristu." 
1Corinthians7:23 Lathengwa ngentengo; lingabi yizigqili zabantu. 
1Corinthians7:24 Ngulowo lalowo abizelwe kukho, bazalwane, kahlale kukho loNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians7:25 Kodwa mayelana lentombi kangilawo umlayo weNkosi; kodwa ngiyeluleka njengowemukele isihawu eNkosini ukuba athembeke. 
1Corinthians7:26 Ngakho ngikhumbula ukuthi lokhu kuhle ngenxa yenkathazo ezikhona, ukuthi kuhle emuntwini ukubanje." 
1Corinthians7:27 Ubotshelwe emfazini yini? Ungadingi ukukhululwa. Ukhululwe emfazini yini? Ungadingi umfazi. 
1Corinthians7:28 Kodwa uba lawe uthatha, kawoni; lentombi uba isenda, kayoni. Kanti abanjalo bazakuba lenkathazo enyameni; mina-ke ngiyaliphephisa." 
1Corinthians7:29 Kodwa ngitsho lokhu, bazalwane, ukuthi isikhathi sifitshane; kusukela khathesi labalabafazi kababe njengabangelabo;" 
1Corinthians7:30 labakhalayo, njenga ba ngakhaliyo; labathokozayo, njenga ba ngathokoziyo; labathengayo, njenga ba ngelalutho;" 
1Corinthians7:31 labasebenzisa lumhlaba, njenga ba nga wu sebenzisisiyo; ngoba isimo salumhlaba siyedlula." 
1Corinthians7:32 Kodwa ngithanda ukuthi lingabi lakukhathazeka. Ongathathanga ukhathalela izinto zeNkosi, ukuthi uzayithokozisa njani iNkosi;" 
1Corinthians7:33 kodwa othetheyo ukhathalela izinto zomhlaba, ukuthi uzamthokozisa njani umfazi." 
1Corinthians7:34 Wehlukene umfazi lentombi. Ongathathwanga ukhathalela okweNkosi, ukuze abe ngcwele emzimbeni kanye lemoyeni; kodwa othethweyo ukhathalela okomhlaba, ukuthi uzayithokozisa njani indoda." 
1Corinthians7:35 Lalokhu ngikutsho ukuthi kube ngolwenu usizo; kungesikuthi ngiliphosele umchilo wokulikhina, kodwa ukuze lihambe ngokufaneleyo lokubambelela eNkosini kungelakuphazamiseka." 
1Corinthians7:36 Kodwa uba umuntu ebona ukuthi uziphatha ngokungafanele entombini yakhe, yona isikhulile, futhi kumele kwenzeke kanje, kenze akufunayo; koni; kabatshade." 
1Corinthians7:37 Kodwa omiyo eqinile enhliziyweni yakhe, engacindezelwa lutho, futhi elamandla ngesakhe isifiso, esekumisile lokhu enhliziyweni yakhe ukuthi uzagcina eyakhe intombi, wenza kuhle;" 
1Corinthians7:38 ngakho lowo owendisayo wenza kuhle; kodwa ongendisiyo wenza ngcono. 
1Corinthians7:39 Umfazi ubotshiwe ngomthetho selokhu indoda yakhe iphila; kodwa uba indoda yakhe isifile, ukhululekile ukuthi endele kulowo amthandayo, kuphela eNkosini." 
1Corinthians7:40 Kodwa uyathaba kakhulu uba ehlala enjalo, ngokubona kwami; ngikhumbula-ke ukuthi lami ngiloMoya kaNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians8:1 Mayelana-ke lezinto ezihlatshelwe izithombe, siyazi ukuthi sonke silolwazi. Ulwazi luyakhukhumeza, kodwa uthando luyakha." 
1Corinthians8:2 Uba-ke umuntu esithi uyazi ulutho, kakazi lutho njengoba kufanele ukuthi azi;" 
1Corinthians8:3 kodwa uba umuntu ethanda uNkulunkulu, yena uyaziwa nguye." 
1Corinthians8:4 Ngakho mayelana lokudla izinto ezihlatshelwe izithombe, siyazi ukuthi isithombe kasilutho emhlabeni, lokuthi kakho omunye unkulunkulu ngaphandle koyedwa;" 
1Corinthians8:5 ngoba lanxa kukhona okuthiwa ngonkulunkulu, loba kusezulwini loba kusemhlabeni (njengoba kukhona onkulunkulu abanengi, lamakhosi amanengi)," 
1Corinthians8:6 kanti kithi kuloNkulunkulu munye, uBaba, okuvela kuye izinto zonke, lathi sikuye; leNkosi inye, uJesu Kristu, okwa vela ngaye konke, lathi si khona ngaye." 
1Corinthians8:7 Kodwa ulwazi kalukho kubo bonke; kanti abanye belesazela sesithombe kuze kube khathesi bayadla njengokuhlatshelwe isithombe, lesazela sabo esibuthakathaka siyangcola." 
1Corinthians8:8 Kodwa ukudla kakusisondezi kuNkulunkulu; ngoba kungesikuthi nxa sisidla, silenzuzo; njalo kungesikuthi nxa singadli, silokulahlekelwa." 
1Corinthians8:9 Qaphelani-ke, hlezi amandla enu la abe yisikhubekiso kwababuthakathaka." 
1Corinthians8:10 Ngoba uba umuntu ekubona wena ololwazi uhlezi ekudleni ethempelini lesithombe, isazela salowo obuthakathaka kasiyikuqiniswa yini ukuthi adle izinto ezihlatshelwe izithombe?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Ngenxa yolwazi lwakho lomzalwane obuthakathaka uzabhubha yini, amfelayo uKristu?" 
1Corinthians8:12 Kodwa uba lisona ngokunjalo kubazalwane, lilimaza isazela sabo esibuthakathaka, liyona kuKristu." 
1Corinthians8:13 Ngakho-ke uba ukudla kumkhubekisa umzalwane wami, kangisoze ngidle inyama loba nininini, ukuze ngingamkhubekisi umzalwane wami." 
1Corinthians9:1 Kangisuye umphostoli yini? Kangikhululekanga yini? Angithi ngibone uJesu Kristu iNkosi yethu yini? Lina kalisiwo yini umsebenzi wami eNkosini? 
1Corinthians9:2 Uba ngingesuye umphostoli kwabanye, kodwa nging uye sibili kini; ngoba lina liluphawu lobuphostoli bami eNkosini." 
1Corinthians9:3 Ukuziphendulela kwami kwabangihlolayo yilokhu. 
1Corinthians9:4 Kasilamandla yini okudla lokunatha? 
1Corinthians9:5 Kasilamandla yini okuhambahamba lomzalwanekazi oyinkosikazi, njengabanye abaphostoli labo, labafowabo beNkosi, loKefasi?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Kumbe yimi ngedwa loBarnabasi yini esingelamandla okungasebenzi? 
1Corinthians9:7 Ngubani owake waphuma impi ngezakhe indleko? Ngubani ohlanyela isivini, angadli okwesithelo saso? Kumbe ngubani owelusa umhlambi, angadli okochago lomhlambi?" 
1Corinthians9:8 Kambe lezizinto ngizitsho ngokomuntu? Kumbe lomlayo kawutsho lezizinto yini? 
1Corinthians9:9 Ngoba kulotshiwe emlayweni kaMozisi ukuthi: Ungayifaki isayeke inkabi nxa ibhula amabele. Kambe uNkulunkulu ukhathalela inkabi? 
1Corinthians9:10 Kumbe utsho ngenxa yethu isibili? Ngoba kubhalwe ngenxa yethu, ukuze kuthi olimayo kufanele alime ethembeni, lobhulayo esethembeni uhlanganyela ethembeni lakhe." 
1Corinthians9:11 Uba thina sahlanyela kini okomoya, kuyinto enkulu yini uba sivuna okwenu okwenyama?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Uba abanye behlanganyela lamandla phezu kwenu, kakhulu kangakanani thina? Kodwa kasiwasebenzisanga lawomandla, kodwa sibekezelela konke, ukuze singabeki isikhubekiso lakanye evangelini likaKristu." 
1Corinthians9:13 Kalazi yini ukuthi labo abasebenza ezintweni ezingcwele badla okwethempeli, labo abalinda ilathi bahlanganyela lelathi?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Ngokunjalo iNkosi layo ilayile ukuthi labo abatshumayela ivangeli baphile ngevangeli. 
1Corinthians9:15 Kodwa mina angisebenzisanga lalunye lwalezizinto; futhi kangibhalanga lezizinto ukuze kwenziwe njalo kimi, ngoba kungaba ngcono kimi ukuthi ngife, kulokuthi umuntu akwenze ize ukuzincoma kwami." 
1Corinthians9:16 Ngoba loba ngitshumayela ivangeli, kangilakuzincoma; ngoba imfanelo yetheswe mina; kodwa maye kimi, uba ngingatshumayeli ivangeli!" 
1Corinthians9:17 Ngoba uba ngisenza lokhu ngokuzithandela, ngilomvuzo; kodwa nxa kungeyisikho ngokuzithandela, ubuphathi bunikelwe kimi." 
1Corinthians9:18 Pho umvuzo wami uyini? Uyi kuthi nxa ngitshumayela ivangeli ngenze ukuthi ivangeli likaKristu lingabizi lutho, ukuze ngingasebenzisi kakhulu amandla ami evangelini." 
1Corinthians9:19 Ngoba ngikhululekile kibo bonke, ngizenze isigqili sabo bonke, ukuze ngizuze abanengi kakhulu." 
1Corinthians9:20 LakumaJuda ngaba njengomJuda, ukuze ngizuze amaJuda; kwabangaphansi komlayo nje ngo ngaphansi komlayo, ukuze ngizuze abangaphansi komlayo;" 
1Corinthians9:21 kwabangelamlayo nje ngo ngelamlayo, ngingesuye ongelamlayo kuNkulunkulu kodwa ngiphakathi komlayo kuKristu, ukuze ngizuze abangelamlayo;" 
1Corinthians9:22 kwababuthakathaka ngaba nje ngo buthakathaka, ukuze ngizuze ababuthakathaka; ngaba yikho konke kubo bonke, ukuze ngakho konke ngisindise abanye." 
1Corinthians9:23 Lalokho ngikwenza ngenxa yevangeli, ukuze lami ngibe ngohlanganyela kulo." 
1Corinthians9:24 Kalazi yini ukuthi abagijima emjahweni bagijima bonke, kodwa munye owemukela umvuzo; gijimani ngokunjalo, ukuze li wu phuthume." 
1Corinthians9:25 Labo bonke abancintisanayo bayazithiba ezintweni zonke; labo-ke ukuze bemukele umqhele ophelayo, kodwa thina ongapheliyo." 
1Corinthians9:26 Mina-ke ngigijima ngokunjalo njengongaqondanga lutho; ngilwa ngokunjalo kungenjengodabula umoya; 
1Corinthians9:27 kodwa ngiyawudinda umzimba wami ngiwenze isigqili, hlezi kuthi, sengitshumayeze abanye ngilahlwe mina uqobo." 
1Corinthians10:1 Kangithandi-ke ukuthi lingazi, bazalwane, ukuthi bonke obaba bethu babengaphansi kweyezi, njalo bonke badabula ulwandle," 
1Corinthians10:2 futhi bonke babhabhathizwa kuMozisi eyezini lolwandle," 
1Corinthians10:3 labo bonke badla ukudla kunye komoya," 
1Corinthians10:4 futhi bonke banatha okunathwayo kunye komoya; ngoba banatha edwaleni lomoya elabalandelayo; lalelodwala lalinguKristu. 
1Corinthians10:5 Kodwa ubunengi babo uNkulunkulu wayengathokozi ngabo; ngoba bachithwa enkangala. 
1Corinthians10:6 Lalezizinto zaba yizibonelo kithi, ukuze singaloyisi okubi, njengalokhu labo baloyisa." 
1Corinthians10:7 Njalo lingabi ngabakhonza izithombe, njengabanye babo; njengokulotshiweyo ukuthi: Abantu bahlala phansi ukudla lokunatha, basebesukuma ukudlala." 
1Corinthians10:8 Njalo kasingaphingi, njengabanye babo abaphingayo, basebesiwa ngasuku lunye inkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lantathu." 
1Corinthians10:9 Njalo asingamlingi uKristu, njengabanye babo futhi ba m linga, basebebhujiswa zinyoka." 
1Corinthians10:10 Lingasoli-ke, njengabanye babo labo basola, babhujiswa ngumbhubhisi." 
1Corinthians10:11 Lalezizinto zonke zabehlela labo kube yizibonelo, njalo zabhalelwa ukuba yisixwayiso sethu, osekufike ukucina kwezikhathi." 
1Corinthians10:12 Ngakho lowo ocabanga ukuthi umi, kabone ukuthi kawi." 
1Corinthians10:13 Kakulakulingwa okulibambileyo ngaphandle kokusebantwini; kodwa uNkulunkulu uthembekile, ongayikuvuma ukuthi lilingwe ngokungaphezu kwamandla enu, kanti kanye lesilingo uzakwenza lendlela yokuphepha, ukuze libe lamandla oku si thwala." 
1Corinthians10:14 Ngakho-ke, bathandiweyo bami, balekelani ukukhonza izithombe." 
1Corinthians10:15 Ngikhuluma njengakwabahlakaniphileyo, lina yehlukanisani engikutshoyo." 
1Corinthians10:16 Inkezo yesibusiso esiyibusisayo, kayisiyo yini eyokuhlanganyela kwegazi likaKristu? Isinkwa esisihlephunayo, kayisiso yini esokuhlanganyela komzimba kaKristu?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Ngoba thina abanengi siyisinkwa sinye, si mzimba munye; ngoba thina sonke sihlanganyela sinkwa sinye." 
1Corinthians10:18 Khangelani uIsrayeli ngokwenyama; abadlayo imihlatshelo kabasibo yini abahlanganyela lelathi? 
1Corinthians10:19 Ngithini pho? Ukuthi isithombe siyilutho yini? Kumbe ukuthi okuhlatshelwe izithombe kuyilutho? 
1Corinthians10:20 Kodwa ukuthi izinto abezizwe abazihlabayo, bazihlabela amadimoni, njalo kungeyisikho kuNkulunkulu; kodwa kangithandi ukuthi libe lenhlanganyelo lamadimoni." 
1Corinthians10:21 Lingenathe inkezo yeNkosi lenkezo yamadimoni; lingehlanganyele itafula leNkosi letafula lamadimoni. 
1Corinthians10:22 Kumbe sizayivusela umona iNkosi? Kambe silamandla kulayo? 
1Corinthians10:23 Zonke izinto zivunyelwe kimi, kodwa kayisizo zonke izinto ezisizayo. Zonke izinto zivunyelwe kimi, kodwa kayisizo zonke izinto ezakhayo." 
1Corinthians10:24 Kakungabi khona ozidingela okwakhe, kodwa ngulowo lalowo okomunye." 
1Corinthians10:25 Konke okuthengiswa esilaheni kudleni, lingabuzi lutho ngenxa yesazela;" 
1Corinthians10:26 ngoba umhlaba ungoweNkosi lokugcwala kwawo. 
1Corinthians10:27 Njalo uba omunye kwabangakholwayo elinxusa, njalo lithanda ukuya, dlanini konke okubekwa phambi kwenu, lingabuzi lutho ngenxa yesazela." 
1Corinthians10:28 Kodwa uba umuntu esithi kini: Lokhu kuhlatshelwe isithombe; lingadli ngenxa yalowo olitshelileyo lesazela; ngoba umhlaba ungoweNkosi lokugcwala kwawo. 
1Corinthians10:29 Kodwa isazela ngithi, esingeyisiso esakho, kodwa esomunye; ngoba kungani inkululeko yami yahlulelwe yisazela somunye?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Njalo uba mina ngomusa ngihlanganyela, ngikhulunyelwani kubi ngalokho mina engikubongayo?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Ngakho uba lisidla, loba linatha, loba lisenzani, konke kwenzeleni udumo lukaNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians10:32 Lingabi ngabakhubekisi lakumaJuda lakumaGriki lebandleni likaNkulunkulu; 
1Corinthians10:33 njengami futhi ezintweni zonke ngithokozisa bonke, ngingadingi olwami usizo, kodwa olwabanengi, ukuze basindiswe." 
1Corinthians11:1 Banini ngabalandeli bami, njengoba lami okaKristu." 
1Corinthians11:2 Ngiyalidumisa-ke, bazalwane, ukuthi liyangikhumbula ezintweni zonke, lokuthi libambelele ezimisweni njengoba ngalinika." 
1Corinthians11:3 Kodwa ngithanda ukuthi lazi, ukuthi inhloko yawo wonke amadoda nguKristu; lenhloko yowesifazana yindoda; lenhloko kaKristu nguNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians11:4 Yonke indoda ekhulekayo loba eprofethayo, ilo lutho ekhanda ilithela ihlazo ikhanda layo." 
1Corinthians11:5 Kodwa wonke owesifazana okhuleka kumbe aprofethe ikhanda lingambombozwanga, ulithela ihlazo elakhe ikhanda; ngoba lokhu kufanana-ke lophuciweyo." 
1Corinthians11:6 Ngoba uba owesifazana engagubuzeli, futhi kagele; kodwa uba kukubi kowesifazana ukugela kumbe ukuphucwa, kagutshuzelwe." 
1Corinthians11:7 Ngoba indoda kayifanele ukumbomboza ikhanda, ngoba ingumfanekiso lodumo lukaNkulunkulu; kodwa owesifazana uludumo lwendoda." 
1Corinthians11:8 Ngoba indoda kayivelanga kowesifazana, kodwa owesifazana endodeni;" 
1Corinthians11:9 ngoba futhi indoda kayidalelwanga owesifazana, kodwa owesifazana indoda;" 
1Corinthians11:10 ngenxa yalokhu owesifazana kufanele abe lamandla phezu kwekhanda ngenxa yezingilosi. 
1Corinthians11:11 Kodwa indoda kayingaphandle kowesifazana, lowesifazana kangaphandle kwendoda, eNkosini." 
1Corinthians11:12 Ngoba njengoba owesifazana evela endodeni, ngokunjalo lendoda ivela ngowesifazana, kodwa konke kuvela kuNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians11:13 Ziboneleni lina; kufanele yini ukuthi owesifazana akhuleke kuNkulunkulu engambombozanga? 
1Corinthians11:14 Imvelo uqobo lwayo kayilifundisi yini, ukuthi uba indoda ilenwele ezinde, kulihlazo kuyo?" 
1Corinthians11:15 Kodwa uba owesifazana elenwele ezinde, kuludumo kuye. Ngoba inwele uziphiwe ukuthi zibe yisimbombozo." 
1Corinthians11:16 Kodwa uba umuntu ebonakala elenkani, thina kasilawo umkhuba onjalo, ngitsho lamabandla kaNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians11:17 Kodwa ngokulaya lokhu kangidumisi, ngoba libuthana ngokungekuhle kodwa ngokubi." 
1Corinthians11:18 Okokuqala ngoba nxa libuthana ebandleni, ngizwa ukuthi kukhona ukwehlukana phakathi kwenu; njalo nganxanye ngiyakukholwa." 
1Corinthians11:19 Ngoba kufanele ukuba lobubhazuka futhi phakathi kwenu, ukuze labo abaqinisileyo babonakale phakathi kwenu." 
1Corinthians11:20 Ngakho nxa libuthana ndawonye, lokhu kakusikho ukudla isidlo seNkosi;" 
1Corinthians11:21 ngoba ngulowo lalowo uthatha kuqala esakhe isidlo ekudleni, lomunye ulambile, lomunye udakiwe." 
1Corinthians11:22 Kanti kalilazo izindlu zokudlela lezokunathela? Kumbe lidelela ibandla likaNkulunkulu, liyangise yini abangela lutho? Ngingathini kini? Ngingalidumisa kulokhu yini? Kangi li dumisi." 
1Corinthians11:23 Ngoba mina ngakwemukela eNkosini, lokho lami engalinika khona, ukuthi iNkosi uJesu ngobusuku eyanikelwa ngabo yathatha isinkwa," 
1Corinthians11:24 isibongile ya si hlephuna, yathi: Thathani, lidle, lokhu kungumzimba wami owahletshunelwa lina; lokhu kwenzeni ukungikhumbula." 
1Corinthians11:25 Ngokunjalo lenkezo, sebedlile, yathi: Inkezo le iyisivumelwano esitsha egazini lami; lokhu kwenzeni, loba nini li yi natha, ukungikhumbula." 
1Corinthians11:26 Ngoba loba nini nxa lisidla lesisinkwa, linatha linkezo, litshumayela ukufa kweNkosi ize ifike." 
1Corinthians11:27 Ngakho loba ngubani odla lesisinkwa kumbe anathe inkezo yeNkosi ngokungafanelanga, uzakuba lecala lomzimba legazi leNkosi." 
1Corinthians11:28 Kodwa umuntu kumele azihlole, ngokunjalo-ke adle okwesinkwa anathe okwenkezo;" 
1Corinthians11:29 ngoba odlayo anathe ngokungafanele, uzidlela azinathele isigwebo, engawehlukanisi umzimba weNkosi." 
1Corinthians11:30 Ngenxa yalokhu banengi kini ababuthakathaka labagulayo, lenengi lilele." 
1Corinthians11:31 Kodwa uba besizihlolile thina, besingayikwahlulelwa;" 
1Corinthians11:32 kodwa nxa sisahlulelwa, sikhuzwa yiNkosi, ukuze singalahlwa kanye lomhlaba." 
1Corinthians11:33 Ngakho, bazalwane bami, nxa libuthana ukuthi lidle, kalibomelelana." 
1Corinthians11:34 Njalo uba omunye elambile, kabokudla ekhaya; ukuze lingabuthaneli ukugwetshwa. Okuseleyo-ke, ngizakulungisa mhla ngifikayo." 
1Corinthians12:1 Mayelana-ke le zipho zomoya, bazalwane, kangithandi ukuthi lingazi." 
1Corinthians12:2 Lazi ukuthi lalingabezizwe lakhokhelelwa ezithombeni eziyizimungulu, njengabadonswayo." 
1Corinthians12:3 Ngakho ngiyalazisa, ukuthi kakho umuntu okhuluma ngoMoya kaNkulunkulu othi: UJesu uyisiqalekiso; futhi kakho umuntu ongathi: UJesu uyiNkosi, ngaphandle ngoMoya oNgcwele." 
1Corinthians12:4 Kukhona-ke izipho ezehlukeneyo, kodwa uMoya munye." 
1Corinthians12:5 Njalo kukhona inkonzo ezehlukeneyo, kodwa iNkosi yinye." 
1Corinthians12:6 Kukhona-ke imisebenzi eyehlukeneyo, kodwa nguNkulunkulu munye, osebenza konke kibo bonke." 
1Corinthians12:7 Kodwa ngulowo lalowo uphiwa ukubonakalisa kukaMoya kulokho okulusizo. 
1Corinthians12:8 Ngoba omunye uphiwa ngoMoya ilizwi lenhlakanipho, lakomunye ilizwi lolwazi, ngoMoya ofananayo;" 
1Corinthians12:9 lakomunye ukholo, ngoMoya ofananayo; lakomunye izipho zokusilisa, ngoMoya ofananayo;" 
1Corinthians12:10 lakomunye imisebenzi yamandla, lakomunye isiprofetho, lakomunye ukwehlukanisa imimoya, lakomunye inhlobo yendimi, lakomunye ukuchasisa indimi;" 
1Corinthians12:11 kodwa konke lokho uMoya munye ofananayo uyakusebenza, ebabela ngulowo lalowo ngamunye njengokuthanda kwakhe." 
1Corinthians12:12 Ngoba njengoba umzimba umunye, njalo ulezitho ezinengi, kodwa zonke izitho zalowomzimba munye, zizinengi, zingumzimba munye; kunjalo-ke loKristu;" 
1Corinthians12:13 ngoba ngoMoya munye lathi sonke sabhabhathizelwa emzimbeni munye, loba amaJuda loba amaGriki, loba izigqili loba abakhululekileyo; futhi thina sonke sanathiswa kuMoya munye." 
1Corinthians12:14 Ngoba umzimba lawo kawusiso isitho sinye kodwa ezinengi. 
1Corinthians12:15 Uba unyawo lungathi: Lokhu ngingesisandla, kangisikho okomzimba; kungeyisikho ngalokho kakusilo olomzimba;" 
1Corinthians12:16 uba-ke indlebe ingathi: Lokhu ngingesilo ilihlo, kangisikho okomzimba; kungeyisikho ngalokho kayisiyo yini eyomzimba?" 
1Corinthians12:17 Uba umzimba wonke ubuyilihlo, ngabe kungaphi ukuzwa? Uba wonke ubuyikuzwa, ngabe kungaphi ukunuka?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Kodwa khathesi-ke uNkulunkulu umisile izitho, yileso laleso sazo, emzimbeni, njengokuthanda kwakhe." 
1Corinthians12:19 Kodwa uba zonke beziyisitho sinye, umzimba ngabe ungaphi?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Kodwa khathesi izitho zinengi, kodwa umzimba munye." 
1Corinthians12:21 Ilihlo-ke lingeke latsho esandleni ukuthi: Kangikusweli. Kumbe futhi ikhanda ezinyaweni ukuthi: Kangilisweli; 
1Corinthians12:22 kodwa kakhulukazi izitho zomzimba ezikhangeleka zibuthakathaka kakhulu, ziyadingeka;" 
1Corinthians12:23 lalezo ezomzimba esicabanga ukuthi zidelelekile kakhulu, yizo esizihlonipha ngokwengezelelwe kakhulu; lalezo ezethu ezingezinhle zilobuhle obengezelelwe kakhulu;" 
1Corinthians12:24 kanti ezinhle zethu kazikusweli; kodwa uNkulunkulu wawuhlanganisa umzimba, enika udumo olwengezelelwe kakhulu kwesi ku swelayo," 
1Corinthians12:25 ukuze kungabi khona ukwehlukana emzimbeni, kodwa izitho zinanzelelane ngokufananayo." 
1Corinthians12:26 Uba-ke kuhlupheka isitho sinye, izitho zonke zihlupheka kanye la so; uba kudunyiswa isitho sinye, izitho zonke ziyajabula kanye la so." 
1Corinthians12:27 Lina-ke lingumzimba kaKristu, lezitho ngamunye ngamunye." 
1Corinthians12:28 Njalo uNkulunkulu umisile abathile ebandleni kuqala abaphostoli, okwesibili abaprofethi, okwesithathu abafundisi, besekusiba amandla, besekusiba izipho zokusilisa, izenzo ezisizayo, ubukhokheli, indimi ezehlukeneyo." 
1Corinthians12:29 Bonke bangabaphostoli yini? Bonke bangabaprofethi yini? Bonke bangabafundisi yini? Bonke benza amandla yini? 
1Corinthians12:30 Bonke balezipho zokusilisa yini? Bonke bakhuluma ngendimi yini? Bonke bayachasisa yini? 
1Corinthians12:31 Kodwa fisani kakhulu izipho ezingcono. Njalo ngisalitshengisa indlela engcono kakhulukazi. 
1Corinthians13:1 Nxa ngingakhuluma ngendimi zabantu lezezingilosi, kodwa ngingelathando, ngizakuba lithusi elikhalayo kumbe insimbi encencethayo." 
1Corinthians13:2 Njalo loba ngingaba lesiprofetho, ngisazi imfihlo zonke lokwazi konke, njalo uba ngilokholo lonke, ukuze ngisuse izintaba, kodwa ngingelathando, angisilutho." 
1Corinthians13:3 Njalo loba ngingabela abayanga konke engilakho, njalo uba nginganikela umzimba wami ukuthi ngitshiswe, kodwa ngingelathando, kakungisizi ngalutho." 
1Corinthians13:4 Uthando luyabekezela, lulobubele; uthando kalulamona; uthando kaluzincomi, kalukhukhunyezwa," 
1Corinthians13:5 kaluziphathi ngokungafanelanga, kaluzidingeli okwalo, kalucunuki, kalunakani okubi," 
1Corinthians13:6 kaluthokozi ngokungalunganga, kodwa luthokoza eqinisweni;" 
1Corinthians13:7 lusibekela izinto zonke, lukholwa izinto zonke, luthemba izinto zonke, lubekezelela izinto zonke." 
1Corinthians13:8 Uthando kalungeke lwehluleke. Kumbe-ke iziprofetho, zizakwenziwa ziphele; kumbe indimi, zizakhawula; kumbe ulwazi, luzakwenziwa luphele." 
1Corinthians13:9 Ngoba sazi nganxanye, siprofetha nganxanye;" 
1Corinthians13:10 kodwa lapho sekufikile okupheleleyo, khona okuyingxenye kuzakwenziwa ize." 
1Corinthians13:11 Lapho ngilusane, ngakhuluma njengosane, ngaqedisisa njengosane, nganakana njengosane; kodwa kuthe sengiyindoda, ngazenza ize izinto zosane." 
1Corinthians13:12 Ngoba khathesi sibona esibukweni kaluvivi, kodwa ngalesosikhathi ubuso ngobuso; khathesi ngazi nganxanye, kodwa ngalesosikhathi ngizakwazi njengoba-ke ngangisaziwa." 
1Corinthians13:13 Njalo khathesi-ke kumi ukholo, ithemba, uthando, lokhu kokuthathu; kodwa okukhulu kulokhu luthando." 
1Corinthians14:1 Landelani uthando; lifise kakhulu izipho zomoya, kodwa ikakhulu ukuthi liprofethe." 
1Corinthians14:2 Ngoba okhuluma ngendimi kakhulumi ebantwini, kodwa kuNkulunkulu; ngoba kakho ozwayo, kanti ukhuluma izimfihlo ngomoya." 
1Corinthians14:3 Kodwa oprofethayo ukhuluma ebantwini ukwakha lenkuthazo lenduduzo. 
1Corinthians14:4 Okhuluma ngendimi uyazakha yena, kodwa oprofethayo wakha ibandla." 
1Corinthians14:5 Njalo ngiyathanda ukuthi lonke likhulume ngendimi, kodwa kakhulu ukuthi liprofethe; ngoba oprofethayo mkhulu kulokhuluma ngendimi, ngaphandle kokuthi atolike, ukuze ibandla lemukele ukwakhiwa." 
1Corinthians14:6 Khathesi-ke, bazalwane, uba ngifika kini ngikhuluma ngendimi, ngizalisiza ngani, nxa ngingakhulumi kini kumbe ekwembulelweni, loba ekwazini, loba kusiprofetho, kumbe ekufundiseni?" 
1Corinthians14:7 Ngokunjalo izinto ezingelampilo ezikhalayo, loba umhlanga, loba ichacho, uba zinganiki umehluko ngokukhala, kuzakwaziwa njani okuvuthelwayo ngomhlanga kumbe okutshaywayo ngomqangala?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Ngoba-ke nxa uphondo lunika ukukhala okungaqondakaliyo, ngubani ozazilungisela impi?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Kunjalo lani, uba linganiki inkulumo ecacileyo ngolimi, kuzakwaziwa njani okukhulunywayo? Ngoba lizakuba likhuluma emoyeni." 
1Corinthians14:10 Kukhona, nxa kungenzakala, imihlobo eminengi kangaka yemisindo emhlabeni kodwa kawukho ongatsho lutho;" 
1Corinthians14:11 ngakho uba ngingawazi umqondo welizwi, ngizakuba ngowezizweni kulowo okhulumayo, lalowo okhulumayo uzakuba ngowezizweni kimi." 
1Corinthians14:12 Kunjalo lani, lokhu litshisekela izipho zomoya, dingani ukuthi livame ekwakhiweni kwebandla." 
1Corinthians14:13 Ngakho-ke okhulumayo ngendimi kakhuleke ukuthi atolike. 
1Corinthians14:14 Ngoba uba ngikhuleka ngendimi, umoya wami uyakhuleka, kodwa ingqondo yami kayilasithelo." 
1Corinthians14:15 Ngakho kuyini? Ngizakhuleka ngomoya, njalo ngizakhuleka langengqondo; ngizahlabelela indumiso ngomoya, njalo ngizahlabelela indumiso langengqondo." 
1Corinthians14:16 Uba kungenjalo, nxa ubonga ngomoya, lowo ogcwalisa indawo yongafundanga uzamutsho njani uAmeni ekubongeni kwakho, lokhu engakwazi okutshoyo?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Ngoba isibili wena ubonga kuhle, kodwa omunye kakhiwa." 
1Corinthians14:18 Ngiyambonga uNkulunkulu wami ukuthi ngikhuluma ngendimi kakhulu kulani lonke; 
1Corinthians14:19 kodwa ebandleni ngithanda ukukhuluma amazwi amahlanu ngengqondo yami, ukuze ngifundise labanye, kulokuthi amazwi ayizinkulungwane ezilitshumi ngendimi." 
1Corinthians14:20 Bazalwane, lingabi ngabantwana engqondweni; kodwa ebubini banini zingane, lekunakaneni libe ngabakhulileyo." 
1Corinthians14:21 Emlayweni kulotshiwe ukuthi: Ngezinye indimi langezinye indebe ngizakhuluma lalesisizwe, langokunjalo labo kabayikungizwa, itsho iNkosi." 
1Corinthians14:22 Ngakho indimi zingezesibonakaliso, kungeyisikho kwabakholwayo, kodwa kwabangakholwayo; kanti isiprofetho, kungayi siso sabangakholwayo, kodwa sabakholwayo." 
1Corinthians14:23 Ngakho uba ibandla lonke libuthene ndawonye, labo bonke bakhulume ngendimi, besekungena abangafundanga loba abangakholwayo, kabazukuthi liyahlanya yini?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Kodwa uba bonke beprofetha, njalo kungene othile ongakholwayo loba ongafundanga, uyakhuzwa yibo bonke, ahlolwe yibo bonke," 
1Corinthians14:25 langokunjalo izinto ezifihliweyo zenhliziyo yakhe ziyadalulwa; ngokunjalo uzakuwa ngobuso akhonze uNkulunkulu, ebika ukuthi uNkulunkulu ngoqotho uphakathi kwenu." 
1Corinthians14:26 Ngakho kuyini, bazalwane? Loba nini libuthana, ngulowo lalowo wenu elesihlabelelo, elemfundiso, elolimi, elesambulelo, elokutolika. Konke kakwenzelwe ekwakheni." 
1Corinthians14:27 Uba umuntu ekhuluma ngendimi, kakube ngababili kumbe ebunengini abathathu, njalo ba dedelane, lomunye kumele atolike;" 
1Corinthians14:28 kodwa uba kungekho umtoliki, kumele athule ebandleni; akhulume kuye ngokwakhe lakuNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians14:29 Abaprofethi-ke ababili loba abathathu kabakhulume, labanye kabahlolisise." 
1Corinthians14:30 Kodwa uba kusembulwa komunye ohleziyo, kathule owokuqala." 
1Corinthians14:31 Ngoba lonke lingaprofetha munye ngamunye, ukuze bonke bafunde, njalo bonke bakhuthazwe;" 
1Corinthians14:32 lemimoya yabaprofethi iyathotshiselwa abaprofethi. 
1Corinthians14:33 Ngoba uNkulunkulu kayisuye owesiphithiphithi, kodwa ngowokuthula, njengemabandleni wonke abangcwele." 
1Corinthians14:34 Abesifazana benu kabathule emabandleni; ngoba kabavunyelwa ukukhuluma, kodwa ukuzithoba, njengoba lawo umlayo usitsho." 
1Corinthians14:35 Uba-ke bethanda ukufunda ulutho, kababuze kubomkabo ekhaya; ngoba kulihlazo kowesifazana ukukhuluma ebandleni." 
1Corinthians14:36 Kumbe ilizwi likaNkulunkulu laphuma kini? Kumbe lafika kini lodwa yini? 
1Corinthians14:37 Uba umuntu ecabanga ukuthi ungumprofethi loba ungowomoya, umele ukwemukela izinto engilibhalela zona, ukuthi ziyimilayo yeNkosi;" 
1Corinthians14:38 uba umuntu engazi, kumele engazi." 
1Corinthians14:39 Ngakho, bazalwane, tshisekelani ukuprofetha, njalo lingakuvimbeli ukukhuluma ngendimi;" 
1Corinthians14:40 konke kakwenziwe ngemfanelo langokulandelana. 
1Corinthians15:1 Ngakho, bazalwane, ngilazisa ivangeli engalitshumayeza lona, lani elalemukelayo, njalo elimi kulo," 
1Corinthians15:2 njalo elisindiswa ngalo; uba libambelela emazwini lawo awevangeli engalitshumayela kini, ngaphandle kokuthi lakholwa ize." 
1Corinthians15:3 Ngoba okokuqala ngalinika lokho engakwemukelayo lami, ukuthi uKristu wafa ngenxa yezono zethu, njengokwemibhalo;" 
1Corinthians15:4 lokuthi wangcwatshwa; lokuthi wavuswa kwabafileyo ngosuku lwesithathu, njengokwemibhalo;" 
1Corinthians15:5 lokuthi wabonakala kuKefasi, emva kwalokho kwabalitshumi lambili;" 
1Corinthians15:6 emva kwalokho wabonakala ngesikhathi sinye kubazalwane abedlula amakhulu amahlanu, ubunengi babo basekhona kuze kube lamuhla, kodwa labanye sebalala;" 
1Corinthians15:7 emva kwalokho wabonakala kuJakobe, emva kwalokho wabonakala kubaphostoli bonke;" 
1Corinthians15:8 lekucineni kwabo bonke wabonakala lakimi njengongazalwanga ngesikhathi esiqondileyo. 
1Corinthians15:9 Ngoba mina ngingomncinyane kubaphostoli, engingafanele ukuthiwa ngumphostoli, ngoba ngazingela ibandla likaNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians15:10 Kodwa ngomusa kaNkulunkulu ngiyikho lokho engiyikho khona, lomusa wakhe okimi kawubanga yize; kodwa ngisebenze okwengezelelwe kulabo bonke, kanti kungesimi, kodwa ngumusa kaNkulunkulu olami." 
1Corinthians15:11 Ngakho loba kuyi mi, loba kuyi bo, ngokunjalo sitshumayela langokunjalo lakholwa." 
1Corinthians15:12 Kodwa uba uKristu etshunyayelwa ukuthi uvusiwe kwabafileyo, batsho njani abanye phakathi kwenu ukuthi kakukho ukuvuka kwabafileyo?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Kodwa uba kungekho ukuvuka kwabafileyo, kavuswanga laye uKristu;" 
1Corinthians15:14 uba-ke uKristu engavuswanga, ngakho ukutshumayela kwethu kuyize, lokholo lwenu lalo luyize," 
1Corinthians15:15 lathi futhi sificwa singabafakazi bamanga bakaNkulunkulu, ngoba safakaza ngoNkulunkulu ukuthi wamvusa uKristu, ongamvusanga, nxa sibili abafileyo bengavuswa." 
1Corinthians15:16 Ngoba uba abafileyo bengavuswa, kavuswanga laye uKristu;" 
1Corinthians15:17 njalo uba uKristu engavuswanga, ukholo lwenu luyize; lisesezonweni zenu." 
1Corinthians15:18 Ngakho lalabo abalele bekuKristu sebaphela. 
1Corinthians15:19 Uba singabathembela kuKristu kule impilo kuphela, singabalosizi kulabo bonke abantu." 
1Corinthians15:20 Kodwa khathesi-ke uKristu uvusiwe kwabafileyo, waba yisithelo sokuqala sabaleleyo." 
1Corinthians15:21 Ngoba lokhu ngomuntu ukufa kweza, langomuntu ukuvuka kwabafileyo kweza." 
1Corinthians15:22 Ngoba njengalokhu kuAdamu bonke bayafa, ngokunjalo futhi kuKristu bonke bazakwenziwa baphile." 
1Corinthians15:23 Kodwa ngulowo lalowo ngesakhe isigaba; isithelo sokuqala uKristu, besekusiba ngabakaKristu ekufikeni kwakhe," 
1Corinthians15:24 besekusiba ukuphela, lapho esenikela umbuso kuNkulunkulu uBaba, lalapho esechithile konke ukubusa labo bonke ubukhosi lamandla." 
1Corinthians15:25 Ngoba umele yena ukubusa, aze abeke zonke izitha zakhe ngaphansi kwenyawo zakhe." 
1Corinthians15:26 Isitha sokucina esizachithwa yikufa. 
1Corinthians15:27 Ngoba izinto zonke uzehlisele ngaphansi kwenyawo zakhe. Kodwa nxa esithi izinto zonke zehlisiwe, kusobala ukuthi ungaphandle kwazo ozehlisileyo izinto zonke ngaphansi kwakhe." 
1Corinthians15:28 Nxa izinto zonke sezehlisiwe ngaphansi kwakhe, lapho-ke layo iNdodana ngokwayo izazehlisa ngaphansi kwalowo owehlisela zonke izinto ngaphansi kwayo, ukuze uNkulunkulu abe yikho konke kukho konke." 
1Corinthians15:29 Pho, bazakwenzani ababhabhathizelwa abafileyo uba abafileyo bengavuki isibili? Babhabhathizelwa labo abafileyo njani?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Kungani lathi sisengozini ihola ngehola? 
1Corinthians15:31 Ngiyafa usuku ngosuku, ngiyaqinisa ngokuzincoma ngani engilakho kuKristu Jesu iNkosi yethu." 
1Corinthians15:32 Uba ngokwabantu ngalwa lezilo eEfesu, nzuzo bani kimi, uba abafileyo bengavuki? Asidle sinathe, ngoba kusasa siyafa." 
1Corinthians15:33 Lingakhohliswa; ukwejwayelana lababi kuyonakalisa izimilo ezinhle. 
1Corinthians15:34 Vusani ingqondo ngokulunga njalo lingoni; ngoba abanye balokungamazi uNkulunkulu; ngikhulumela ukuthi libe lenhloni. 
1Corinthians15:35 Kodwa omunye uzakuthi: Abafileyo bavuswa njani? Njalo beza lomzimba onjani? 
1Corinthians15:36 Siphukuphuku, lokho okuhlanyelayo wena, kakwenziwa kuphile ngaphandle kokuthi kufe;" 
1Corinthians15:37 lalokho okuhlanyelayo, kawuhlanyeli umzimba ozakuba khona, kodwa uhlamvu oluze, mhlawumbe, olwebele kumbe olokunye nje;" 
1Corinthians15:38 kodwa uNkulunkulu uyinika umzimba njengokuthanda kwakhe, lakuleyo laleyo yenhlanyelo owayo umzimba." 
1Corinthians15:39 Inyama yonke kayisinyamanye; kodwa enye yinyama yabantu, lenye yinyama yenyamazana, lenye eyenhlanzi, lenye eyezinyoni." 
1Corinthians15:40 Ikhona lemizimba yezulwini, lemizimba yemhlabeni; kodwa yehlukene inkazimulo yezulu, njalo yehlukene leyemhlabeni." 
1Corinthians15:41 Enye yinkazimulo yelanga, lenye yinkazimulo yenyanga, lenye yinkazimulo yezinkanyezi; ngoba inkanyezi yehlukile kwenye inkanyezi enkazimulweni." 
1Corinthians15:42 Kunjalo-ke ukuvuka kwabafileyo. Kuhlanyelwa ekuboleni, kuyavuswa kungekho ekuboleni;" 
1Corinthians15:43 kuhlanyelwa ekudelweni, kuvuswe enkazimulweni; kuhlanyelwa ebuthakathakeni, kuvuswe emandleni;" 
1Corinthians15:44 kuhlanyelwa umzimba wemvelo, kuvuswe umzimba womoya. Kukhona umzimba wemvelo, njalo kukhona umzimba womoya." 
1Corinthians15:45 Langokunjalo kulotshiwe ukuthi: Umuntu wokuqala uAdamu waba ngumphefumulo ophilayo; uAdamu wokucina ngumoya ophilisayo. 
1Corinthians15:46 Kodwa okokuqala kakusikho okomoya, kodwa okwemvelo, besekusiza okomoya." 
1Corinthians15:47 Umuntu wokuqala wavela emhlabeni, ungowomhlabathi; umuntu wesibili uyiNkosi evela ezulwini." 
1Corinthians15:48 Njengoba enjalo owomhlabathi, banjalo labo abomhlabathi; lanjengoba enjalo owezulwini, banjalo labo abezulwini;" 
1Corinthians15:49 futhi njengoba silesimo sowomhlabathi, lathi sizakuba lesimo sowezulwini." 
1Corinthians15:50 Kodwa ngitsho lokhu, bazalwane, ukuthi inyama legazi kungelidle ilifa lombuso kaNkulunkulu; lokubola kakulidli ilifa lokungaboli." 
1Corinthians15:51 Khangelani, ngilitshela imfihlo: Kasiyikulala sonke, kodwa sizaphendulwa sonke," 
1Corinthians15:52 ngesikhatshana, ngokucwayiza kwelihlo, ekukhaleni kophondo lokucina; ngoba uphondo luzakhala, labafileyo bazavuswa bengelakubola, lathi sizaphendulwa." 
1Corinthians15:53 Ngoba lokhu okubolayo kumele ukwembatha ukungaboli, lalokho okufayo kwembathe ukungafi." 
1Corinthians15:54 Nxa-ke lokho okubolayo sekwembethe ukungaboli, lalokho okufayo sekwembethe ukungafi, kuzakwenzeka ngalesosikhathi ilizwi elilotshiweyo lokuthi: Ukufa kuginyiwe ekunqobeni." 
1Corinthians15:55 Lungaphi, kufa, udonsi lwakho? Kungaphi, ngcwaba, ukunqoba kwakho?" 
1Corinthians15:56 Lodonsi lokufa yisono; lamandla esono ngumlayo. 
1Corinthians15:57 Kodwa kabongwe uNkulunkulu osinika ukunqoba ngeNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu. 
1Corinthians15:58 Ngakho, bazalwane bami abathandekayo, manini, linganyikinyeki, lengezelelwe emsebenzini weNkosi kokuphela, lazi ukuthi ukutshikatshika kwenu kakusilo ize eNkosini." 
1Corinthians16:1 Mayelana-ke lokuqoqelwa okwabangcwele, njengoba ngalaya amabandla eGalathiya, yenzani ngokunjalo lani." 
1Corinthians16:2 Ngalo lonke usuku lokuqala lweviki kakube ngulowo lalowo wenu azibekele aqogelele loba yini aphumelela ngayo, ukuze kungabi ng’khona kuzaqoqwa nxa ngifikayo." 
1Corinthians16:3 Njalo loba nini ekufikeni kwami, loba ngobani elibakhethileyo, ngezincwadi, laba ngizabathuma ukuze base isipho senu somusa eJerusalema;" 
1Corinthians16:4 njalo uba kufanele ukuthi lami ngihambe, bazahamba lami." 
1Corinthians16:5 Kodwa ngizakuza kini, nxa sengidabule eMakedoniya; ngoba ngizadabula eMakedoniya;" 
1Corinthians16:6 futhi ngingahle ngihlale lani, loba ngiqede lobusika, ukuze lina lingidlulisele loba ngaphi lapho engiya khona." 
1Corinthians16:7 Ngoba kangifisi ukulibona khathesinje ekwedluleni; kodwa ngithemba ukuhlala lani isikhathi esithile, uba iNkosi ivuma." 
1Corinthians16:8 Kodwa ngizahlala eEfesu kuze kufike iPentekoste*; 
1Corinthians16:9 ngoba ngivulelwe umnyango omkhulu lolamandla, labaphikisayo banengi." 
1Corinthians16:10 Nxa-ke uTimothi engafika, bonani ukuthi ulani engelakwesaba; ngoba usebenza umsebenzi weNkosi njengami futhi." 
1Corinthians16:11 Ngakho kakungabi khona omdelelayo; kodwa mdluliseni ngokuthula, ukuze eze kimi; ngoba ngimlindele kanye labazalwane." 
1Corinthians16:12 Njalo mayelana lomzalwane uApolosi, ngamkhuthaza kakhulu ukuze eze kini kanye labazalwane; kodwa kwakungesiyo intando yakhe lakanye ukuthi eze khathesi, kodwa uzakuza nxa eselethuba." 
1Corinthians16:13 Lindani, lime ekholweni, liziphathe njengamadoda, libe lamandla." 
1Corinthians16:14 Izinto zenu zonke kazenziwe ngothando. 
1Corinthians16:15 Futhi ngiyalincenga bazalwane, liyayazi indlu kaStefana, ukuthi yisithelo sokuqala seAkaya, lo kuthi bazimisele ukusebenzela abangcwele;" 
1Corinthians16:16 ukuze lani lehliselwe ngaphansi kwabanjalo, labo bonke abasebenza kanye lathi betshikatshika." 
1Corinthians16:17 Sengithokoza ngokufika kukaStefana loFortunatu loAkayiko, ngoba bona bagcwalisile ukusilela kwenu;" 
1Corinthians16:18 ngoba bawuvuselele umoya wami lowenu. Ngakho bananzeleleni abanjalo. 
1Corinthians16:19 Amabandla eAsiya ayalibingelela; bayalibingelela kakhulu eNkosini oAkwila loPrisila, kanye lebandla elisemzini wabo." 
1Corinthians16:20 Bonke abazalwane bayalibingelela. Bingelelanani ngokwanga okungcwele. 
1Corinthians16:21 Isibingelelo ngesami isandla esikaPawuli. 
1Corinthians16:22 Uba umuntu engayithandi iNkosi uJesu Kristu, kabe yisithuko. Woza Nkosi!" 
1Corinthians16:23 Umusa weNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu kawube lani. 
1Corinthians16:24 Uthando lwami kalube lani lonke kuKristu Jesu. Ameni. 
2Corinthians1:1 UPawuli umphostoli kaJesu Kristu ngentando kaNkulunkulu, loTimothi umzalwane, kubandla likaNkulunkulu eliseKorinte, labo bonke abangcwele abakuyo yonke iAkaya:" 
2Corinthians1:2 Umusa kawube kini lokuthula okuvela kuNkulunkulu uBaba wethu leNkosini uJesu Kristu. 
2Corinthians1:3 Kabongwe uNkulunkulu, ngitsho uYise weNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu, uYise wobubele loNkulunkulu wenduduzo yonke," 
2Corinthians1:4 osiduduza ekuhluphekeni kwethu konke, ukuze sibe lamandla okududuza abasekuhluphekeni konke, ngenduduzo esiduduzwa ngayo thina ngokwethu nguNkulunkulu;" 
2Corinthians1:5 ngoba njengalokhu inhlupheko zikaKristu zengezelelekile kithi, ngokunjalo lenduduzo yethu yengezelelekile ngoKristu." 
2Corinthians1:6 Njalo loba sihlutshwa, ku ngokwenduduzo losindiso lwenu, okusetshenzwa ekubekezeleni kunhlupho ezifananayo esihlupheka ngazo lathi; loba siduduzwa, ku ngokwenduduzo losindiso lwenu;" 
2Corinthians1:7 njalo ithemba lethu ngani liqinile, sisazi ukuthi njengalokhu lihlanganyela ezinhluphekweni ngokunjalo lenduduzweni." 
2Corinthians1:8 Ngoba kasithandi ukuthi lingazi, bazalwane, ngokuhlupheka kwethu okwasehlela eAsiya, ukuthi sasindwa kakhulukazi ngokungaphezu kwamandla, saze saphelelwa lithemba lelempilo." 
2Corinthians1:9 Kodwa thina ngokwethu sasilaso kithi isigwebo sokufa, ukuze singazithembi thina kodwa kuNkulunkulu ovusa abafileyo;" 
2Corinthians1:10 owasophula ekufeni okungaka, losophulayo; esithemba kuye ukuthi uza s ophula futhi." 
2Corinthians1:11 Lani lisebenzela thina ndawonye ngomkhuleko, ukuze isipho somusa kithi esivela ebantwini abanengi singasibongelwa ngabanengi." 
2Corinthians1:12 Ngoba ukuzincoma kwethu yilokhu, ubufakazi besazela sethu, ukuthi ngokungelankohliso langobuqotho bukaNkulunkulu, kungeyisikho ngenhlakanipho yenyama kodwa emuseni kaNkulunkulu, saziphatha emhlabeni, kodwa ngokukhethekileyo maqondana lani." 
2Corinthians1:13 Ngoba kasilibhaleli okunye, kodwa loba izinto elizifundayo kumbe njalo lizizwe; ngithemba futhi ukuthi liza zi vuma kuze kube sekupheleni;" 
2Corinthians1:14 njengalokhu lathi selisivumile nganxanye, ukuthi siyikuzincoma kwenu njengalokhu lani lingabethu, esukwini lweNkosi uJesu." 
2Corinthians1:15 Langalelithemba ngafisa ukuza kini kuqala, ukuze libe lomusa wesibili;" 
2Corinthians1:16 njalo ukudlula kini ngisiya eMakedoniya, ngibuye kini futhi ngivela eMakedoniya, njalo ngidluliselwe yini eJudiya." 
2Corinthians1:17 Ngakho ngiqonde lokho, besengisebenzisa yini ukungapheleli? Kumbe izinto engizimisayo, ngimisa ngokwenyama yini, ukuze kube khona kimi uyebo, yebo; lohatshi, hatshi?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Kodwa uNkulunkulu uthembekile, ukuthi ilizwi lethu elikini kalisuye uyebo lohatshi." 
2Corinthians1:19 Ngoba iNdodana kaNkulunkulu uJesu Kristu owatshunyayelwa yithi phakathi kwenu, ngami loSilivanu loTimothi, wayengeyisuye uyebo lohatshi, kodwa kuye kwakunguyebo." 
2Corinthians1:20 Ngoba zonke izithembiso zikaNkulunkulu, kuye zinguyebo, lakuye zinguAmeni, kube ludumo lukaNkulunkulu ngathi." 
2Corinthians1:21 Losiqinisayo kanye lani kuKristu, owasigcobayo, nguNkulunkulu," 
2Corinthians1:22 owasiphawulayo lathi, wasenika isibambiso sikaMoya enhliziyweni zethu." 
2Corinthians1:23 Kodwa mina ngibiza uNkulunkulu ukuthi abe ngumfakazi phezu komphefumulo wami, ukuze ngiliyekele angikezi eKorinte." 
2Corinthians1:24 Kungesikuthi sibusa ukholo lwenu, kodwa siyizisebenzi ndawonye zentokozo yenu; ngoba limi ngokholo." 
2Corinthians2:1 Ngasengizimisela lokhu, ukungaphindi ngize kini esizini." 
2Corinthians2:2 Ngoba uba mina ngilibangela usizi, ngubani-ke ongithokozisayo, ngaphandle kobangelwe yimi usizi?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Njalo ngalibhalela into le efananayo ukuze ekufikeni kwami ngingabi losizi kulabo abamele bangithokozise, ngileqiniso ngani lonke, ukuthi intokozo yami ingeyenu lonke." 
2Corinthians2:4 Ngoba esizini olukhulu lekudabukeni kwenhliziyo ngalibhalela ngezinyembezi ezinengi, kungeyisikho ukuthi libangelwe usizi, kodwa ukuze lazi uthando olwengezelelweyo engilalo kini." 
2Corinthians2:5 Kodwa uba ekhona obange usizi, kabanganga usizi kimi, kodwa nganxanye (ukuze ngingathwalisi nzima) kini lonke." 
2Corinthians2:6 Kumanele onjalo lokhukukhuza okungokwabanengi; 
2Corinthians2:7 ukuze endaweni yalokho kungcono lithethelele liduduze, hlezi onjalo aginywe lusizi olwengezelelweyo." 
2Corinthians2:8 Ngakho ngiyalincenga ukuthi liqinise uthando kuye. 
2Corinthians2:9 Ngoba ngalokhu ngabhala futhi, ukuze ngazi ubufakazi benu, uba lingabalalelayo ezintweni zonke." 
2Corinthians2:10 Lalowo elimthethelela ulutho, lami ngiyamthethelela; ngoba mina futhi uba ngithethelele ulutho, lowo engimthethelelayo, ngikwenza ngenxa yenu phambi kobuso bukaKristu," 
2Corinthians2:11 ukuze singasetshenziswa nguSathane; ngoba kasisibo abangazi ngamaqhinga akhe. 
2Corinthians2:12 Lekufikeni kwami eTrowasi ngevangeli likaKristu, kwathi sengivulelwe umnyango eNkosini," 
2Corinthians2:13 kangibanga lokuphumula emoyeni wami, ngoba angimtholanga uTitosi umzalwane wami; kodwa ngasengivalelisa kibo ngasuka ngaya eMakedoniya." 
2Corinthians2:14 Njalo kabongwe uNkulunkulu osikhokhelayo ngesikhathi sonke ekunqobeni kuKristu, njalo ebonakalisa ngathi iphunga lolwazi lwakhe endaweni zonke." 
2Corinthians2:15 Ngoba siliphunga elimnandi likaKristu kuNkulunkulu kulabo abasindiswayo lakulabo ababhubhayo; 
2Corinthians2:16 kulaba iphunga lokufa ekufeni, lakwabanye iphunga elimnandi lempilo empilweni. Njalo ngubani olingene lezizinto?" 
2Corinthians2:17 Ngoba kasinjengabanengi, abalonayo ilizwi likaNkulunkulu. Kodwa njengebuqothweni, njalo njengokuvela kuNkulunkulu phambi kukaNkulunkulu, sikhuluma sikuKristu." 
2Corinthians3:1 Siqala siphinde ukuziveza yini? Kumbe siyadinga yini, njengabanye, izincwadi zoku si veza kini, loba zokuvezwa okuvela kini?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Lina liyincwadi yethu, ebhalwe enhliziyweni zethu, eyaziwa ifundwe ngabantu bonke;" 
2Corinthians3:3 libonakalisa ukuthi liyincwadi kaKristu esetshenziswa yithi, ebhalwe hatshi ngeyinki, kodwa ngoMoya kaNkulunkulu ophilayo, kungeyisikho ezibhebheni zamatshe, kodwa ezibhebheni zenyama yenhliziyo." 
2Corinthians3:4 Lethemba elinjalo silalo ngoKristu kuNkulunkulu; 
2Corinthians3:5 kungesikuthi siyenelisa thina ngokwethu ukucabanga ulutho njengoluvela kithi, kodwa ukwenelisa kwethu kuvela kuNkulunkulu;" 
2Corinthians3:6 owasenza futhi senelisa ukuba yizikhonzi zesivumelwano esitsha, esingeyisiso sokulotshiweyo kodwa esikaMoya; ngoba okulotshiweyo kuyabulala, kodwa uMoya uyaphilisa." 
2Corinthians3:7 Kodwa uba inkonzo yokufa, emazwini, abazwe ematsheni, yafikela enkazimulweni, kwaze kwathi abantwana bakoIsrayeli behluleka ukujolozela ubuso bukaMozisi ngenxa yenkazimulo yobuso bakhe, eyenziwa yaphela," 
2Corinthians3:8 pho ingebe nkulu kangakanani inkonzo kaMoya izakuba enkazimulweni? 
2Corinthians3:9 Ngoba uba inkonzo yokulahlwa iyinkazimulo, kangakanani inkonzo yokulunga yengeziwe enkazimulweni." 
2Corinthians3:10 Ngoba lalokho okwake kwaba yinkazimulo, akuzange ngitsho kukhazimule ngalindlela, ngenxa yalinkazimulo eyidlulayo kakhulu." 
2Corinthians3:11 Ngoba uba lokho okwenziwa kwaphela ku lenkazimulo, kangakanani lokho okumiyo, kusenkazimulweni." 
2Corinthians3:12 Ngakho silethemba elinje, sisebenzisa isibindi esikhulu ekukhulumeni;" 
2Corinthians3:13 njalo kasinjengoMozisi owafaka isimbombozo ebusweni bakhe, ukuze abantwana bakoIsrayeli bangajolozeli isiphetho sento eyenziwa yaphela;" 
2Corinthians3:14 kodwa ingqondo zabo zenziwa lukhuni; ngoba kuze kube lamuhla isimbombozo esifananayo sihlezi ekufundeni isivumelwano esidala singambombozwanga, esenziwa saphela kuKristu." 
2Corinthians3:15 Kodwa kuze kube lamuhla, nxa kufundwa uMozisi, isimbombozo siphezu kwenhliziyo yabo." 
2Corinthians3:16 Loba nini nxa ebuyela eNkosini, isimbombozo siyasuswa." 
2Corinthians3:17 LeNkosi inguMoya; lalapho akhona uMoya weNkosi, lapho kukhona inkululeko." 
2Corinthians3:18 Thina-ke, sonke esilobuso obembuliweyo sibona inkazimulo yeNkosi esibukweni, siyaguqulelwa esimeni esifananayo sisuka enkazimulweni sisiya enkazimulweni, njengokuvela kuMoya weNkosi." 
2Corinthians4:1 Ngakho-ke, lokhu silenkonzo le, njengoba senzelwa umusa, kasidinwa;" 
2Corinthians4:2 kodwa sizilahlile izinto ezifihliweyo zehlazo, singahambi ebuqilini, singaphambanisi ilizwi likaNkulunkulu, kodwa ngokwenza obala iqiniso siyazibuka kusazela sabo bonke abantu phambi kukaNkulunkulu." 
2Corinthians4:3 Kodwa uba futhi ivangeli lethu lembesiwe, lembesiwe kulabo ababhubhayo;" 
2Corinthians4:4 okubo unkulunkulu walesisikhathi uphumputhekisile ingqondo zabangakholwayo, ukuze kungakhanyi kibo ukukhanya kwevangeli lenkazimulo kaKristu, ongumfanekiso kaNkulunkulu." 
2Corinthians4:5 Ngoba kasizitshumayeli, kodwa uKristu Jesu iNkosi; njalo thina si zinceku zenu ngenxa kaJesu." 
2Corinthians4:6 Ngoba uNkulunkulu owathi ukukhanya kukhanya kuvela ebumnyameni, nguye owakhanya enhliziyweni zethu enkazimulweni yolwazi lobukhosi bukaNkulunkulu ebusweni bukaJesu Kristu." 
2Corinthians4:7 Kodwa silayo limpahla eligugu ezitsheni zebumba, ukuze ubuhlekazi bamandla bube ngobukaNkulunkulu, njalo bungaveli kithi;" 
2Corinthians4:8 si yaminyezelwa inhlangothi zonke, kodwa ka si bandezeleki; siya dideka, kodwa ka si lahli ithemba;" 
2Corinthians4:9 si yazingelwa, kodwa ka si hlanyukwa; si wiselwa phansi, kodwa ka si bhujiswa;" 
2Corinthians4:10 sithwele njalonjalo ukufa kweNkosi uJesu emzimbeni, ukuze lempilo kaJesu ibonakaliswe emzimbeni wethu." 
2Corinthians4:11 Ngoba thina esiphilayo sinikelwa njalonjalo ekufeni ngenxa kaJesu, ukuze lempilo kaJesu ibonakaliswe enyameni yethu efayo." 
2Corinthians4:12 Ngakho ukufa kusebenza kithi, kodwa impilo kini." 
2Corinthians4:13 Ngakho silomoya ofananayo wokholo, njengokulotshiweyo ukuthi: Ngakholwa, ngakho ngakhuluma; lathi siyakholwa, ngakho lathi siyakhuluma;" 
2Corinthians4:14 sisazi ukuthi lowo owayivusayo iNkosi uJesu uzasivusa lathi ngoJesu, a si veze kanye lani." 
2Corinthians4:15 Ngoba zonke izinto zingenxa yenu, ukuze umusa ovamileyo, ngokubonga kwabanengi, wengezelelwe kube ludumo lukaNkulunkulu." 
2Corinthians4:16 Ngakho kasidinwa, kodwa nxa lomuntu wethu wangaphandle ebhujiswa, kube kanti owangaphakathi wenziwa abe mutsha insuku ngensuku." 
2Corinthians4:17 Ngoba inhlupheko yethu elula yomzuzwana iyasisebenzela isisindo sobukhosi esilaphakade esingelakulinganiswa isibili," 
2Corinthians4:18 ngoba kasikhangeli okubonwayo kodwa okungabonwayo; ngoba okubonwayo kungokwesikhathi; kodwa okungabonwayo ngokulaphakade. 
2Corinthians5:1 Ngoba siyazi ukuthi uba indlu yethu yemhlabeni yedumba idilizwa, silesakhiwo esivela kuNkulunkulu, indlu engenziwanga ngezandla, ephakade emazulwini." 
2Corinthians5:2 Ngoba lakule siyabubula, silangatha ukwembeswa ngendlu yethu evela ezulwini;" 
2Corinthians5:3 uba lathi sesembathisiwe singaficwa size. 
2Corinthians5:4 Ngoba lathi esikhona ku leli dumba siyabubula sisindwa; ngoba kasifisi ukwembulwa kodwa ukwembeswa, ukuze okubhubhayo kuginywe yimpilo." 
2Corinthians5:5 Owasilungisela-ke khona lokhu nguNkulunkulu, futhi owasipha isibambiso sikaMoya." 
2Corinthians5:6 Ngakho silesibindi ngesikhathi sonke, sisazi ukuthi sisekhona ekhaya emzimbeni sikhatshana leNkosi," 
2Corinthians5:7 ngoba sihamba ngokholo, kungeyisikho ngokubona;" 
2Corinthians5:8 ngakho silesibindi, njalo siyathaba kakhulu ukuba khatshana lomzimba, lokuba sekhaya leNkosi." 
2Corinthians5:9 Ngalokho-ke siyafisa kakhulu, loba sisekhaya, kumbe sikhatshana lekhaya, ukuthi sibe ngabemukelekayo kuye." 
2Corinthians5:10 Ngoba sonke simele ukubonakala phambi kwesihlalo sokwahlulela sikaKristu, ukuze ngulowo lalowo azamukelele izinto ezenziwe ngomzimba, njengalokhu akwenzileyo, loba kuhle kumbe kubi." 
2Corinthians5:11 Ngakho sisazi ukwesabeka kweNkosi siyabancenga abantu, kodwa sibonakalisiwe kuNkulunkulu; njalo ngithemba ukuthi sibonakalisiwe lezazeleni zenu." 
2Corinthians5:12 Ngoba kasizivezi futhi kini, kodwa silinika ithuba lokuzincoma ngathi, ukuze libe la kho ukumelana labo abazincomayo ebusweni, kungeyisikho enhliziyweni." 
2Corinthians5:13 Ngoba uba sihlanya, ku kuNkulunkulu; uba siqondile, ku kini." 
2Corinthians5:14 Ngoba uthando lukaKristu luyasiqhubezela, sibona lokhu, ukuthi uba omunye wafela bonke, ngakho bonke bafa;" 
2Corinthians5:15 njalo wafela bonke ukuze abaphilayo bangabe besaziphilela, kodwa lowo owabafelayo wabuye wavuka." 
2Corinthians5:16 Ngakho kusukela khathesi thina kasazi muntu ngokwenyama; lanxa lathi samazi uKristu ngokwenyama, kodwa khathesi kasisa m azi." 
2Corinthians5:17 Ukuze kuthi uba umuntu ekuKristu, uy isidalwa esitsha; okudala sekudlule, khangela konke sekukutsha." 
2Corinthians5:18 Konke lokhu-ke kuvela kuNkulunkulu, owabuyisana lathi ngoJesu Kristu kuye, wasinika inkonzo yokubuyisana;" 
2Corinthians5:19 okunjengokuthi uNkulunkulu wayekuKristu ebuyisana lomhlaba kuye, engababaleli iziphambeko zabo, ebeka kithi ilizwi lokubuyisana." 
2Corinthians5:20 Ngakho siyizithunywa esikhundleni sikaKristu, njengokungathi uNkulunkulu uyancenga ngathi; siyancenga esikhundleni sikaKristu sithi: Buyisanani loNkulunkulu." 
2Corinthians5:21 Ngoba lowo ongasazanga isono wamenza isono esikhundleni sethu, ukuze thina sibe yikulunga kukaNkulunkulu kuye." 
2Corinthians6:1 Sisebenza-ke ndawonye lathi siyancenga ukuthi lingawemukeli ngeze umusa kaNkulunkulu; 
2Corinthians6:2 ngoba uthi: Ngesikhathi esihle ngikuzwile, langosuku losindiso ngakusiza; khangelani, khathesi yisikhathi esihle isibili; khangelani khathesi lusuku losindiso." 
2Corinthians6:3 Kasikhubekisi ngalutho ngitsho, ukuze inkonzo ingasolwa;" 
2Corinthians6:4 kodwa kukho konke sizibonakalisa njengezikhonzi zikaNkulunkulu, ekubekezeleni okukhulu, ezinhluphekweni, ebunzimeni, encindezelweni," 
2Corinthians6:5 ekutshayweni, ekubotshweni, eziphithiphithini, ekusebenzeni nzima, ekungalalini, ekuzileni ukudla," 
2Corinthians6:6 ekuhlambulukeni, elwazini, ekubekezeleni, ebubeleni, kuMoya oNgcwele, ethandweni olungazenzisiyo," 
2Corinthians6:7 elizwini leqiniso, emandleni kaNkulunkulu; ngezikhali zokulunga kwesokunene lakwesokhohlo," 
2Corinthians6:8 ngodumo langehlazo, ngokuthukwa langokudunyiswa; njengabakhohlisi, kanti abaqinisileyo;" 
2Corinthians6:9 njengabangaziwayo, kanti abaziwayo kakhulu; njengabafayo, kanti khangelani siyaphila; njengabalaywayo, kanti abangabulawayo;" 
2Corinthians6:10 njengabalosizi, kodwa abathokoza njalonjalo; njengabayanga, kodwa abanothisa abanengi; njengabangelalutho, kanti abalakho konke." 
2Corinthians6:11 Umlomo wethu uvulekele lina, beKorinte, inhliziyo yethu yenziwe banzi." 
2Corinthians6:12 Kalivinjelwanga yithi, kodwa livinjelwe emibilini yenu." 
2Corinthians6:13 Njalo ngokwenanana okufananayo, ngikhuluma njengebantwaneni, lani yenziwani banzi." 
2Corinthians6:14 Lingabotshwa ngokungalingani ejogweni labangakholwayo; ngoba kulokuhlanganyela bani ukulunga lokungalungi? Kulokuhlanganyela bani ukukhanya lobumnyama? 
2Corinthians6:15 Njalo uKristu ulokuzwana bani loBheliyali? Kumbe ulesabelo bani okholwayo longakholwayo? 
2Corinthians6:16 Njalo kulokuvumelana bani ithempeli likaNkulunkulu lezithombe? Ngoba lina lilithempeli likaNkulunkulu ophilayo, njengokutsho kukaNkulunkulu ukuthi: Ngizahlala kibo, ngizabhoda phakathi kwabo; sengizakuba nguNkulunkulu wabo, bona-ke bazakuba ngabantu bami." 
2Corinthians6:17 Ngakho phumani phakathi kwabo lehlukaniswe, itsho iNkosi, lingathinti okungcolileyo; mina-ke ngizalemukela," 
2Corinthians6:18 futhi ngizakuba nguBaba kini, lina selizakuba kimi ngamadodana lamadodakazi, itsho iNkosi uSomandla." 
2Corinthians7:1 Lokhu silalezizithembiso, bathandekayo, asizihlambululeni kukho konke ukungcola kwenyama lokomoya, siphelelise ubungcwele ekwesabeni uNkulunkulu." 
2Corinthians7:2 Semukeleni; kasonanga muntu, kasonakalisanga muntu, kasidlelezelanga muntu." 
2Corinthians7:3 Kangikhulumeli uku li sola; ngoba ngatsho phambili, ukuthi lisenhliziyweni zethu ukuthi sife ndawonye siphile ndawonye." 
2Corinthians7:4 Sikhulu isibindi sami senkulumo kini, ngilokuziqhenya okukhulu ngani; ngigcwele induduzo; ngengezelelwe kakhulu intokozo kuyo yonke inhlupheko yethu." 
2Corinthians7:5 Ngoba lekufikeni kwethu eMakedoniya, inyama yethu kayibanga lokuphumula, kodwa sabandezelwa ezintweni zonke; ngaphandle ingxabano, ngaphakathi ukwesaba." 
2Corinthians7:6 Kodwa uNkulunkulu, oduduza abadanileyo, wasiduduza ekufikeni kukaTitosi;" 
2Corinthians7:7 njalo kungeyisikho ekufikeni kwakhe kuphela, kodwa langenduduzo aduduzeka ngayo ngani, lapho esilandisela ukulangatha kwenu, ukudabuka kwenu, ukungitshisekela kwenu, ngaze ngathokoza kakhulu." 
2Corinthians7:8 Ngoba lanxa ngalidabula encwadini, kangizisoli; lanxa ngazisola; ngoba ngibona ukuthi leyoncwadi yalidabula, loba kungokwesikhathi." 
2Corinthians7:9 Khathesi ngiyathokoza, kungeyisikho ukuthi ladatshulwa, kodwa ukuthi ladatshulelwa ekuphendukeni; ngoba ladatshulwa ngokukaNkulunkulu, ukuze lingalahlekelwa lutho ngenxa yethu." 
2Corinthians7:10 Ngoba ukudabuka ngokukaNkulunkulu kuletha ukuphenduka kube lusindiso ongezisole ngalo; kodwa ukudabuka komhlaba kuletha ukufa. 
2Corinthians7:11 Ngoba khangelani, le into efananayo, ukuthi ladatshulwa ngokukaNkulunkulu, ukuthi kuveze kini ukukhuthala okungakanani, yebo, ukuziphendulela, yebo, ukuthukuthela, yebo, ukwesaba, yebo, ukulangatha, yebo, ukutshiseka, yebo, impindiselo. Kukho konke lazibonakalisa ukuthi limsulwa kule indaba." 
2Corinthians7:12 Uba-ke lami ngalibhalela, kungeyisikho ngenxa yalowo owonayo, njalo kungeyisikho ngenxa yalowo owoniweyo, kodwa ukuze ukulikhuthalela kwethu kubonakaliswe kini phambi kukaNkulunkulu." 
2Corinthians7:13 Ngalokho siduduzekile ngenduduzo yenu; kodwa sathokoza ngokwengezelelweyo kakhulu ngentokozo kaTitosi, ngoba umoya wakhe uvuselelwe ngokuvela kini lonke;" 
2Corinthians7:14 ngoba uba ngazincomela lina ngo lutho kuye kangiyangekanga; kodwa njengoba sakukhuluma konke kini ngeqiniso, ngokunjalo lokuzincoma kwethu okwakukuTitosi kwaba liqiniso." 
2Corinthians7:15 Isihelo sakhe sesengezelelwe kakhulu kini, lapho ekhumbula ukulalela kwenu lonke, ukuthi lamemukela njani ngokwesaba langokuthuthumela." 
2Corinthians7:16 Ngakho ngiyathokoza ukuthi ngiyalithemba kukho konke. 
2Corinthians8:1 Sesiyalazisa, bazalwane, umusa kaNkulunkulu ophiwe emabandleni eMakedoniya;" 
2Corinthians8:2 ukuthi ekulingweni okukhulu kwenhlupho, ukwengezelelwa kwentokozo yabo lobuyanga babo obujulileyo bengezelela enothweni yokuphana kwabo." 
2Corinthians8:3 Ngoba babekhululekile njengokwamandla abo, ngiyafakaza, langaphezu kwamandla abo," 
2Corinthians8:4 ngesicelo esikhulu basincenga, ukuthi semukele isipho lokuhlanganyela koncedo olungolwabangcwele;" 
2Corinthians8:5 njalo kaku ba nga njengoba sathemba, kodwa bazinikela kuqala eNkosini, lakithi ngentando kaNkulunkulu." 
2Corinthians8:6 Kwaze kwathi sakhuthaza uTitosi ukuthi, njengalokhu wayeseqalile phambili, ngokunjalo awuqede futhi kini lumsebenzi womusa." 
2Corinthians8:7 Kodwa njengalokhu lisengezelela kukho konke, ekholweni, lelizwini, lelwazini, lekutshisekeni konke, lethandweni lwenu kithi, ukuze lakulumsebenzi womusa lengezelele." 
2Corinthians8:8 Kangikhulumi njengokulawula, kodwa ngokutshiseka kwabanye ngihlola lobuqotho bothando lwenu." 
2Corinthians8:9 Ngoba liyawazi umusa weNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu, ukuthi lanxa wayenothile, waba ngumyanga ngenxa yenu, ukuze ngobuyanga bakhe lina linothe." 
2Corinthians8:10 Lakulokhu ngipha umbono; ngoba lokhu kuluncedo kini, abaqala phambili nyakenye, kungeyisikwenza kuphela, kodwa lokufisa;" 
2Corinthians8:11 kodwa khathesi-ke qedani futhi ukwenza, ukuze, njengalokhu kukhona ukukhuthalela ukufisa, ngokunjalo kukhona lokuqedisa ngalokho elilakho." 
2Corinthians8:12 Ngoba uba kukhona ukufisa, umuntu uyemukeleka ngalokho alakho, kungeyisikho ngalokho angelakho." 
2Corinthians8:13 Ngoba kungeyisikuthi abanye babe lenkululeko, lina-ke libe lohlupho; kodwa ngokulingana, okwalesisikhathi isengezo senu sibe ngesenswelo yabo," 
2Corinthians8:14 ukuze kuthi lesengezo sabo sibe ngesenswelo yenu, ukuze kube khona ukulingana," 
2Corinthians8:15 njengokulotshiweyo ukuthi: O wabutha okunengi, kabanga lokusalayo; lo wabutha okuncinyane kasilelanga." 
2Corinthians8:16 Kodwa kabongwe uNkulunkulu ofaka inkuthalo efananayo ngani enhliziyweni kaTitosi," 
2Corinthians8:17 ukuthi isibili wemukela isikhuthazo, kodwa etshiseka kakhulu, wasuka waya kini ngesifiso sakhe." 
2Corinthians8:18 Njalo sithuma kanye laye umzalwane, odumo lwakhe evangelini ludabule emabandleni wonke;" 
2Corinthians8:19 kungeyisilokhu kuphela, kodwa ukhethiwe futhi ngamabandla ukuthi asiphelekezele lalo umusa owasetshenzwa yithi kube ludumo lweNkosi efananayo, lekukhuthaleni kwenu;" 
2Corinthians8:20 sivikela lokhu, hlezi umuntu asisole kulesisengezo esisetshenzwe yithi;" 
2Corinthians8:21 sinakekela okuhle kungekho phambi kweNkosi kuphela kodwa laphambi kwabantu. 
2Corinthians8:22 Sasesithuma kanye labo umzalwane wethu, esimfice ezintweni ezinengi kanengi ekhuthele, kodwa khathesi ukhuthele kakhulukazi ngenxa yokulithemba okukhulu." 
2Corinthians8:23 Kumbe ngoTitosi, ungumhlanganyeli lesisebenzi kanye lami kini; loba abazalwane bethu, bayizithunywa zamabandla, bayinkazimulo kaKristu." 
2Corinthians8:24 Ngakho bonakalisani kubo ubufakazi bothando lwenu labokuzincomela kwethu lina, laphambi kwamabandla." 
2Corinthians9:1 Ngoba mayelana lokuncedisa okungokwabangcwele kakusweleki kimi ukulibhalela; 
2Corinthians9:2 ngoba ngiyazi ukukhuthala kwenu, engizincoma ngakho ngani kwabeMakedoniya, ukuthi iAkaya yayisizilungisele kusukela nyakenye; lokutshiseka okuvela kini kubavusile abanengi." 
2Corinthians9:3 Kodwa ngithume abazalwane, ukuze ukuzincoma kwethu ngani kungenziwa ize maqondana lalokhu; ukuze, njengokutsho kwami, libe lilungile;" 
2Corinthians9:4 hlezi mhlawumbe, nxa abeMakedoniya befika lami balifica lingalungiselanga, siyangeke thina (ukuze singathi, lina) ngalesisibindi sokuzincoma." 
2Corinthians9:5 Ngakho ngibona kufanele ukuthi ngikhuthaze abazalwane, ukuze baqale ukuza kini, njalo balungisele ngaphambili ukupha kwenu ngesihle okwakhulunywa ngakho mandulo, ukuthi lesi silungile, ngokunjalo njengesibusiso futhi kungenjengokuncitshana." 
2Corinthians9:6 Lalokhu ukuthi, ohlanyela ingcosana, uzavuna ingcosana laye; lohlanyela ngokunengi, uzavuna ngokunengi laye." 
2Corinthians9:7 Ngulowo lalowo njengalokhu azikhethela khona enhliziyweni; kungabi ngokokudonda kumbe ngokokubanjwa ngamandla; ngoba uNkulunkulu uyamthanda onikelayo ngentokozo. 
2Corinthians9:8 Njalo uNkulunkulu ulamandla okulengezelela wonke umusa, ukuze, lilokwenela konke ezintweni zonke ngesikhathi sonke, lengezwe emisebenzini yonke emihle;" 
2Corinthians9:9 njengokulotshiweyo kokuthi: Uchithachithile, wanika abayanga; ukulunga kwakhe kuhlala kuze kube phakade." 
2Corinthians9:10 Njalo yena onika inhlanyelo kumhlanyeli, lesinkwa sokudla, kwangathi anganika angakhulisa inhlanyelo yenu, andise izithelo zokulunga kwenu;" 
2Corinthians9:11 linothiswa ezintweni zonke kukho konke ukuphana, okusebenza ngathi ukubongwa kuNkulunkulu;" 
2Corinthians9:12 ngoba umsebenzi walinkonzo kawugcwalisi kuphela inswelo zabangcwele, kodwa futhi wengeza ngokubongwa okunengi kuNkulunkulu;" 
2Corinthians9:13 ngobufakazi balinkonzo badumisa uNkulunkulu ngokulalela kovumo lwenu ivangeli likaKristu, langokupha kwenu okukhulu kubo, lakubo bonke;" 
2Corinthians9:14 langomkhuleko wabo ngani, belilangatha ngomusa kaNkulunkulu ongelakulinganiswa phezu kwenu." 
2Corinthians9:15 Njalo kabongwe uNkulunkulu ngenxa yesipho sakhe esingakhulumekiyo. 
2Corinthians10:1 Mina-ke uPawuli ngokwami ngiyalincenga ngobumnene langesisa sikaKristu, othobekileyo phakathi kwenu nxa ngi khona, kodwa nxa ngingekho engilesibindi kini;" 
2Corinthians10:2 ngiya li ncenga-ke ukuthi, nxa ngikhona, ngingabi lesibindi ngalokhukuzimisela ebengikhunjulelwa ngakho ukuthi ngilesibindi sokumelana labanye abacabanga ngathi njengabahamba ngokwenyama." 
2Corinthians10:3 Ngoba lanxa sihamba enyameni kasilwi ngokwenyama; 
2Corinthians10:4 ngoba izikhali zempi yethu kayisizo zasenyameni, kodwa zilamandla ngoNkulunkulu ekubhidlizeni izinqaba," 
2Corinthians10:5 sehlisa iminakano lakho konke okuziphakamisela ukumelana lolwazi lukaNkulunkulu, lemicabango yonke siyithumbela ekumlaleleni uKristu;" 
2Corinthians10:6 futhi silokulungela ukuphindisela ukungalaleli konke, nxa ukulalela kwenu sekuphelele." 
2Corinthians10:7 Likhangela izinto njengokubonakala kwazo yini? Uba umuntu ezithemba yena ukuthi ungokaKristu, kabuye anakane lokhu ngaye, ukuthi njengoba yena engokaKristu, ngokunjalo lathi singabakaKristu." 
2Corinthians10:8 Ngoba loba ngolutho olwengezelelweyo kakhulu ngingaze ngizincome futhi ngamandla ethu, eyasinika wona iNkosi ekwakheni, njalo kungabi ngokulichitha, kangiyikuyangeka;" 
2Corinthians10:9 ukuze ngingabonakali njengolethusa ngezincwadi. 
2Corinthians10:10 Ngoba kuthiwa: Incwadi zakhe zinzima zilamandla; kodwa ubukhona bomzimba wakhe bubuthakathaka, lokukhuluma kwakhe kudelelekile." 
2Corinthians10:11 Onjalo kanakane lokhu, ukuthi njengoba sinjalo ngelizwi ngezincwadi nxa singekho, lathi sinjalo ngesenzo nxa sikhona." 
2Corinthians10:12 Ngoba kasilasibindi sokuzibalela kumbe ukuzifananisa labathile babo abaziqhenyayo; kodwa bona bayalinganisana bodwa, njalo bayafananisana bodwa, kabaqedisisi." 
2Corinthians10:13 Kodwa thina kasisoze sizincome okwedlula amalawulo; kodwa ngesilinganiso sesigaba uNkulunkulu asabele sona, isilinganiso sokufika lakini." 
2Corinthians10:14 Ngoba kasizeluli ngokweqileyo ngokungathi kasifinyelelanga kini, ngoba sifikile lakini evangelini likaKristu;" 
2Corinthians10:15 kasizincomi okwedlula amalawulo emsebenzini wabanye, kodwa silethemba lokuthi, nxa lwandile ukholo lwenu, sizakhuliswa ngokwengezelelelweyo phakathi kwenu ngesigaba sethu," 
2Corinthians10:16 ukutshumayela ivangeli endaweni ezingaphambili kwenu, singazincomi ngesigaba somunye ezintweni ezilungisiweyo." 
2Corinthians10:17 Kodwa ozincomayo, kazincome eNkosini." 
2Corinthians10:18 Ngoba kayisuye ozincomayo, kodwa lowo iNkosi emncomayo, nguye ovunywayo." 
2Corinthians11:1 Kungathi lingangibekezelela kancane ebuthutheni bami; kodwa lani lingibekezelele. 
2Corinthians11:2 Ngoba ngilobukhwele ngani ngobukhwele bukaNkulunkulu; ngoba ngaliganela endodeni yinye ukuthi ngilise kuKristu liy intombi emsulwa. 
2Corinthians11:3 Kodwa ngiyesaba ukuthi hlezi mhlawumbe njengalokhu inyoka yakhohlisa uEva ngobuqili bayo, ngokunjalo imicabango yenu ingaduhiswa ebuqothweni obukuKristu." 
2Corinthians11:4 Ngoba uba ofikayo etshumayela omunye uJesu esingamtshumayelanga, loba lisemukela omunye umoya elingamemukelanga, loba elinye ivangeli elingalemukelanga, kuhle ukuthi li m bekezelele." 
2Corinthians11:5 Ngoba ngithi kangisileli ngalutho kulabo abaphostoli abaqakathekileyo sibili. 
2Corinthians11:6 Njalo uba lami ngingafundanga ekukhulumeni, kanti kungeyisikho elwazini; kodwa entweni yonke sibonakalisiwe kini ezintweni zonke." 
2Corinthians11:7 Kumbe ngenze isono yini ngokuzithoba ukuze liphakanyiswe lina, lokhu ngilitshumayeze ivangeli likaNkulunkulu ngesihle?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Ngaphanga amanye amabandla, ngithatha iholo ukuze ngilisize;" 
2Corinthians11:9 lalapho ngangikhona kini ngiswele kangibanga ngumthwalo ngitsho emuntwini; ngoba abazalwane, abavela eMakedoniya, bagcwalisa inswelo yami; njalo kukho konke ngizigcinile futhi ngizazigcina ukuthi ngingabi ngumthwalo kini." 
2Corinthians11:10 Njengoba iqiniso likaKristu likimi, ukuthi lokhukuzincoma kakuyikumiswa ngami ezabelweni zeAkaya." 
2Corinthians11:11 Kungani? Ngoba ngingalithandi yini? UNkulunkulu uyazi. 
2Corinthians11:12 Kodwa engikwenzayo, ngizakwenza futhi, ukuze ngiqume ithuba kwabafuna ithuba, ukuze kulokho abazincoma ngakho, baficwe benjengathi labo." 
2Corinthians11:13 Ngoba abanje bangabaphostoli bamanga, izisebenzi ezikhohlisayo, beziphendula babe ngabaphostoli bakaKristu." 
2Corinthians11:14 Kakumangalisi-ke; ngoba uSathane uqobo uziphendula abe yingilosi yokukhanya. 
2Corinthians11:15 Ngakho ka ku sinto enkulu uba lazo inceku zakhe ziziphendula njengenceku zokulunga, okuphela kwazo kuzakuba njengokwemisebenzi yazo." 
2Corinthians11:16 Ngiyaphinda ngithi: Kakungabi lomuntu ocabanga ukuthi ngiyisithutha; kodwa uba kunge njalo ngemukelani lanjengesithutha, ukuze lami ngizincome kancinyane." 
2Corinthians11:17 Lokho engikutshoyo, kangikutsho ngokweNkosi, kodwa njengebuthutheni, kulesisibindi sokuzincoma." 
2Corinthians11:18 Lokhu abanengi bezincoma ngokwenyama, lami ngizazincoma." 
2Corinthians11:19 Ngoba libekezelela abayizithutha ngentokozo lina lingabahlakaniphileyo. 
2Corinthians11:20 Ngoba liyabekezela, uba umuntu elenza izigqili, uba umuntu elidla aliqede, uba umuntu e l emuka, uba umuntu eziphakamisa, uba umuntu elitshaya ebusweni." 
2Corinthians11:21 Ngitsho ngenhloni, kuze kungathi thina besibuthakathaka; kodwa kukuphi umuntu alesibindi ngakho (ngikhulumela ebuthutheni) lami ngilesibindi ngakho." 
2Corinthians11:22 BangamaHebheru yini? Lami. BangabakoIsrayeli yini? Lami. Bayinzalo kaAbrahama yini? Lami. 
2Corinthians11:23 Bayizikhonzi zikaKristu yini? (Ngikhuluma njeng ohlanya) ngi yiso ku labo; emisebenzini enzima okwengezelelweyo kakhulu, emivimvinyeni okwedlula amalawulo, ezintolongweni okungezelelweyo kakhulu, ekufeni kanengi;" 
2Corinthians11:24 kumaJuda ngemukela imivimvinya engamatshumi amane kusala owodwa kahlanu. 
2Corinthians11:25 Ngatshaywa kathathu ngezinduku, ngakhandwa ngamatshe kanye, kathathu ngachithekelwa ngumkhumbi, ubusuku lemini ngisekujuleni kolwandle;" 
2Corinthians11:26 ekuhambeni kanengi; engozini zemifula, engozini zabaphangi, ezingozini kwabakithi, ezingozini kwabezizwe, ezingozini emzini, ezingozini enkangala, engozini olwandle, ezingozini kubazalwane bamanga," 
2Corinthians11:27 ekutshikatshikeni lebunzimeni, ekungalalini kanengi, ekulambeni lekomeni, ekuzileni ukudla kanengi, ekugodoleni lekuhambenize." 
2Corinthians11:28 Ngaphandle kwezinto ezingaphandle, okungicindezelayo insuku zonke yikukhathalela wonke amabandla." 
2Corinthians11:29 Ngubani obuthakathaka, ngingabi buthakathaka lami? Ngubani okhutshekiswayo, lami ngingatshiseki?" 
2Corinthians11:30 Uba kumele ukuzincoma, ngizazincoma ngezinto zobuthakathaka bami." 
2Corinthians11:31 UNkulunkulu uYise weNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu, obongekayo kuze kube nini lanini, uyazi ukuthi kangiqambi manga." 
2Corinthians11:32 EDamaseko induna yenkosi uAretha yalinda umuzi wabeDamaseko, efuna ukungibamba;" 
2Corinthians11:33 njalo ngehliswa ngewindi esilulwini ngomduli, ngasengiphepha ezandleni zayo." 
2Corinthians12:1 Qiniso ukuzincoma kakusizi lutho kimi; ngoba ngizakuya kumibono lezembulo zeNkosi. 
2Corinthians12:2 Ngiyamazi umuntu ekuKristu sekudlule iminyaka elitshumi lane (loba emzimbeni kangazi, loba ngaphandle komzimba kangazi, uNkulunkulu uyazi) ukuthi lonje wahluthulelwa ezulwini lesithathu." 
2Corinthians12:3 Ngiyamazi-ke umuntu onjalo (loba emzimbeni, loba ngaphandle komzimba, kangazi; uNkulunkulu uyazi)," 
2Corinthians12:4 ukuthi wahluthulwa wasiwa eParadise, wezwa amazwi angakhulumekiyo, angavunyelwa muntu ukuwakhuluma." 
2Corinthians12:5 Ngizazincoma ngonjalo, kodwa ngami uqobo kangiyikuzincoma, ngaphandle kobuthakathaka bami." 
2Corinthians12:6 Ngoba uba bengingathanda ukuzincoma, bengingazukuba yisithutha; ngoba ngizakhuluma iqiniso, kodwa ngiyayekela, hlezi umuntu acabange ngami okungaphezu kwalokho angibona ngiyikho, kumbe akuzwa kimi," 
2Corinthians12:7 futhi ukuze ngingaphakanyiswa kakhulukazi ngobukhulukazi bezembulo, nganikwa ameva enyameni, isithunywa sikaSathane, ukungidutshuza, ukuze ngingaziphakamisi kakhulukazi." 
2Corinthians12:8 Ngalokho nganxusa iNkosi kathathu ukuze kusuke kimi. 
2Corinthians12:9 Yasisithi kimi: Umusa wami ukwanele; ngoba amandla ami apheleliswa ebuthakathakeni. Ngakho ngizazincoma ngentokozo enkulu ebuthakathakeni bami, ukuze amandla kaKristu ahlale phezu kwami." 
2Corinthians12:10 Ngakho ngiyathokoza ebuthakathakeni, ekuthukweni, ekubanjweni ngamandla, ekuzingelweni, ekukhathazekeni, ngenxa kaKristu; ngoba nxa ngibuthakathaka, khona ngilamandla." 
2Corinthians12:11 Sengize ngaba yisithutha, ngizincoma; yini elingicindezeleyo; ngoba bekufanele ukuthi mina ngivezwe yini; ngoba kangisilelanga ngalutho kulabo abaphostoli abaqakathekileyo sibili, lanxa ngingesilutho." 
2Corinthians12:12 Isibili impawu zomphostoli zenziwa phakathi kwenu ekubekezeleni konke, ngezibonakaliso lezimangaliso lemisebenzi yamandla." 
2Corinthians12:13 Ngoba kuyini elaba ngaphansi ngakho kwamanye amabandla, ngaphandle kokuthi mina uqobo kangibanga ngumthwalo kini? Ngithethelelani lokhukungalungi." 
2Corinthians12:14 Khangelani, sengilungele ukuza kini ngokwesithathu, njalo kangizukuba ngumthwalo kini; ngoba kangidingi okwenu, kodwa lina; ngoba abantwana kabafanele ukudlinzekelela abazali, kodwa abazali abantwana." 
2Corinthians12:15 Mina-ke ngizachitha ngentokozo njalo ngizachithelwa imiphefumulo yenu, lanxa ngilithanda okwengezelelweyo kakhulu, ngithandwa kancinyane." 
2Corinthians12:16 Kodwa ku njalo, mina kangibanga ngumthwalo kini; kodwa ngingumhugi, ngalibamba ngobuqili." 
2Corinthians12:17 Ngaliqilibezela yini ngomunye walabo engabathuma kini? 
2Corinthians12:18 Ngacela uTitosi, ngasengithuma kanye la ye umzalwane; uTitosi waliqilibezela yini? Kasihambanga yini ngomoya munye? Ngitsho ngezinyathelo zinye yini?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Licabanga futhi ukuthi siyaziphendulela yini kini? Sikhuluma phambi kukaNkulunkulu sikuKristu; njalo konke lokhu, bathandekayo, kungokokwakhiwa kwenu." 
2Corinthians12:20 Ngoba ngilovalo hlezi mhlawumbe ekufikeni kwami ngizalifica lingenjengalokho engikuthandayo, lami ngificwe yini ngingenjengalokho elikuthandayo; hlezi mhlawumbe kube khona ukuxabana, umona, ulaka, umbango, ukuhleba, ukunyeya, ukuzikhukhumeza, iziphithiphithi;"
