2Corinthians12:21 hlezi ekufikeni kwami futhi uNkulunkulu wami angithobise phakathi kwenu, njalo ngililele abanengi abonileyo ngaphambili, njalo abangaphendukanga kukho ukungcola lobufebe lamanyala abakwenzileyo." 
2Corinthians13:1 Ngalesisikhathi sesithathu ngiza kini; ngemilomo yabafakazi ababili kumbe abathathu wonke umutsho uzaqiniswa. 
2Corinthians13:2 Sengitshilo ngaphambili njalo ngiyandulela ukutsho, njengalokhu ngikhona ngokwesibili, njalo ngingekho khathesi ngibhalela kulabo abona ngaphambili lakwabanye bonke, ukuthi nxa ngingabuya futhi, kangisoze ngi ba yekele;" 
2Corinthians13:3 njengoba lidinga ubufakazi bukaKristu okhuluma kimi, ongebuthakathaka kini kodwa elamandla phakathi kwenu;" 
2Corinthians13:4 ngoba lanxa wabethelwa ngobuthakathaka, kanti uyaphila ngamandla kaNkulunkulu. Ngoba lathi sibuthakathaka kuye, kodwa sizaphila kanye laye ngamandla kaNkulunkulu kini." 
2Corinthians13:5 Zihloleni ukuthi lisekholweni, lizilinge. Kanti kalazi lina ukuthi uJesu Kristu ukini? Ngaphandle kokuthi ngeqiniso lingabalahliweyo." 
2Corinthians13:6 Ngithemba-ke ukuthi lizakwazi ukuthi thina kasisibo abalahliweyo. 
2Corinthians13:7 Njalo ngiyakhuleka kuNkulunkulu, ukuthi lingenzi lutho olubi, kungesikuthi sibonakale thina singabathembekileyo, kodwa ukuze lina lenze ukulunga, kodwa thina sibe njengabalahliweyo." 
2Corinthians13:8 Ngoba kasilamandla okwenza ulutho olumelana leqiniso, kodwa okweqiniso." 
2Corinthians13:9 Ngoba siyajabula nxa sibuthakathaka thina, lani lilamandla; njalo lalokho siyakukhulekela, ukupheleliswa kwenu." 
2Corinthians13:10 Ngakho ngibhala lezizinto ngingekho, ukuze kuthi nxa ngikhona ngingasebenzisi ubukhali, njengamandla iNkosi eyanginika wona, ekwakheni, njalo angabi ngawokubhidliza." 
2Corinthians13:11 Elokucina, bazalwane, thokozani, lipheleliswe, liduduzwe, libe ngqondonye, lihlale ngokuthula; njalo uNkulunkulu wothando lowokuthula uzakuba lani." 
2Corinthians13:12 Bingelelanani ngokwanga okungcwele. 
2Corinthians13:13 Bonke abangcwele bayalibingelela. 
2Corinthians13:14 Umusa weNkosi uJesu Kristu, lothando lukaNkulunkulu, lokuhlanganyela kukaMoya oNgcwele kakube lani lonke. Ameni." 
Galatians1:1 UPawuli umphostoli ongaveli ebantwini, njalo kungekho ngomuntu, kodwa ngoJesu Kristu, langoNkulunkulu uYise owamvusa kwabafileyo," 
Galatians1:2 labazalwane bonke abalami, kumabandla eGalathiya:" 
Galatians1:3 Umusa kawube kini lokuthula okuvela kuNkulunkulu uBaba, leNkosini yethu uJesu Kristu," 
Galatians1:4 owazinikela ngenxa yezono zethu, ukuze asophule kulesisikhathi esibi sakhathesi, ngokwentando kaNkulunkulu loBaba wethu;" 
Galatians1:5 obukuye ubukhosi kuze kube nini lanini. Ameni. 
Galatians1:6 Ngiyamangala ukuthi limhlamuke masinyane kangaka lowo owalibizela emuseni kaKristu la ya kwelinye ivangeli; 
Galatians1:7 elingeyisilo elinye; kodwa bakhona abanye abalididayo bethanda ukuhlanekela ivangeli likaKristu. 
Galatians1:8 Kodwa lanxa kungaba yithi kumbe ingilosi evela ezulwini engalitshumayeza ivangeli elehlukene lalelo esalitshumayeza lona, kayibe yisiqalekiso." 
Galatians1:9 Njengoba sesitshilo, lakhathesi ngiyaphinda ngithi: Uba umuntu elitshumayeza ivangeli elehlukene lalelo elalemukelayo, kabe yisiqalekiso." 
Galatians1:10 Ngoba ngincenga abantu loba uNkulunkulu khathesi yini? Kumbe ngidinga ukuthokozisa abantu yini? Ngoba uba ngisathokozisa abantu, ngingebe yinceku kaKristu." 
Galatians1:11 Kodwa ngiyalazisa, bazalwane, ivangeli elatshunyayelwa yimi, ukuthi alinjengokomuntu." 
Galatians1:12 Ngoba lami kangilemukelanga emuntwini, futhi kangi li fundiswanga, kodwa ngokwembulelwa kukaJesu Kristu." 
Galatians1:13 Ngoba selizwile ukuhamba kwami kwakuqala kobuJuda, ukuthi ngalizingela kakhulukazi sibili ibandla likaNkulunkulu, njalo ngangilichitha;" 
Galatians1:14 njalo ngangiphumelela kubuJuda ngaphezu kwabanengi abayintanga yami kusizukulwana sami, ngatshisekela ngokwengeziweyo amasiko abobaba." 
Galatians1:15 Kodwa nxa kwaba kuhle kuNkulunkulu, owangehlukanisa kusukela esizalweni sikamama, wangibiza ngomusa wakhe," 
Galatians1:16 ukwembula iNdodana yakhe kimi, ukuze ngiyitshumayele phakathi kwabezizwe, khona lapho kangelulekananga lenyama legazi;" 
Galatians1:17 futhi kangenyukelanga eJerusalema kubo ababengabaphostoli ngaphambi kwami, kodwa ngasuka ngaya eArabhiya, ngasengiphinda ngibuyela eDamaseko." 
Galatians1:18 Emva kwalokho sekwedlule iminyaka emithathu ngenyukela eJerusalema ukuyabonana loPetro, ngasengihlala laye insuku ezilitshumi lanhlanu." 
Galatians1:19 Kodwa kangibonanga la munye wabaphostoli, ngaphandle kukaJakobe umfowabo weNkosi." 
Galatians1:20 Lezinto engilibhalela zona, khangelani, phambi kukaNkulunkulu, kangiqambi manga." 
Galatians1:21 Emva kwalokho ngaya ezabelweni zeSiriya lezeKilikhiya. 
Galatians1:22 Njalo ngangingakaziwa ngobuso emabandleni eJudiya ayekuKristu; 
Galatians1:23 kodwa ayesizwa nje ukuthi: Owake wasizingela, usetshumayela ukholo owake waluchitha," 
Galatians1:24 asedumisa uNkulunkulu kimi. 
Galatians2:1 Emva kwalokho sekwedlule iminyaka elitshumi lane ngenyukela futhi eJerusalema kanye loBarnabasi, ngathatha loTitosi futhi;" 
Galatians2:2 ngasengisenyuka ngesambulelo, ngasengibalandisela ivangeli engilitshumayela phakathi kwabezizwe, kodwa ngasese kulabo ababedumile, hlezi mhlawumbe ngigijimele kumbe ngagijimela ize." 
Galatians2:3 Kodwa ngitsho uTitosi o waye lami, engumGriki, kacindezelwanga ukuthi asokwe;" 
Galatians2:4 njalo ngenxa yabazalwane bamanga abangeniswa ngensitha, abangena ngokunyenya ukuze bahlole ukukhululeka kwethu esilakho kuKristu Jesu, ukuze basenze izigqili;" 
Galatians2:5 esingabathobelanga ngokuzehlisa ngitsho okwehola, ukuze iqiniso levangeli lime njalo kini." 
Galatians2:6 Kodwa kulabo okuthiwa bayilutho (loba babeyini kakutsho lutho kimi; uNkulunkulu kemukeli isimo somuntu) ngoba labo ababedunyisiwe kabangelekelelanga ngalutho; 
Galatians2:7 kodwa kokuphambeneyo, bebona ukuthi ngaphiwa ivangeli lokungasoki, njengoPetro e lokusoka," 
Galatians2:8 ngoba owenza ngamandla kuPetro kubuphostoli bokusoka, wenza ngamandla lakimi kwabezizwe," 
Galatians2:9 bathi besazi umusa engiwuphiweyo, oJakobe loKefasi loJohane, abadume bezinsika, banika mina loBarnabasi isandla sokunene sobudlelwano, ukuze thina siye kwabezizwe, bona-ke ekusokweni;" 
Galatians2:10 kuphela ukuze sikhumbule abayanga, into le lami engangikhuthalele ukuyenza." 
Galatians2:11 Kodwa kwathi uPetro efika eAntiyoki, ngamelana laye ebusweni, ngoba wayefanele asolwe." 
Galatians2:12 Ngoba bengakafiki abathile abavela kuJakobe, wayesidla labezizwe; kodwa kuthe sebefikile, wamonyuka wazehlukanisa, esesaba abokusoka." 
Galatians2:13 Lamanye futhi amaJuda azenzisa kanye laye, kwaze kwathi loBarnabasi wathatheka ngokuzenzisa kwawo." 
Galatians2:14 Kodwa kuthe sengibonile ukuthi kabahambi ngokuqonda eqinisweni levangeli, ngathi kuPetro phambi kwabo bonke: Uba wena ungumJuda, uphila ngokwabezizwe njalo kungeyisikho ngokwamaJuda, ubacindezelelani abezizwe ukuthi baphile ngokwamaJuda?" 
Galatians2:15 Thina singamaJuda ngemvelo, njalo kasisizo izoni ezivela kwabezizwe," 
Galatians2:16 sisazi ukuthi umuntu kalungisiswa ngemisebenzi yomlayo, kodwa ngokholo lukaJesu Kristu, lathi sakholwa kuKristu Jesu, ukuze silungisiswe ngokholo lukaKristu, njalo kungeyisikho ngemisebenzi yomlayo; ngakho yonke inyama kayiyikulungisiswa ngemisebenzi yomlayo." 
Galatians2:17 Kodwa uba thina, esidinga ukulungisiswa kuKristu, lathi uqobo sificwe siyizoni, ngakho uKristu uyisisebenzi sesono yini? Phinde!" 
Galatians2:18 Ngoba uba ngibuye ngakhe izinto engizidilizileyo, ngitshengisa ukuthi ngingophambekayo." 
Galatians2:19 Ngoba ngomlayo mina ngafa kuwo umlayo, ukuze ngiphile kuNkulunkulu." 
Galatians2:20 Ngibethelwe kanye loKristu, kodwa ngiyaphila, kakuseyimi-ke, kodwa uKristu uphila kimi; kodwa lokhu engikuphila khathesi enyameni ngikuphila ekholweni lweNdodana kaNkulunkulu eyangithandayo njalo yazinikelela mina." 
Galatians2:21 Kangiwutshayi ize umusa kaNkulunkulu; ngoba uba ukulunga kungomlayo, ngakho uKristu wafela ize." 
Galatians3:1 Hawu maGalathiya ayizithutha, ngubani oliloyileyo ukuze lingalaleli iqiniso, abekwa obala phambi kwamehlo enu uJesu Kristu ebethelwe phakathi kwenu?" 
Galatians3:2 Yilokhu kuphela engithanda ukukufunda kini ukuthi: Lemukela uMoya ngemisebenzi yomlayo yini, loba ngokuzwa kokholo?" 
Galatians3:3 Kanti liyizithutha kangaka? Seliqalile ngoMoya selipheleliswa ngenyama yini? 
Galatians3:4 Lahlupheka izinto ezinengi kangaka ngeze yini? Uba-ke ngitsho kungeze. 
Galatians3:5 Ngakho yena olinika uMoya losebenza amandla phakathi kwenu, kungaba emisebenzini yomlayo yini, kumbe ekuzweni kokholo?" 
Galatians3:6 NjengoAbrahama wakholwa kuNkulunkulu, kwasekubalelwa kuye ukuthi yikulunga." 
Galatians3:7 Ngakho liyazi ukuthi labo abangabokholo, bona bangabantwana bakaAbrahama." 
Galatians3:8 Lombhalo ubona ngaphambili ukuthi uNkulunkulu ulungisisa abezizwe ngokholo, watshumayela ivangeli ngaphambili kuAbrahama wathi: Izizwe zonke zizabusiswa kuwe." 
Galatians3:9 Ngakho abangabokholo babusiswa kanye loAbrahama okholwayo. 
Galatians3:10 Ngoba bonke abemisebenzini yomlayo bangaphansi kwesiqalekiso; ngoba kulotshiwe ukuthi: Uqalekisiwe wonke ongemi njalo kukho konke okulotshiweyo encwadini yomlayo ukukwenza. 
Galatians3:11 Njalo kusobala ukuthi ngomlayo kakulamuntu olungisiswayo phambi kukaNkulunkulu; ngoba kuthiwa: Olungileyo uzaphila ngokholo; 
Galatians3:12 kodwa umlayo kawusiwo wokholo, kodwa kuthiwa: Umuntu owenza lezizinto uzaphila kuzo." 
Galatians3:13 UKristu wasihlenga kusiqalekiso somlayo, esebeyisiqalekiso esikhundleni sethu; ngoba kulotshiwe ukuthi: Uqalekisiwe wonke olenga esihlahleni;" 
Galatians3:14 ukuze kuthi isibusiso sikaAbrahama sifike kwabezizwe ngoKristu Jesu, ukuze semukele isithembiso sikaMoya ngokholo." 
Galatians3:15 Bazalwane, ngikhuluma njengokomuntu; ngitsho isivumelwano somuntu esiqinisiweyo, kakho o si chithayo loba o s engezelelayo." 
Galatians3:16 Njalo izithembiso zakhulunywa kuAbrahama lenzalweni yakhe. Katsho ukuthi: Lezinzalweni, njengezinengi, kodwa njengeyodwa ukuthi: Lenzalweni yakho, enguKristu." 
Galatians3:17 Lalokho ngithi: Umlayo oweza emva kweminyaka engamakhulu amane lamatshumi amathathu kawusichithi isivumelwano esaqiniswa nguNkulunkulu kuKristu ngaphambili, usenze isithembiso sibe yize." 
Galatians3:18 Ngoba uba ilifa livela emlayweni, alisaveli esithembisweni; kodwa uNkulunkulu wa li nika uAbrahama ngesithembiso." 
Galatians3:19 Pho, umlayo uyini? Wengezwa ngenxa yeziphambeko, kuze kufike inzalo eyanikwa isithembiso; wamiswa ngezingilosi esandleni somlamuli." 
Galatians3:20 Kodwa umlamuli kayisuye woyedwa, kodwa uNkulunkulu munye." 
Galatians3:21 Pho umlayo uphambene lezithembiso zikaNkulunkulu yini? Phinde! Ngoba uba wawunikiwe umlayo olamandla okuphilisa, isibili ukulunga ngabe kuvela ngomlayo." 
Galatians3:22 Kodwa umbhalo uvalele konke ngaphansi kwesono, ukuze isithembiso esivela ngokholo lukaJesu Kristu siphiwe abakholwayo." 
Galatians3:23 Kodwa kungakafiki ukholo, sasilondolozwe ngaphansi komlayo sasivalelwe kuze kube sekholweni obeluzakwembulwa." 
Galatians3:24 Ngakho umlayo wawungumeluleki wethu kuKristu, ukuze silungisiswe ngokholo;" 
Galatians3:25 kodwa selufikile ukholo, kasisekho ngaphansi kukameluleki." 
Galatians3:26 Ngoba lonke lingabantwana bakaNkulunkulu ngokholo kuKristu Jesu. 
Galatians3:27 Ngoba lonke elabhabhathizelwa kuKristu, lembethe uKristu;" 
Galatians3:28 kakukho umJuda lomGriki, kakukho obotshiweyo lokhululekileyo, kakukho owesilisa lesifazana; ngoba lina lonke limunye kuKristu Jesu." 
Galatians3:29 Uba-ke lingabakaKristu, ngakho liyinzalo kaAbrahama, njalo liyizindlalifa njengokwesithembiso." 
Galatians4:1 Kodwa ngithi, ngaso sonke isikhathi indlalifa iseyingane, kayehlukananga ngalutho esigqilini lanxa ingumnikazi wakho konke;" 
Galatians4:2 kodwa ingaphansi kwabaphathi lababonisi, kuze kufike isikhathi esamiswa nguyise." 
Galatians4:3 Ngokunjalo lathi, lapho si se yizingane, sasiyizigqili ngaphansi kwemfundiso zakuqala zomhlaba;" 
Galatians4:4 kodwa kwathi ukuphelela kwesikhathi sekufikile, uNkulunkulu wathuma iNdodana yakhe, yenziwa ngowesifazana, yenziwa ngaphansi komthetho," 
Galatians4:5 ukuze ihlenge abangaphansi komlayo, ukuze semukele ukuma kwabantwana." 
Galatians4:6 Njengoba lingamadodana, uNkulunkulu wathuma uMoya weNdodana yakhe enhliziyweni zenu, ememeza esithi: Aba*, Baba!" 
Galatians4:7 Ngakho kawuseyiso isigqili, kodwa indodana; njalo uba uy indodana, futhi uy indlalifa kaNkulunkulu ngoKristu." 
Galatians4:8 Kodwa ngalesosikhathi, lingamazi uNkulunkulu, laliyizigqili kulabo abangeyisibo onkulunkulu ngemvelo;" 
Galatians4:9 kodwa khathesi lokhu selimazi uNkulunkulu, kodwa kangithi lisaziwa nguNkulunkulu, libuyela njani futhi kumfundiso zakuqala ezibuthakathaka leziyibuyanga, elifuna ukuba yizigqili zazo futhi butsha?" 
Galatians4:10 Ligcina izinsuku, lezinyanga lezikhathi, leminyaka." 
Galatians4:11 Ngilovalo ngani, hlezi ngitshikatshikele ize kini." 
Galatians4:12 Banini njengami, ngoba lami nginjengani, bazalwane, ngiyalincenga. Kalingonanga nga lutho;" 
Galatians4:13 liyazi-ke ukuthi ngobuthakathaka benyama ngatshumayela ivangeli kini ngokokuqala," 
Galatians4:14 lokulingwa kwami okwakusenyameni yami kalikudelelanga njalo kalikwenyanyanga, kodwa langemukela njengengilosi kaNkulunkulu, njengoKristu Jesu." 
Galatians4:15 Ngakho sasiyini isibusiso senu? Ngoba ngiyalifakazela ukuthi, uba kungenzeka, lalingakhupha amehlo enu linginike." 
Galatians4:16 Ngakho sengibeyisitha senu ngokulitshela iqiniso yini? 
Galatians4:17 Bayalitshisekela ngokungekuhle; kodwa bafuna ukulivalela ngaphandle, ukuze litshisekele bona." 
Galatians4:18 Kodwa kuhle ukuthi litshisekelelwe kokuhle isikhathi sonke, njalo kungabi sebukhoneni bami lani kuphela." 
Galatians4:19 Bantwana bami abancane, engilomhelo futhi wokulizala aze uKristu abunjwe kini," 
Galatians4:20 kodwa bengingathanda ukuba khona lani khathesi, ngiphendule ilizwi lami, ngoba ngididekile ngani." 
Galatians4:21 Ngitshelani, lina elithanda ukuba ngaphansi komlayo, kaliwuzwa yini umlayo?" 
Galatians4:22 Ngoba kulotshiwe ukuthi uAbrahama wayelamadodana amabili; enye ingeyesigqilikazi, lenye ingeyokhululekileyo." 
Galatians4:23 Kodwa eyesigqilikazi yazalwa ngokwenyama, kodwa eyokhululekileyo ngesithembiso." 
Galatians4:24 Okuyizinto ezingumfuziselo; ngoba laba bayizivumelwano ezimbili; esinye esentabeni iSinayi, esizalela ebugqilini, esinguAgari." 
Galatians4:25 Ngoba lokhu, uAgari, kuyintaba iSinayi eseArabhiya, njalo imele iJerusalema yalamuhla, futhi iyisigqili kanye labantwana bayo." 
Galatians4:26 Kodwa iJerusalema ephezulu ikhululekile, engumama wethu sonke;" 
Galatians4:27 ngoba kulotshiwe ukuthi: Thokoza, nyumba engazaliyo; kekela umemeze, wena ongawuzwanga umhelo; ngoba abantwana botshiyiweyo banengi okwedlula kakhulu kulaye olendoda." 
Galatians4:28 Kodwa thina, bazalwane, njengoIsaka singabantwana besithembiso." 
Galatians4:29 Kodwa njengakulesosikhathi owazalwa ngokwenyama wamzingela yena ongowokoMoya, kunjalo lakhathesi." 
Galatians4:30 Kodwa umbhalo uthini? Uthi: Xotsha isigqilikazi lendodana yaso; ngoba indodana yesigqilikazi kayisoze idle ilifa kanye lendodana yokhululekileyo. 
Galatians4:31 Ngakho, bazalwane, kasisibo abantwana besigqilikazi, kodwa bokhululekileyo." 
Galatians5:1 Ngakho manini liqine enkululekweni uKristu asikhulula ngayo, lingabuyi libotshelwe futhi ejogweni lobugqili." 
Galatians5:2 Khangelani, mina Pawuli ngithi kini, uba lisokwa, uKristu kayikulisiza ngalutho." 
Galatians5:3 Ngiyafakaza-ke futhi kumuntu wonke osokwayo, ukuthi ulomlandu wokwenza umlayo wonke." 
Galatians5:4 Likhutshiwe kuKristu, elilungisiswa ngomlayo; liwile emuseni." 
Galatians5:5 Ngoba thina ngoMoya silindele ngokholo ithemba lokulunga. 
Galatians5:6 Ngoba kuKristu Jesu ukusoka kumbe ukungasoki kakulamandla, kodwa ukholo olusebenza ngothando." 
Galatians5:7 Beligijima kuhle; ngubani olivimbele ukuthi lingalaleli iqiniso? 
Galatians5:8 Lokhukuhuga kakuveli kolibizayo. 
Galatians5:9 Imvubelo eyingcosana ibilisa inhlama yonke. 
Galatians5:10 Mina ngilethemba ngani eNkosini, ukuthi kaliyikunakana okwehlukeneyo; kodwa lowo olihluphayo uzathwala isigwebo, loba engubani." 
Galatians5:11 Kodwa mina, bazalwane, uba ngisatshumayela ukusoka, ngisazingelelwani? Ngakho isikhubekiso sesiphambano sisusiwe." 
Galatians5:12 Sengathi abalihluphayo bangazithena labo. 
Galatians5:13 Ngoba lina labizelwa enkululekweni, bazalwane; kuphela lingenzi inkululeko ibe lithuba enyameni, kodwa ngothando sizanani." 
Galatians5:14 Ngoba umlayo wonke ugcwaliseka elizwini linye, kulokhu ukuthi: Wothanda umakhelwane wakho njengalokhu uzi thanda wena." 
Galatians5:15 Kodwa uba lilumana lidlana, qaphelani ukuthi lingaqedwa omunye ngomunye." 
Galatians5:16 Kodwa ngithi: Hambani ngoMoya, lingagcwalisi lakanye inkanuko zenyama." 
Galatians5:17 Ngoba inyama ikhanuka okuphambene loMoya, loMoya okuphambene lenyama; njalo lezizinto ziphambene, ukuze lingenzi izinto elizifunayo." 
Galatians5:18 Kodwa uba likhokhelwa nguMoya, kalikho ngaphansi komlayo." 
Galatians5:19 Imisebenzi yenyama-ke isobala, eyi le: Ukufeba, ukuphinga, ukungcola, amanyala," 
Galatians5:20 ukukhonza izithombe, ukuthakatha, ubutha, inkani, umona, ulaka, ukubanga, ukuxabana, ukubhazuka," 
Galatians5:21 umhawu, ukubulala, ukudakwa, ukuminza, lezinye izinto ezinjalo; engilitshela ngakho ngaphambili, njengoba ngatsho futhi ngaphambili, ukuthi abenza izinto ezinje kabayikulidla ilifa lombuso kaNkulunkulu." 
Galatians5:22 Kodwa isithelo sikaMoya luthando, intokozo, ukuthula, ukubekezela, ububele, ukulunga, ukholo," 
Galatians5:23 ubumnene, ukuzithiba; kokunje kakulamlayo." 
Galatians5:24 Kodwa abakaKristu babethele inyama kanye lokuhugeka lezinkanuko. 
Galatians5:25 Uba siphila ngoMoya, njalo asihambe ngoMoya." 
Galatians5:26 Kasingazikhukhumezi, siqalane, sifelane umona." 
Galatians6:1 Bazalwane, uba-ke umuntu esehlelwa yisiphambeko esithile, lina abakaMoya mlungiseni onjalo ngomoya wobumnene, uziqaphele, hlezi lawe ulingwe." 
Galatians6:2 Thwalisanani imithwalo yenu, langokunjalo gcwalisani umlayo kaKristu." 
Galatians6:3 Ngoba uba umuntu ezitsho ukuthi uyilutho, engesilutho, uyazikhohlisa;" 
Galatians6:4 kodwa ngulowo lalowo kahlole owakhe umsebenzi, khona-ke ezakuba lokuzincoma ngokungokwakhe yedwa, njalo kungabi ngokomunye." 
Galatians6:5 Ngoba ngulowo lalowo uzathwala owakhe umthwalo. 
Galatians6:6 Lofundiswayo ilizwi kahlanganyele ezintweni zonke ezinhle lalowo ofundisayo. 
Galatians6:7 Lingakhohliswa, uNkulunkulu kahlekwa usulu; ngoba loba yini ayihlanyelayo umuntu yiyo leyo azayivuna." 
Galatians6:8 Ngoba ohlanyela kweyakhe inyama, uzavuna ukubhubha enyameni; kodwa ohlanyela kuMoya uzavuna impilo elaphakade okuvela kuMoya." 
Galatians6:9 Kodwa kasingadinwa ekwenzeni okuhle; ngoba ngesikhathi esifaneleyo sizavuna, uba singadinwanga." 
Galatians6:10 Ngakho-ke njengoba silethuba, asenze okuhle kibo bonke, kodwa ikakhulu kwabendlu yokholo." 
Galatians6:11 Bonani amabala amakhulu kangaka engilibhalela ngawo ngesami isandla. 
Galatians6:12 Bonke abafuna ukubukeka enyameni, yibo abalicindezela ukuthi lisokwe, kuphela ukuze bangazingelwa ngenxa yesiphambano sikaKristu." 
Galatians6:13 Ngoba ngitsho lalabo abasokwayo kabawugcini umlayo, kodwa bafuna ukuthi lisokwe, ukuze bazincome enyameni yenu." 
Galatians6:14 Kodwa kimi kakungabi khona ukuzincoma ngaphandle kwesiphambanweni seNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu, okubethelwe ngaso umhlaba kimi, lami kuwo umhlaba." 
Galatians6:15 Ngoba kuKristu Jesu ukusoka kumbe ukungasoki kakulamandla, kodwa isidalwa esitsha." 
Galatians6:16 Njalo bonke abazahamba ngalesisimiso, ukuthula kakube phezu kwabo, lesihawu, laphezu kukaIsrayeli kaNkulunkulu." 
Galatians6:17 Kusukela khathesi, kakungabi lamuntu ongihluphayo; ngoba mina ngithwele emzimbeni wami impawu zeNkosi uJesu." 
Galatians6:18 Umusa weNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu kawube lomoya wenu, bazalwane. Ameni." 
Ephesians1:1 UPawuli, umphostoli kaJesu Kristu ngentando kaNkulunkulu, kubo abangcwele abaseEfesu, labathembekileyo kuKristu Jesu:" 
Ephesians1:2 Umusa kawube kini lokuthula okuvela kuNkulunkulu uBaba wethu leNkosini uJesu Kristu. 
Ephesians1:3 Ubusisiwe uNkulunkulu loYise weNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu, osibusisileyo ngaso sonke isibusiso somoya ezintweni zezulwini kuKristu;" 
Ephesians1:4 njengoba wasikhetha kuye ngaphambi kokusekelwa komhlaba, ukuthi sibe ngcwele, njalo singasoleki phambi kwakhe ethandweni," 
Ephesians1:5 esesimisele ngaphambili ekumeni kwabantwana kuye ngoJesu Kristu, njengokufisa okuhle kwentando yakhe," 
Ephesians1:6 kube ludumo lobukhosi bomusa wakhe, asiphe ngawo umusa koThandiweyo;" 
Ephesians1:7 esilohlengo kuye ngegazi lakhe, uthethelelo lweziphambeko, njengokwenotho yomusa wakhe," 
Ephesians1:8 awengezelele kithi kuyo yonke inhlakanipho lokuqonda," 
Ephesians1:9 esesazisile imfihlo yentando yakhe, njengokufisa kwakhe okuhle, akumisa kuye ngokwakhe," 
Ephesians1:10 ukuze, ekuphatheni kokugcwaliseka kwezikhathi, ahlanganise ndawonye izinto zonke kuKristu, zombili ezisemazulwini lezisemhlabeni;" 
Ephesians1:11 ngitsho kuye, lathi esabelwa ilifa kuye, esamiselwa ngaphambili njengokwesimiso sakhe owenzayo izinto zonke njengokwecebo lentando yakhe," 
Ephesians1:12 ukuze sibe ngabodumo lobukhosi bakhe, esathemba kuKristu kuqala;" 
Ephesians1:13 eseli themba kuye lani, selizwile ilizwi leqiniso, ivangeli losindiso lwenu, kuye selikholiwe lani laphawulwa nguMoya oNgcwele wesithembiso," 
Ephesians1:14 oyisibambiso selifa lethu, ehlengweni lokuzuziweyo, kudumo lobukhosi bakhe." 
Ephesians1:15 Ngenxa yalokho lami sengizwile ngokholo lwenu eNkosini uJesu lothando kubo bonke abangcwele," 
Ephesians1:16 kangiyekeli ukulibongela, ngiliphatha emikhulekweni yami;" 
Ephesians1:17 ukuze uNkulunkulu weNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu, uYise wodumo, alinike umoya wenhlakanipho lowesembulo elwazini lwakhe;" 
Ephesians1:18 amehlo engqondo yenu akhanyiswe, ukuze lazi ukuthi liyini ithemba lobizo lwakhe, lokuthi iyini inotho yodumo lwelifa lakhe kwabangcwele," 
Ephesians1:19 lokuthi buyini ubukhulu bamandla akhe obudlula amalawulo kithi esikholwa njengokusebenza kobuninimandla bamandla akhe," 
Ephesians1:20 awasebenzisa kuKristu, ngokumvusa kwabafileyo, njalo e m hlalisa ngakwesokunene sakhe e ndaw eni zezulu," 
Ephesians1:21 engqongeni yakho konke ukubusa lobukhulu lamandla lobukhosi, lebizo lonke elibizwayo, kungeyisikho kulesisikhathi kuphela, kodwa lakwesizayo;" 
Ephesians1:22 wasebeka konke ngaphansi kwenyawo zakhe, wamnikela ukuba yinhloko phezu kwakho konke kulo ibandla," 
Ephesians1:23 elingumzimba wakhe, ukugcwala kwalowo ogcwalisa konke kukho konke." 
Ephesians2:1 Lina-ke walivusa elalifile ngeziphambeko langezono," 
Ephesians2:2 elalikade lihamba kuzo njengokwendlela yalumhlaba, njengokombusi wamandla omkhathi, awomoya osebenzayo khathesi phakathi kwabantwana bokungalaleli;" 
Ephesians2:3 lathi sonke esake sahamba phakathi kwabo enkanukweni zenyama yethu, sisenza intando zenyama lezemicabango, njalo ngokwemvelo sasingabantwana bolaka, njengabanye labo;" 
Ephesians2:4 kodwa uNkulunkulu, enothile esihawini, ngenxa yothando lwakhe olukhulu asithanda ngalo," 
Ephesians2:5 lanxa sasifile ngeziphambeko, wa si philisa kanye loKristu (ngomusa lisindisiwe)" 
Ephesians2:6 njalo wa si vusa kanye la ye, wase si hlalisa kanye la ye endaweni zezulwini kuKristu Jesu;" 
Ephesians2:7 ukuze abonakalise ezikhathini ezizayo inotho yomusa wakhe edlula amalawulo ngobubele kithi kuKristu Jesu; 
Ephesians2:8 ngoba ngomusa lisindisiwe ngokholo, lalokhu kakuveli kini; yisipho sikaNkulunkulu;" 
Ephesians2:9 ka ku veli emisebenzini, ukuze kungabi khona ozincomayo." 
Ephesians2:10 Ngoba singumsebenzi wakhe, kuKristu Jesu sadalelwa imisebenzi emihle, uNkulunkulu ayilungisela ngaphambili, ukuze sihambe kiyo." 
Ephesians2:11 Ngakho khumbulani ukuthi lina lake laba ngabezizwe enyameni, ababizwa ngokuthi yikungasoki ngalokhu okuthiwa yikusoka enyameni okwenziwe ngezandla," 
Ephesians2:12 ukuthi ngalesosikhathi lalingelaye uKristu, abemzini kubusakhamuzi bakoIsrayeli, njalo abezizwe kuzivumelwano zesithembiso, lalingelathemba, njalo lingelaye uNkulunkulu emhlabeni." 
Ephesians2:13 Kodwa khathesi-ke kuKristu Jesu lina elalikade likhatshana, seliseduze ngegazi likaKristu." 
Ephesians2:14 Ngoba yena uyikuthula kwethu, owenza kokubili kwaba kunye, lowabhidliza umduli ophakathi owesehlukaniso," 
Ephesians2:15 echithile ubutha enyameni yakhe, umlayo wemithetho ezimisweni, ukuze kuye labo ababili abadale babe ngumuntu munye omutsha, enze ukuthula," 
Ephesians2:16 njalo enze ukuthi bobabili babuyisane loNkulunkulu emzimbeni munye ngesiphambano, esebulele ubutha ngaso;" 
Ephesians2:17 njalo weza watshumayela ukuthula kini elalikhatshana, lakulabo ababeseduze;" 
Ephesians2:18 ngoba ngaye sobabili silokungena ngoMoya munye kuBaba. 
Ephesians2:19 Ngakho-ke kaliseyibo abemzini lezihambi, kodwa izakhamizi kanye labangcwele njalo abendlu kaNkulunkulu," 
Ephesians2:20 lakhiwe phezu kwesisekelo sabaphostoli labaprofethi, uJesu Kristu uqobo eyilitshe eliyinhloko yengonsi," 
Ephesians2:21 okuhlanganiselwe kuye isakhiwo sonke sikhule sibe lithempeli elingcwele eNkosini," 
Ephesians2:22 elakhiwa kuye lani kanye la banye libe yindlu yokuhlala kaNkulunkulu kuMoya. 
Ephesians3:1 Ngenxa yalokhu mina Pawuli, isibotshwa sikaKristu Jesu ngani abezizwe," 
Ephesians3:2 uba kambe selizwile ngokuphathwa komusa kaNkulunkulu engawuphiwelwa lina," 
Ephesians3:3 ukuthi njengesambulelo wangazisa imfihlo, njengalokhu ngabhala ngaphambili ngamafitshane," 
Ephesians3:4 okungalokhu, nxa lifunda, lingazi ulwazi lwami emfihlweni kaKristu;" 
Ephesians3:5 yona engaziswanga ezizukulwaneni ezinye ebantwaneni babantu, njengalokhu isiyembuliwe khathesi kubaphostoli bakhe abangcwele labaprofethi ngoMoya;" 
Ephesians3:6 ukuthi abezizwe babe yizindlalifa abahlanganyeli lomzimba ofananayo labahlanganyeli besithembiso sakhe kuKristu, ngevangeli," 
Ephesians3:7 engenziwa ngalo isikhonzi njengokwesipho somusa kaNkulunkulu engiwuphiwe ngokusebenza kwamandla akhe. 
Ephesians3:8 Kimi, engimncinyane kulomncinyane wabo bonke abangcwele, lowomusa ngawuphiwa, ukuthi ngitshumayele kwabezizwe ivangeli lenotho kaKristu engelakulinganiswa," 
Ephesians3:9 lokukhanyisela bonke ukuthi buyini ubudlelwano bemfihlo ebifihliwe kusukela endulo kuNkulunkulu owadala izinto zonke ngoJesu Kristu," 
Ephesians3:10 ukuze khathesi emibusweni lemandleni e ndaw eni zezulu yaziswe libandla inhlakanipho kaNkulunkulu ezinhlobonhlobo," 
Ephesians3:11 njengokwecebo laphakade alenza ngoKristu Jesu iNkosi yethu; 
Ephesians3:12 esilesibindi kuye lokungena ngethemba, ngokholo lwakhe." 
Ephesians3:13 Ngakho ngiyacela ukuthi lingalahli ithemba enhluphekweni zami ngani, eziludumo lwenu." 
Ephesians3:14 Ngenxa yalokhu ngiguqa ngamadolo kuYise weNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu," 
Ephesians3:15 okubizwa ngaye usendo lonke olusemazulwini lolusemhlabeni," 
Ephesians3:16 ukuze alinike, njengokwenotho yobukhosi bakhe, liqiniswe ngamandla ngoMoya wakhe emuntwini ongaphakathi," 
Ephesians3:17 ukuze uKristu ahlale ngokholo enhliziyweni zenu; ligxilile lisekelwe ethandweni," 
Ephesians3:18 ukuze libe lamandla sibili okuqedisisa kanye labo bonke abangcwele, ukuthi kuyini ububanzi lobude lokutshona lokuphakama," 
Ephesians3:19 lokwazi uthando lukaKristu olwedlula ulwazi, ukuze ligcwaliswe ngokugcwala konke kukaNkulunkulu." 
Ephesians3:20 Njalo kuye, olamandla phezu kwakho konke okwenza okwedlula ngokwengezelelweyo kwesikucelayo kumbe esikunakanayo, njengamandla asebenza kithi," 
Ephesians3:21 kuye kakube udumo ebandleni kuKristu Jesu, ezizukulwaneni zonke zaphakade laphakade. Ameni." 
Ephesians4:1 Ngakho ngiyalincenga, mina isibotshwa eNkosini, ukuthi lihambe ngokufanele ubizo elabizwa ngalo," 
Ephesians4:2 kanye lokuthobeka konke lobumnene, lokubekezela, libekezelelane ethandweni," 
Ephesians4:3 likhuthale ukugcina ukuhlangana koMoya ngesibopho sokuthula. 
Ephesians4:4 Munye umzimba njalo munye uMoya, njengalokhu lani labizwa ethembeni linye lobizo lwenu;" 
Ephesians4:5 yinye iNkosi, lunye ukholo, lunye ubhabhathizo," 
Ephesians4:6 munye uNkulunkulu loYise wabo bonke, ophezu kwabo bonke, langabo bonke, lakini lonke." 
Ephesians4:7 Kodwa ngulowo lalowo wethu waphiwa umusa njengokwesilinganiso sesipho sikaKristu. 
Ephesians4:8 Ngakho uthi: Ekwenyukeleni kwakhe phezulu wathumba ukuthunjwa, wanika abantu izipho." 
Ephesians4:9 Lokhu-ke ukuthi: Wenyuka, kuyini ngaphandle kokuthi laye wehlela kuqala kungxenye ezingaphansi zomhlaba?" 
Ephesians4:10 Owehlayo, nguye owenyukela futhi khatshana ngaphezulu kwamazulu wonke, ukuze agcwalise izinto zonke." 
Ephesians4:11 Yena wasenika abanye babe ngabaphostoli, labanye babe ngabaprofethi, labanye babe ngabavangeli, labanye babe ngabelusi labafundisi," 
Ephesians4:12 ekuphelelisweni kwabangcwele, emsebenzini wenkonzo, ekwakhiweni komzimba kaKristu;" 
Ephesians4:13 size sifike sonke ebunyeni bokholo, lobolwazi lweNdodana kaNkulunkulu, endodeni epheleleyo, esilinganisweni sesimo sokugcwala kukaKristu;" 
Ephesians4:14 ukuze singabe sisaba zinsane, ezizuliswa ngamagagasi njalo ezithwalelwa le lale yiwo wonke umoya wemfundiso, ngenkohliso yabantu, ngobuqili becebo lokuphambuka;" 
Ephesians4:15 kodwa sikhulume iqiniso ethandweni sikhule kukho konke kuye, oyinhloko, uKristu," 
Ephesians4:16 okuvela kuye umzimba wonke, ohlanganiswe kuhle njalo ubambene, ngokwelekelelana kwalo lonke ilunga, njengokusebenza esilinganisweni saleso laleso isitho, wenza ukukhula komzimba ekuzakheni kwawo ethandweni." 
Ephesians4:17 Ngakho ngitsho lokho ngifakaza eNkosini, ukuthi lingabe lisahamba lanjengabanye abezizwe behamba ebuzeni bengqondo yabo," 
Ephesians4:18 befiphaziwe engqondweni, benziwe abemzini empilweni kaNkulunkulu ngokungazi okukibo, ngobulukhuni benhliziyo yabo;" 
Ephesians4:19 abathi sebentunyile, bazinikela emanyaleni, ekwenzeni kokungcola konke ngomhawu." 
Ephesians4:20 Kodwa lina kalimfundanga ngokunjalo uKristu," 
Ephesians4:21 uba-ke limzwile lafundiswa kuye, njengoba iqiniso likuJesu;" 
Ephesians4:22 ukuthi lilahle, mayelana lohambo lokuqala, umuntu omdala, owonakaliswa yizifiso zenkohliso;" 
Ephesians4:23 njalo lenziwe batsha emoyeni wengqondo yenu," 
Ephesians4:24 njalo lembathe umuntu omutsha, odalwe njengokukaNkulunkulu ekulungeni lebungcweleni beqiniso." 
Ephesians4:25 Ngakho lilahla amanga, khulumani iqiniso ngulowo lalowo lomakhelwane wakhe; ngoba siyizitho omunye komunye." 
Ephesians4:26 Thukuthelani lingoni; ilanga kalingatshoni phezu kolaka lwenu; 
Ephesians4:27 futhi lingamniki indawo uSathane. 
Ephesians4:28 Owebayo kangabe eseba; kodwa kulalokhu kakhuthale, asebenze okuhle ngezandla zakhe, ukuze abe lakho ukwabela olenswelo." 
Ephesians4:29 Kakungaphumi emlonyeni wenu lalinye ilizwi elibolileyo, kodwa kuphela okuhle okulungele ukwakha njengokufaneleyo, ukuze kunike umusa kubo abezwayo." 
Ephesians4:30 Njalo lingamdabukisi uMoya oyiNgcwele kaNkulunkulu, elaphawulwa ngaye kuze kube lusuku lohlengo." 
Ephesians4:31 Konke ukubaba lentukuthelo lolaka lomsindo lokunyeya kakususwe kini, kanye layo yonke inzondo;" 
Ephesians4:32 kodwa libe mnene omunye komunye, lilesihawu, lithethelelane, njengalokhu uNkulunkulu laye walithethelela kuKristu." 
Ephesians5:1 Ngakho banini ngabalandeli bakaNkulunkulu, njengabantwana abathandekayo;" 
Ephesians5:2 njalo lihambe ethandweni, njengalokhu uKristu laye wasithanda, wazinikelela thina abe ngumnikelo lomhlatshelo kuNkulunkulu ukuba luqhatshi olumnandi." 
Ephesians5:3 Kodwa ubufebe lakho konke ukungcola kumbe umhawu kakungaphathwa lakanye phakathi kwenu, njengoba kufanele abangcwele;" 
Ephesians5:4 lamanyala, lokukhuluma okuyize, kumbe ukusoma okulenhlamba, okuy izinto ezingafanelanga; kodwa kulalokhu ukubonga." 
Ephesians5:5 Ngoba lokhu liyakwazi, ukuthi sonke isifebe, kumbe ongcolileyo, kumbe olomhawu, ongumkhonzi wezithombe, kalalifa embusweni kaKristu lokaNkulunkulu." 
Ephesians5:6 Kakungabi lamuntu olikhohlisayo ngamazwi ayize; ngoba ngenxa yalezizinto ulaka lukaNkulunkulu luyehlela phezu kwabantwana bokungalaleli. 
Ephesians5:7 Ngakho lingabi ngabahlanganyeli labo. 
Ephesians5:8 Ngoba lake laba ngumnyama, kodwa khathesi liyi kukhanya eNkosini; hambani njengabantwana bokukhanya," 
Ephesians5:9 ngoba isithelo sikaMoya sikubo bonke ubuhle lokulunga leqiniso," 
Ephesians5:10 lihlolisise okuthokozisayo eNkosini; 
Ephesians5:11 njalo lingahlanganyeli lemisebenzi yobumnyama engelazithelo, kodwa-ke kulalokho solani;" 
Ephesians5:12 ngoba izinto ezenziwa yibo ekusithekeni kuthelela inhloni ngitsho ukukhuluma ngazo. 
Ephesians5:13 Kodwa konke okusolwayo yikukhanya kuyabonakaliswa; ngoba konke okubonakaliswayo kuyikukhanya," 
Ephesians5:14 ngakho uthi: Phaphama wena oleleyo uvuke kwabafileyo, njalo uKristu uzakukhanyisela." 
Ephesians5:15 Ngakho qaphelani ukuthi lihamba njani ngonanzelelo, kungabi njengezithutha, kodwa njengabahlakaniphileyo," 
Ephesians5:16 lihlenga isikhathi, ngoba insuku zimbi." 
Ephesians5:17 Ngakho lingabi yizithutha, kodwa liqedisisa okuyintando yeNkosi." 
Ephesians5:18 Njalo lingadakwa liwayini, okukulo umsindo, kodwa gcwaliswani nguMoya," 
Ephesians5:19 likhulumisana ngezihlabelelo langamahubo okudumisa langezingoma zomoya, lihlabelele licule eNkosini enhliziyweni yenu," 
Ephesians5:20 limbonga njalo uNkulunkulu loBaba ngazo zonke izinto ebizweni leNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu," 
Ephesians5:21 lizehlisela ngaphansi omunye komunye ekumesabeni uNkulunkulu. 
Ephesians5:22 Bafazi, zehliseleni ngaphansi kwawenu amadoda, njengeNkosini," 
Ephesians5:23 ngoba indoda iyinhloko yomfazi, njengoba uKristu laye eyinhloko yebandla, njalo yena unguMsindisi womzimba." 
Ephesians5:24 Kodwa njengoba-ke ibandla lehliselwe ngaphansi kukaKristu, ngokunjalo labafazi kwawabo amadoda kuyo yonke into." 
Ephesians5:25 Madoda, thandani abenu abafazi, njengoKristu laye walithanda ibandla, wasezinikelela lona;" 
Ephesians5:26 ukuze azingcwelisele lona, ese li hlambulule ngesihlambo samanzi ngelizwi," 
Ephesians5:27 ukuze azimisele lona lilenkazimulo, ibandla elingelachatha, kumbe umxhele kumbe okunye nje, kodwa ukuze libe ngcwele lingelacala." 
Ephesians5:28 Ngokunjalo amadoda afanele ukuthanda abawo abafazi njengeyawo imizimba. Othanda owakhe umfazi, uyazithanda yena;" 
Ephesians5:29 ngoba kakho owake wazonda eyakhe inyama, kodwa uya y ondla ayiphathe kuhle, njengalokhu leNkosi isenza ku bandla;" 
Ephesians5:30 ngoba siyizitho zomzimba wakhe, okwenyama yakhe lokwamathambo akhe." 
Ephesians5:31 Ngenxa yalokhu umuntu uzatshiya uyise lonina uzanamathela kumkakhe, njalo laba ababili bazakuba nyamanye." 
Ephesians5:32 Inkulu le imfihlo; kodwa mina ngikhuluma ngoKristu lebandla. 
Ephesians5:33 Ngalokho lonke ngokukhethekileyo lani-ke, ngulowo lalowo kathande ngokunjalo owakhe umfazi njengaye; lomfazi ukuze ahloniphe indoda." 
Ephesians6:1 Bantwana, lalelani abazali benu eNkosini; ngoba lokhu kulungile." 
Ephesians6:2 Hlonipha uyihlo lonyoko, okungumlayo wokuqala olesithembiso," 
Ephesians6:3 ukuze kube kuhle kuwe, njalo uphile isikhathi eside emhlabeni." 
Ephesians6:4 Lani bobaba, lingabathukuthelisi abantwana benu, kodwa libondle emlayweni lemfundisweni yeNkosi." 
Ephesians6:5 Zisebenzi, lalelani amakhosi enu ngokwenyama, ngokwesaba langokuthuthumela, ebuqothweni benhliziyo zenu, njengakuKristu;" 
Ephesians6:6 kungeyisikho njengokukhonza amehlo njengabathokozisa abantu, kodwa njengezisebenzi zikaKristu, zisenza intando kaNkulunkulu ngenhliziyo," 
Ephesians6:7 lisebenza ngenhliziyo enhle kungathi kuseNkosini njalo kungeyisikho kubantu; 
Ephesians6:8 lisazi ukuthi loba yini enhle ngulowo lalowo angayenza, okunjalo uzakwemukela eNkosini, loba eyisigqili, loba engokhululekileyo." 
Ephesians6:9 Lani makhosi, yenzani izinto ezifananayo kuzo, liyekele ukuzisongela; lisazi ukuthi leyenu iNkosi isemazulwini, njalo ukubandlulula umuntu kakukho kuyo." 
Ephesians6:10 Elokucina, bazalwane bami, qinani eNkosini, lebuninimandleni bamandla ayo." 
Ephesians6:11 Hlomani izikhali zonke zikaNkulunkulu, ukuze libe lamandla okumelana lobuqili bukaSathane;" 
Ephesians6:12 ngoba kasibindani legazi lenyama, kodwa lemibuso, lamandla, lababusi balumhlaba wobumnyama balesisikhathi, labomoya ababi e ndaw eni zezulu." 
Ephesians6:13 Ngakho hlomani izikhali zonke zikaNkulunkulu, ukuze libe lamandla okugxila esukwini olubi, lokuze kuthi lapho seliqede konke lime." 
Ephesians6:14 Ngakho manini, inkalo zenu zibotshiwe ngeqiniso, lifakile isivikelo sesifuba sokulunga," 
Ephesians6:15 njalo ligqokise inyawo zenu ngokulunga kwevangeli lokuthula; 
Ephesians6:16 phezu kwakho konke selithethe isihlangu sokholo, elizakuba lamandla okucitsha ngaso yonke imitshoko evuthayo yomubi." 
Ephesians6:17 Njalo thathani ikhowa losindiso, lenkemba kaMoya, eyilizwi likaNkulunkulu," 
Ephesians6:18 ngawo wonke umkhuleko lonxuso likhuleka isikhathi sonke kuMoya, lakulokhu lilinde ngesineke sonke lonxuso ngabangcwele bonke," 
Ephesians6:19 langami, ukuze ngiphiwe ilizwi ekuvuleni umlomo wami ngesibindi ukuze ngazise imfihlo yevangeli," 
Ephesians6:20 engiyisithunywa ngalo esisemaketaneni, ukuze ngikhulume ngesibindi kulo, njengoba kungifanele ukuthi ngikhulume." 
Ephesians6:21 Kodwa ukuze lani lazi izinto eziqondana lami, engikwenzayo, uzalitshela konke uTikiko umzalwane othandekayo lesikhonzi esithembekileyo eNkosini;" 
Ephesians6:22 engimthuma kini ngakhona lokhu, ukuze lazi izinto eziqondana lathi, lokuthi aduduze inhliziyo zenu." 
Ephesians6:23 Ukuthula kakube kubazalwane, lothando kanye lokholo oluvela kuNkulunkulu uBaba leNkosini uJesu Kristu." 
Ephesians6:24 Umusa kawube kubo bonke abathanda iNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu ngokungonakaliyo. Ameni. 
Philippians1:1 UPawuli loTimothi, izinceku zikaJesu Kristu, kubo bonke abangcwele kuKristu Jesu abaseFiliphi, kanye lababonisi labadikoni:" 
Philippians1:2 Umusa kawube kini lokuthula okuvela kuNkulunkulu uBaba wethu leNkosini uJesu Kristu. 
Philippians1:3 Ngiyambonga uNkulunkulu wami ekulikhumbuleni konke," 
Philippians1:4 ngezikhathi zonke kuwo wonke umkhuleko wami ngani lonke ngenza umkhuleko ngentokozo," 
Philippians1:5 ngokuhlanganyela kwenu evangelini, kusukela esukwini lokuqala kuze kube khathesi;" 
Philippians1:6 ngithemba khona lokhu, ukuthi owaqalisa umsebenzi omuhle kini uza wu phelelisa kuze kube sesukwini lukaJesu Kristu;" 
Philippians1:7 njengoba kulungile kimi ukuthi ngikhumbule lokhu ngani lonke, ngoba ngilani enhliziyweni, ukuthi lekubotshweni kwami, l e kuvikel eni l e kuqinisel eni ivangeli, lina lonke lingabahlanganyeli bomusa wami." 
Philippians1:8 Ngoba uNkulunkulu ungumfakazi wami, wokuthi ngililangatha kangakanani lonke emibilini kaJesu Kristu." 
Philippians1:9 Njalo ngikhuleka lokhu, ukuthi uthando lwenu luvame-ke lusanda ngokwanda elwazini lekuqedisiseni konke," 
Philippians1:10 ukuze lizivume izinto ezinhle kakhulu, ukuze lihlambuluke lingasoleki kuze kube sesukwini lukaKristu," 
Philippians1:11 ligcwaliswe ngezithelo zokulunga ezingoJesu Kristu, ebukhosini lodumo lukaNkulunkulu." 
Philippians1:12 Kodwa ngithanda ukuthi lazi, bazalwane, ukuthi izinto ezangehlelayo zenza kakhulu ukuqhutshelwa phambili kwevangeli;" 
Philippians1:13 zize izibopho zami kuKristu zibonakale esigodlweni sonke lakwabanye bonke," 
Philippians1:14 labazalwane abanengi eNkosini, beqiniswe ngezibopho zami, sebelesibindi esikhulu sokukhuluma ilizwi ngokungesabi." 
Philippians1:15 Abanye kambe batshumayela uKristu ngomona langombango, kodwa abanye kambe ngenhliziyo enhle;" 
Philippians1:16 laba batshumayela uKristu ngokuphikisana, bengelaqiniso, bekhumbula ukuthi baletha ukuhlupheka ekubotshweni kwami;" 
Philippians1:17 kodwa labo ngothando, besazi ukuthi ngimiselwe ukuvikela ivangeli." 
Philippians1:18 Kuyini pho? Loba kunjalo kuyo yonke indlela, loba ekuzenziseni, kumbe eqinisweni, uKristu uyatshunyayelwa; kulokhu-ke ngiyathokoza, yebo ngizathokoza futhi." 
Philippians1:19 Ngoba ngiyazi ukuthi lokhu kuzaphendukela kimi esindisweni ngomkhuleko wenu, langokwelekelela kukaMoya kaJesu Kristu," 
Philippians1:20 njengokulindela okukhulu lethemba lami, ukuthi kangiyikuyangiswa ngalutho, kodwa ngesibindi sonke, njengesikhathi sonke, lakhathesi uKristu uzakhuliswa emzimbeni wami, loba ngempilo, kumbe ngokufa." 
Philippians1:21 Ngoba kimi ukuphila kunguKristu, lokufa yinzuzo." 
Philippians1:22 Kodwa uba ukuphila enyameni kuyisithelo somsebenzi kimi, lengizakukhetha kangikwazi." 
Philippians1:23 Ngoba ngiminyezelwe ngokubili; ngilesifiso sokusuka lokuba loKristu, okungcono kakhulukazi;" 
Philippians1:24 kodwa ukuhlala enyameni kuyasweleka kakhulu ngenxa yenu. 
Philippians1:25 Lalokhu ngithemba ngiyazi ukuthi ngizakuba khona, ngihlale lani lonke, ekuqhubekeni kwenu lentokozweni yokholo," 
Philippians1:26 ukuze ukuzincoma kwenu ngami kwengezwe kuKristu Jesu kimi, ngobukhona bami kini futhi." 
Philippians1:27 Kuphela hambani ngokufanele ivangeli likaKristu, kuze kuthi, loba ngifika ngilibona, loba ngingekho, ngizwe indaba zenu, zokuthi limi emoyeni munye, ngengqondonye lilwela ukholo lwevangeli ndawonye," 
Philippians1:28 njalo lingethuswa ngalutho ngabaphikisayo; okuyisibonakaliso kibo sokubhubha, kodwa kini sosindiso, njalo lokhu kuvela kuNkulunkulu;" 
Philippians1:29 ngoba lanikwa ngesihle esikhundleni sikaKristu, kungeyisikho ukukholwa kuye kuphela, kodwa lokumhluphekela;" 
Philippians1:30 lilokulwa okufananayo njengalokho elakubona kimi, lelikuzwa kimi khathesi." 
Philippians2:1 Ngakho uba kukhona inkuthazo kuKristu, uba kukhona induduzo yothando, uba kukhona ukuhlanganyela kukaMoya, uba kukhona imihelo lesihawu," 
Philippians2:2 gcwalisani intokozo yami, ukuze libe ngqondonye, libe lothando olufananayo, libe lenhliziyonye, ukuqonda kunye;" 
Philippians2:3 li ng enz i lutho ngokubangisana kumbe ngokuziqhenya, kodwa ngokuthobeka liphakamise omunye komunye ngcono kulani;" 
Philippians2:4 ngulowo lalowo angakhathaleli okwakhe, kodwa ngulowo lalowo lokwabanye." 
Philippians2:5 Ngoba kawube kini lowomqondo owawukhona lakuKristu Jesu; 
Philippians2:6 owathi esesimeni sikaNkulunkulu, kanakananga ukuthi kuyikuphanga ukulingana loNkulunkulu," 
Philippians2:7 kodwa wazidela, ethatha isimo senceku, enziwe esimeni sabantu;" 
Philippians2:8 njalo eficwe elesimo njengomuntu, wazithoba, waba ngolalelayo kwaze kwaba sekufeni, yebo ukufa kwesiphambano." 
Philippians2:9 Ngakho laye uNkulunkulu wamphakamisa kakhulu, wamnika ibizo eliphezu kwalo lonke ibizo;" 
Philippians2:10 ukuze kuthi ebizweni likaJesu lonke idolo liguqe, elabezulwini, lelabemhlabeni, lelabangaphansi komhlaba," 
Philippians2:11 lenlimi zonke zivume ukuthi uJesu Kristu uyiNkosi, kube ludumo kuNkulunkulu uYise." 
Philippians2:12 Ngakho, bathandiweyo bami, njengalokho lilalela ngezikhathi zonke, kungenjengebukhoneni bami kuphela, kodwa khathesi ikakhulukazi ngingekho, phelelisani usindiso lwenu ngokwesaba langokuthuthumela;" 
Philippians2:13 ngoba kunguNkulunkulu osebenza kini kokubili ukuthanda lokwenza njengentando yakhe enhle. 
Philippians2:14 Yenzani zonke izinto kungelakusola lokuphikisana," 
Philippians2:15 ukuze lingasoleki libe msulwa, abantwana bakaNkulunkulu abangelasici phakathi kwesizukulwana esigobileyo lesiphambeneyo, elikhanya phakathi kwaso njengokukhanya emhlabeni," 
Philippians2:16 libonakalise ilizwi lempilo, ekuzincomeni kwami esukwini lukaKristu, ukuthi kangigijimelanga ize, njalo kangitshikatshikelanga ize." 
Philippians2:17 Yebo, uba lami ngithululwa njengomnikelo wokunathwayo phezu komhlatshelo lenkonzo yokholo lwenu, ngiyathokoza njalo ngithokoza kanye lani lonke;" 
Philippians2:18 ngenxa yalokho-ke thokozani lani njalo lithokoze kanye lami. 
Philippians2:19 Ngiyathemba-ke eNkosini uJesu ukuthuma uTimothi kini masinyane, ukuze lami ngithokoze ngokwazi indaba zenu." 
Philippians2:20 Ngoba kangilaye olengqondo enjengeyakhe, ozananzelela indaba zenu ngobuqotho," 
Philippians2:21 ngoba bonke bazidingela okwabo, kungeyisikho okukaKristu Jesu." 
Philippians2:22 Kodwa liyazi ukuqinisa kwakhe, ukuthi njengomntwana kuyise, usebenzile lami evangelini." 
Philippians2:23 Ngiyathemba-ke ukuhle ngimthume yena, nxa sengibonisisile okuqondene lami;" 
Philippians2:24 kodwa ngiyathemba eNkosini, ukuthi lami ngizakuza kini masinyane." 
Philippians2:25 Kodwa ngibone kufanele ukuthi ngithume kini uEpafrodithu, umzalwane lesisebenzi lolibutho kanye lami, kodwa isithunywa senu, lesisebenzi sokuswela kwami;" 
Philippians2:26 njengoba wayelilangatha lonke, njalo ekhathazekile kakhulu, ngoba lezwa ukuthi wayegula;" 
Philippians2:27 ngoba njalo wagula waphosa wafa, kodwa uNkulunkulu wamhawukela, njalo kungeyisuye yena yedwa, kodwa lami, ukuze ngingabi losizi phezu kosizi." 
Philippians2:28 Ngakho ngitshisekela kakhulu ukumthuma, ukuze kuthi, nxa limbona, lithokoze futhi, losizi lwami lunciphe." 
Philippians2:29 Memukeleni-ke eNkosini ngentokozo yonke, libahloniphe abanjalo-ke;" 
Philippians2:30 ngoba ngenxa yomsebenzi kaKristu waphose wafa, edela impilo, ukuze aphelelise okusileleyo komsebenzi wenu kimi." 
Philippians3:1 Elokucina, bazalwane bami, thokozani eNkosini. Ukulibhalela izinto ezifananayo, mina kakungidinisi, kodwa lina kuyaliqinisa." 
Philippians3:2 Nanzelelani izinja, linanzelele izisebenzi ezimbi, linanzelele ukusika;" 
Philippians3:3 ngoba thina siyikusoka, esikhonza uNkulunkulu ngoMoya, siziqhenya kuKristu Jesu, njalo singathembeli enyameni;" 
Philippians3:4 lanxa mina ngilethemba futhi enyameni; uba omunye ecabanga ukuthemba enyameni, mina kakhulu;" 
Philippians3:5 ngasokwa ngosuku lwesificaminwembili, ngingowohlanga lukaIsrayeli, owesizwe sakoBhenjamini, umHebheru wamaHebheru, ngokomlayo umFarisi," 
Philippians3:6 ngokokukhuthala ngazingela ibandla, ngokokulunga okusemlayweni ngingasoleki." 
Philippians3:7 Kodwa izinto ezaziyinzuzo kimi, lezo ngazibala njengencithakalo ngenxa kaKristu." 
Philippians3:8 Yebo isibili, futhi ngikubala konke njengencithakalo ngenxa yobuhlekazi bolwazi lukaKristu Jesu iNkosi yami; okungenxa yakhe ngilahlekelwe yikho konke, njalo ngakuthatha njengezibi, ukuze ngizuze uKristu," 
Philippians3:9 njalo ngificwe kuye, ngingelakho okwami ukulunga okuvela emlayweni, kodwa lokho okungokholo lukaKristu, ukulunga okuvela kuNkulunkulu ngokholo;" 
Philippians3:10 ukuze ngimazi yena lamandla okuvuka kwakhe, lokuhlanganyela kwenhlupheko zakhe, ngenziwe ngifuze ukufa kwakhe," 
Philippians3:11 uba kungenzeka ngifinyelele ekuvukeni kwabafileyo. 
Philippians3:12 Kangitsho ukuthi sengi ku bambile, kumbe ukuthi sengiphelelisiwe; kodwa ngiya ku xotsha, ukuthi futhi ngingakubambisisa lokho engabanjisiselwa khona nguKristu Jesu." 
Philippians3:13 Bazalwane, mina kangibali ukuthi mina uqobo sengi ku bambisisile; kodwa kunye engikwenzayo, ngikhohlwa okungemuva, ngizelulela kokungaphambili," 
Philippians3:14 ngigijimela umudwa ngokunxwanela, emvuzweni wobizo lwaphezulu lukaNkulunkulu kuKristu Jesu." 
Philippians3:15 Ngakho ngobunengi bethu esesiphelele, kasikhumbule lokhu; njalo uba licabanga ulutho olwehlukeneyo, lalokhu uNkulunkulu uzalembulela khona;" 
Philippians3:16 kodwa kulokhu esesifike kukho, kasihambeni ngesimiso esifananayo, sikhumbule intonye." 
Philippians3:17 Banini ngabahlanganyeli abanga balingiseli bami, bazalwane, njalo baqaphelisiseni abahamba ngokunjalo, njengoba lilathi njengesibonelo." 
Philippians3:18 Ngoba abanengi bahamba, engalitshela kanengi ngabo, lakhathesi ngitsho ngezinyembezi ngithi, ba yizitha zesiphambano sikaKristu;" 
Philippians3:19 abakuphela kwabo kuyikubhujiswa, abankulunkulu wabo uyisisu, lodumo lwabo lusehlazweni labo, abacabanga izinto zomhlaba." 
Philippians3:20 Ngoba ikithi lisemazulwini, lalapho esilindele ukuthi uMsindisi avele khona, iNkosi uJesu Kristu;" 
Philippians3:21 ozaphendula umzimba wethu wobuphansi, ukuze ufanane lomzimba wakhe wenkazimulo, njengokusebenza elamandla ngitsho okwehlisela ngaphansi kwakhe zonke izinto." 
Philippians4:1 Ngakho, bazalwane bami abathandekayo labalangathwayo, intokozo lomqhele wami, manini liqine ngokunjalo eNkosini, bathandekayo." 
Philippians4:2 Ngiyamncenga uYuwodiya, njalo ngiyamncenga uSintike, ukuthi babe lomqondo munye eNkosini." 
Philippians4:3 Ngiyakucela-ke lawe, mnakwethu oqotho, siza labo abesifazana, abasebenza kakhulu kanye lami evangelini, kanye loKlementi, lezinye izisebenzi kanye lami, amabizo azo asencwadini yempilo." 
Philippians4:4 Thokozani eNkosini njalonjalo; ngiyaphinda ngithi: Thokozani. 
Philippians4:5 Ukubekezela kwenu kakwaziwe yibo bonke abantu. INkosi iseduze. 
Philippians4:6 Lingakhathazeki ngalutho, kodwa ezintweni zonke, izicelo zenu kazaziwe kuNkulunkulu ngomkhuleko langonxuso kanye lokubonga," 
Philippians4:7 lokuthula kukaNkulunkulu, okudlula ukuqedisisa konke, kuzalondoloza inhliziyo zenu lemicabango yenu kuKristu Jesu." 
Philippians4:8 Elokucina, bazalwane, konke okuliqiniso, konke okuhloniphekayo, konke okulungileyo, konke okuhlambulukileyo, konke okuhle, konke okulodumo oluhle, uba kukhona okuhle njalo uba kukhona okudumisekayo, nakanani ngakho lokhu;" 
Philippians4:9 lelakufundayo njalo lakwemukela futhi lakuzwa laselikubona kimi, zenzeni lezizinto; loNkulunkulu wokuthula uzakuba lani." 
Philippians4:10 Kodwa ngiyathokoza kakhulu eNkosini, ukuthi khathesi selize lavuselela ukunginanzelela, ebelinanzelela kambe, kodwa laswela ithuba." 
Philippians4:11 Kakusikho ukuthi ngitsho mayelana lenswelo; ngoba mina sengifundile ukuthi ngeneliswe ezintweni engikuzo. 
Philippians4:12 Ngiyakwazi konke ukuthotshiswa, futhi ngiyakwazi ukuba lokunengi kakhulu; kukho konke lezintweni zonke sengifundisiwe futhi ukusutha lokulamba, lokuba lokunengi kakhulu lokuswela." 
Philippians4:13 Ngingakwenza konke ngoKristu engiqinisa. 
Philippians4:14 Kodwa lenze kuhle ngokuhlanganyela ekuhluphekeni kwami. 
Philippians4:15 Liyazi futhi lani, beFiliphi, ukuthi ekuqaleni kwevangeli, ekusukeni kwami eMakedoniya, kwakungekho bandla elahlanganyela lami endabeni yokupha lokwemukela, ngaphandle kwenu lodwa;" 
Philippians4:16 ngoba laseThesalonika lathumela ekusweleni kwami kanye njalo la phinda. 
Philippians4:17 Kungesikuthi ngidinga isipho, kodwa ngidinga isithelo esengeza isikhwama senu." 
Philippians4:18 Kodwa ngemukele konke njalo ngengezelelwe; ngigcwele, ngengikwemukele kuEpafrodithu izinto ezivela kini, uqhatshi olumnandi, umnikelo owemukelekayo, othabisayo kuNkulunkulu." 
Philippians4:19 Kodwa uNkulunkulu wami uzagcwalisa yonke inswelo yenu njengokwenotho yakhe ebukhosini, kuKristu Jesu." 
Philippians4:20 Akube-ke kuNkulunkulu loBaba wethu udumo kuze kube nini lanini. Ameni. 
Philippians4:21 Bingelelani wonke ongcwele okuKristu Jesu. Abazalwane abalami bayalibingelela. 
Philippians4:22 Bonke abangcwele bayalibingelela, kodwa ikakhulu labo abendlu kaKesari." 
Philippians4:23 Umusa weNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu kawube lani lonke. Ameni. 
Colossians1:1 UPawuli umphostoli kaJesu Kristu ngentando kaNkulunkulu, loTimothi umzalwane," 
Colossians1:2 kibo abangcwele labazalwane abathembekileyo kuKristu abaseKolose: Umusa kawube kini lokuthula okuvela kuNkulunkulu uBaba wethu leNkosini uJesu Kristu. 
Colossians1:3 Siyambonga uNkulunkulu loYise weNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu, sikhuleka ngani njalonjalo," 
Colossians1:4 sesizwile ngokholo lwenu kuKristu Jesu, langothando olukwabangcwele bonke," 
Colossians1:5 ngethemba elibekelwe lona emazulwini, elezwa ngalo ngaphambili ngelizwi leqiniso levangeli," 
Colossians1:6 eselifikile kini, njengalokhu lemhlabeni wonke, njalo lithela izithelo, njengoba kunjalo laphakathi kwenu, kusukela ngosuku elezwa laseliwazi umusa kaNkulunkulu ngeqiniso;" 
Colossians1:7 njengalokhu lani lafunda kuEpafra othandekayo wethu inceku kanye lathi, oyisikhonzi esithembekileyo sikaKristu ngani," 
Colossians1:8 ositshele futhi ngothando lwenu kuMoya. 
Colossians1:9 Ngakho lathi, kusukela ngosuku esezwa ngalo, kasiyekeli ukulikhulekela, lokucela ukuthi ligcwaliswe ngolwazi lwentando yakhe ngenhlakanipho yonke lokuqedisisa okungomoya," 
Colossians1:10 ukuze lihambe ngokufanele iNkosi kukho konke okuthokozisayo, lithela izithelo kuwo wonke umsebenzi olungileyo njalo likhule elwazini lukaNkulunkulu;" 
Colossians1:11 liqiniswe ngamandla wonke njengokwamandla obukhosi bakhe, ekubekezeleni konke lesineke, lenjabulo;" 
Colossians1:12 sibonge uBaba owasenza safanela ekuhlanganyeleni kwelifa labangcwele ekukhanyeni," 
Colossians1:13 owasikhulula emandleni obumnyama, wase si sa embusweni weNdodana yothando lwakhe," 
Colossians1:14 esilohlengo kuyo ngegazi layo, uthethelelo lwezono." 
Colossians1:15 Engumfanekiso kaNkulunkulu ongabonwayo, izibulo lesidalwa sonke;" 
Colossians1:16 ngoba kuyo zonke izinto zidalwa, ezisemazulwini lezisemhlabeni, ezibonwayo lezingabonwayo, loba izihlalo zobukhosi, loba ubuphathamandla, loba imibuso, loba amandla; zonke izinto zidalwa ngayo zadal el wa yona;" 
Colossians1:17 yona-ke ingaphambi kwazo zonke izinto, lezinto zonke zimi ndawonye ngayo." 
Colossians1:18 Njalo yona yinhloko yomzimba, olibandla; eyikuqala, izibulo kwabafileyo, ukuze yona ibe ngeyokuqala ezintweni zonke;" 
Colossians1:19 ngoba kwa m thokozisa uBaba ukuthi ukugcwala konke kuhlale kiyo," 
Colossians1:20 njalo ngayo enze izinto zonke zibuyisane laye oqobo, esenze ukuthula ngegazi lesiphambano sayo, ngayo, loba yizinto ezisemhlabeni loba ezisemazulwini." 
Colossians1:21 Lani elalikade lenziwe abemzini lezitha ngengqondo emisebenzini emibi, kodwa khathesi usebuyisene lani" 
Colossians1:22 emzimbeni wenyama yayo ngokufa ukuthi alimise phambi kwakhe lingcwele njalo lingelacala njalo lingasoleki," 
Colossians1:23 uba-ke lihlala ekholweni lisekelwe liqinile, lingasuswa ethembeni levangeli elalizwayo, elatshunyayelwa kuso sonke isidalwa esingaphansi kwezulu, engenziwe isikhonzi salo mina Pawuli." 
Colossians1:24 Khathesi-ke ngiyathokoza ekulihluphekeleni kwami, njalo okusileleyo kwenhlupheko zikaKristu ngiyakugcwalisa enyameni yami esikhundleni somzimba wakhe, olibandla;" 
Colossians1:25 mina engenziwa isikhonzi salo, njengokwesimiso sikaNkulunkulu enganikwa sona maqondana lani, ukugcwalisa ilizwi likaNkulunkulu," 
Colossians1:26 imfihlo ebifihliwe kusukela ezikhathini zendulo njalo kusukela kuzizukulwana; kodwa khathesi ibonakaliswe kwabangcwele bakhe," 
Colossians1:27 kubo uNkulunkulu wathanda ukubazisa ukuthi iyini inotho yobukhosi balimfihlo phakathi kwabezizwe, enguKristu phakathi kwenu, ithemba lenkazimulo;" 
Colossians1:28 esimtshumayelayo thina, sixwayisa wonke umuntu, sifundisa wonke umuntu ngayo yonke inhlakanipho, ukuze silethe wonke umuntu ephelele kuKristu Jesu;" 
Colossians1:29 engikutshikatshikelayo lami, ngisilwa njengokusebenza kwakhe, okusebenza kimi ngamandla." 
Colossians2:1 Ngoba ngithanda ukuthi lazi ukuthi kukhulu kangakanani ukulwa engilakho ngani labaseLawodikeya, njalo ngobunengi balabo abangabonanga ubuso bami enyameni," 
Colossians2:2 ukuze inhliziyo zabo ziduduzwe, behlanganiswe ethandweni, lenothweni yonke yokuqinisekiswa okupheleleyo kokuqedisisa, elwazini lwemfihlo kaNkulunkulu loBaba, lekaKristu," 
Colossians2:3 okufihlwe kuye izinto zonke eziligugu zenhlakanipho lezolwazi. 
Colossians2:4 Ngitsho lokhu-ke, ukuze kungabi lamuntu olikhohlisayo ngamazwi ayengayo." 
Colossians2:5 Ngoba lanxa ngingekho ngenyama, kanti ngilani ngomoya, ngithokoza ngibona ukuhlela kwenu, lokuqina kokholo lwenu kuKristu." 
Colossians2:6 Ngakho njengalokho limemukele uKristu Jesu iNkosi, hambani kuye," 
Colossians2:7 ligxilile lakhiwe kuye, njalo liqiniswe ekholweni, njengokufundiswa kwenu, lengeze kulo ekubongeni." 
Colossians2:8 Nanzelelani hlezi kube khona olithumbayo ngolwazi lwenhlakanipho langenkohliso eyize, njengokomkhuba wabantu, njengokwemfundiso zakuqala zomhlaba, njalo kungenjengokukaKristu;" 
Colossians2:9 ngoba kuhlala kuye ukugcwala konke kobuNkulunkulu ngomzimba," 
Colossians2:10 njalo liphelelisiwe kuye, oyinhloko yakho konke ukubusa lamandla;" 
Colossians2:11 elasokelwa kuye lani ngokusoka okungenziwanga ngezandla, ngokuhlubula umzimba wezono zenyama, ekusokeni kukaKristu," 
Colossians2:12 lingcwatshwe kanye laye ebhabhathizweni, elavuswa lani kanye laye kulo ngokholo lokusebenza kukaNkulunkulu, owamvusa kwabafileyo." 
Colossians2:13 Lani lifile eziphambekweni lokungasoki kwenyama yenu, ulenze laphila kanye laye, eselithethelele zonke iziphambeko," 
Colossians2:14 esesule incwadi yezimiso emelana lathi, ephambene lathi, wayisusa phakathi, eseyibethele esiphambanweni;" 
Colossians2:15 ebahlubule ababusi lamandla, wabaveza obala, wathakazelela ukubanqoba ngaso." 
Colossians2:16 Ngakho kakungabi khona olilahla ekudleni kumbe ekunatheni, loba endabeni yomkhosi loba yokuthwasa kwenyanga kumbe yamasabatha;" 
Colossians2:17 eziyisithunzi sezinto ezizayo, kodwa umzimba ngokaKristu." 
Colossians2:18 Kakungabi lamuntu olemuka umvuzo wenu ngobuqili ethanda uku z enza othobekileyo lokukhonza izingilosi, engena ezintweni angazibonanga, ezikhukhumeza ngeze ngengqondo yenyama yakhe," 
Colossians2:19 njalo engabambi inhloko, umzimba wonke ngamalunga lemisipha wondliwa njalo uhlanganiswa ngayo, ukhula ngokukhula kukaNkulunkulu." 
Colossians2:20 Ngakho uba lafa kanye loKristu emfundisweni zakuqala zomhlaba, libophekeleni ngemikhuba ngokungathi liphila elizweni," 
Colossians2:21 (ungabambi, unganambithi, ungathinti," 
Colossians2:22 ezizaphela zonke ngokusetshenziswa) njengokwemilayo lezimfundiso zabantu? 
Colossians2:23 Ezilesimo senhlakanipho ekukhonzeni kokuzenzela lekuzithobeni lekuphatheni nzima umzimba, kakusizi lutho ukumelana lokusuthisa inyama." 
Colossians3:1 Ngakho uba livuswe loKristu, dingani okwaphezulu, lapho akhona uKristu ehlezi ngakwesokunene sikaNkulunkulu." 
Colossians3:2 Nakanani ngezinto eziphezulu, kungeyisikho ngezinto ezisemhlabeni." 
Colossians3:3 Ngoba selifile, lempilo yenu ifihlwe loKristu kuNkulunkulu." 
Colossians3:4 Nxa ebonakaliswa uKristu, oyimpilo yethu, ngalesosikhathi lani lizabonakaliswa laye enkazimulweni." 
Colossians3:5 Ngakho bulalani amalunga enu asemhlabeni, ukuphinga, ukungcola, inkanuko embi, ukufisa okubi, lomhawu, oyikukhonza izithombe," 
Colossians3:6 okwehla ngazo ulaka lukaNkulunkulu phezu kwabantwana bokungalaleli; 
Colossians3:7 elake lahamba kuzo lani, lapho lalihlezi phakathi kwazo." 
Colossians3:8 Kodwa khathesi lani khuphani konke lokhu, ulaka, ukuthukuthela, inzondo, inhlamba, ukukhuluma amanyala emlonyeni wenu;" 
Colossians3:9 lingaqambelani amanga, lokhu selimhlubule umuntu omdala lezenzo zakhe," 
Colossians3:10 selembethe omutsha, owenziwa kutsha elwazini njengomfanekiso walowo owamdalayo;" 
Colossians3:11 okungekho umGriki lomJuda, ukusoka lokungasoki, owezizweni, umSikethiya, isigqili, okhululekileyo; kodwa uKristu uyikho konke lakukho konke." 
Colossians3:12 Ngakho yembathani, njengabakhethiweyo bakaNkulunkulu, abangcwele labathandekayo, imihelo yesihawu, ububele, ukuzithoba, ubumnene, ukubekezela;" 
Colossians3:13 libekezelelane, lithethelelane uba umuntu elensolo komunye; njengoba loKristu walithethelela, ngokunjalo lani;" 
Colossians3:14 phezu kwakho konke-ke yembathani uthando, oluyisibopho sokuphelela." 
Colossians3:15 Lokuthula kukaNkulunkulu kakubuse enhliziyweni zenu, elibizelwa kukho lani emzimbeni munye; futhi banini ngababongayo." 
Colossians3:16 Ilizwi likaKristu kalihlale phakathi kwenu ngokwenotho enhlakaniphweni yonke; lifundisane lilayane, ngezihlabelelo, lamahubo odumo, lengoma zomoya, lihlabelela lilomusa enhliziyweni zenu eNkosini." 
Colossians3:17 Njalo konke loba yini eliyenzayo, elizwini loba esenzweni, konke kwenzeni ebizweni leNkosi uJesu, libonge uNkulunkulu loBaba ngaye." 
Colossians3:18 Bafazi, zehliseleni ngaphansi kwawenu amadoda, njengokufanele eNkosini." 
Colossians3:19 Madoda, thandani omkenu, lingabi lokubaba kibo." 
Colossians3:20 Bantwana, lalelani abazali ezintweni zonke; ngoba lokhu kuyayithokozisa iNkosi." 
Colossians3:21 Bobaba, lingabathukuthelisi abantwana benu, ukuze bangadani." 
Colossians3:22 Zisebenzi, lalelani ezintweni zonke labo abangamakhosi njengokwenyama, kungeyisikho ngokukhonza amehlo njengabathokozisa abantu, kodwa ngobuqotho benhliziyo, lisesaba uNkulunkulu;" 
Colossians3:23 njalo yonke loba yini eliyenzayo, yenzeni ngenhliziyo, njengeNkosini, njalo kungeyisikho ebantwini;" 
Colossians3:24 lisazi ukuthi eNkosini lizakwemukela umvuzo welifa; ngoba likhonza iNkosi uKristu. 
Colossians3:25 Kodwa owenza okubi uzazemukelela okubi akwenzileyo; njalo kakukho ukubandlulula umuntu. 
Colossians4:1 Makhosi, nikani izisebenzi okulungileyo lokulingeneyo, lisazi ukuthi lani lileNkosi emazulwini." 
Colossians4:2 Khuthalani emkhulekweni, lilinde kuwo ngokubonga;" 
Colossians4:3 likhuleke ngesikhathi esifananayo ngathi futhi, ukuthi uNkulunkulu asivulele umnyango welizwi, ukukhuluma imfihlo kaKristu, engibotshwe lami ngenxa yayo;" 
Colossians4:4 ukuthi ngiyibonakalise, njengalokhu ngifanele ukukhuluma." 
Colossians4:5 Hambani ngenhlakanipho mayelana labangaphandle, lihlenga isikhathi." 
Colossians4:6 Ilizwi lenu kalihlale emuseni, linambitheke ngetswayi, ukuze lazi ukuthi kulifanele njani ukuphendula ngulowo lalowo." 
Colossians4:7 Konke okumaqondana lami uzalitshela uTikiko, umzalwane othandekayo lesikhonzi esithembekileyo lesisebenzi kanye lathi eNkosini;" 
Colossians4:8 engimthume kini kukho lokhu, ukuze azi indaba zenu lokuthi aduduze inhliziyo zenu;" 
Colossians4:9 kanye loOnesimo umzalwane othembekileyo lothandekayo, owakini. Bazalazisa konke okulapha." 
Colossians4:10 Uyalibingelela uAristako oyisibotshwa kanye lami, loMarko umzawakhe kaBarnabasi, elemukela imilayo ngaye; uba efika kini, memukeleni," 
Colossians4:10 Uyalibingelela uAristako oyisibotshwa kanye lami, loMarko umzawakhe kaBarnabasi, elemukela imilayo ngaye; uba efika kini, memukeleni," 
Colossians4:11 loJesu othiwa nguJustusi, owa bo kusoka; laba bodwa yizisebenzi kanye la mi embusweni kaNkulunkulu, ababayinduduzo kimi." 
Colossians4:12 Uyalibingelela uEpafra owakini, inceku kaKristu, elilwela emikhulekweni ngezikhathi zonke, ukuze lime liphelele ligcwaliswe entandweni yonke kaNkulunkulu." 
Colossians4:13 Ngoba ngiyafakaza kuye ukuthi uyalitshisekela kakhulu labaseLawodikeya labaseHiyerapoli. 
Colossians4:14 Uyalibingelela uLuka umelaphi othandekayo, loDema." 
Colossians4:15 Bingelelani abazalwane abaseLawodikeya, loNimfa, lebandla elisemzini wakhe." 
Colossians4:16 Njalo nxa isifundiwe lincwadi phakathi kwenu, bonani ukuthi ifundwe lebandleni labeLawodikeya, njalo ukuthi lani liyifunde leyo evela eLawodikeya." 
Colossians4:17 Limtshele uArkipho lithi: Qaphela inkonzo oyemukele eNkosini, ukuthi uyiphelelise." 
Colossians4:18 Isibingelelo ngesami isandla esikaPawuli. Khumbulani izibopho zami. Umusa kawube lani. Ameni. 
1Thessalonians1:1 UPawuli loSilivanu loTimothi, kubandla labeThesalonika kuNkulunkulu uBaba, leNkosi uJesu Kristu: Umusa kawube kini lokuthula okuvela kuNkulunkulu uBaba wethu, leNkosi uJesu Kristu." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Sibonga uNkulunkulu ngezikhathi zonke ngani lonke, siliphatha emikhulekweni yethu," 
1Thessalonians1:3 sikhumbula ngokungaphezi isenzo senu sokholo, lomsebenzi onzima wothando, lokuqina kwethemba eNkosini yethu uJesu Kristu, phambi kukaNkulunkulu loBaba wethu;" 
1Thessalonians1:4 sisazi, bazalwane abathandiweyo nguNkulunkulu, ukukhethwa kwenu;" 
1Thessalonians1:5 ngoba ivangeli lethu kalifikanga kini ngelizwi kuphela, kodwa langamandla, langoMoya oNgcwele, langokuqiniswa okukhulu, njengoba lisazi ukuthi sasinjani phakathi kwenu ngenxa yenu." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Lani laba ngabalingisi bethu labeNkosi, selilemukele ilizwi ekuhluphekeni okukhulu lilentokozo kaMoya oNgcwele," 
1Thessalonians1:7 laze laba yizibonelo kubo bonke abakholwayo eMakedoniya leAkaya. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Ngoba kini kwezwakala ilizwi leNkosi, kungeyisikho eMakedoniya leAkaya kuphela, kodwa ukholo lwenu kuNkulunkulu lwaphumela lakuyo yonke indawo, okokuthi kwakungasadingeki ukuthi sikhulume ulutho." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Ngoba bona uqobo lwabo balandisa ngathi ukuthi saba lokungena okunjani kini, lokuthi laphendukela njani kuNkulunkulu livela ezithombeni, ukuthi likhonze uNkulunkulu ophilayo loweqiniso," 
1Thessalonians1:10 lilindele iNdodana yakhe ivela emazulwini, ayivusa kwabafileyo, uJesu osihlangula elakeni oluzayo." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Ngoba liyazi lina, bazalwane, ukungena kwethu kini, ukuthi kakubanga yize;" 
1Thessalonians2:2 kodwa lanxa sasihluphekile kuqala saphathwa kubi, njengoba lisazi, eFiliphi, saba lesibindi kuNkulunkulu wethu sokukhuluma kini ivangeli likaNkulunkulu phakathi kokulwa okukhulu." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Ngoba inkuthazo yethu yayingayisiyo yokuduha njalo ingaveli ekungcoleni, njalo ingengobugqili;" 
1Thessalonians2:4 kodwa njengoba sivunywe nguNkulunkulu ukuthi siphathiswe ivangeli, sikhuluma ngokunjalo, kungenjengokuthokozisa abantu, kodwa uNkulunkulu ohlola inhliziyo zethu." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Ngoba kasizange size ngamazwi ayengayo, njengoba lisazi, futhi kungeyisikho ngokufihla ubuhwaba; uNkulunkulu ungumfakazi;" 
1Thessalonians2:6 singadingi udumo ebantwini, futhi olungaveli kini njalo kwabanye, loba sasingaba ngumthwalo njengabaphostoli bakaKristu," 
1Thessalonians2:7 kodwa saba mnene phakathi kwenu njengomdlezane esondla abakhe abantwana. 
1Thessalonians2:8 Njengoba besilithanda kangaka, sathokoza ukulinika kungeyisilo ivangeli likaNkulunkulu kuphela, kodwa lemiphefumulo yethu uqobo, ngoba laselingabathandekayo kithi." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Ngoba liyakhumbula, bazalwane, ukutshikatshika lokulwisa kwethu; ngoba ubusuku lemini sisebenza ukuze singabi ngumthwalo lakomunye wenu, silitshumayeza ivangeli likaNkulunkulu." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Lina lingabafakazi, loNkulunkulu, ukuthi sasingcwele njani njalo silungile futhi singasoleki kini elikholwayo;" 
1Thessalonians2:11 njengoba-ke lisazi ukuthi ngulowo lalowo wenu, njengoyise kwabakhe abantwana, salikhuthaza njani sa li duduza safakaza" 
1Thessalonians2:12 ukuthi lihambe ngokufanele uNkulunkulu olibizela embusweni lebukhosini bakhe. 
1Thessalonians2:13 Ngenxa yalokhu njalo thina kasiyekeli ukumbonga uNkulunkulu, ukuthi selemukele ilizwi likaNkulunkulu elalizwa kithi, lemukela kungeyisilo ilizwi labantu, kodwa linjengeqiniso ilizwi likaNkulunkulu, osebenza lakini elikholwayo." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Ngoba lina, bazalwane, laba ngabalingiseli bamabandla kaNkulunkulu aseJudiya kuKristu Jesu; ngoba lani lahlupheka lezizinto kwabesizwe sakini uqobo, njengoba lawo kumaJuda," 
1Thessalonians2:15 abulala leNkosi uJesu labaprofethi bawo uqobo, asizingela lathi, kawamthokozisi uNkulunkulu, amelana labantu bonke," 
1Thessalonians2:16 esivimbela ukutshumayeza abezizwe ukuze basindiswe, ukuze agcwalise izono zawo njalonjalo; kodwa ulaka selwehlele phezu kwawo kuze kube sekupheleni." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Kodwa thina, bazalwane, lokhu sehlukaniswe lani okwesikhatshana, ngobuso, kungeyisikho ngenhliziyo, sazama kakhulukazi ukuthi sibone ubuso benu ngokulangatha okukhulu." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Ngakho besifisa ukufika kini, ikakhulu mina Pawuli, lakanye lokuphinda, kodwa uSathane wasivimbela;" 
1Thessalonians2:19 ngoba liyini ithemba lethu, kumbe intokozo, kumbe umqhele wokuzincoma? Angithi yini futhi, phambi kweNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu ekufikeni kwayo?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Ngoba lina liludumo lentokozo yethu. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Kwathi-ke singaselakubekezela, sathi kuhle ukuthi sitshiywe sodwa eAtene," 
1Thessalonians3:2 sasesithuma uTimothi umzalwane wethu lesikhonzi sikaNkulunkulu lesisebenzi kanye lathi evangelini likaKristu, ukuze aliqinise lokuthi alikhuthaze ngokholo lwenu," 
1Thessalonians3:3 ukuze kunganyikinywa lamunye kulezizinhlupheko; ngoba liyazi lina ukuthi simiselwe lokhu. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Ngoba lathi siselani, salitshela ngaphambili ukuthi sesizahlupheka, njengoba futhi kwenzeka, lani liya kw azi." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Ngenxa yalokhu futhi ngingaselakubekezela, ngathumela ukuthi ngazi ukholo lwenu, hlezi mhlawumbe umlingi ulilingile, lokuthi umtshikatshika wethu ube yize." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Kodwa khathesi uTimothi usefikile kithi evela kini, usibikele indaba ezinhle zokholo lothando lwenu, lokuthi lihlala lilomkhumbulo omuhle ngathi, lifisa kakhulu ukusibona, njengoba-ke lathi lina;" 
1Thessalonians3:7 ngenxa yalokhu saduduzeka, bazalwane, ngani, kukho konke ukuhlupheka losizi lwethu ngokholo lwenu;" 
1Thessalonians3:8 ngoba khathesi siyaphila, uba lina limi liqinile eNkosini." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Ngoba sibongobani esingenanisa kuNkulunkulu ngani, ngentokozo yonke esithokoza ngayo ngenxa yenu phambi kukaNkulunkulu wethu?" 
1Thessalonians3:10 Ebusuku lemini siyakhuleka kakhulu sidlulisa amalawulo ukuze sibone ubuso benu, siphelelise-ke okusileleyo kokholo lwenu." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Njalo kungathi uNkulunkulu uqobo loBaba wethu, leNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu angaqondisa indlela yethu kini;" 
1Thessalonians3:12 njalo kungathi iNkosi ingalandisa njalo ilenze lengezeleleke ethandweni omunye komunye lakubo bonke, njengoba sinjalo lathi kini," 
1Thessalonians3:13 ukuze iqinise inhliziyo zenu zingasoleki ebungcweleni, phambi kukaNkulunkulu loBaba wethu, ekufikeni kweNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu kanye labangcwele bakhe bonke." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Okunye-ke, bazalwane, siyalincenga si li khuthaza eNkosini uJesu, njengalokhu lakwemukela kithi ukuthi kulifanele njani ukuhamba lokumthokozisa uNkulunkulu, ukuze lengezelele kukho kakhulu." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Ngoba liyazi ukuthi milayo bani esalinika yona ngeNkosi uJesu. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Ngoba le yintando kaNkulunkulu, ukungcweliswa kwenu, ukuthi lizithinte ekuphingeni;" 
1Thessalonians4:4 ukuthi ngulowo lalowo wenu kakwazi ukugcina esakhe isitsha ekungcweliseni lekuhlonipheni," 
1Thessalonians4:5 kungeyisikho enkanukweni yesifiso, njengabezizwe lazo ezingamaziyo uNkulunkulu." 
1Thessalonians4:6 Kakungabi khona oweqayo aqile umfowabo endabeni; ngoba iNkosi ingumphindiseli ngazo zonke lezizinto, njengoba lathi salitshela ngaphambili safakaza." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Ngoba uNkulunkulu kasibizelanga emanyaleni, kodwa ebungcweleni." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Ngakho lowo odelelayo, kadeleli muntu, kodwa uNkulunkulu owasinika futhi uMoya wakhe oyiNgcwele." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Kodwa mayelana lothando lobuzalwane kalidingi ukuthi ngi libhalele; ngoba lina uqobo lifundisiwe nguNkulunkulu ukuthi lithandane; 
1Thessalonians4:10 ngoba lani lenza lokhu kubo bonke abazalwane abaseMakedoniya lonke. Kodwa siyalikhuthaza, bazalwane, ukuthi lengeze kakhulu," 
1Thessalonians4:11 njalo likhuthalele ukuba lokuthula lokwenza okwenu, lokusebenza ngezenu izandla, njengoba salilaya;" 
1Thessalonians4:12 ukuze lihambe ngokuhlonitshwa ngabangaphandle, lingasweli lutho." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Kodwa kangithandi ukuthi lingabi lalwazi, bazalwane, ngalabo abaleleyo, ukuze lingadabuki, njengabanye labo abangelathemba." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Ngoba uba sikholwa ukuthi uJesu wafa wavuka, ngokunjalo-ke labo abalele kuJesu, uNkulunkulu uyabaletha kanye laye." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Ngoba lokhu sikutsho kini ngelizwi leNkosi, ukuthi thina esiphilayo esitshiywe kuze kube sekufikeni kweNkosi, isibili kasiyikubaqalela labo asebelele;" 
1Thessalonians4:16 ngoba iNkosi uqobo izakwehla ivela ezulwini ngesimemezelo sokulawula, ngelizwi lengilosi eyinduna, lango kukhala kophondo lukaNkulunkulu, labafileyo kuKristu bazavuka kuqala;" 
1Thessalonians4:17 kulandele thina esiphilayo esitshiyiweyo, sizahluthunelwa kanye labo emayezini siyehlangabeza iNkosi emoyeni; ngokunjalo besesihlala leNkosi njalonjalo." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Ngakho duduzanani ngalamazwi. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Kodwa ngezikhathi langemizuzu, bazalwane, kalisweli ukuthi libhalelwe," 
1Thessalonians5:2 ngoba lina uqobo liyazi kuhle kakhulu ukuthi usuku lweNkosi luzafika ngokunjalo njengesela ebusuku; 
1Thessalonians5:3 ngoba nxa besithi: Ukuthula lokuhlala kuhle, khona ukubhujiswa okujumayo kuzabehlela, njengomhelo kowesifazana okhulelweyo, njalo kabasoze baphunyuke." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Kodwa lina, bazalwane, kalikho emnyameni, ukuze lolosuku luliphuthume njengesela;" 
1Thessalonians5:5 lina lonke lingabantwana bokukhanya labantwana bemini; kasisibo abobusuku loba abobumnyama; 
1Thessalonians5:6 ngakho-ke asingalali njengabanye labo, kodwa asilinde siqonde." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Ngoba abalalayo balala ebusuku; labadakwayo badakwa ebusuku. 
1Thessalonians5:8 Kodwa thina esingabemini, asiqonde, sifake isivikelo sesifuba sokholo lothando, lethemba losindiso libe likhowa," 
1Thessalonians5:9 ngoba uNkulunkulu kasimiselanga ulaka, kodwa ukuzuza usindiso ngeNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu," 
1Thessalonians5:10 owasifelayo, ukuze loba siphapheme loba silele, siphile kanye laye." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Ngakho khuthazanani, lakhane, njengoba lani likwenza." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Kodwa siyalincenga, bazalwane, ukuthi libazi labo abasebenza nzima phakathi kwenu, labaliphathayo eNkosini, labalelulekayo," 
1Thessalonians5:13 njalo libahlonipha kakhulu okwedlula amalawulo ethandweni ngenxa yomsebenzi wabo. Hlalisanani ngokuthula. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Kodwa siyalikhuthaza, bazalwane, lulekani abangelamthetho, liduduze abadanileyo, lisekele ababuthakathaka, libekezelele bonke." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Qaphelani ukuthi kungabi khona ophindisela omunye okubi ngokubi; kodwa dingisisani ngesikhathi sonke okuhle lomunye komunye lakibo bonke. 
1Thessalonians5:16 Thokozani njalonjalo; 
1Thessalonians5:17 khulekani lingaphezi; 
1Thessalonians5:18 bongani kukho konke; ngoba lokhu kuyintando kaNkulunkulu kuKristu Jesu ngani. 
1Thessalonians5:19 Lingamcitshi uMoya; 
1Thessalonians5:20 lingadeleli iziprofetho; 
1Thessalonians5:21 hlolisisani konke; libambelele kokuhle; 
1Thessalonians5:22 dedani kukho konke ukubonakala kobubi. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Kungathi uNkulunkulu wokuthula uqobo alenze libe ngcwele ngokupheleleyo; njalo kungathi umoya wenu wonke lomphefumulo lomzimba kungalondolozwa kungasoleki ekufikeni kweNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu. 
1Thessalonians5:24 Uthembekile yena olibizayo; laye oza kw enza lokhu. 
1Thessalonians5:25 Bazalwane, sikhulekeleni." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Bingelelani abazalwane bonke ngokwanga okungcwele. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Ngiyalifungisa ngeNkosi, ukuthi lincwadi ifundwe kubo bonke abazalwane abangcwele." 
1Thessalonians5:28 Umusa weNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu kawube lani. Ameni. 
2Thessalonians1:1 UPawuli loSilivanu loTimothi kubandla labeThesalonika eli kuNkulunkulu uBaba wethu leNkosini uJesu Kristu: 
2Thessalonians1:2 Umusa kawube kini lokuthula okuvela kuNkulunkulu uBaba wethu leNkosini uJesu Kristu. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Simele ukumbonga uNkulunkulu njalonjalo ngani, bazalwane, njengoba kufanele, ngoba ukholo lwenu luyanda ngokungelakulinganiswa, lothando lwalowo lalowo wenu lonke luyengezeleleka komunye lomunye;" 
2Thessalonians1:4 ngakho thina ngokwethu siyazincoma ngani emabandleni kaNkulunkulu ngenxa yokubekezela kwenu lokholo phakathi kokuzingelwa kwenu konke lezinhlupheko elibekezela kuzo; 
2Thessalonians1:5 okuy isibonakaliso sokwahlulelwa okulungileyo kukaNkulunkulu, ukuze kuthiwe lingabafanele umbuso kaNkulunkulu, lani eliwuhluphekelayo;" 
2Thessalonians1:6 njengoba kuyinto elungileyo kuNkulunkulu ukuthi abuyisele ukuhlupheka kwabalihluphayo," 
2Thessalonians1:7 njalo kini elihluphekayo, ukuphumula kanye lathi, ekwembulweni kweNkosi uJesu evela ezulwini lengilosi zamandla akhe," 
2Thessalonians1:8 emalangabini omlilo, esenza impindiselo kwabangamaziyo uNkulunkulu, lakwabangalaleli ivangeli leNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu;" 
2Thessalonians1:9 abazahlupheka ngesijeziso sokubhujiswa okulaphakade, basuswe ebusweni beNkosi lenkazimulweni yamandla akhe," 
2Thessalonians1:10 mhla efika ukuthi adunyiswe kubangcwele bakhe, njalo abatshazwe ekubo bonke abakholwayo (ngoba ubufakazi bethu bakholeka phakathi kwenu) ngalolosuku." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Ngenxa yalokho sihlala silikhulekela lani, ukuze uNkulunkulu wethu alibone lingabafanele ubizo, lokuze aphelelise yonke intando enhle yobuhle bakhe lomsebenzi wokholo ngamandla;" 
2Thessalonians1:12 ukuze ibizo leNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu lidunyiswe kini, lani kuye, njengomusa kaNkulunkulu wethu loweNkosi uJesu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Siyalincenga-ke, bazalwane, mayelana lokufika kweNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu, lokubuthana kwethu kuyo," 
2Thessalonians2:2 ukuthi lingaphangisi liqhuqhiswe engqondweni, kumbe lethuswe, loba ngumoya, loba yilizwi, loba yincwadi ngokungathi ivela kithi, ngokungathi usuku lukaKristu selufikile." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Kakungabi lamuntu olikhohlisayo langayiphi indlela; ngoba aluyikufika ngaphandle kokuthi ukuhlubuka kufike kuqala, lomuntu wesono embulwe, indodana yokubhujiswa," 
2Thessalonians2:4 emelana izikhukhumeze phezu kwakho konke okuthiwa nguNkulunkulu loba yinto ekhonzwayo, ize ihlale ethempelini likaNkulunkulu njengoNkulunkulu, izitshengisa ukuthi inguNkulunkulu." 
2Thessalonians2:5 4Kalikhumbuli yini ukuthi ngiseselani ngalitshela lezizinto? 
2Thessalonians2:6 Selikwazi khathesi okuvimbelayo, ukuze embulwe ngesakhe isikhathi." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Ngoba imfihlo yokungabi lomthetho isasebenza; kuphela kukhona ovimbelayo okwalesisikhathi, aze asuswe phakathi," 
2Thessalonians2:8 khona-ke ezakwembulwa oNgelamthetho, iNkosi ezamqeda ngokuphefumula komlomo wayo, iza m bhubhisa ngokubonakala kokufika kwayo;" 
2Thessalonians2:9 lowo okufika kwakhe kunjengokusebenza kukaSathane emandleni wonke lezibonakalisweni lezimangalisweni zamanga," 
2Thessalonians2:10 lenkohlisweni yonke yokungalungi kulabo ababhubhayo, ngoba kabemukelanga uthando lweqiniso ukuze basindiswe." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Ngenxa yalokhu-ke uNkulunkulu uzabathumezela amandla enkohliso, ukuze bakholwe amanga;" 
2Thessalonians2:12 ukuze balahlwe bonke abangakholwanga iqiniso, kodwa bathokoza kukho ukungalungi." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Kodwa thina simele ukubonga uNkulunkulu njalonjalo ngani, bazalwane abathandwa beNkosi, ukuthi uNkulunkulu walikhethela usindiso kusukela ekuqaleni, ekungcwelisweni koMoya, lokholo lweqiniso;" 
2Thessalonians2:14 owalibizela kulokhu ngevangeli lethu, ekuzuzeni inkazimulo yeNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Ngakho-ke, bazalwane, manini liqine, libambelele ezimfundisweni elazifundiswayo, loba ngelizwi, kumbe ngencwadi yethu." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Kakuthi-ke iNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu uqobo, loNkulunkulu, ngitsho uBaba wethu owasithandayo, lowa si nika induduzo elaphakade lethemba elihle ngomusa," 
2Thessalonians2:17 aduduze inhliziyo zenu, aliqinise emazwini lemisebenzini yonke emihle." 
2Thessalonians3:1 Elokucina, bazalwane, sikhulekeleni, ukuze ilizwi leNkosi ligijime, lidunyiswe, njengalokhu kwaba njalo lakini," 
2Thessalonians3:2 lokuthi sikhululwe ebantwini abangaqondanga lababi; ngoba ukholo kayisilo lwabo bonke. 
2Thessalonians3:3 Kodwa iNkosi ithembekile, ezaliqinisa i li vikele komubi." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Silethemba-ke eNkosini ngani, ukuthi izinto esililaya zona, lani liyazenza njalo lizazenza." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Kodwa iNkosi sengathi ingaqondisa inhliziyo zenu ethandweni lukaNkulunkulu, lekubekezeleni kukaKristu." 
2Thessalonians3:6 Siyalilaya-ke, bazalwane, ebizweni leNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu, ukuthi lizehlukanise laye wonke umzalwane ohamba ngokungafanele, njalo kungenjengomlayo elawemukela kithi." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Ngoba liyazi ngokwenu ukuthi li fanele li silingise njani; ngoba kasihambanga ngokungafanele phakathi kwenu," 
2Thessalonians3:8 njalo kasidlanga kudla komuntu nje, kodwa ekutshikatshikeni lekusebenzeni nzima, ubusuku lemini sisebenza, ukuze singabi ngumthwalo lakomunye wenu;" 
2Thessalonians3:9 kungesikuthi sasingelalungelo, kodwa ukuze sizinikele kini nje ngesibonelo sokusilingisela." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Ngoba lalapho silani, salilaya lokhu ukuthi: Uba umuntu engafuni ukusebenza, akumelanga adle." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Ngoba sizwa ukuthi abanye phakathi kwenu bahambahamba ngokungafanele, kabasebenzi lutho, kodwa besenza izinto ezingelamsebenzi." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Abanjalo-ke siyabalaya sibakhuthaze ngeNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu, ukuze basebenze ngokuthula badle okwabo ukudla." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Lani, bazalwane, lingadinwa yikwenza okuhle." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Kodwa uba umuntu engalaleli ilizwi lethu ngencwadi, mqapheliseni lowo, njalo lingahlangani laye, ukuze abe lenhloni;" 
2Thessalonians3:15 njalo linga m phathi njengesitha, kodwa m elulekeni njengomzalwane." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Sengathi-ke iNkosi yokuthula uqobo ingalinika ukuthula ngesikhathi sonke ngendlela zonke. INkosi kayibe lani lonke. 
2Thessalonians3:17 Isibingelelo ngesami isandla esikaPawuli, okuluphawu kuyo yonke incwadi; ngibhala ngokunjalo."
