2Thessalonians3:18 Umusa weNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu kawube lani lonke. Ameni. 
1Timothy1:1 UPawuli, umphostoli kaJesu Kristu njengokomlayo kaNkulunkulu uMsindisi wethu, loweNkosi uJesu Kristu ithemba lethu," 
1Timothy1:2 kuTimothi umntana mi weqiniso ekholweni: Umusa, isihawu, ukuthula okuvela kuNkulunkulu uBaba wethu loJesu Kristu iNkosi yethu." 
1Timothy1:3 Njengoba ngakukhuthaza ukuthi uhlale eEfesu, ngisiya eMakedoniya, ukuze ulaye abathile ukuthi bangafundisi imfundiso eyehlukileyo," 
1Timothy1:4 futhi bangananzeleli izinganekwane lendaba zosendo olokuzalana ezingapheliyo, ezibanga ukuphikisana kulokwakha kukaNkulunkulu okusekholweni." 
1Timothy1:5 Kodwa isiphetho somlayo luthando oluvela enhliziyweni emhlophe la ku sazela esihle l e khol weni olungelakuzenzisa; 
1Timothy1:6 kulokhu abathile abaduhe kukho baphambukela ekukhulumeni okuyize," 
1Timothy1:7 befuna ukuthi babe ngabafundisi bomlayo, bengaqedisisi lezinto abazitshoyo, kumbe langezinto abaziqinisayo." 
1Timothy1:8 Kodwa siyazi ukuthi umlayo ulungile, uba umuntu ewusebenzisa ngokomlayo," 
1Timothy1:9 esazi lokhu, ukuthi umlayo kawubekelwa olungileyo, kodwa abangelamlayo labangalaleliyo, abeyisa uNkulunkulu labayizoni, abangangcwele labangakholwayo, ababulala oyise lababulala onina, ababulala abantu," 
1Timothy1:10 izifebe, abesilisa abalalanayo, abathumba abantu, abaqambimanga, abephula izifungo, njalo nxa kukhona okunye okuphambene lemfundiso ephilileyo," 
1Timothy1:11 njengokwevangeli lenkazimulo kaNkulunkulu obusisiweyo, engaphathiswa lona." 
1Timothy1:12 Ngiyambonga-ke owanginika amandla, uKristu Jesu iNkosi yethu, ukuthi wangibona ngithembekile, wa ngi misa enkonzweni," 
1Timothy1:13 owayekade engumhlambazi lomzingeli lomthuki; kodwa ngahawukelwa, ngoba ngangi kw enza ngokungazi ekungakholweni;" 
1Timothy1:14 kodwa umusa weNkosi yethu wengezelelwa kakhulu kanye lokholo lothando olukuKristu Jesu. 
1Timothy1:15 Lithembekile lelilizwi njalo lifanele ukwemukelwa konke, ukuthi uKristu Jesu weza emhlabeni ukusindisa izoni, engiyinduna yazo mina;" 
1Timothy1:16 kodwa ngenxa yalokhu ngahawukelwa, ukuze kimi engiyinduna uJesu Kristu abonakalise konke ukubekezela, ngibe yisibonelo kwabazakholwa kuye empilweni ephakade." 
1Timothy1:17 Kuyo-ke iNkosi eyisimakade, engabhubhiyo, engelakubonwa, uNkulunkulu yedwa ohlakaniphileyo, ka kube udumo lobukhosi kuze kube nini lanininini. Ameni." 
1Timothy1:18 Lumlayo ngiwunika wena, mntana mi Timothi, njengeziprofetho ezenzakala kuqala ngawe, ukuze ngazo ulwe ukulwa okuhle," 
1Timothy1:19 ubamba ukholo lesazela esihle, abanye abasininayo, bachithekelwa ngumkhumbi mayelana lokholo;" 
1Timothy1:20 okukubo uHimeneyo loAleksandro, engibanikele kuSathane, ukuze bafunde ukuthi bangahlambazi." 
1Timothy2:1 Ngakho kuqala kukho konke ngikhuthaza ukuthi ukunxusa, imikhuleko, ukulabhela, ukubonga kwenzelwe abantu bonke;" 
1Timothy2:2 amakhosi, labo bonke abayiziphathamandla, ukuze sichithe impilo elokuthula lepholileyo kukho konke ukukhonza uNkulunkulu langenhlonipho;" 
1Timothy2:3 ngoba lokhu kuhle kuyemukeleka phambi kukaNkulunkulu uMsindisi wethu," 
1Timothy2:4 ofuna ukuthi bonke abantu basindiswe njalo beze elwazini lweqiniso. 
1Timothy2:5 Ngoba munye uNkulunkulu, njalo munye umlamuli phakathi kukaNkulunkulu labantu, umuntu uKristu Jesu," 
1Timothy2:6 owazinikela yena ukuba lihlawulo labo bonke, ubufakazi ngezikhathi ezifaneleyo," 
1Timothy2:7 mina engamiselwa khona ukuba ngumtshumayeli lomphostoli (ngikhuluma iqiniso kuKristu, kangiqambi manga) umfundisi wabezizwe ekholweni leqinisweni." 
1Timothy2:8 Ngakho ngifisa ukuthi amadoda akhuleke kuyo yonke indawo, ephakamisa izandla ezingcwele, engelalaka lokuxabana." 
1Timothy2:9 Ngokunjalo labesifazana bazicecise ngezigqoko ezifaneleyo, lenhlonipho lokuqonda, kungabi ngenwele ezelukiweyo, kumbe igolide, kumbe amapharele*, kumbe izembatho ezidulayo," 
1Timothy2:10 kodwa, okufanele abesifazana abathi bakhonza uNkulunkulu, ngemisebenzi emihle." 
1Timothy2:11 Owesifazana kafunde ngokuthula ekuzithobeni konke. 
1Timothy2:12 Kodwa kangivumeli owesifazana ukuthi afundise, kumbe abe lamandla phezu kowesilisa, kodwa abe ekuthuleni." 
1Timothy2:13 Ngoba uAdamu wabunjwa kuqala, emva kwalokho uEva;" 
1Timothy2:14 futhi uAdamu kakhohliswanga, kodwa owesifazana esekhohlisiwe waba sesiphambekweni," 
1Timothy2:15 kodwa uzasindiswa ngokuzala abantwana, uba behlala ekholweni lethandweni lebungcweleni kanye lokuqonda." 
1Timothy3:1 Lithembekile ilizwi elithi: Uba umuntu efisa isikhundla sombonisi, ufisa umsebenzi omuhle;" 
1Timothy3:2 ngakho kumele ukuthi umbonisi abe ngongasolekiyo, indoda yomfazi munye, ozithintayo, oqondileyo, oziphatha ngokufaneleyo, ophatha kuhle izihambi, olelisu lokufundisa;" 
1Timothy3:3 angabi yisidakwa, angabi ngothanda ukulwa, anganxwaneli inzuzo embi, kodwa abe mnene, angabi ngothanda ukuxabana, angabi ngothanda imali;" 
1Timothy3:4 ephatha kuhle owakhe umuzi, elabantwana abalalela ngenhlonipho yonke," 
1Timothy3:5 ngoba uba umuntu engakwazi ukuphatha owakhe umuzi, angaligcina njani ibandla likaNkulunkulu?" 
1Timothy3:6 Kangabi ngosanda ukukholwa, hlezi ngokukhukhunyezwa awele ekulahlweni kukaSathane." 
1Timothy3:7 Kumele futhi ukuthi abe lobufakazi obuhle kwabangaphandle, hlezi awele ekuthukweni l e mjibil eni kaSathane." 
1Timothy3:8 Ngokunjalo abadikoni bahlonipheke, bangabi ndimimbili, abangananzi iwayini elinengi, abangafisi inzuzo embi," 
1Timothy3:9 babambe imfihlo yokholo esazeleni esimhlophe. 
1Timothy3:10 Laba-ke kabaqale bahlolwe, okulandelayo kabakhonze uba bengasoleki." 
1Timothy3:11 Ngokunjalo omka bo babe ng abahloniphekayo, abanganyeyiyo, abazithintayo, bethembekile ezintweni zonke." 
1Timothy3:12 Abadikoni kababe ngamadoda amfazi munye, aphatha kuhle abantwana leyawo imizi." 
1Timothy3:13 Ngoba abakhonze kuhle bazizuzela isimilo esihle, lesibindi esikhulu ekholweni olukuKristu Jesu." 
1Timothy3:14 Lezizinto ngikubhalela zona, ngithemba ukuza kuwe masinyane;" 
1Timothy3:15 kodwa uba ngibambeka, ukuze wazi ukuthi kufanele uziphathe njani endlini kaNkulunkulu, elibandla likaNkulunkulu ophilayo, insika lesisekelo seqiniso." 
1Timothy3:16 Kuyavunywa-ke ukuthi yinkulu imfihlo yokukhonza uNkulunkulu: UNkulunkulu wabonakaliswa enyameni, wathiwa ulungile kuMoya, wabonwa zingilosi, watshunyayelwa ezizweni, wakholeka emhlabeni, wenyuselwa ebukhosini." 
1Timothy4:1 UMoya-ke utsho ngokucacileyo ukuthi ngezikhathi zokucina abanye bazahlehlela emuva ekholweni, balalele omoya abaduhisayo lemfundiso zamadimoni," 
1Timothy4:2 ekuzenziseni kwabaqambimanga, betshiswe kwezabo izazela ngensimbi etshisayo," 
1Timothy4:3 besalela ukuthathana, bezila ukudla uNkulunkulu akudalileyo ekwemukelweni lokubonga ngabakholwayo labazi iqiniso;" 
1Timothy4:4 ngoba sonke isidalwa sikaNkulunkulu sihle, kakulahlwa lutho, uba lwemukelwa kanye lokubonga;" 
1Timothy4:5 ngoba luyangcweliswa ngelizwi likaNkulunkulu la ngo mkhuleko. 
1Timothy4:6 Uba ubeluleka lezizinto abazalwane uzakuba yisikhonzi esihle sikaJesu Kristu, wondliwe emazwini okholo, lawemfundiso enhle oyilandelayo ngokunanzelela." 
1Timothy4:7 Kodwa wale inganekwane ezimbi lezezalukazi. Uzejwayeze ukukhonza uNkulunkulu; 
1Timothy4:8 ngoba ukwejwayeza umzimba kulokusiza okuncinyane; kodwa ukukhonza uNkulunkulu kusiza ezintweni zonke, kulesithembiso sempilo yalamuhla lezayo." 
1Timothy4:9 Lithembekile ilizwi njalo lifanele konke ukwemukelwa. 
1Timothy4:10 Ngoba ngalokho lathi siyasebenza nzima futhi siyathukwa ngoba sithembele kuNkulunkulu ophilayo onguMsindisi wabo bonke abantu, ikakhulu wabakholwayo." 
1Timothy4:11 Laya nga lezizinto ufundise. 
1Timothy4:12 Kungabi lamuntu odelela ubutsha bakho, kodwa woba yisibonelo kwabakholwayo elizwini, ekuhambeni, ethandweni, emoyeni, ekholweni, ekuhlambulukeni." 
1Timothy4:13 Ngize ngifike, nanzelela ekubaleni, ekulayeni, ekufundiseni." 
1Timothy4:14 Ungadeleli isiphiwo esikuwe, owasiphiwa ngesiprofetho kanye lokubekwa izandla zobudala." 
1Timothy4:15 Nakana ngalezizinto, ube kulezizinto, ukuze ukuqhubeka kwakho kubonakale phakathi kwabo bonke." 
1Timothy4:16 Zinanzelele wena lemfundiso. Hlala kulezizinto; ngoba ngokwenza lokho uzazisindisa wena kanye lalabo abakuzwayo. 
1Timothy5:1 Ungamkhalimeli omdala, kodwa m eluleke njengoyihlo; abatsha njengabafowenu;" 
1Timothy5:2 abesifazana abadala njengonyoko; abesifazana abatsha njengabodadewenu, ekuhlambulukeni konke." 
1Timothy5:3 Hlonipha abafelokazi abangabafelokazi isibili. 
1Timothy5:4 Kodwa uba umfelokazi othile elabantwana loba abazukulu, kabafunde kuqala ukuhlonipha indlu yakwabo, kabenanise umkhondo kubazali; ngoba lokhu kuhle kuyemukeleka phambi kukaNkulunkulu." 
1Timothy5:5 Lowo-ke ongumfelokazi isibili osele yedwa uthembele kuNkulunkulu, uhlala ekunxuseni lemikhulekweni ebusuku lemini." 
1Timothy5:6 Kanti lowo ozinikela ekuzithokoziseni, ufile ephila." 
1Timothy5:7 Laya-ke nga lezizinto, ukuze bangasoleki." 
1Timothy5:8 Kodwa uba umuntu engondli abakibo, ikakhulu abendlu yakhe, uluphikile ukholo, futhi mubi kulongakholwayo." 
1Timothy5:9 Kabalwa umfelokazi ongengaphansi kweminyaka engamatshumi ayisithupha, umfazi owake wenda endodeni kanye," 
1Timothy5:10 onconywa ngemisebenzi emihle, uba ondle abantwana, uba engenise izihambi, uba egezise inyawo zabangcwele, uba esize abahluphekayo, uba ekhuthalele wonke umsebenzi omuhle." 
1Timothy5:11 Kodwa abafelokazi abatsha ubale; ngoba nxa sebelenkanuko ezimelana loKristu, bafuna ukwenda;" 
1Timothy5:12 balokulahlwa, ngoba bachithile ukholo lwabo lokuqala." 
1Timothy5:13 Futhi ngesikhathi esifananayo-ke bafunda ukuvilapha bezula lezindlu, futhi benga vilaphi kuphela, kodwa babuye bahlebe bengena kokungeyisikho okwabo, bekhuluma okungafanelanga." 
1Timothy5:14 Ngakho ngifisa ukuthi abafelokazi abatsha bende, bazale abantwana, baphathe umuzi wabo, banganiki isitha lathuba lokuthuka." 
1Timothy5:15 Ngoba lakhathesi abanye sebephambuke balandela uSathane. 
1Timothy5:16 Uba okholwayo owesilisa kumbe okholwayo owesifazana elabafelokazi, kabasize, njalo ibandla lingathwaliswa nzima, ukuze lisize abangabafelokazi isibili." 
1Timothy5:17 Abadala abaphatha kuhle bafanele ukuhlonitshwa ngokuphindiweyo, ikakhulu labo abasebenza nzima elizwini lekufundiseni;" 
1Timothy5:18 ngoba umbhalo uthi: Ungayifaki isayeke inkabi ebhulayo; futhi uthi: Isisebenzi sifanele iholo laso. 
1Timothy5:19 Ungalemukeli icala elimelana lomdala, ngaphandle phambi kwabafakazi ababili kumbe abathathu." 
1Timothy5:20 Abonayo basole phambi kwabo bonke, ukuze abanye labo babe lokwesaba." 
1Timothy5:21 Ngiya ku layisisa phambi kukaNkulunkulu leNkosi uJesu Kristu lengilosi ezikhethiweyo, ukuze uzigcine lezizinto ngokungaqumi okungakathoniswa, ungenzi lutho ngokubandlulula." 
1Timothy5:22 Ungaphangisi ukubeka izandla phezu komuntu, futhi ungahlanganyeli ezonweni zabanye; uzigcine wena umsulwa." 
1Timothy5:23 Ungabe usanatha amanzi wodwa, kodwa sebenzisa iwayini elilutshwana, ngenxa yesisu sakho lemikhuhlane yakho futhifuthi." 
1Timothy5:24 Izono zabanye abantu zisobala, zibaqalela ukuya ekugwetshweni; kanti ezabanye ziyalandela." 
1Timothy5:25 Ngokunjalo lemisebenzi emihle isobala; laleyo eyehlukileyo ingeke ifihlakale. 
1Timothy6:1 Bonke abangaphansi kwejogwe, izigqili, kabathi amakhosi abo afanele konke ukuhlonitshwa, ukuze ibizo likaNkulunkulu lemfundiso kungadunyazwa;" 
1Timothy6:2 labalamakhosi akholwayo banga wa deleli, ngoba engabazalwane; kodwa kulalokhu kaba wa sebenzele, ngoba ekholwa njalo ethandeka, abahlanganyeli benzuzo. Fundisa njalo ukhuthaze lezizinto." 
1Timothy6:3 Uba kukhona ofundisa okwehlukileyo, njalo engavumelani lamazwi aphilileyo, aweNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu, lemfundiso evumelana lokukhonza uNkulunkulu," 
1Timothy6:4 uyazikhukhumeza, kazi lutho, kodwa ubulawa yinkani lemibuzo lokuphikisana ngamazwi, okuvela kukho umona, umbango, ukuthuka, imicabango emibi," 
1Timothy6:5 ukuxabaxabana kwabantu abangqondo yabo yonakele, labalahlekelwe liqiniso, besithi ukukhonza uNkulunkulu kuyindlela yenzuzo. Zehlukanise labanjalo." 
1Timothy6:6 Kodwa ukukhonza uNkulunkulu lokwenela kuyinzuzo enkulu; 
1Timothy6:7 ngoba kasizanga lalutho emhlabeni; kusobala ukuthi kasiyikusuka lalutho; 
1Timothy6:8 kodwa uba silokudla lezembatho sizakweneliswa yikho. 
1Timothy6:9 Kodwa abafisa ukunotha bawela ekulingweni lemjibileni, lenkanukweni ezinengi zobuphukuphuku ezilimazayo, ezicwilisela abantu encithakalweni lekubhujisweni;" 
1Timothy6:10 ngoba uthando lwemali luyimpande yakho konke okubi; abanye beyifisa baduhile ekholweni, bazigwaza ngenhlungu ezinengi." 
1Timothy6:11 Kodwa wena O muntu kaNkulunkulu, balekela lezizinto; njalo udingisise ukulunga, ukwesaba uNkulunkulu, ukholo, uthando, ukubekezela, ubumnene." 
1Timothy6:12 Lwana ukulwa okuhle kokholo, ubambelele empilweni ephakade, owabizelwa kuyo, wavuma uvumo oluhle phambi kwabafakazi abanengi." 
1Timothy6:13 Ngiyakulaya phambi kukaNkulunkulu ophilisa konke, loKristu Jesu owafakaza uvumo oluhle phambi kukaPontiyusi Pilatu," 
1Timothy6:14 ukuthi ugcine umthetho ungelasici, ungasoleki, kuze kube sekubonakaleni kweNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu," 
1Timothy6:15 ozakubonakalisa ngezakhe izikhathi oBusisiweyo loSomandla oyedwa, iNkosi yamakhosi, loMbusi wababusi," 
1Timothy6:16 yena yedwa olokungafi, ohlala ekukhanyeni okungelakusondelelwa, akulamuntu ebantwini owambonayo, kumbe ongambona; okukuye udumo lamandla aphakade. Ameni." 
1Timothy6:17 Laya abanothileyo emhlabeni wakhathesi ukuthi bangazigqaji, bangathembeli ekungaqondini kwenotho, kodwa kuNkulunkulu ophilayo osipha ngokunotha zonke izinto ukuze sithokoze," 
1Timothy6:18 benze okuhle, banothe emisebenzini emihle, balungele ukupha, ukwabelana ngesihle," 
1Timothy6:19 bazibekele isisekelo esihle sibek elwa okuzayo, ukuze babambe impilo elaphakade." 
1Timothy6:20 O Timothi, londoloza kuhle okubekwe kuwe, xwaya ukukhuluma okuyize okungcolileyo lokuphikisana kwalokho okuthiwa lulwazi kungeyisilo," 
1Timothy6:21 okuthe abanye ngokukuvuma baduha ekholweni. Umusa kawube lani. Ameni. 
2Timothy1:1 UPawuli umphostoli kaJesu Kristu ngentando kaNkulunkulu, njengokwesithembiso sempilo ekuKristu Jesu," 
2Timothy1:2 kuTimothi, umntana mi othandekayo: Umusa, isihawu, ukuthula okuvela kuNkulunkulu uBaba, loKristu Jesu iNkosi yethu." 
2Timothy1:3 Ngiyambonga uNkulunkulu, engimkhonzayo kusukela kubokhokho esazeleni esimhlophe, njengalokhu ngikukhumbula ngokungaphezi emikhulekweni yami ebusuku lemini," 
2Timothy1:4 ngilangatha ukukubona, ngikhumbula inyembezi zakho, ukuze ngigcwaliswe ngentokozo," 
2Timothy1:5 nxa ngibeka emkhumbulweni ukholo olungelakuzenzisa olukuwe, olwaluhlezi kugogo wakho uLoyisi kuqala lakunyoko uYunike, njalo ngithemba ukuthi lukhona lakuwe." 
2Timothy1:6 Ngenxa yalesisizatho ngiyakukhumbuza ukuthi uvuselele isipho sikaNkulunkulu, esikuwe ngokubekwa kwezandla zami." 
2Timothy1:7 Ngoba uNkulunkulu kasinikanga umoya wobugwala, kodwa owamandla lowothando lowokuqonda." 
2Timothy1:8 Ngakho ungabi lanhloni ngobufakazi beNkosi yethu, loba ngami isibotshwa sayo; kodwa kumele uhlupheke kanye levangeli njengamandla kaNkulunkulu," 
2Timothy1:9 owasisindisayo, njalo wa si biza ngobizo olungcwele, kungeyisikho njengemisebenzi yethu kodwa ngokwelakhe icebo langomusa asinika wona kuKristu Jesu kungakafiki izibanga zezikhathi," 
2Timothy1:10 kodwa oselubonakaliswe khathesi ngokubonakala koMsindisi wethu uJesu Kristu, owachitha ukufa, waseletha ekukhanyeni impilo lokungabhubhi ngevangeli," 
2Timothy1:11 engamiselwa lona mina ukuba ngumtshumayeli lomphostoli lomfundisi wezizwe. 
2Timothy1:12 Ngenxa yalesisizatho lami ngiyahlupheka lezizinto, kodwa kangilanhloni; ngoba ngiyamazi engikholwe kuye, njalo ngileqiniso ukuthi ulamandla okulondoloza lokho engikubeke ku ye kuze kufike lolosuku." 
2Timothy1:13 Bambelela kusibonelo samazwi aphilileyo owawezwayo kimi, ekholweni l e thand weni olukuKristu Jesu." 
2Timothy1:14 Lokhu okuhle okuphathisiweyo kulondoloze ngoMoya oNgcwele ohlezi kithi. 
2Timothy1:15 Uyakwazi lokhu, ukuthi bonke abaseAsiya bangihlamuka, okukubo uFigelo loHermogene." 
2Timothy1:16 Sengathi iNkosi inganika umusa indlu kaOnesiforo; ngoba wangivuselela kanengi, njalo wayengelanhloni ngeketane lami," 
2Timothy1:17 kodwa ekufikeni kwakhe eRoma, wangidingisisa kakhulu wase ngi thola;" 
2Timothy1:18 sengathi iNkosi ingamnika ukuthi athole isihawu eNkosini ngalolosuku; lokuthi zingaki izinto a ng enzela zona eEfesu, uyakwazi wena kuhle kakhulu." 
2Timothy2:1 Ngakho wena, mntanami, qiniswa emuseni okuKristu Jesu." 
2Timothy2:2 Lezinto owazizwa kimi phakathi kwabafakazi abanengi, zinikele ebantwini abathembekileyo, abazakuba lamandla okufundisa labanye." 
2Timothy2:3 Ngakho wena hlupheka ngobunzima, njengebutho elihle likaJesu Kristu." 
2Timothy2:4 Kakho osebenza njengebutho okhanywa zindaba zempilo, ukuze amkholise lowo o m buthileyo." 
2Timothy2:5 Futhi nxa lomuntu encintisana, kanikwa umqhele ngaphandle kokuthi encintisana ngokomthetho." 
2Timothy2:6 Kufanele umlimi osebenza kakhulu emukele kuqala izithelo. 
2Timothy2:7 Nakana ngezinto engizitshoyo; njalo sengathi iNkosi ingakunika ukuqedisisa ezintweni zonke. 
2Timothy2:8 Khumbula ukuthi uJesu Kristu wavuswa kwabafileyo, owenzalo kaDavida, njengokwevangeli lami;" 
2Timothy2:9 engihlupheka kulo okubi kuze kube kuzibopho, njengomenzi wobubi; kanti ilizwi likaNkulunkulu kalibotshwanga." 
2Timothy2:10 Ngakho ngikubekezelele konke ngenxa yabakhethiweyo, ukuze labo bazuze usindiso olukuKristu Jesu, kanye lobukhosi obuphakade." 
2Timothy2:11 Lithembekile ilizwi elithi: Ngoba uba safa kanye la ye, sizaphila kanye la ye futhi;" 
2Timothy2:12 uba sibekezela, lathi sizabusa kanye la ye; uba si m phika, laye uzasiphika;" 
2Timothy2:13 uba singathembeki, yena uhlala ethembekile; angeziphike yena." 
2Timothy2:14 Ba khumbuze lezizinto, ulayisise phambi kweNkosi ukungaphikisi ngamazwi kokungasizi lutho, ngaphandle kokuduhiswa kwabezwayo." 
2Timothy2:15 Khuthalela ukuthi uziveze kuNkulunkulu uthembekile, isisebenzi esingelambangela yokuba lenhloni, esiqondisa kuhle ilizwi leqiniso." 
2Timothy2:16 Kodwa xwaya ukukhuluma okungcolileyo okuyize; ngoba bazaqhubeka ekungamesabini uNkulunkulu okukhulu," 
2Timothy2:17 lelizwi labo lizabhibhidla okwemvukuzane; okukubo uHimeneyo loFileto; 
2Timothy2:18 abaduhileyo eqinisweni, besithi ukuvuka kwabafileyo sekudlule, begenqula ukholo lwabanye." 
2Timothy2:19 Loba kunjalo isisekelo sikaNkulunkulu simi siqinile, silaloluphawu lokuthi: INkosi iyabazi abangabayo, lo kuthi: Wonke obiza ibizo likaKristu kehlukane lokungalungi." 
2Timothy2:20 Kodwa endlini enkulu kakukho izitsha zegolide lezesiliva kuphela, kodwa lezesihlahla lezebumba, njalo ezinye ngezenhlonipho, kodwa ezinye ngezokungahlonitshwa." 
2Timothy2:21 Ngakho uba umuntu ezihlambulula kulezizinto, uzakuba yisitsha senhlonipho, esingcwelisiweyo, njalo esilosizo kumninindlu, sesilungiselwe wonke umsebenzi omuhle." 
2Timothy2:22 Balekela-ke inkanuko yobutsha, kodwa udingisise ukulunga, ukholo, uthando, ukuthula kanye labo ababiza iNkosi kuvela enhliziyweni emhlophe." 
2Timothy2:23 Kodwa yala ukuphikisana okobuthutha lokokungafundi, usazi ukuthi kubanga ukulwa." 
2Timothy2:24 Inceku yeNkosi-ke kayifanele ukulwisa, kodwa ukuba mnene kibo bonke, ibe lelisu lokufundisa, ibekezele," 
2Timothy2:25 ibeluleke ngobumnene abalenkani; mhlawumbe uNkulunkulu angabanika ukuphenduka baye kulwazi lweqiniso," 
2Timothy2:26 njalo basanguluke kumjibila kaSathane, ababanjwe nguye entandweni yakhe." 
2Timothy3:1 Kodwa yazi lokhu, ukuthi ensukwini zokucina kuzafika izikhathi ezinzima." 
2Timothy3:2 Ngoba abantu bazakuba ngabazithandayo, abathanda imali, abaziqakisayo, abazigqajayo, abahlambazayo, abangalaleli abazali, abangabongiyo, abangangcwele," 
2Timothy3:3 abangelathando ngemvelo, abangelakuxoliswa, abahlebayo, abangazikhuziyo, abalolaka, abangathandi okuhle," 
2Timothy3:4 abanikela abanye, abalamawala, abazikhukhumezayo, abathanda intokozo kulokuthanda uNkulunkulu," 
2Timothy3:5 abalesimo sokukhonza uNkulunkulu, kodwa amandla alo bewaphika; labanjalo baxwaye." 
2Timothy3:6 Ngoba okuvela kubo labo ngabanyenyela ezindlini, njalo bathumbe abesifazana ababuthakathaka abasindwa yizono, bebuswa zinkanuko eziyinhlobonhlobo," 
2Timothy3:7 befunda njalonjalo, futhi bengasoze babelakho ukufika elwazini lweqiniso." 
2Timothy3:8 Njengoba-ke uJane loJambere bamelana loMozisi, ngokunjalo lalaba bamelana leqiniso, abantu abalengqondo eyonakeleyo, abangasizi lutho mayelana lokholo." 
2Timothy3:9 Kodwa kabayikuqhubekela phambili; ngoba ubuthutha babo buzakuba sobala kibo bonke, njengoba kwaba njalo lakobabo." 
2Timothy3:10 Kodwa wena ulandele ngokunanzelela imfundiso yami, ukuziphatha, injongo, ukholo, ukubekezela, uthando, ukuqinisela," 
2Timothy3:11 ukuzingelwa, izinhlupheko, njengalokhu okwangehlela eAntiyoki, eIkoniyuma, eListra, ukuzingelwa okunjani engakuthwalayo; njalo kukho konke iNkosi yangophula." 
2Timothy3:12 Isibili labo bonke abathanda ukuphila ngokwesaba uNkulunkulu kuKristu Jesu bazazingelwa; 
2Timothy3:13 kodwa abantu ababi labakhohlisi bazaqhubekela phambili bedlulisa ebubini, bekhohlisa njalo bekhohliswa." 
2Timothy3:14 Kodwa wena mana kulezozinto ozifundileyo lowaqiniseka kuzo, usazi ukuthi u zi funde kubani," 
2Timothy3:15 lokuthi kusukela ebuntwaneni wayazi imibhalo engcwele, elamandla okukuhlakaniphisa kube sesindisweni ngokholo olukuKristu Jesu." 
2Timothy3:16 Wonke umbhalo waphefumulelwa nguNkulunkulu, njalo ulungele imfundiso, ukukhalimela, ukuqondisa, ukufundisa okusekulungeni;" 
2Timothy3:17 ukuze umuntu kaNkulunkulu aphelele, alungisiselwe wonke umsebenzi omuhle." 
2Timothy4:1 Ngakho mina ngiyalayisisa phambi kukaNkulunkulu, leNkosi uJesu Kristu, ozakwahlulela abaphilayo labafileyo, ekubonakaleni kwakhe lembusweni wakhe," 
2Timothy4:2 tshumayela ilizwi, ulunge ngesikhathi esilungileyo, ngesikhathi esingalunganga, sola, ukhuze, weluleke, ekubekezeleni konke lemfundisweni." 
2Timothy4:3 Ngoba kuzakuba lesikhathi lapho bengayikuvuma imfundiso ephilileyo, kodwa ngokowabo umhawu bazazibuthelelela abafundisi, belunywa zindlebe;" 
2Timothy4:4 njalo bazafulathelisa indlebe zabo eqinisweni, bazaphambukela ezinganekwaneni." 
2Timothy4:5 Kodwa wena qonda ezintweni zonke, ubekezelele inhlupheko, wenze umsebenzi womvangeli, ugcwalise inkonzo yakho." 
2Timothy4:6 Ngoba mina sengithululwe njengomnikelo wokunathwayo, lesikhathi sokusuka kwami sesifikile." 
2Timothy4:7 Ngilwile ukulwa okuhle, ngiqedile uhambo, ngilondolozile ukholo;" 
2Timothy4:8 kusukela khathesi, ngibekelwe umqhele wokulunga, ezanginika wona ngalolosuku iNkosi, umahluleli olungileyo; kodwa kungeyisimi ngedwa, kodwa labo bonke abathanda ukubonakala kwayo." 
2Timothy4:9 Khuthala ukuza kimi masinyane; 
2Timothy4:10 ngoba uDema ungihlamukile, ethande umhlaba wakhathesi, waya eThesalonika; uKresena eGalathiya, uTitosi eDalmathiya." 
2Timothy4:11 ULuka yedwa ulami. Thatha uMarko ubuye la ye; ngoba uloncedo kakhulu kimi enkonzweni. 
2Timothy4:11 ULuka yedwa ulami. Thatha uMarko ubuye la ye; ngoba uloncedo kakhulu kimi enkonzweni. 
2Timothy4:12 Kodwa uTikiko ngimthume eEfesu. 
2Timothy4:13 Ulethe isembatho engasitshiya kuKarpo eTrowasi, nxa ubuya, lezingwalo, ikakhulu incwadi zesikhumba." 
2Timothy4:14 UAleksandro umkhandi wethusi wangitshengisa okubi okunengi; sengathi iNkosi ingambuyisela njengokwemisebenzi yakhe; 
2Timothy4:15 umnanzelele lawe, ngoba wamelana kakhulukazi lamazwi ethu." 
2Timothy4:16 Ekuziphenduleleni kwami kwakuqala kwakungekho muntu owangimelayo, kodwa bonke bangihlamuka; sengathi kungebalelwe kibo." 
2Timothy4:17 Kodwa iNkosi yangimela, yangipha amandla, ukuze ngami ukutshumayela kupheleliswe, lezizwe zonke zizwe; ngasengikhululwa emlonyeni wesilwane," 
2Timothy4:18 njalo iNkosi izangikhulula kuwo wonke umsebenzi omubi, njalo iza ngi sindisela umbuso wayo wezulu; kakube kuyo ubukhosi kuze kube phakade laphakade. Ameni." 
2Timothy4:19 Bingelela uPriska loAkwila, lendlu kaOnesiforo." 
2Timothy4:20 UErastu wasala eKorinte; kodwa uTrofimu ngamtshiya eMilethu egula. 
2Timothy4:21 Khuthala ufike ubusika bungakafiki. UYubulu uyakubingelela, loPudeni, loLino, loKlawudiya, labo bonke abazalwane." 
2Timothy4:22 INkosi uJesu Kristu kayibe lomoya wakho. Umusa kawube lani. Ameni. 
Titus1:1 UPawuli, inceku kaNkulunkulu, lomphostoli kaJesu Kristu, njengokokholo lwabakhethiweyo bakaNkulunkulu lolwazi lweqiniso olunjengokukhonza uNkulunkulu," 
Titus1:2 ethembeni lempilo elaphakade, uNkulunkulu ongaqambi manga alithembisa zingakafiki izibanga zesikhathi," 
Titus1:3 kodwa wabonakalisa ngezikhathi ezifaneleyo ilizwi lakhe ngokutshumayela mina engakuphathiswayo njengokulaya kukaNkulunkulu uMsindisi wethu," 
Titus1:4 kuTitosi umntana mi isibili njengokholo esiluhlanganyele sonke: Umusa, isihawu, ukuthula okuvela kuNkulunkulu uBaba, leNkosini uJesu Kristu uMsindisi wethu." 
Titus1:5 Ngenxa yalokhu ngakutshiya eKrete, ukuze ulungise lezozinto ezitshiyiweyo, njalo ubeke abadala kuwo wonke umuzi, njengoba mina ngakulaya;" 
Titus1:6 uba kukhona ongasolekiyo, indoda elomfazi munye, elabantwana abakholwayo, abangasolwa ngokuganga, loba ngokungalaleli." 
Titus1:7 Ngoba kufanele umbonisi abe ngongasolekiyo, njengomphathindlu kaNkulunkulu; ongayisiso siqholo, ongathukutheli masinyane, ongesiso sidakwa, ongathandi ukulwa, ongafisi inzuzo embi," 
Titus1:8 kodwa ophatha kuhle izihambi, othanda okuhle, oziphathayo, oqondileyo, ongcwele, ozithintayo," 
Titus1:9 ebambelela elizwini elithembekileyo njengokwemfundiso, ukuze laye abe lamandla okukhuthaza ngemfundiso ephilileyo, lokwehlula labo abalenkani." 
Titus1:10 Ngoba kulabanengi labo abangalaleliyo, abakhuluma okuyize labakhohlisayo, ikakhulu labo abokusoka," 
Titus1:11 imilomo yabo imele ukufakwa isayeke, abagenqula imizi yonke, befundisa izinto ezingafanelanga, ngenxa yenzuzo embi." 
Titus1:12 Omunye kibo, owabo umprofethi, wathi: AmaKrete bahlala bengabaqambimanga, izilo ezimbi, iziminzi ezivilaphayo." 
Titus1:13 Lobubufakazi buqinisile. Ngalesosizatho balayisise ngobukhali, ukuze baphile ekholweni," 
Titus1:14 bangalaleli inganekwane zamaJuda, lemithetho yabantu abafulathela iqiniso." 
Titus1:15 Kwabahlambulukileyo konke kuhlambulukile; kodwa kwabangcolileyo labangakholwayo kakulalutho oluhlanzekileyo; kodwa lengqondo lezazela zabo kungcolile. 
Titus1:16 Bavuma ukuthi bayamazi uNkulunkulu, kodwa be m phika ngezenzo, besenyanyeka, labangalaleliyo, lakuwo wonke umsebenzi omuhle kabasizi lutho." 
Titus2:1 Kodwa wena khuluma izinto ezifanele imfundiso ephilileyo. 
Titus2:2 Amadoda amadala ukuthi azithinte, ahlonipheke, engaqondileyo, ephilile ekholweni, ethandweni, ekubekezeleni;" 
Titus2:3 abesifazana abadala ngokunjalo ukuthi baziphathe ngokufanele abangcwele, bangabi ngabahlebayo, bangafuywa liwayini elinengi, abafundisi bokuhle," 
Titus2:4 ukuze bafundise abesifazana abatsha ukuthi baqonde, babengabathandi babomkabo, bathande abantwana babo," 
Titus2:5 abaqondileyo, bemhlophe, begcina amakhaya, belungile, bezehlisela ngaphansi kwawabo amadoda, ukuze ilizwi likaNkulunkulu lingadunyazwa." 
Titus2:6 Abesilisa abatsha ngokunjalo ubakhuthaze ukuthi babe ngabaqondileyo; 
Titus2:7 mayelana lazo zonke izinto zitshengise uyisibonelo sezenzo ezinhle: Ekufundiseni okungabolanga, ubunzulu, ukuqonda," 
Titus2:8 ilizwi eliphilileyo, elingasolekiyo; ukuze omelana la ni abe lenhloni, aswele ulutho olubi angalukhuluma ngani." 
Titus2:9 Khuthaza izigqili ukuthi zizehlisele ngaphansi kwawazo amakhosi, zikholeke ezintweni zonke, zingabi lankani," 
Titus2:10 zingantshontshi, kodwa zitshengise konke ukuthembeka okuhle, ukuze zicecise imfundiso kaNkulunkulu uMsindisi wethu ezintweni zonke." 
Titus2:11 Ngoba ubonakele umusa kaNkulunkulu osindisayo ebantwini bonke," 
Titus2:12 usifundisa ukuthi, sidele ukungakhonzi uNkulunkulu lenkanuko zomhlaba, siphile ngokuqonda langokulunga langokwesaba uNkulunkulu emhlabeni wakhathesi," 
Titus2:13 silindele ithemba elibusisiweyo lokubonakala kwenkazimulo kaNkulunkulu omkhulu loMsindisi wethu uJesu Kristu," 
Titus2:14 owazinikelela thina, ukuze asihlenge ebubini bonke, uzihlambululele isizwe esikhethekileyo, esitshisekela imisebenzi emihle." 
Titus2:15 Khuluma lezizinto, ukhuthaze, ukhuze ulamandla wonke. Kungabi khona umuntu okudelelayo." 
Titus3:1 Bakhumbuze ukuthi bazehlisele ngaphansi kwababusi leziphathamandla, ba ba lalele, balungele wonke umsebenzi omuhle," 
Titus3:2 bangahlebi muntu, bangabi yizilwi, babekezele, batshengise bonke ubumnene ebantwini bonke." 
Titus3:3 Ngoba lathi kade sasiyiziphukuphuku, singalaleli, sikhohliswa, sisebenzela inkanuko lentokozo ezinenginengi, sihlezi ebubini lemoneni, sizondeka, sizondana." 
Titus3:4 Kodwa lapho sekubonakele umusa lothando lukaNkulunkulu uMsindisi wethu kubantu," 
Titus3:5 kungeyisikho okuvela ezenzweni zokulunga esazenzayo thina, kodwa njengokwesihawu sakhe wasisindisa, ngokugeziswa kokuzalwa kutsha lokuvuselelwa koMoya oNgcwele," 
Titus3:6 owamthulula ngokwengeziweyo phezu kwethu, ngoJesu Kristu uMsindisi wethu," 
Titus3:7 ukuze silungisiswe ngomusa wakhe, sibe yizindlalifa ngokwethemba lempilo elaphakade." 
Titus3:8 Lithembekile ilizwi, njalo ngithanda ukuthi uqinise isibili ngalezizinto, ukuze abakholwa kuNkulunkulu bakhuthalele ukuma emisebenzini emihle. Lezi yizinto ezinhle ezilosizo ebantwini;" 
Titus3:9 kodwa xwaya imibuzo yobuthutha lendaba zosendo olokuzalana lombango lokuphikisana ngomlayo; ngoba kazisizi futhi ziyize. 
Titus3:10 Umuntu obhazukayo emva kwesilayo sokuqala lesesibili, mdele," 
Titus3:11 usazi ukuthi onjalo uphambukile, uyona, uyazilahla yena." 
Titus3:12 Nxa ngizathuma uArtema kuwe loba uTikiko, khuthala uze kimi eNikapoli; ngoba ngizimisele ukuhlala khona ebusika." 
Titus3:13 Khuthala uncedise uZena isazumthetho loApolosi ekuhambeni kwabo, ukuze kungabi lalutho oluswelakalayo kubo." 
Titus3:14 Abakithi-ke labo kabafunde ukuma emisebenzini emihle yokudingekayo kusweleka, ukuze bangabi ngabangelazithelo." 
Titus3:15 Bonke abalami bayakubingelela. Bingelela abasithandayo ekholweni. Umusa kawube lani lonke. Ameni. 
Philemon1:1 UPawuli isibotshwa sikaKristu Jesu loTimothi umzalwane, kuFilimoni othandekayo lesisebenzi kanye lathi," 
Philemon1:2 lakuApifiya othandekayo, lakuArkipho owebutho kanye lathi, lakubandla elisendlini yakho:" 
Philemon1:3 Umusa kawube kini lokuthula okuvela kuNkulunkulu uBaba wethu leNkosini uJesu Kristu. 
Philemon1:4 Ngiyambonga uNkulunkulu wami, ngikuphatha ngezikhathi zonke emikhulekweni yami," 
Philemon1:5 ngisizwa ngothando lwakho langokholo olalo eNkosini uJesu lakubo bonke abangcwele," 
Philemon1:6 ukuze ukuhlanganyela kokholo lwakho kube lamandla elwazini lwento yonke enhle ekini kuKristu Jesu. 
Philemon1:7 Ngoba silentokozo enkulu lenduduzo ethandweni lwakho, ngoba imibilini yabangcwele yavuselelwa ngawe, mzalwane." 
Philemon1:8 Ngalokho, lanxa ngilesibindi esikhulu kuKristu sokuthi ngikulaye into efaneleyo," 
Philemon1:9 kanti ngenxa yothando kungcono ukuthi ngincenge, nginjengonje, uPawuli omdala, esengiyisibotshwa futhi sikaJesu Kristu." 
Philemon1:10 Ngiyakuncenga ngomntanami, engimzeleyo kuzibopho zami, uOnesimo," 
Philemon1:11 okade engelasizo kuwe, kodwa khathesi-ke ulosizo kuwe lakimi," 
Philemon1:12 engimbuyisela kuwe; kodwa wena, memukele, okuyikuthi imibilini yami;" 
Philemon1:13 ebengifisa mina ukumbamba abe lami, ukuze angisebenzele esikhundleni sakho kuzibopho zevangeli;" 
Philemon1:14 kodwa kangithandanga ukwenza ulutho ngaphandle kwemvumo yakho, ukuze okuhle kwakho kungabi ngokokubanjwa ngamandla, kodwa njengokwesihle." 
Philemon1:15 Ngoba mhlawumbe wehlukaniswa lawe okwesikhatshana ngenxa yalokhu, ukuze ubuye umemukele phakade;" 
Philemon1:16 angabe esaba njengesigqili, kodwa ngaphezu kwesigqili, umzalwane othandekayo, ikakhulu kimi, kodwa kakhulu kangakanani kuwe konke enyameni leNkosini." 
Philemon1:17 Ngakho uba usithi ngingumhlanganyeli lawe, memukele njengami." 
Philemon1:18 Kodwa uba ekone ng olutho kumbe elomlandu, lokho kubalele kimi;" 
Philemon1:19 mina Pawuli ngibhale ngesandla sami, mina ngizakuhlawula; ukuze ngingatsho kuwe ukuthi ulomlandu oseleyo kimi lawe uqobo." 
Philemon1:20 Yebo, mzalwane, sengathi ngingaba lentokozo ngawe eNkosini; uvuselele imibilini yami eNkosini." 
Philemon1:21 Ngikubhalele ngithemba ukulalela kwakho, ngisazi ukuthi lawe uzakwenza okungaphezu kwalokho engikutshoyo." 
Philemon1:22 Futhi ngesikhathi esifananayo ungilungisele lami indawo; ngoba ngiyathemba ukuthi ngemikhuleko yenu ngizanikwa kini. 
Philemon1:23 Uyakubingelela uEpafra oyisibotshwa kanye lami kuKristu Jesu," 
Philemon1:24 uMarko, uAristako, uDema, uLuka, izisebenzi kanye lami." 
Philemon1:24 uMarko, uAristako, uDema, uLuka, izisebenzi kanye lami." 
Philemon1:25 Umusa weNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu kawube lomoya wenu. Ameni. 
Hebrews1:1 UNkulunkulu owakhuluma endulo kubobaba ngabaprofethi ngezigaba ngezigaba langendlela ezinengi," 
Hebrews1:2 kulezinsuku zokucina ukhulume kithi ngeNdodana, ayimise ibe yindlalifa yezinto zonke, owadala ngayo futhi imihlaba," 
Hebrews1:3 yona eyikubenyezela kwenkazimulo, lomfuziselo uqobo wobukhona bakhe, njalo ithwele izinto zonke ngelizwi lamandla ayo, lapho isiyenzile ngokwayo ukuhlanjululwa kwezono zethu, yahlala phansi ngakwesokunene soBukhulu obuphezulu," 
Hebrews1:4 isiyenziwe yaphakama kakhulu kulezingilosi, njengalokhu izuze ilifa lebizo elikhulu kulalezo." 
Hebrews1:5 Ngoba kukuyiphi yezingilosi ake watsho kuyo ukuthi: Wena uyiNdodana yami, mina lamuhla ngikuzele? Lokuthi futhi: Mina ngizakuba nguYise kiyo, yona-ke ibe yiNdodana kimi?" 
Hebrews1:6 Futhi mhla ephinda eletha olizibulo emhlabeni, uthi: Lengilosi zonke zikaNkulunkulu kazimkhonze." 
Hebrews1:7 Lakuzingilosi uthi: Owenza ingilosi zakhe imimoya, lenceku zakhe ilangabi lomlilo;" 
Hebrews1:8 kodwa eNdodaneni uthi: Isihlalo sakho sobukhosi, Nkulunkulu, singesaphakade laphakade, intonga yombuso wakho yintonga yokulunga." 
Hebrews1:9 Uthandile ukulunga, wazonda ububi; ngenxa yalokhu, uNkulunkulu, uNkulunkulu wakho ukugcobile ngamagcobo entokozo kulabanakwenu." 
Hebrews1:10 Lokuthi: Wena Nkosi, ekuqaleni wasekela umhlaba, lamazulu ayimisebenzi yezandla zakho;" 
Hebrews1:11 kuzabhubha lokho, kodwa wena umi njalonjalo; futhi kuzaguga konke njengesigqoko," 
Hebrews1:12 lanjengesembatho uzakugoqa, kuzaphendulwa-ke; kodwa wena unguwe uqobo, leminyaka yakho kayiyikuphela." 
Hebrews1:13 Kukuyiphi-ke yezingilosi ake atsho kuyo ukuthi: Hlala ngakwesokunene sami, ngize ngibeke izitha zakho zibe yisenabelo senyawo zakho?" 
Hebrews1:14 Kazisibo yini zonke omoya abasebenzayo abathunyelwe ukukhonza ngenxa yalabo abazakudla ilifa losindiso? 
Hebrews2:1 Ngenxa yalokhu kufanele siqaphelisise izinto e si zizwileyo, hlezi mhlawumbe sikhukhulwe." 
Hebrews2:2 Ngoba uba ilizwi elakhulunywa zingilosi laqiniseka, lakho konke ukuphambuka lokungalaleli kwemukela ukuphindisela ngokokulunga," 
Hebrews2:3 thina sizaphepha njani uba sidelela usindiso olungaka? Olwaqala ukukhulunywa yiNkosi, lwaqiniswa kithi yilabo aba yi zwayo," 
Hebrews2:4 uNkulunkulu efakaza kanye la bo ngezibonakaliso lezimangaliso, lamandla azinhlobonhlobo, lokwabelwa kukaMoya oNgcwele, njengokwentando yakhe." 
Hebrews2:5 Ngoba kehliselanga ngaphansi kwezingilosi ilizwe elizayo, esikhuluma ngalo." 
Hebrews2:6 Kodwa omunye ufakazile kanzulu endaweni ethile esithi: Umuntu uyini, ukuthi umkhumbule? kumbe indodana yomuntu, ukuthi uyinanze?" 
Hebrews2:7 Wamenza okwesikhatshana waba phansi kulezingilosi; wamethwesa umqhele wobukhosi lodumo; wammisa phezu kwemisebenzi yezandla zakho; 
Hebrews2:8 izinto zonke wazehlisela ngaphansi kwenyawo zakhe. Ngoba ekwehliseni izinto zonke ngaphansi kwakhe, katshiyanga lutho olungehliselwanga kuye. Kodwa khathesi kasikaziboni izinto zonke zehliselwe kuye." 
Hebrews2:9 Kodwa siyambona uJesu, etheswe umqhele wobukhosi lodumo, owenziwa okwesikhatshana waba phansi kulezingilosi, ngenxa yenhlupheko yokufa, ukuze ngomusa kaNkulunkulu azwele wonke ukufa." 
Hebrews2:10 Ngoba kwakumfanele, ezikhona zonke izinto ngenxa yakhe, lezikhona zonke ngaye, ukuthi, lapho eletha abantwana abanengi enkazimulweni, amphelelise umkhokheli wosindiso lwabo ngezinhlupheko." 
Hebrews2:11 Ngoba lalowo ongcwelisayo labangcwelisiweyo, bonke bavela koyedwa; ngalesosizatho kalanhloni ukubabiza ngokuthi ngabafowabo," 
Hebrews2:12 esithi: Ngizatshumayela ibizo lakho kubafowethu, ngizakuhlabelela indumiso phakathi kwebandla." 
Hebrews2:13 Futhi-ke: Mina ngizathemba kuye. Futhi-ke: Khangela mina labantwana uNkulunkulu anginike bona. 
Hebrews2:14 Ngakho njengoba abantwana behlanganyele inyama legazi, laye uqobo wahlanganyela khona lokho, ukuze ngokufa amchithe yena obelamandla okufa, onguSathane," 
Hebrews2:15 abakhulule labo bonke abathi ngokwesaba ukufa impilo yabo yonke babebanjwe ebugqilini. 
Hebrews2:16 Ngoba isibili kazithatheli izingilosi, kodwa uzithathela inzalo kaAbrahama." 
Hebrews2:17 Ngenxa yalokho kwamfanela ukuthi abe njengabafo wabo kuzo zonke izinto, ukuze abe ngumpristi omkhulu olesihawu lothembekileyo ezintweni ezimayelana loNkulunkulu, ukuze enze inhlawulo yokuthula ngezono zabantu." 
Hebrews2:18 Ngoba kulokhu ahlupheke kukho uqobo elingwa, ulamandla okusiza abalingwayo." 
Hebrews3:1 Ngakho, bazalwane abangcwele, bahlanganyeli bobizo lwasezulwini, qaphelani umphostoli lompristi omkhulu wesivumo sethu, uKristu Jesu," 
Hebrews3:2 othembeke kulowo owammisayo, njengoMozisi laye wayenjalo endlini yakhe yonke." 
Hebrews3:3 Ngoba kwathiwa lo ufanele udumo olukhulu kuloMozisi, njengoba ulodumo olukhulu kulendlu ayakhileyo." 
Hebrews3:4 Ngoba yonke indlu yakhiwa ngothile; kodwa owakha izinto zonke nguNkulunkulu. 
Hebrews3:5 UMozisi kambe wayethembekile endlini yonke yakhe njengenceku, kuze kube yibufakazi bezinto ebezizakhulunywa;" 
Hebrews3:6 kodwa uKristu njengendodana phezu kwendlu yakhe; esiyindlu yakhe thina, uba-ke sibambelela ngokuqina isibindi lokuziqhenya kwethemba kuze kube sekupheleni." 
Hebrews3:7 Ngakho njengoba uMoya oyiNgcwele esithi: Lamuhla uba lilizwa ilizwi lakhe," 
Hebrews3:8 lingazenzi zibe lukhuni inhliziyo zenu, njengekucunuleni, ngosuku lokulingwa enkangala," 
Hebrews3:9 lapho oyihlo bangilinga, bengihlola, basebebona imisebenzi yami okweminyaka engamatshumi amane;" 
Hebrews3:10 ngakho ngasithukuthelela lesosizukulwana, ngathi: Bayaduha kokuphela enhliziyweni; lalaba kabazazanga indlela zami;" 
Hebrews3:11 ngaze ngafunga ekuthukutheleni kwami ngathi: Kabayikungena ekuphumuleni kwami. 
Hebrews3:12 Nanzelelani, bazalwane, hlezi kuzakuba khona loba nini phakathi komunye wenu inhliziyo embi yokungakholwa, ekuduheni kuNkulunkulu ophilayo;" 
Hebrews3:13 kodwa khuthazanani insuku ngensuku, kusathiwa lamuhla, ukuze kungabi khona kini owenziwa lukhuni ngenkohliso yesono;" 
Hebrews3:14 ngoba sesibe ngabahlanganyeli bakaKristu, uba-ke sibambisisa isiqalo sokuqiniseka kuze kube sekupheleni;" 
Hebrews3:15 kusathiwa: Lamuhla uba lilizwa ilizwi lakhe, lingazenzi zibe lukhuni inhliziyo zenu, njengekucunuleni." 
Hebrews3:16 Ngoba abanye sebezwile bathukuthelisa, kodwa kakusibo bonke labo abaphuma eGibhithe ngoMozisi." 
Hebrews3:17 Kodwa ngobani athukutheliswa yibo okweminyaka engamatshumi amane? Kakusibo labo abonayo yini, abazidumbu zabo zawela enkangala?" 
Hebrews3:18 Ngobani-ke afunga kibo ukuthi kabazukungena ekuphumuleni kwakhe, ngaphandle kwalabo abangalalelanga?" 
Hebrews3:19 Ngakho siyabona ukuthi babengelakungena ngenxa yokungakholwa. 
Hebrews4:1 Ngakho, lapho sisekhona isithembiso sokungena ekuphumuleni kwakhe, kasesabe hlezi loba nini kube khona omunye wenu obonakala esehluleka;" 
Hebrews4:2 ngoba lathi satshunyayezwa ivangeli, njengabo; kodwa ilizwi lombiko kalibasizanga bona, lokhu lingahlangananga lokholo kulabo abalizwayo;" 
Hebrews4:3 ngoba thina esikholwayo siyangena ekuphumuleni, njengoba watsho ukuthi: Njengoba ngifungile ekuthukutheleni kwami ngathi: Kabayikungena ekuphumuleni kwami; lanxa imisebenzi yayiqediwe kusukela ekusekelweni komhlaba." 
Hebrews4:4 Ngoba utshilo kwenye indawo ngo suku lwesikhombisa kanje: UNkulunkulu wasephumula ngosuku lwesikhombisa emisebenzini yakhe yonke; 
Hebrews4:5 lakul indawo uthi futhi: Kabayikungena ekuphumuleni kwami. 
Hebrews4:6 Ngakho lokhu kusalele ukuthi abanye bangene kukho, lalabo abatshunyayezwa ivangeli kuqala kabangenanga ngokungalaleli," 
Hebrews4:7 ubuye aqume usuku oluthile athi: Lamuhla, utsho ngoDavida, emva kwesikhathi esingaka, njengokwatshiwo ukuthi: Lamuhla uba lizalizwa ilizwi lakhe, lingazenzi zibe lukhuni inhliziyo zenu." 
Hebrews4:8 Ngoba uba uJoshuwa wayebaphumuzile, wayengayikukhuluma emva kwalokhu ngolunye usuku." 
Hebrews4:9 Ngakho kubasalele abantu bakaNkulunkulu ukuphumula kwesabatha. 
Hebrews4:10 Ngoba ongenileyo ekuphumuleni kwakhe laye usephumule emisebenzini yakhe, njengoNkulunkulu kweyakhe." 
Hebrews4:11 Ngakho asikhuthalele ukungena kulokhokuphumula, ukuze kungabi lowela kulesisibonelo sokungalaleli." 
Hebrews4:12 Ngoba ilizwi likaNkulunkulu liphilile, lilamandla, libukhali kuloba yiyiphi inkemba esika nhlangothi zombili, lihlaba kuze kube sekwehlukanisweni kwakho konke umphefumulo lomoya, wonke amalunga lomnkantsho, njalo lingumhloli okhaliphileyo wemicabango lezizindlo zenhliziyo." 
Hebrews4:13 Futhi kakulalutho oludaliweyo olungabonakaliyo phambi kwakhe; kodwa zonke izinto zembuliwe zisobala emehlweni akhe esilokuzilanda kuye. 
Hebrews4:14 Ngakho lokhu silompristi omkhulu kakhulu, odlulele emazulwini, uJesu iNdodana kaNkulunkulu, asibambelele kusivumo sethu." 
Hebrews4:15 Ngoba kasilaye umpristi omkhulu ongelakuzwelana lobuthakathaka bethu, kodwa owalingwa kukho konke njenga thi, e ngelasono." 
Hebrews4:16 Ngakho kasisondele ngesibindi esihlalweni sobukhosi somusa, ukuze semukele isihawu, sithole umusa wosizo ngesikhathi esifaneleyo." 
Hebrews5:1 Ngoba wonke umpristi omkhulu, othathwa ebantwini, umiselwa abantu ezintweni ezimayelana loNkulunkulu, ukuze anikele izipho lemihlatshelo ngenxa yezono;" 
Hebrews5:2 ongababekezelela abangaziyo labaduhayo, lokhu laye egonjolozelwe yibuthakathaka;" 
Hebrews5:3 njalo ngenxa yalokhu kufanele ukuthi anikelele izono, njengokwabantu, kunjalo langokwakhe." 
Hebrews5:4 Futhi kakulamuntu ozithathela le inhlonipho, kodwa obizwa nguNkulunkulu, lanjengoAroni." 
Hebrews5:5 Ngokunjalo loKristu kazidumisanga yena ukuba ngumpristi omkhulu, kodwa lowo owathi kuye: Wena uyiNdodana yami, lamuhla mina ngikuzele." 
Hebrews5:6 Njengoba esitsho futhi kwenye indawo ukuthi: Wena ungumpristi kuze kube phakade ngokohlobo kaMelkizedeki. 
Hebrews5:7 Owathi ensukwini zenyama yakhe, esenikele imikhuleko kanye lokunxusa elokukhala okukhulu langezinyembezi kuye olamandla okumsindisa ekufeni, futhi wezwiwa ngenxa yokwesaba kwakhe uNkulunkulu," 
Hebrews5:8 loba eyiNdodana, wafunda ukulalela ezintweni ahlupheka ngazo," 
Hebrews5:9 esephelelisiwe waba ngumthombo wosindiso olulaphakade kibo bonke abamlalelayo; 
Hebrews5:10 ebizwa nguNkulunkulu ngokuthi ngumpristi omkhulu ngokohlobo kaMelkizedeki. 
Hebrews5:11 Esilokunengi esingakutsho ngaye futhi okulukhuni ukulichasisela, lokhu selaba buthundu ekuzweni." 
Hebrews5:12 Ngoba lapho ebelifanele ukuba ngabafundisi, ngenxa yesikhathi, liswela futhi ukuthi kube khona olifundisayo, ukuthi ziyini izimiso zakuqala zamazwi kaNkulunkulu; selingabafanele uchago, kungeyisikho-ke ukudla okuqinileyo." 
Hebrews5:13 Ngoba wonke odla uchago kalalwazi olupheleleyo elizwini lokulunga; ngoba uyingane. 
Hebrews5:14 Kodwa ukudla okuqinileyo kungokwabakhulileyo, asebesebenzise izingqondo ngokwejwayela ekwehlukaniseni konke okuhle lokubi." 
Hebrews6:1 Ngakho, sitshiya izinto zakuqala zemfundiso kaKristu, kasiqhubekele kokupheleleyo, singabeki futhi isisekelo sokuphenduka emisebenzini efileyo, lesokholo kuNkulunkulu," 
Hebrews6:2 semfundiso yenhlobo zobhabhathizo, lesokubeka izandla, lesokuvuka kwabafileyo, lesokwahlulelwa okulaphakade." 
Hebrews6:3 Lalokhu sizakwenza, nxa kuphela uNkulunkulu evuma." 
Hebrews6:4 Ngoba kakulakwenzeka ukuthi labo asebake bakhanyiswa, banambitha isipho sezulwini, baba ngabahlanganyeli bakaMoya oNgcwele," 
Hebrews6:5 banambitha ilizwi elihle likaNkulunkulu, lamandla elizwe elizayo," 
Hebrews6:6 basebehlamuka, labo-ke ukuthi babuye ba vuselwe ekuphendukeni, lokhu bephinda bezibethelela iNdodana kaNkulunkulu, be yi thela ihlazo obala;" 
Hebrews6:7 ngoba umhlabathi onatha izulu elifika kanengi phezu kwawo, ubusumilisa imibhida ebasizayo labo olinywa yibo, wemukela isibusiso esivela kuNkulunkulu;" 
Hebrews6:8 kodwa lowo oveza ameva lokhula oluhlabayo, uyaliwa useduze lokuqalekiswa, okuphela kwakho kusekutshisweni." 
Hebrews6:9 Kodwa siqiniseka ngani izinto ezingcono, bathandekayo, lezilosindiso, lanxa sikhuluma njalo;" 
Hebrews6:10 ngoba uNkulunkulu kayisuye ongalunganga ukuthi akhohlwe umsebenzi wenu lomsebenzi onzima wothando elalubonakalisa ebizweni lakhe, ngokusebenzela abangcwele li saba sebenzela." 
Hebrews6:11 Kodwa sifisa ukuthi ngulowo lalowo wenu akubonakalise lokhukukhuthala ekuqinisekeni okupheleleyo kwethemba ekupheleni; 
Hebrews6:12 ukuze lingabi ngabavilaphayo, kodwa abalingisi babo abathi ngokholo langokubekezela badla ilifa lezithembiso." 
Hebrews6:13 Ngoba lapho uNkulunkulu ethembisa kuAbrahama, ngoba wayengelaye omkhulu kula ye angafunga ngaye, wazifunga ngaye uqobo," 
Hebrews6:14 esithi: Isibili ukubusisa ngizakubusisa, lokwandisa ngizakwandisa." 
Hebrews6:15 Langokunjalo esebekezele wazuza isithembiso. 
Hebrews6:16 Ngoba isibili abantu bayafunga ngomkhulu ku labo, lesifungo sokuqinisa siyisiphetho sakho konke ukuphikisana kibo." 
Hebrews6:17 Okwathi uNkulunkulu kukho, ethanda ukubonisa ngokwengezelelweyo kakhulu kuzindlalifa zesithembiso ukungaphenduki kwecebo lakhe, walamula ngesifungo," 
Hebrews6:18 ukuze, ngezinto ezimbili ezingaphendukiyo, okukuzo okungelakwenzeka ukuthi uNkulunkulu aqambe amanga ngazo, sibe lenduduzo elamandla, thina esibalekele ukuphephela ukubambelela ethembeni elibekwe phambi kwethu;" 
Hebrews6:19 esilalo njengengwegwe yomphefumulo eqinileyo legxilileyo, lingena kokuphakathi kweveyili;" 
Hebrews6:20 lapho isigijimi esingumanduleli sasingenela khona, uJesu, esaba ngumpristi omkhulu ephakadeni ngokohlobo kaMelkizedeki." 
Hebrews7:1 Ngoba uMelkizedeki lo, inkosi yeSalema, umpristi kaNkulunkulu oPhezukonke, owahlangabeza uAbrahama mhla ebuya ekubulaleni amakhosi, wasembusisa," 
Hebrews7:2 uAbrahama laye wamabela ingxenye yetshumi yakho konke; kuqala uphendulelwa ngokuthi inkosi yokulunga, emva kwalokhu beseku thiwa futhi inkosi yeSalema, okuyikuthi inkosi yokuthula;" 
Hebrews7:3 kalayise, kalanina, kalasendo, kalakuqala kwensuku kumbe ukuphela kwempilo, kodwa esenziwe wafanana leNdodana kaNkulunkulu, uhlala engumpristi laphakade." 
Hebrews7:4 Bonani-ke ukuthi mkhulu kangakanani lo, ngitsho uAbrahama ukhokho amnika ingxenye yetshumi yezimpango." 
Hebrews7:5 Lalabo abavela emadodaneni kaLevi abemukela ubupristi balomlayo wokwemukela ingxenye yetshumi ebantwini ngokomthetho, okuyikuthi kubafowabo, lanxa bevela ekhalweni lukaAbrahama;" 
Hebrews7:6 kodwa yena ongabalelwa osendweni lwabo, wemukela ingxenye yetshumi kuAbrahama, wasembusisa lowo owayelezithembiso." 
Hebrews7:7 Njalo kungelakuphikwa ngitsho ukuthi: Omncinyane ubusiswa ngomkhulu. 
Hebrews7:8 Lapha-ke abantu abafayo bemukela ingxenye yetshumi; kodwa lapho esemukela lowo okufakazwa ngaye ukuthi uyaphila. 
Hebrews7:9 Kungatshiwo-ke, uLevi laye owemukela ingxenye yetshumi wanikela ingxenye yetshumi ngoAbrahama;" 
Hebrews7:10 ngoba wayesesekhalweni lukayise, mhla uMelkizedeki emhlangabeza." 
Hebrews7:11 Ngakho-ke uba kwakukhona ukuphelela ngobupristi bukaLevi (ngoba isizwe sanikwa umlayo ngaphansi kwabo), kwakusaswelekelani ukuthi kuvele omunye umpristi ngokohlobo kaMelkizedeki, lokungatshiwo ngokwendlela kaAroni?" 
Hebrews7:12 Ngoba uba ubupristi buphendulwa, kuyadingeka ukuthi kube khona lokuphendulwa komlayo." 
Hebrews7:13 Ngoba lowo okukhulunywa ngaye lezizinto ungowesinye isizwe, okungabanga khona kuso owanakekela ilathi." 
Hebrews7:14 Ngoba kusobala ukuthi iNkosi yethu yavela koJuda, isizwe uMozisi angakhulumanga lutho ngaso mayelana lobupristi." 
Hebrews7:15 Njalo kusesobala ngokwengezelelwe kakhulu, uba sekusima omunye umpristi njengokofuzo lukaMelkizedeki," 
Hebrews7:16 ongenziwanga ngokomthetho wesimiso senyama, kodwa ngokwamandla empilo engelakuphela;" 
Hebrews7:17 ngoba ufakaza esithi: Wena ungumpristi kuze kube nininini ngokohlobo kaMelkizedeki. 
Hebrews7:18 Ngoba ukuchithwa komthetho wokuqala kwenziwa ngenxa yobuthakathaka lokungasizi lutho kwawo; 
Hebrews7:19 ngoba umlayo kawuzanga wenze ulutho luphelele, kodwa uyisingeniso sethemba elingcono, esisondela ngalo kuNkulunkulu." 
Hebrews7:20 Njalo okungangokuthi k enziwa nga ngaphandle kwesifungo," 
Hebrews7:21 (ngoba bona baba ngabapristi ngaphandle kwesifungo, kodwa yena ngesifungo ngalowo owathi kuye: INkosi yafunga njalo kayiyikuzisola yathi: Wena ungumpristi kuze kube nininini ngokohlobo kaMelkizedeki)" 
Hebrews7:22 uJesu waba yisibambiso sesivumelwano esingcono kakhulu. 
Hebrews7:23 Lalabo babebanengi ababa ngabapristi, ngoba bavinjelwa yikufa ukuthi bahlale njalo;" 
Hebrews7:24 kodwa lo, ngenxa yokuthi uhlala kuze kube phakade, ulobupristi obungadluliyo." 
Hebrews7:25 Ngenxa yalokho laye ulamandla okusindisa ngokupheleleyo abeza kuNkulunkulu ngaye, lokhu ephilela njalo ukubanxusela." 
Hebrews7:26 Ngoba umpristi omkhulu onjalo usifanele, ongcwele, ongelacala, ongelasici, owehlukanisiweyo kuzoni, lowenziwa waphakama kulamazulu;" 
Hebrews7:27 ongadingi insuku ngensuku, njengabapristi abakhulu, ukunikela imihlatshelo esenz ela ezakhe izono kuqala, emva kwalokho ezabantu; ngoba lokho wakwenza kanye mhla ezinikela yena." 
Hebrews7:28 Ngoba umlayo uyamisa abantu babe ngabapristi abakhulu, abalobuthakathaka; kodwa ilizwi lesifungo elalandela umlayo lamisa iNdodana ephelelisiweyo kuze kube nininini." 
Hebrews8:1 Ngakho isiqokoqela sezinto esazikhulumayo yikuthi: Silompristi omkhulu onje, owahlala ngakwesokunene sesihlalo sobukhosi soMkhulu emazulwini," 
Hebrews8:2 isikhonzi se ndawo ezingcwele lesethabhanekele eliqotho, iNkosi eyalimisayo, njalo kungesimuntu;" 
Hebrews8:3 ngoba wonke umpristi omkhulu umiselwe ukunikela iminikelo lemihlatshelo; ngakho kuyadingeka ukuthi laye abe lakho okuthile angakunikela. 
Hebrews8:4 Ngoba uba ubesemhlabeni, ubengeyikuba ngumpristi lakanye, ngoba bakhona abapristi abanikela iminikelo ngokomlayo," 
Hebrews8:5 abakhonza isibonelo lesithunzi sezinto zezulwini, njengoMozisi elaywe nguNkulunkulu esezakwenza ithabhanekele, ngoba wathi: Qaphela ukuthi wenze zonke izinto njengomfanekiso owaboniswa wona entabeni." 
Hebrews8:6 Kodwa khathesi-ke uzuze inkonzo enhle kakhulu, njengalokhu laye engumlamuli wesivumelwano esingcono, esimiswe phezu kwezithembiso ezingcono." 
Hebrews8:7 Ngoba uba leso sivumelwano esakuqala besingasoleki, bekungayikudingwa indawo yesesibili." 
Hebrews8:8 Ngoba ebasola uthi: Khangela insuku ziyeza, kutsho iNkosi, njalo ngizamisa isivumelwano esitsha phezu kwendlu kaIsrayeli laphezu kwendlu kaJuda;" 
Hebrews8:9 esingenjengesivumelwano engasenza laboyise mhla ngibabamba ngesandla ukubakhupha elizweni leGibhithe; ngoba bona kabahlalanga esivumelwaneni sami, lami kangibananzanga, itsho iNkosi." 
Hebrews8:10 Ngoba yilesi isivumelwano engizavumelana ngaso lendlu kaIsrayeli emva kwalezonsuku, itsho iNkosi, ngizafaka imilayo yami engqondweni yabo, lenhliziyweni zabo ngiyibhale; ngibe nguNkulunkulu kibo, bona-ke bazakuba ngabantu kimi." 
Hebrews8:11 Njalo kabayikufundisa ngulowo lalowo umakhelwane wakhe, njalo ngulowo lalowo umfowabo, esithi: Yazi iNkosi; ngoba bonke bazangazi, kusukela komncinyane wabo kuze kufike komkhulu wabo." 
Hebrews8:12 Ngoba ngizakuba lesihawu ekungalungini kwabo, lezono zabo lobubi babo kangisayikukukhumbula." 
Hebrews8:13 Ngokuthi: Isivumelwano esitsha, senze esokuqala saba ngesigugileyo. Njalo osekugugile lokudala sekuseduze lokunyamalala." 
Hebrews9:1 Ngakho isibili lesosi vumelwano sakuqala sasilezimiso zenkonzo kaNkulunkulu, le ndawo engcwele yemhlabeni." 
Hebrews9:2 Ngoba kwakhiwa ithabhanekele elokuqala okwakukhona kulo uluthi lwesibane letafula lezinkwa zokubukiswa, elibizwa ngokuthi yindawo engcwele." 
Hebrews9:3 Langemva kweveyili lesibili kwakukhona ithabhanekele elibizwa ngokuthi yingcwele yezingcwele," 
Hebrews9:4 lilesitsha segolide sokutshisela impepha, lomtshokotsho wesivumelwano ohuqwe ngegolide inhlangothi zonke, okwakukhona kuwo inqayi yegolide elemana, lenduku kaAroni eyahlumayo, lezibhebhe zesivumelwano;" 
Hebrews9:5 laphezu kwawo amakherubi enkazimulo asibekele isihlalo somusa; esingekhulume ngalezizinto khathesi ngokukhethekileyo. 
Hebrews9:6 Sezilungisiwe lezizinto ngokunjalo, abapristi bangena njalonjalo ethabhanekeleni lokuqala bephelelisa imisebenzi yokukhonza uNkulunkulu;" 
Hebrews9:7 kodwa kwelesibili kwakungena kanye ngomnyaka umpristi omkhulu yedwa, kungeyisikho ngaphandle kwegazi, azinikelela yena leziphambeko zabantu;" 
Hebrews9:8 uMoya oyiNgcwele utshengisa lokhu, ukuthi indlela eya e ndaw eni engcwele kayikembulwa, lapho lisemi ithabhanekele lokuqala;" 
Hebrews9:9 okwakungumfanekiso walesosikhathi, okwanikelwa kulo konke iminikelo lemihlatshelo, engelakho ukuphelelisa okhonzayo maqondana lesazela," 
Hebrews9:10 kuphela kokudliwayo, lokunathwayo, lokugeza okuzinhlobonhlobo lezimiso zenyama, ezibekwe phezu kwa bo kuze kufike isikhathi sokulungisiswa." 
Hebrews9:11 Kodwa uKristu esefikile, engumpristi omkhulu wezinto ezinhle ezizayo, ngethabhanekele elikhulu lelipheleleyo kule linye, elingenziwanga ngezandla, okuyikuthi, elingeyisilo lalokhukudalwa," 
Hebrews9:12 futhi kungeyisikho ngegazi lezimbuzi lelamathole, kodwa ngelakhe igazi wangena kanye e ndaw eni engcwele, esezuze ukuhlengwa okulaphakade." 
Hebrews9:13 Ngoba uba igazi lezimbuzi lelezinkunzi, lomlotha wethokazi ufafaza abangcolileyo, ungcwelisa kuze kube sekuhlambulukeni kwenyama," 
Hebrews9:14 kakhulu kangakanani igazi likaKristu, owathi ngoMoya ophakade wazinikela kuNkulunkulu engelasici, lizahlambulula isazela senu emisebenzini efileyo, ukukhonza uNkulunkulu ophilayo?" 
Hebrews9:15 Langenxa yalokhu ungumlamuli wesivumelwano esitsha, ukuze, lokhu ukufa sekufikile ekuhlengeni kweziphambeko ngesikhathi sesivumelwano sokuqala, ababiziweyo bemukele isithembiso selifa laphakade." 
Hebrews9:16 Ngoba lapho okukhona incwadi yelifa, kufuneka ukuthi kubikwe ukufa komenzi wencwadi yelifa." 
Hebrews9:17 Ngoba incwadi yelifa isebenza kwabafileyo, lokhu kayikabi lamandla lapho ephila umenzi wencwadi yelifa." 
Hebrews9:18 Ngakho laso esokuqala kasimiswanga ngaphandle kwegazi. 
Hebrews9:19 Ngoba lapho usumenyezelwe umthetho wonke ngokomlayo nguMozisi ebantwini bonke, wathatha igazi lamathole lelembuzi, kanye lamanzi loboya obubomvu lehisope*, wafafaza kokubili ugwalo uqobo labantu bonke," 
Hebrews9:20 esithi: Leli ligazi lesivumelwano uNkulunkulu alilaya ngaso. 
Hebrews9:21 Ngokunjalo wasefafaza ngegazi lethabhanekele lezitsha zonke zenkonzo. 
Hebrews9:22 Njalo phose zonke izinto zihlanjululwa ngegazi ngokomthetho, langaphandle kokuchitheka kwegazi kakubi khona uthethelelo." 
Hebrews9:23 Ngokunjalo kwakudingeka ukuthi imifanekiso yezinto zemazulwini ihlanjululwe ngalezizinto, kodwa izinto zezulwini uqobo ngemihlatshelo engcono kulale." 
Hebrews9:24 Ngoba uKristu kangenanga e ndaw eni ezingcwele ezenziwe ngezandla, ezingumfanekiso weziqotho, kodwa ezulwini uqobo, ukuthi khathesi abonakalele thina phambi kobuso bukaNkulunkulu;" 
Hebrews9:25 kungeyisikuthi futhi ukuze azinikele kanengi, njengalokhu umpristi omkhulu engena e ndaw eni engcwele umnyaka ngomnyaka legazi lokunye;" 
Hebrews9:26 uba kwakunjalo wayemele ukuhlupheka kanengi selokhu kwasekelwa umhlaba; kodwa khathesi ubonakaliswe kanye ekupheleni kwesikhathi ukuze asuse izono ngomhlatshelo wakhe uqobo. 
Hebrews9:27 Njalo njengalokhu kumiselwe abantu ukuthi bafe kanye, lemva kwalokhu ukwahlulelwa;" 
Hebrews9:28 ngokunjalo uKristu, esenikelwe kanye ukuze athwale izono zabanengi, ngokwesibili uzabonakala ngaphandle kwesono kwabamlindeleyo, kube lusindiso." 
Hebrews10:1 Ngoba umlayo ulesithunzi sezinto ezinhle ezizayo, ungeyisiwo umfanekiso oqotho wezinto, ungeze waba lamandla ngaleyomihlatshelo enikelwa njalonjalo iminyaka ngeminyaka ukubenza baphelele labo abasondelayo." 
Hebrews10:2 Uba kwakunjalo nga kayimanga yini ukunikelwa, ngoba abakhonzayo babengasayikuba lasazela sezono, sebehlanjululwe kanye?" 
Hebrews10:3 Kodwa kuleyo kukhona ukukhunjulwa kwezono umnyaka ngomnyaka; 
Hebrews10:4 ngoba kakulakwenzeka ukuthi igazi lezinkunzi lelezimbuzi lisuse izono; 
Hebrews10:5 ngakho esefika emhlabeni uthi: Umhlatshelo lomnikelo kawuwuthandanga, kodwa ungilungisele umzimba;" 
Hebrews10:6 iminikelo yokutshiswa leyesono kawuyithokozelanga; 
Hebrews10:7 ngasengisithi: Khangela, ngiza (kumqulu wogwalo kulotshwe ngami) ukwenza intando yakho, Nkulunkulu." 
Hebrews10:8 Kuqala esithi: Umhlatshelo lomnikelo leminikelo yokutshiswa leyezono kawuyithandanga njalo kawuyithokozelanga, yona enikelwa ngokomlayo," 
Hebrews10:9 wasesithi: Khangela, ngiza ukwenza intando yakho, Nkulunkulu. Ususa okokuqala, ukuze amise okwesibili." 
Hebrews10:10 Kuleyontando singcwelisiwe, ngokunikelwa komzimba kaJesu Kristu kanye." 
Hebrews10:11 Laye wonke umpristi kambe uyema insuku ngensuku ekhonza, njalo enikela kanengi leyomihlatshelo, engasoze yaba lamandla okususa izono;" 
Hebrews10:12 kodwa yena, esenikele umhlatshelo waba munye ngenxa yezono ephakadeni wahlala phansi ngakwesokunene sikaNkulunkulu," 
Hebrews10:13 kusukela khathesi ulindele zize zenziwe izitha zakhe isenabelo senyawo zakhe. 
Hebrews10:14 Ngoba ngomnikelo munye uphelelisile ephakadeni labo abangcwelisiweyo. 
Hebrews10:15 LoMoya oyiNgcwele laye uyafakaza kithi; ngoba emva kokuthi esetshilo kuqala uthi: 
Hebrews10:16 Lesi yisivumelwano engizavumelana labo ngaso emva kwalezonsuku, kutsho iNkosi: Ngizafaka imilayo yami enhliziyweni zabo, njalo ngizayibhala engqondweni zabo;" 
Hebrews10:17 lezono zabo lobubi babo kangisoze ngikukhumbule futhi. 
Hebrews10:18 Lapho-ke okukhona uthethelelo lwalokhu, kakuselamnikelo ngesono." 
Hebrews10:19 Ngakho, bazalwane, silesibindi sokungena kwezingcwele ngegazi likaJesu," 
Hebrews10:20 ngendlela entsha lephilayo, asidabulele yona ngeveyili, eliyinyama yakhe," 
Hebrews10:21 futhi silaye umpristi omkhulu phezu kwendlu kaNkulunkulu," 
Hebrews10:22 kasisondele ngenhliziyo eqinisileyo ekuqinisekeni okupheleleyo kokholo, inhliziyo zifafaziwe esazeleni sokubi, lomzimba ugezisiwe ngamanzi acwebileyo;" 
Hebrews10:23 kasibambisise isivumo sethemba lethu singanyikinyeki, ngoba uthembekile owathembisayo;" 
Hebrews10:24 njalo kasiqaphelisisane ekuvuseleni uthando lemisebenzi emihle," 
Hebrews10:25 singayekeli ukuhlangana kwethu, njengomkhuba wabanye, kodwa kasikhuthale, futhi ikakhulu, njengoba libona usuku lusondela." 
Hebrews10:26 Ngoba uba sisona ngabomo emva kokuthi semukele ulwazi lweqiniso, kakusekho umhlatshelo ngezono," 
Hebrews10:27 kodwa ukulindela okuthile okwesabekayo kokulahlwa, lolaka lomlilo ozaqeda izitha." 
Hebrews10:28 Umuntu odelela umlayo kaMozisi ufa ngaphandle kwesihawu ngabafakazi ababili loba abathathu; 
Hebrews10:29 pho, licabanga ukuthi uzathiwa ufanele ukujeziswa kabuhlungu kanganani onyathelela phansi iNdodana kaNkulunkulu, njalo othi igazi lesivumelwano, angcweliswa ngalo, liyiluthonje, njalo odelela uMoya womusa?" 
Hebrews10:30 Ngoba siyamazi owathi: Impindiselo ngeyami, mina ngizabuyisela, itsho iNkosi; futhi uphinde athi: INkosi izakwahlulela abantu bayo." 
Hebrews10:31 Kuyesabeka ukuwela ezandleni zikaNkulunkulu ophilayo. 
Hebrews10:32 Kodwa khumbulani insuku zamandulo, okwathi ngazo selikhanyisiwe lakhuthazela empini enkulu yezinhlupho;" 
Hebrews10:33 kokunye, lapho lenziwa umbukiso ngenhlamba langezinhlupheko; kokunye, lapho laba ngabahlanganyeli balabo ababephathwa ngokunjalo." 
Hebrews10:34 Ngoba lani lazwelana lezibopho zami, lavuma ngentokozo ukuphangwa kwempahla zenu, lisazi ukuthi ngaphakathi kwenu lilempahla engcono lemiyo emazulwini." 
Hebrews10:35 Ngakho lingalahli isibindi senu, esilomvuzo omkhulu." 
Hebrews10:36 Ngoba liswele ukubekezela, ukuze kuthi, seliyenzile intando kaNkulunkulu, lemukele isithembiso." 
Hebrews10:37 Ngoba kuseyisikhatshana nje, ozayo uzafika, njalo kazukulibala;" 
Hebrews10:38 kodwa olungileyo uzaphila ngokholo; njalo uba ehlehlela emuva, umphefumulo wami kawuthokozi ngaye." 
Hebrews10:39 Kodwa thina kasisibo ababahlehlela emuva ekubhujisweni, kodwa ababakholwayo ekusindisweni komphefumulo." 
Hebrews11:1 Ngakho ukholo luyikuqiniseka kwezinto ezithenjwayo, ubufakazi bezinto ezingabonwayo." 
Hebrews11:2 Ngoba ngalo abadala bafakazelwa. 
Hebrews11:3 Ngokholo sibona ukuthi imihlaba yadalwa ngelizwi likaNkulunkulu, kuze kuthi izinto ezibonwayo kaziveli ezintweni ezibonakalayo." 
Hebrews11:4 Ngokholo uAbela wanikela kuNkulunkulu umhlatshelo ongcono kuloKhayini, owazuza ngawo ubufakazi bokuthi ulungile, uNkulunkulu efakazela izipho zakhe; langalo efile usakhuluma." 
Hebrews11:5 Ngokholo uEnoki wasuswa ukuze angaboni ukufa, njalo akatholwa, ngoba uNkulunkulu wayesemsusile; ngoba engakasuswa wafakazelwa ngokuthi umthokozisile uNkulunkulu;" 
Hebrews11:6 kodwa ngaphandle kokholo kakwenzeki uku m thokozisa; ngoba ozayo kuNkulunkulu umele akholwe ukuthi ukhona, lo kuthi ungumvuzi walabo abamdingisisayo." 
Hebrews11:7 Ngokholo uNowa exwayisiwe nguNkulunkulu ngezinto ebezingakabonwa, esesaba, wakha umkhumbi wosindiso lwendlu yakhe; alahla umhlaba ngawo, wasesiba yindlalifa yokulunga ngokokholo." 
Hebrews11:8 Ngokholo uAbrahama walalela ebizwa ukuthi aphume aye endaweni ayezayemukela ibe yilifa, waphuma, engazi lapho aya khona." 
Hebrews11:9 Ngokholo wahlala njengomuntu wezizweni elizweni lesithembiso, njengelemzini, ehlala emathenteni loIsaka loJakobe, ababeyizindlalifa kanye laye zalesosithembiso;" 
Hebrews11:10 ngoba wayelindele umuzi olezisekelo, omqambi wesimo lomakhi wawo nguNkulunkulu." 
Hebrews11:11 Ngokholo laye uSara uqobo wazuza amandla okwemukela inhlanyelo, esedlulelwe yisikhathi sobudala wabeletha, ngoba wathi uthembekile lowo owathembisayo." 
Hebrews11:12 Ngakho-ke bazalwa ngoyedwa, lalezizinto zivela kosefile, abangangenkanyezi zezulu ngobunengi, langangetshebetshebe elisekhunjini lolwandle elingelakubalwa." 
Hebrews11:13 Bonke laba bafela ekholweni, bengemukelanga izithembiso, kodwa bazibonela khatshana, baqiniseka, ba zi gona, njalo bavuma ukuthi bangabezizwe lezihambi emhlabeni." 
Hebrews11:14 Ngoba abatsho izinto ezinje batshengisa ukuthi badinga ilizwe lakibo. 
Hebrews11:15 Uba-ke kambe babecabanga ngalelo ababesuke kulo, babengaba lethuba lokubuyela;" 
Hebrews11:16 kodwa khathesi-ke balangatha elingcono, elingelezulwini; ngakho uNkulunkulu kalanhloni ngabo, ukuthiwa nguNkulunkulu wabo; ngoba ubalungisele umuzi." 
Hebrews11:17 Ngokholo uAbrahama wanikela uIsaka lapho ehlolwa, lalowo owemukela izithembiso wayenikela ozelwe yedwa wakhe," 
Hebrews11:18 okwakuthiwe kuye: KuIsaka inzalo yakho izabizwa; 
Hebrews11:19 wathi uNkulunkulu ulamandla okuvusa lakwabafileyo; lapho laye amzuze evela khona ngokulinganisa. 
Hebrews11:20 Ngokholo uIsaka wabusisa uJakobe loEsawu ngezinto ezizayo. 
Hebrews11:21 Ngokholo uJakobe esesifa wabusisa lowo lalowo wamadodana kaJosefa, wasekhonza ebambelele phezu kodondolo lwakhe." 
Hebrews11:22 Ngokholo uJosefa esesifa wakhuluma ngokuphuma kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli, waselayezela ngamathambo akhe." 
Hebrews11:23 Ngokholo uMozisi esezelwe wafihlwa ngabazali bakhe inyanga ezintathu, ngoba babona ukuthi ngumntwana omuhle; njalo bengawesabi umthetho wenkosi." 
Hebrews11:24 Ngokholo uMozisi esekhulile wala ukuthiwa uyindodana yendodakazi kaFaro," 
Hebrews11:25 kulalokho wakhetha ukuphathwa kubi kanye labantu bakaNkulunkulu kulokuthi abe lentokozo yesono isikhatshana; 
Hebrews11:26 wathi ukuthukwa kukaKristu kuyinotho enkulu kulamagugu eGibhithe; ngoba wayekhangele umvuzo. 
Hebrews11:27 Ngokholo watshiya iGibhithe, engalwesabi ulaka lwenkosi; ngoba waqinisela kungathi uyambona oNgabonwayo." 
Hebrews11:28 Ngokholo wagcina iphasika lokufafazwa kwegazi, ukuze lowo obhubhisa amazibulo angabathinti." 
Hebrews11:29 Ngokholo badabula uLwandle oluBomvu njengemhlabathini owomileyo; okwathi amaGibhithe bekulinga lokho baminzwa. 
Hebrews11:30 Ngokholo imiduli yeJeriko yadilika, isibhodiwe insuku eziyisikhombisa." 
Hebrews11:31 Ngokholo uRahabi isifebe kabhubhanga kanye labangakholwanga, esezemukele izinhloli ngokuthula." 
Hebrews11:32 Ngisezathini? Ngoba ngingaphelelwa yisikhathi ngilandisa ngoGidiyoni loBaraki loSamsoni loJefitha loDavida loSamuweli labaprofethi; 
Hebrews11:33 abathi ngokholo banqoba imibuso, bebenza ukulunga, bazuza izithembiso, bavala imilomo yezilwane," 
Hebrews11:34 bacitsha amandla omlilo, baphepha ubukhali benkemba, bazuza amandla ebuthakathakeni, baqina empini, baxotsha amabutho awezizwe." 
Hebrews11:35 Abesifazana bemukela abafileyo babo bevela ekuvukeni; labanye bazwiswa ubuhlungu, bengemukeli ukukhululwa, ukuze bazuze ukuvuka okungcono;" 
Hebrews11:36 abanye balingwa ngokwenziwa inhlekisa lokutshaywa, futhi langezibopho langentolongo;" 
Hebrews11:37 bakhandwa ngamatshe, basahwa phakathi, balingwa, bafa ekubulaweni ngenkemba; bazula bembethe izigogo zezimvu le zigogo zezimbuzi, baswela, bazwiswa ubuhlungu, baphathwa kubi," 
Hebrews11:38 (umhlaba ongabafanelanga bona) bazula ezinkangala l e zintab eni l e zimbal wini l e mihom eni yomhlaba. 
Hebrews11:39 Labo bonke laba, befakazelwe ngokholo kabazuzanga isithembiso," 
Hebrews11:40 lokhu uNkulunkulu wayesinakekele ngaphambili okungcono, ukuze kuthi ngaphandle kwethu bangapheleliswa." 
Hebrews12:1 Ngakho-ke lathi sigonjolozelwe liyezi elikhulu kangaka labafakazi, asilahle konke okusindayo lesono esi si thandele lula, asigijime ngokubekezela umjaho esiwumiselweyo," 
Hebrews12:2 sikhangele kuJesu umqalisi lomphelelisi wokholo lwethu, owathi endaweni yentokozo ayimiselweyo, waqinisela esiphambanweni, edelela ihlazo, wahlala ngakwesokunene sesihlalo sobukhosi sikaNkulunkulu." 
Hebrews12:3 Ngakho mqapheliseni yena owaqinisela kuyo impikisano engaka lezoni emelane laye, ukuze lingadinwa, liphelelwe ngamandla emiphefumulweni yenu." 
Hebrews12:4 Kalikamelani la kho kuze kube segazini lisilwa lesono; 
Hebrews12:5 njalo selikhohliwe inkuthazo, ekhuluma kini njengemadodaneni eyokuthi: Ndodana yami, ungadeleli ukulaya kweNkosi, njalo ungapheli amandla, nxa usolwa yiyo;" 
Hebrews12:6 ngoba iNkosi iyalaya emthandayo; njalo itshaye ngesiswepu yonke indodana eyemukelayo. 
Hebrews12:7 Uba likhuthazela ekulayweni, uNkulunkulu uyaliphatha njengamadodana; ngoba yiyiphi indodana uyise angayilayiyo?" 
Hebrews12:8 Kodwa uba lingelakulaywa, okuthi bonke bangabahlanganyeli bakho, ngakho lingabokufetshwa njalo kalisiwo amadodana." 
Hebrews12:9 Futhi-ke sasilabo obaba benyama yethu aba si layayo njalo sa ba hlonipha; pho, kasiyikuzehlisela ngaphansi kukaYise wemimoya kakhulu kula lokho, siphile?" 
Hebrews12:10 Ngoba bona kambe ba si laya okwensuku ezinlutshwana, njengokubona kwabo; kodwa yena kube yikusizakala kwethu, ukuze si hlanganyele ubungcwele bakhe." 
Hebrews12:11 Lakho konke ukulaywa okukhona kakubonakali angathi ngokwentokozo, kodwa ngokosizi; emva kwalokho-ke kuyabalethela isithelo sokuthula sokulunga abajeziswa ngakho." 
Hebrews12:12 Ngakho qinisani izandla ezibuthakathaka lamadolo axegayo; 
Hebrews12:13 njalo lenzele inyawo zenu indlela eziqondileyo, ukuze okuqhulayo kungenyeli, kodwa kulalokho kusiliswe." 
Hebrews12:14 Nxwanelani ukuthula labo bonke, lobungcwele, ngaphandle kwalokho kakulamuntu ozayibona iNkosi;" 
Hebrews12:15 qaphelisani kungabi khona osilelayo emuseni kaNkulunkulu; kungamili lampande yokubaba ikhathaze, njalo ngayo abanengi bangcoliswe;" 
Hebrews12:16 kakungabi lamuntu oyisifebe kumbe ongakhonzi uNkulunkulu, njengoEsawu, owathengisa ubuzibulo bakhe ngokudla okukodwa." 
Hebrews12:17 Ngoba liyazi ukuthi lemva kwalokho, esethanda ukudla ilifa lesibusiso, waliwa; ngoba kayitholanga indawo yokuphenduka, lanxa wayidingisisa ngezinyembezi." 
Hebrews12:18 Ngoba kalizanga entabeni engathintwa, lemlilweni ovuthayo, lekufiphaleni, lemnyameni, lesivunguvungwini," 
Hebrews12:19 lekukhaleni kophondo, lelizwini lamazwi, okwathi labo abezwayo bancenga ukuthi kungabe kusa khulunywa ilizwi kibo;" 
Hebrews12:20 ngoba babengelakukumela lokho okwalaywayo kokuthi: Ngitsho lenyamazana uba ithinta intaba, izakhandwa ngamatshe, kumbe itshokwe ngomtshoko;" 
Hebrews12:21 njalo, kwakusesabeka kangaka lokho okwabonwayo, uMozisi wathi: Ngilovalo ngiyathuthumela." 
Hebrews12:22 Kodwa lize entabeni iSiyoni, lemzini kaNkulunkulu ophilayo, eJerusalema yasezulwini, lakuzigidi zengilosi ezingelakubalwa," 
Hebrews12:23 lemhlanganweni omkhulu lebandleni lamazibulo abhalwe emazulwini, lakuNkulunkulu umahluleli wabo bonke, lakumimoya yabalungileyo abaphelelisiweyo," 
Hebrews12:24 lakuJesu umlamuli wesivumelwano esitsha, legazini lokufafaza elikhuluma izinto ezingcono kulelikaAbela." 
Hebrews12:25 Qaphelani ukuthi lingamali okhulumayo. Ngoba uba bengaphephanga labo abala lowo owakhuluma okuvela kuNkulunkulu emhlabeni, kakhulu kangakanani thina esimfulathelayo lowo ovela emazulwini;" 
Hebrews12:26 olizwi lakhe ngalesosikhathi lanyikinya umhlaba, kodwa khathesi uthembisile, wathi: Ngi za phinda kanye ukunyikinya kungeyisiwo umhlaba wodwa, kodwa lezulu." 
Hebrews12:27 Lalokhu ukuthi: Ngiza phinda kanye, kutshengisa ukususwa kwezinto ezinyikinyekayo, kungathi ezenziweyo, ukuze kusale izinto ezinganyikinyekiyo." 
Hebrews12:28 Ngakho njengoba sisemukela umbuso ongelakunyikinyekiswa, asibe lomusa esingamkhonza uNkulunkulu ngawo ngokwemukelekayo kanye lokuthobeka lokwesaba uNkulunkulu;" 
Hebrews12:29 ngoba-ke uNkulunkulu wethu ungumlilo oqothulayo. 
Hebrews13:1 Kalume njalo uthando lobuzalwane. 
Hebrews13:2 Lingakhohlwa ukungenisa izihambi; ngoba ngalokho abanye bangenisa izingilosi bengazi. 
Hebrews13:3 Khumbulani izibotshwa, ngokungathi libotshwe kanye lazo; abaphethwe kubi, ngokungathi lani liphethwe kubi emzimbeni." 
Hebrews13:4 Umtshado uhlonitshwa kubo bonke, lombheda ungangcoliswa; kodwa uNkulunkulu uzagweba iziphingi lezifebe." 
Hebrews13:5 Indlela yempilo kayingabi ngeyokuthanda imali, yeneliswani yizinto elilazo; ngoba yena utshilo ukuthi: Kangisoze ngakulahla, njalo kangisoze ngakutshiya." 
Hebrews13:6 Ngakho singatsho ngesibindi sithi: INkosi ingumsizi wami, njalo kangiyikwesaba umuntu azakwenza kimi." 
Hebrews13:7 Khumbulani abakhokheli benu, abakhulume kini ilizwi likaNkulunkulu; liqaphelise ukuphela kokuhamba kwabo, lilingisele ukholo lwabo." 
Hebrews13:8 UJesu Kristu unguye izolo lalamuhla lephakadeni. 
Hebrews13:9 Lingaduhiswa yizimfundiso eziyinhlobonhlobo lezingaziwayo; ngoba kuhle ukuthi inhliziyo iqiniswe ngomusa, kungabi ngokudla, abangasizwanga yikho ababebambelela kukho." 
Hebrews13:10 Silalo ilathi, abangelalungelo lokudla kulo abakhonza ithabhanekele." 
Hebrews13:11 Ngoba lezozinyamazana, ogazi lazo langeniswa ngumpristi omkhulu e ndaw eni ezingcwele ngenxa yesono, izidumbu zazo zitshiswa ngaphandle kwenkamba." 
Hebrews13:12 Ngakho laye uJesu, ukuze angcwelise abantu ngelakhe igazi, wahlupheka ngaphandle kwesango." 
Hebrews13:13 Ngakho-ke asiphumele kuye ngaphandle kwenkamba, sithwele ihlazo lakhe." 
Hebrews13:14 Ngoba kasilawo umuzi omiyo lapha, kodwa sidinga ozayo." 
Hebrews13:15 Ngakho asinikele njalonjalo kuNkulunkulu ngaye umnikelo wendumiso, okutsho isithelo sendebe sivuma ibizo lakhe." 
Hebrews13:16 Kodwa lingakhohlwa ukwenza okuhle lokuphana; ngoba uNkulunkulu uyathokoza ngeminikelo enjalo. 
Hebrews13:17 Lalelani abakhokheli benu, lizehlisele ngaphansi kwabo; ngoba laba balinda imiphefumulo yenu, njengabazalandisa; ukuze bakwenze lokhu ngenjabulo, njalo bengabubuli; ngoba kungalisizi lokhu." 
Hebrews13:18 Sikhulekeleni; ngoba siyathemba ukuthi silesazela esihle, sifisa ukuhamba kuhle ezintweni zonke;" 
Hebrews13:19 njalo ngiya li ncenga ngokwengezelelwe kakhulu ukuthi li kwenze lokhu, ukuze ngibuyiselwe kini ngokuphangisa." 
Hebrews13:20 Kungathi uNkulunkulu wokuthula owamkhuphula kwabafileyo uMelusi omkhulu wezimvu ngegazi lesivumelwano saphakade, iNkosi yethu uJesu," 
Hebrews13:21 angaliphelelisa kuwo wonke umsebenzi omuhle ukuze lenze intando yakhe, esebenza kini lokho okumthokozisayo phambi kwakhe, ngoJesu Kristu, kakube kuye ubukhosi kuze kube nini lanini. Ameni." 
Hebrews13:22 Kodwa ngiyalincenga, bazalwane, lemukeleni ngesineke ilizwi lenkuthazo; ngoba ngilibhalele ngamafitshane." 
Hebrews13:23 Yazini ukuthi umzalwane uTimothi ukhululwe, uba efika masinyane, ngizalibona ngilaye." 
Hebrews13:24 Bingelelani bonke abakhokheli benu, labo bonke abangcwele. Abavela eIthaliya bayalibingelela." 
Hebrews13:25 Umusa kawube lani lonke. Ameni. 
James1:1 UJakobe, inceku kaNkulunkulu leyeNkosi uJesu Kristu, kuzo izizwe ezilitshumi lambili ezisekuhlakazekeni, ngiyabingelela." 
James1:2 Kubaleni njenge ntokozo yonke, bazalwane bami, nxa liwela ezilingweni ezizinhlobonhlobo," 
James1:3 lisazi ukuthi ukuhlolwa kokholo lwenu kuveza ukubekezela; 
James1:4 kodwa ukubekezela kakube lomsebenzi opheleleyo, ukuze libe ngabapheleleyo liphelelisiwe, lingasileli ngalutho." 
James1:5 Njalo uba kukhona kini oswele inhlakanipho, kacele kuNkulunkulu ophanayo ngesihle kibo bonke, futhi kasoli, njalo uzayinikwa." 
James1:6 Kodwa kacele ekholweni engathandabuzi ngalutho; ngoba othandabuzayo unjengegagasi lolwandle eliqhutshwa ngumoya lizuliswe. 
James1:7 Ngoba lowomuntu kangacabangi ukuthi uzazuza ulutho eNkosini. 
James1:8 Indoda enhliziyombili kayijikamanga endleleni zayo zonke. 
James1:9 Lomzalwane ophansi kazincome ekuphakameni kwakhe; 
James1:10 lonothileyo ekuthotshisweni kwakhe; ngoba njengeluba lotshani uzadlula. 
James1:11 Ngoba ilanga liphuma lilokutshisa, libunise utshani, leluba labo liwohloke, lobuhle bokubonakala kwalo bunyamalale; ngokunjalo lesinothi sizanyamalala ezindleleni zaso." 
James1:12 Ibusisiwe indoda ebekezelela isilingo; ngoba isihloliwe izakwemukela umqhele wempilo, iNkosi eyawuthembisa kwabayithandayo." 
James1:13 Kakulamuntu olingwayo omele athi: Ngilingwa nguNkulunkulu; ngoba uNkulunkulu kalasilingo sokubi, laye uqobo kalingi muntu." 
James1:14 Kodwa ngulowo lalowo uyalingwa, lapho edonswa ehugwa ngezakhe inkanuko;" 
James1:15 kuthi lapho inkanuko isikhulelwe ibelethe isono; lesono lapho sesiphelele sizala ukufa. 
James1:16 Lingakhohliswa, bazalwane bami abathandekayo." 
James1:17 Sonke isipho esihle laso sonke isipho esipheleleyo sivela phezulu, sehla sivela kuYise wezibane, okungekho kuye ukuguquka, kumbe isithunzi sokuphenduka." 
James1:18 Ngokuthanda kwakhe wasizala ngelizwi leqiniso, ukuze sibe njengezithelo zokuqala zezidalwa zakhe." 
James1:19 Ngakho, bazalwane bami abathandekayo, wonke umuntu umele aphangise ukuzwa, aphuze ukukhuluma, aphuze ukuthukuthela;" 
James1:20 ngoba ukuthukuthela kwendoda kakwenzi ukulunga kukaNkulunkulu. 
James1:21 Ngakho selihlubule amanyala wonke lokwanda kakhulu kobubi, lemukele ngobumnene ilizwi eligxunyekiweyo, elilamandla okusindisa imiphefumulo yenu." 
James1:22 Kodwa banini ngabenzi belizwi, lingabi ngabezwayo kuphela, lizikhohlisa lina ngokwenu." 
James1:23 Ngoba uba umuntu engumuzwi welizwi futhi engesimenzi, yena ufanana lendoda ebuka ubuso bayo bemvelo esibukweni;" 
James1:24 ngoba iyazibuka, ibisisuka, ibisihle ikhohlwa ukuthi ibinjani." 
James1:25 Kodwa lowo okhangelisisa emlayweni opheleleyo, lowo owenkululeko, abesebambelela kuwo, yena engesimuzwi okhohlwayo kodwa engumenzi womsebenzi, lo uzakuba ngobusisiweyo ekwenzeni kwakhe." 
James1:26 Uba umuntu phakathi kwenu esithi uyakholwa, uba engalufaki itomu ulimi lwakhe, kodwa akhohlise inhliziyo yakhe, ukukholwa kwalowo kuyize." 
James1:27 Ukukholwa okuhlanzekileyo lokungangcoliswanga phambi kukaNkulunkulu ngitsho uBaba yilokhu, ukuhambela izintandane labafelokazi ekuhluphekeni kwabo, l okuzilondoloza engelasici ko ko mhlaba." 
James2:1 Bazalwane bami, kungeyisikho ngokubandlulula abantu libe lokholo lweNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu, iNkosi yenkazimulo." 
James2:2 Ngoba uba kungena emhlanganweni wenu indoda elendandatho yegolide lesembatho esikhazimulayo, besekungena longumyanga olesembatho esingcolileyo," 
James2:3 beselinanzelela ogqoke isembatho esikhazimulayo beselisithi kuye: Wena hlala lapha kuhle, beselisithi kongumyanga: Wena mana lapho; loba: Hlala lapha ngaphansi kwesenabelo senyawo zami;" 
James2:4 pho, kalibandlululi phakathi kwenu, njalo laba ngabahluleli abalemicabango emibi yini?" 
James2:5 Zwanini, bazalwane bami abathandekayo. UNkulunkulu kabakhethanga yini abayanga balumhlaba, benothile ekholweni, njalo bezindlalifa zombuso awuthembisayo kwabamthandayo?" 
James2:6 Kodwa lina libadumazile abayanga. Abanothileyo kabalicindezeli yini, njalo bona balidonsele ekwahlulelweni yini?" 
James2:7 Bona kabalihlambazi yini ibizo elihle elibizwa ngalo? 
James2:8 Uba liphelelisa umlayo wobukhosi, ngokombhalo othi: Wothanda umakhelwane wakho njengalokhu uzi thanda wena, lenza kuhle;" 
James2:9 kodwa uba libandlulula abantu, lenza isono, lilahlwa ngumlayo njengabaweqayo." 
James2:10 Ngoba loba ngubani ogcina umlayo wonke, kodwa akhubeke kokukodwa, uba lecala kuyo yonke." 
James2:11 Ngoba owathi: Ungafebi; wathi futhi: Ungabulali; uba-ke ungafebi, kodwa ubulala, usungumeqi womlayo." 
James2:12 Khulumani ngokunjalo lenze njalo, njengabazakwahlulelwa ngomlayo wenkululeko." 
James2:13 Ngoba ukwahlulelwa okungelasihawu kungokwalowo ongenzanga isihawu; njalo isihawu sizincoma kukho ukwahlulela. 
James2:14 Kusizani, bazalwane bami, uba umuntu esithi ulokholo, kodwa engelamisebenzi? Lolokholo lungamsindisa yini?" 
James2:15 Uba-ke umzalwane loba umzalwanekazi behambaze njalo beswela ukudla kwensuku ngensuku," 
James2:16 omunye wenu abesesithi kibo: Hambani ngokuthula, likhudumale lisuthe; kodwa engabaniki izinto ezidingwa ngumzimba, lokho kusizani?" 
James2:17 Kunjalo lokholo, uba lungelamisebenzi, lufile ngokwalo." 
James2:18 Kodwa omunye uzakuthi: Wena ulokholo, mina-ke ngilemisebenzi: Ngitshengisa ukholo lwakho ngaphandle kwemisebenzi yakho, lami emisebenzini yami ngizakutshengisa ukholo lwami." 
James2:19 Wena uyakholwa ukuthi uNkulunkulu munye; wenza kuhle; lamadimoni ayakholwa, njalo athuthumele." 
James2:20 Kodwa uyathanda ukwazi yini, O siphukuphuku, ukuthi ukholo olungelamisebenzi lufile?" 
James2:21 UAbrahama ubaba wethu kalungisiswanga yini ngemisebenzi, esenikele indodana yakhe uIsaka phezu kwelathi?" 
James2:22 Uyabona ukuthi ukholo lwalusebenza kanye lemisebenzi yakhe, lokuthi ukholo lwapheleliswa ngemisebenzi," 
James2:23 kwasekugcwaliswa umbhalo othi: LoAbrahama wakholwa uNkulunkulu, kwasekubalelwa kuye ukuthi kuyikulunga, wasebizwa ngokuthi ngumngane kaNkulunkulu." 
James2:24 Ngakho-ke liyabona ukuthi umuntu uyalungisiswa ngemisebenzi, futhi kungesikuthi ngokholo kuphela." 
James2:25 Ngokunjalo-ke loRahabi isifebe kalungisiswanga ngemisebenzi yini, esezemukele izithunywa, ese zi phumise ngenye indlela?" 
James2:26 Ngoba njengalokhu umzimba ngaphandle komoya ufile, ngokunjalo lokholo ngaphandle kwemisebenzi lufile." 
James3:1 Lingabi ngabafundisi abanengi, bazalwane bami, lisazi ukuthi sizakwemukela isigwebo esikhulu." 
James3:2 Ngoba sonke siyakhubeka ezintweni ezinengi. Uba umuntu engakhubeki elizwini, lowo uyindoda epheleleyo, elamandla okukhina lomzimba wonke." 
James3:3 Khangela, sifaka amatomu emilonyeni yamabhiza ukuze asilalele, sibe sesiqondisa umzimba wonke wawo kwenye indlela." 
James3:4 Khangela, lemikhumbi, lanxa imikhulu kangaka njalo iqhutshwa yimimoya elamandla, iyaqondiswa kwenye indlela ngephinyana nje, lapho isifiso somtshayeli esifuna khona." 
James3:5 Lunjalo lolimi luyisitho esincinyane, kanti luzincoma kakhulu. Khangela, umlilo omncinyane uyatshisa izigodo ezingakanani!" 
James3:6 Ulimi lalo lungumlilo, umhlaba wobubi; lunjalo ulimi lubekwe phakathi kwezitho zethu, lungcolisa umzimba wonke, luthungele indlela yempilo, njalo luthungelwa yisihogo." 
James3:7 Ngoba yonke imvelo yokubili izinyamazana lezinyoni, kokubili ezihuquzelayo lezidalwa zolwandle, iyathanjiswa njalo isithanjisiwe ngemvelo yabantu;" 
James3:8 kodwa ulimi kakulamuntu ongaluthambisa; luyibubi obungenqotshwe, lugcwele ubuhlungu obubulalayo." 
James3:9 Ngalo siyabonga uNkulunkulu ngitsho uBaba, langalo siqalekisa abantu abenziwe ngokufanana loNkulunkulu;" 
James3:10 emlonyeni ofananayo kuyaphuma ukubonga lenhlamba. Lezizinto kazifanelanga, bazalwane bami, zenzeke njalo."
